- ℹ️ Media-migrate builds SQL with interpolated table name `${name}` (web2-livestream-media-migrate.js:111,122,135,143,157). `name` is NOT user input — it comes from the hardcoded TABLES constant — so this is not an injection vector. Column names are also interpolated but sourced from a hardcoded cols li — `render.com/services/web2-livestream-media-migrate.js:110-158` → No action. Keep table/column identifiers strictly from internal constants; never accept them from request input.

**Ghi chú:** CONFIRMED: no setInterval/background poll re-introduced in web2-livestream-poller. start() is init-only; the \_loop/\_scheduleNext recursive timer is dead code (never seeded). The only setInterval in this unit is web2-reprocess-cron (a legitimate SePay reprocess cron with an overlap guard), not a livestream poll.; Timezone handling is CORRECT in both this unit (poller.\_utcMs appends Z for naive Pancake timestamps, poller.js:53-58) and the route helper parseUtcTs (web2-live-comments.js:171-182). No GMT+7 bug found here.; Pool usage is correct: poller upserts to web2Pool (web2Db); only the documented shared pancake_accounts read uses chatPool. media-migrate copies chatDb→web2Db as intended. reprocess-cron uses web2Pool||chatDbPool (acceptable — it processes web2 GD rows).; Cron overlap is guarded in BOTH web2-reprocess-cron (\_running) and media-migrate (\_running) and poller \_cycle (\_running). The unguarded surface is concurrent pollPostNow/pollNow on the same post (see bugs).; Idempotency: ensureConfigTable seeds with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING (idempotent). upsertComments uses ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE with COALESCE/NULLIF to avoid clobbering existing phone/address/name/avatar (good). media-migrate is idempotent but its count-based skip heuristic is not airtight (see bugs).; The biggest correctness risk is the DEDUP-KEY MISMATCH between the WS-direct id scheme (`conv.id_message_count`) and the poller id scheme (`postId_messageId`) — these two writers can store the same comment twice under different primary keys. Fix recommended before relying on pollNow/pollPostNow alongside the WS relay.

### services:wallet-money

Four Render backend services that own Web 2.0 customer-wallet money flow, fully isolated from Web 1.0 (web2Db pool, web2*\* tables only). web2-wallet-service.js is the credit/debit ledger (processDeposit/processWithdraw with FOR UPDATE row lock + sepay/manual idempotency + post-commit SSE emit). web2-wallet-isolation.js builds the web2*\* wallet schema at boot (own sequences, anti-double-credit partial unique indexes), guarding every legacy-table reference behind to_regclass since web2Db has no legacy tables. web2-sepay-matching.js inserts SePay webhook rows into web2_balance_history then matches them to a customer (QR / aggregate phone / prelink) and auto-credits the wallet, falling back to web2_pending_matches for ambiguity. web2-payment-signal-detector.js scans inbound Pancake messages for "CK XONG"/"ĐÃ CK" keywords and writes flag-only signals (no money). The whole chain is driven by the SePay webhook (fire-and-forget) plus a 10-min reprocess cron.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** web2-wallet-isolation.ensureSchema(web2Db) at boot: ALTER performed*by column FIRST, then to_regclass-guarded CREATE web2*_ tables LIKE legacy, own sequences with setval = max(legacy,web2)+10000, drop legacy mirror triggers, one-time backfill, build idx_web2_wallet_tx_unique_sepay + idx_web2_wallet_tx_unique_manual (only if no existing dups). \_ready flag makes it run once per process.; web2-sepay-matching.ensureSchema(web2Db) at boot: CREATE web2_balance_history, web2_payment_qr_codes, web2_pending_matches, match_method CHECK constraint, own id sequence. \_ready guard.; web2-payment-signal-detector.ensureSchema(web2Db) at boot (via routes/web2-payment-signals.js router.ensureSchema): CREATE web2_payment_signals + web2_customer_intents + indexes; idempotent ADD COLUMN migrations.; web2-reprocess-cron.startCron(web2Db, reprocessUnmatched) at boot: setInterval 10 min, \_running guard against overlap, calls reprocessUnmatched(db, 200).; web2WalletEvents EventEmitter created at module load, setMaxListeners(100); realtime-sse-web2 subscribes to web2:wallet:_ at boot.

| Control                                                                             | Handler                                             | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| processDeposit(db,phone,amount,sourceId,note,customerId,txDate,sepayId,performedBy) | web2-wallet-service.js:155                          | runWithTx: if sepayId, dup-check reference_type='sepay'; getOrCreateWallet + SELECT FOR UPDATE row lock; if manual sourceId also dup-check reference_type='balance_history'; compute balanceAfter; INSERT web2_wallet_transactions; UPDATE web2_customer_wallets.balance; register emitAfterCommit hook. On 23505 race (pool only) re-query and return alreadyProcessed. |
| processWithdraw(db,phone,amount,referenceType,referenceId,note,performedBy)         | web2-wallet-service.js:324                          | FOR UPDATE lock; throws if balance<amt; INSERT WITHDRAW tx; UPDATE balance; emitAfterCommit. NO idempotency dup-check on referenceId (relies on idx_web2_wallet_tx_unique_manual at DB level for manual/balance_history only).                                                                                                                                           |
| processWeb2Match(db,web2BhId,fetchWithTimeout)                                      | web2-sepay-matching.js:385                          | Loads row; skips if debt_added or not 'in'; prelink-credit if linked_customer_phone>=5; else extractIdentifier → QR lookup → aggregate phone search of web2_customers; single→gate(\_findActiveOrderByPhone)+processDeposit+UPDATE debt_added; multi→INSERT web2_pending_matches; runs OUTSIDE a transaction on the pool.                                                |
| resolveWeb2PendingMatch(db,pendingId,selectedPhone,selectedName,resolvedBy)         | web2-sepay-matching.js:920                          | BEGIN; SELECT pending FOR UPDATE + balance_history FOR UPDATE; rejects if debt_added already true; processDeposit(client,...) inside tx; if alreadyProcessed and held by other phone → throw (route to reassign); UPDATE balance_history + pending status='resolved'; COMMIT; audit AFTER commit.                                                                        |
| reprocessUnmatched(db,fetchWithTimeout,opts)                                        | web2-sepay-matching.js:1074                         | SELECT debt*added=FALSE and match_method NOT IN pending*\* LIMIT<=500; loops processWeb2Match per row sequentially; tallies matched/pending/no_match/errors. Called by cron AND POST /reprocess-unmatched route — can run concurrently with webhook.                                                                                                                     |
| insertWeb2BalanceHistory(db,webhookData)                                            | web2-sepay-matching.js:201                          | INSERT web2_balance_history ON CONFLICT(sepay_id) DO NOTHING; returns {id,isDuplicate}. raw_data stores full webhook JSON.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| handleIncoming(pool,data,notify)                                                    | web2-payment-signal-detector.js:255                 | detectPaymentKeyword; \_hasRecentSignal dedup 6h by psid+page (ANY status); \_resolveCustomer + \_matchOrder; INSERT web2_payment_signals; SSE notify web2:payment-signals. Flag-only, no money.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| handleIntent(pool,data,notify,createNotification)                                   | web2-payment-signal-detector.js:330                 | detectIntent (cancel/address/ship/view); dedup 6h; INSERT web2_customer_intents; createNotification + SSE web2:customer-intents.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| POST /api/web2/wallets/:phone/deposit                                               | routes/v2/web2-wallets.js:197 (requireWeb2AuthSoft) | \_findIdempotentTx pre-check on x-idempotency-key OUTSIDE tx (TOCTOU window), then processDeposit. performed_by from req.web2User.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| POST /api/web2/wallets/:phone/withdraw                                              | routes/v2/web2-wallets.js:151 (requireWeb2AuthSoft) | \_findIdempotentTx pre-check then processWithdraw; 400 on insufficient balance.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |

**Liên kết:** render.com/routes/sepay-webhook-core.js (\_processWeb2Path → insertWeb2BalanceHistory + processWeb2Match, fire-and-forget on web2Db), render.com/db/with-transaction.js (withTransaction + \_afterCommit hook queue used by emitAfterCommit), render.com/db/web2-customers-schema.js (searchWeb2CustomersByPhone — customer resolution), render.com/services/web2-content-extractor.js (extractIdentifier QR+phone candidates), render.com/services/web2-content-parser.js (scoreConfidence/decisionTier), render.com/services/web2-match-audit.js (audit log + revertMatch debit/credit), render.com/services/web2-msg-send-worker.js (sendSingleMessage — QR confirm message to customer), render.com/services/web2-ck-watcher.js (onNewSepayTx hook after match), render.com/services/web2-reprocess-cron.js (periodic reprocessUnmatched), render.com/routes/fast-sale-orders.js (applyWalletToUnpaidPbhs after credit; getWallet/processWithdraw), render.com/routes/web2-returns.js, native-orders.js (processDeposit/processWithdraw callers), render.com/routes/admin-web2-wallet-reset.js (calls processWeb2Match), render.com/routes/realtime-sse-web2.js (web2WalletEvents subscriber → SSE web2:wallet topics)

**SSE:** PUBLISH web2:wallet:update + web2:wallet:<phone> via web2WalletEvents EventEmitter — emitAfterCommit (web2-wallet-service.js:122). Fires inside withTransaction \_afterCommit hook (post-COMMIT, correct) OR process.nextTick fallback when db is a raw client (can fire BEFORE outer commit → stale read). No debounce here; consumer realtime-sse-web2 owns fan-out.; PUBLISH web2:balance-history {action:'new',id} from sepay-webhook-core \_processWeb2Path:60 (re-fetch pattern, no PII).; PUBLISH web2:payment-signals {action:'new',id,keyword,ts} (detector:315) and web2:customer-intents (detector:387). keyword is leaked but low-sensitivity; ids only otherwise.; No EventSource/listener lifecycle here (server side). web2WalletEvents listeners are added once by realtime-sse-web2 at boot; setMaxListeners(100) suggests awareness of accumulation but per-request subscribe/cleanup must be verified in realtime-sse-web2 (out of scope).

**console.log:** 52 — web2-sepay-matching.js:310-318 logs customer phone in GATE message ('${phone} không có đơn active') — PII (full phone) in Render logs; web2-sepay-matching.js:373 logs phone + conversation_id on QR confirm send; web2-sepay-matching.js:529 logs QR candidate codes (contain customer-name slug + TPOS partner id); web2-wallet-service.js:308 logs sepay_id on double-credit race avoidance; web2-payment-signal-detector.js:310 logs customer_name/psid + keyword + phone; sepay-webhook-core.js:384 logs raw webhook body substring(0,500) — contains bank content/customer transfer memo (PII) on every webhook; sepay-webhook-core.js:66 logs matched phone per tx

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `race` processWeb2Match runs OUTSIDE a DB transaction directly on the pool. The webhook path, POST /reprocess-unmatched, the 10-min cron, and admin-web2-wallet-reset can all call processWeb2Match(db, sameWeb2BhId) concurrently. The wallet CREDIT is protected by idx_web2_wallet_tx_unique_sepay (one sepay cr — `web2-sepay-matching.js:385,669-677,539` → Wrap processWeb2Match's row handling in withTransaction with SELECT ... FOR UPDATE on the web2_balance_history row at the top (re-check debt_added after lock), OR add a partial unique index on web2_pe
- 🟡 `race` Manual deposit idempotency has a TOCTOU gap when no x-idempotency-key is sent: \_findIdempotentTx pre-check runs on the pool BEFORE the transaction (routes/v2/web2-wallets.js:206). The service-level guard (processDeposit:216 dup-check after FOR UPDATE) only fires when sourceId is present; idx_web2_wa — `routes/v2/web2-wallets.js:204-233 + web2-wallet-service.js:216,253` → Require x-idempotency-key for manual deposits (reject 400 if absent) or generate a server-side key, so reference_id is never NULL and the unique index actually dedupes.
- 🟡 `race` emitAfterCommit falls back to process.nextTick when client lacks \_afterCommit (i.e. db passed as a raw PoolClient from an OUTER caller transaction, e.g. fast-sale-orders.js:94 passes a client). In that case the SSE wallet event fires on nextTick which can run BEFORE the outer transaction COMMITs → s — `web2-wallet-service.js:122-136` → When db is an outer client, push the emit onto that client's \_afterCommit queue if present; if the outer caller did not create one, document that callers passing a client MUST provide \_afterCommit, or
- 🟡 `logic` reprocessUnmatched stats mis-classify gated transactions. \_gateBlock returns {success:false,...} so a 'no active order' gated row is counted as no_match, and on the NEXT cron tick it is re-selected (debt_added still FALSE, match_method='pending_no_order' is not in the excluded pending list) and re-p — `web2-sepay-matching.js:1083 (NOT IN list omits 'pending_no_order') + 311 (sets m` → Add 'pending_no_order' to the reprocess exclusion list, or skip rows re-tried within a backoff window; reconsider whether gated rows should keep retrying at all.
- 🟡 `race` \_findActiveOrderByPhone 'latest campaign' gate uses DISTINCT ON (fb_page_id) ORDER BY created_at DESC over native_orders to decide which campaign is 'live'. Under concurrent order inserts this latest-campaign snapshot can flip between two near-simultaneous campaigns, so the same SePay transfer's aut — `web2-sepay-matching.js:267-299` → Anchor 'live campaign' to an explicit campaign-active flag rather than max(created_at); assert the pool is web2Db.
- ⚪ `data-loss` In processWeb2Match the single-match credit path: if processDeposit succeeds (money credited) but the subsequent UPDATE web2_balance_history SET debt_added=TRUE (line 615) throws (e.g. transient DB error), the money is in the wallet but the row stays debt_added=FALSE → next reprocess/cron run re-ent — `web2-sepay-matching.js:604-668` → Do the deposit and the balance_history UPDATE in one withTransaction so they commit atomically (or are both rolled back).
- ⚪ `logic` detectPaymentKeyword rejects any message containing '?' to avoid questions, but a customer who writes 'đã CK rồi nhé? cảm ơn' (rhetorical) is dropped — minor false-negative. Also normalize() strips the '?' only for keyword regex but the '?' guard runs on rawText; inconsistent (intent detection has n — `web2-payment-signal-detector.js:48` → Lower priority; consider requiring the '?' to be adjacent to the keyword rather than anywhere in the message.
- ⚪ `perf` reprocessUnmatched can be triggered by BOTH the 10-min cron and the client-facing POST /reprocess-unmatched route with no shared lock between them (the cron's \_running guard only protects the cron's own interval, not the route). Two reprocess passes over the same LIMIT 200 rows run the same processW — `web2-sepay-matching.js:1074 + web2-reprocess-cron.js:41` → Add an advisory lock (pg_try_advisory_lock) keyed to a constant around reprocessUnmatched so cron + route + webhook serialize.
- ℹ️ `tpos-coupling` No TPOS API dependency remains in matching (comments at 27,552 confirm TPOS removed; customer resolution uses web2*customers). web2_payment_qr_codes still stores TPOS partner_id inside qr_code string but does not call TPOS. Web 1.0 coupling: matching reads ONLY web2*\* tables on the web2Db pool — cor — `web2-sepay-matching.js:27,552` → No action; isolation is correct.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟡 processWeb2Match (and thus auto-credit of real wallet money) runs with NO auth gate — it is reachable from the SePay webhook (API-key gated upstream) but also from POST /reprocess-unmatched and admin-web2-wallet-reset. The service itself trusts any caller. Acceptable since callers are server-interna — `routes/v2/web2-wallets.js:151,197 + middleware/web2-auth.js:132` → Confirm WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1 is set in prod (MEMORY says enabled 13/06). For money endpoints prefer requireWeb2Auth (hard) over Soft so a missing env can never expose credit/debit.
- ⚪ PII (full customer phone numbers, transfer memo content, customer names) written to Render logs across all four files. Logs persist and may be shared in screenshots/support. — `web2-sepay-matching.js:310,373,529; sepay-webhook-core.js:384; web2-payment-sign` → Mask phone (keep last 3-4 digits) and avoid logging raw webhook body/content; log sepay_id + row id only.
- ⚪ resolveWeb2PendingMatch accepts selectedPhone/selectedName/resolvedBy from the request; selectedName is stored to display_name and later rendered. No length cap on selectedName/selectedPhone here (only verifiedBy is sliced to 100). Stored-XSS risk depends on frontend escaping balance-history display — `web2-sepay-matching.js:996-1008` → Validate selectedPhone with /^0\d{9}$/ and cap selectedName length server-side; ensure frontend renders via textContent.
- ℹ️ All SQL is parameterized (searchWeb2CustomersByPhone, all INSERT/UPDATE) — no SQL injection found. ensureSchema string-interpolates only a static seq/table allow-list (web2-wallet-isolation.js:138-146), not user input. — `web2-wallet-isolation.js:144` → No action; keep the table/seq list hardcoded.
- ℹ️ web2WalletEvents.setMaxListeners(100) — if realtime-sse-web2 adds a listener per SSE connection without removeListener on disconnect, listeners leak past 100 and emits slow down. Cleanup is owned by realtime-sse-web2 (out of scope) but worth verifying. — `web2-wallet-service.js:29` → Verify the SSE hub subscribes once (singleton) and re-broadcasts, not once-per-client.

**Ghi chú:** ensureSchema cross-table-reference bug noted in FOCUS is correctly mitigated: web2-wallet-isolation.js wraps every legacy-table reference (customer_wallets/wallet_transactions/wallet_adjustments) in to_regclass DO-blocks and per-table try/catch, and ALTERs performed_by FIRST before the LIKE-legacy CREATE block, so a missing legacy table on web2Db no longer aborts the whole schema build. The outer catch deliberately does NOT throw (keeps Web 1.0 alive).; Anti-double-credit is layered: idx_web2_wallet_tx_unique_sepay (sepay deposits) + idx_web2_wallet_tx_unique_manual (manual/balance_history) + FOR UPDATE row lock + processDeposit 23505 recovery. The gap is the multi-match pending_match insert and NULL-reference_id manual deposits (see bugs).; Timezone: services store epoch (Date.now()) and TIMESTAMP/TIMESTAMPTZ; created_at uses COALESCE($txDate, NOW()) — NOW() resolves to server TZ Asia/Saigon. No naive-string parsing of Pancake timestamps in these four files, so the GMT+7 traps documented elsewhere do not apply here. inserted_at handling lives upstream.; resolveWeb2PendingMatch is the best-built path: real transaction, FOR UPDATE on both pending and balance_history, debt_added guard, alreadyProcessed cross-phone check routing to reassign, audit AFTER commit. processWeb2Match's auto path should adopt the same transactional pattern.; Idempotency dedupe keys: sepay path keys on reference_id WHERE reference_type='sepay'; manual path keys on (reference_id,type). Both correct; the weak point is NULL reference_id for keyless manual deposits.

## Shared

### shared:bootstrap

The shared bootstrap loaded on every Web 2.0 page. web2-auth.js declares the single source-of-truth base-URL config (WEB2_CONFIG → window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG), the localStorage token store ('web2_auth'), the authHeaders() helper that attaches x-web2-token, and a self-running client-side page guard. web2-sidebar.js renders the hardcoded NAV tree and, critically, auto-injects ~15 shared scripts (Popup, Web2Auth, Command Palette, Lottie, PWA, notification-system, api-fetch, jwt-utils, etc.) plus a mobile CSS link and a health-monitor script. page-builder.js (Web2Page.mount) constructs generic CRUD list pages (header/toolbar/filter/table/pagination/modal) backed by Web2Api.forEntity, with optimistic delete, a double-submit guard on save, and SSE refresh on web2:<slug>. web2-api.js is the generic /api/web2/:entity client; web2-api-fetch.js is the dedup'd JSON fetch+auth+dual-base-fallback; web2-jwt-utils.js decodes JWTs client-side; web2-deeplink.js builds cross-page URLs by name; modules-manifest.js + web2-menu.json are generated/static reference data not fetched at runtime.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** web2-auth.js runs guardPage() immediately at module load (web2-auth.js:241): redirects to /web2/login if no valid localStorage token — pure client-side, no server verify; web2-auth.js sets window.WEB2_CONFIG + merges window.API_CONFIG (worker/render base URLs) at load (web2-auth.js:30-53); web2-sidebar.js injectMobileCss() IIFE appends <link> web2-mobile.css?v=20260619a to <head> (web2-sidebar.js:42-53); web2-sidebar.js autoLoadSharedModules() IIFE injects up to ~15 sibling scripts with async=false in load order: popup.js, delivery-method-picker.js, web2-auth.js, web2-command-palette.js, web2-lottie.js, web2-pwa.js, notification-system.js, web2-escape.js, web2-format.js, web2-api-fetch.js, web2-notify.js, web2-phone-utils.js, web2-text-utils.js, web2-jwt-utils.js, web2-avatar-utils.js, web2-image-lightbox.js (web2-sidebar.js:58-103); web2-sidebar.js bottom IIFE injects shared/js/service-health-monitor.js (Web1+Web2 infra) guarded by window.\_\_n2HealthMonitorLoaded (web2-sidebar.js:677-692); Web2Sidebar.mount() renders NAV + user footer; if Web2Auth not yet loaded, starts a setInterval poll every 100ms up to 20 attempts to re-render footer (web2-sidebar.js:614-626); mount() injects mobile hamburger button + scrim and binds open/close + auto-close-on-nav listeners (web2-sidebar.js:636-659); page-builder Web2Page.mount() renders skeleton, binds toolbar/search/filter/modal/checkbox listeners, a document-level keydown(Escape) listener, subscribes Web2SSE 'web2:<slug>', then calls load() for first fetch (page-builder.js:660-711)

| Control                                                        | Handler                                                          | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| -------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Web2Auth.getStored/storeLogin/clear                            | web2-auth.js:59-96                                               | Read/write/remove localStorage 'web2_auth' {token,expiresAt,user}; getStored auto-clears + returns null when expiresAt<now                                                                |
| Web2Auth.verify()                                              | web2-auth.js:98-123                                              | GET {worker}/api/web2-users/me?token=<token> (token in QUERY STRING); on !ok or no user clears + returns null; else re-stores refreshed user; on network error returns cached stored.user |
| Web2Auth.authHeaders(extra)                                    | web2-auth.js:196-201                                             | Returns {...extra, x-web2-token:<token>} when token present — the canonical write-auth header helper                                                                                      |
| Web2Auth.requireAuth(opts)                                     | web2-auth.js:154-172                                             | awaits verify(); if no user redirects to login?next=...; permission check via can() only warns, still returns user (caller must enforce). NOTE: exported but no page calls it             |
| Web2Auth.logout()                                              | web2-auth.js:174-191                                             | POST {worker}/api/web2-users/logout {token}; clear(); redirect to loginUrl()                                                                                                              |
| Web2Auth.guardPage()                                           | web2-auth.js:212-223                                             | client-only gate: skip on /web2/login/ or window.\_\_WEB2_GUARD_OFF; if getStored() falsy then location.replace(loginUrl()+?next). No server check — bypassable by forging localStorage   |
| Sidebar group header click                                     | web2-sidebar.js:498 inline onclick                               | toggles .is-open on the group div (expand/collapse)                                                                                                                                       |
| Sidebar 'soon' item click                                      | Web2Sidebar.alertSoon (web2-sidebar.js:662-667)                  | shows notificationManager/Popup/alert 'chua lam'                                                                                                                                          |
| Sidebar collapse toggle button                                 | setCollapsed (web2-sidebar.js:517-524)                           | toggles body.web2-sidebar-collapsed + persists localStorage web2SidebarCollapsed                                                                                                          |
| Sidebar login button (logged-out footer)                       | web2-sidebar.js:555-560                                          | navigates to loginUrl()?next=<current>                                                                                                                                                    |
| Sidebar logout button                                          | web2-sidebar.js:586-589                                          | calls Web2Auth.logout({redirect:true})                                                                                                                                                    |
| Web2Api.forEntity(slug).list/get/create/update/remove          | web2-api.js:45-90                                                | fetch {worker}/api/web2/<slug>/(list\|get\|create\|update\|delete) with Accept+x-web2-token; create/update attach Web2UserInfo audit fields; throws Error(data.error\|\|HTTP n) on !ok    |
| Web2ApiFetch.json / withFallback                               | web2-api-fetch.js:39-78                                          | single JSON fetch with auth headers, content-type-aware parse, Error(.status/.body); withFallback tries WEB2_API then WORKER_URL bases                                                    |
| page-builder Them moi / Sua                                    | openCreate/openEdit (page-builder.js:381-407)                    | opens modal, renders form fields, focuses first field                                                                                                                                     |
| page-builder Luu (save modal)                                  | saveModal (page-builder.js:579-613)                              | validates required, disables save btn (double-submit guard), awaits api.update or api.create, notify, closeModal, load(). No optimistic apply (await-then-render)                         |
| page-builder Xoa row                                           | removeRecord (page-builder.js:614-658)                           | Popup.danger confirm then optimistic splice via Web2Optimistic.run({snapshot,apply,run:api.remove,rollback}); fallback path apply()+api.remove().catch(rollback)                          |
| page-builder Ap dung/Xoa loc/Tai lai/search/limit/activeFilter | applyFilters/clearFilters/load (page-builder.js:357-378,660-675) | mutates STATE.search/activeOnly/limit/page then load() refetches                                                                                                                          |
| page-builder pagination/check-all/ref-picker                   | goPage/renderForm ref wiring (page-builder.js:374-378,476-566)   | goPage clamps + load(); check-all toggles row checks; ref input debounce 220ms then refApi.list dropdown                                                                                  |
| Web2Deeplink.url.\* / linkBtn / go / param                     | web2-deeplink.js:52-99                                           | builds <root>web2/<page>/index.html?<param=enc(name)> URLs; linkBtn returns <a> HTML; go navigates or opens \_blank noopener                                                              |

**Liên kết:** Injects/depends on shared modules: popup.js, delivery-method-picker.js, web2-command-palette.js, web2-lottie.js, web2-pwa.js, web2-escape.js, web2-format.js, web2-notify.js, web2-phone-utils.js, web2-text-utils.js, web2-avatar-utils.js, web2-image-lightbox.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-optimistic.js, shared/js/notification-system.js + shared/js/service-health-monitor.js (Web 1.0 shared, cross-layer), Render/worker routes: /api/web2-users/{me,logout}, /api/web2/<slug>/{list,get,create,update,delete} via chatomni-proxy worker; fallback web2-api-kv04.onrender.com, NAV links to ~40 web2 pages incl native-orders/, so-order/, live-chat/ (chat.html, comments-mobile.html), web2/overview, web2/products, web2/reconcile, web2/supplier-wallet, web2/customers, etc., Web2Deeplink targets: web2/supplier-wallet, web2/supplier-debt, so-order, web2/products, native-orders, web2/reconcile

**SSE:** page-builder subscribes Web2SSE 'web2:<config.slug>' on mount (page-builder.js:695-708); 600ms debounce coalesces burst then load(); unsubscribe stored in \_sseUnsubscribe and torn down only if caller invokes returned destroy() (page-builder.js:718-724); LEAK RISK: pages that never call destroy() (e.g. product-category, delivery-zone call mount once and discard the return) keep the SSE subscription + the document-level keydown(Escape) listener for page lifetime — fine for single-mount pages, but a leak if mount() is ever re-invoked on the same root (re-subscribe + duplicate keydown listener, no removeEventListener); No SSE published by this unit; bootstrap only consumes web2:<entity> topics (correct Web 2.0 hub, not bare snake_case)

**console.log:** 6 — web2-auth.js:166 console.warn logs username + missing permission ('[Web2Auth] User <username> lacks <slug>.<action>') — minor PII (username) in console; page-builder.js:700 console.log emits SSE action+record code on every realtime event (debug noise, not PII); page-builder.js:66 console.log fallback notify (debug noise when notificationManager absent); web2-auth.js:86,120 console.warn store/verify failures — benign; page-builder.js:454 console.warn missing ref slug — dev noise

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `memory-leak` document-level keydown(Escape) listener added on every page-builder mount() (page-builder.js:684) is NEVER removed — destroy() only tears down SSE (page-builder.js:718-724). On single-mount pages this is harmless, but any page that re-mounts Web2Page on the same/another root stacks duplicate keydown — `web2/shared/page-builder.js:684-687, 718-724` → Hoist the keydown handler to a named const, addEventListener it, and removeEventListener it inside destroy(); or scope the listener to the modal element instead of document.
- 🟡 `race` Sidebar footer setInterval poll (100ms x20) for Web2Auth (web2-sidebar.js:617-625) races with web2-auth.js load. If Web2Auth loads but the user object arrives only after verify() refresh, the footer renders the logged-out state and never re-renders (poll stops on first Web2Auth presence, before veri — `web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js:614-626` → Re-render footer after Web2Auth.verify() resolves (event/callback) rather than a fixed-count interval that stops at object presence.
- 🟡 `race` page-builder optimistic delete rollback restores at a possibly-wrong index after a concurrent SSE reload. removeRecord snapshots idx from STATE.records (page-builder.js:623), but a 600ms-debounced SSE reload (or another delete) can replace STATE.records between apply() and rollback(); rollback splic — `web2/shared/page-builder.js:614-658` → On rollback, re-find by code or just call load() to resync; let load() be the source of truth for STATE.total instead of optimistic +/-1 math.
- 🟡 `race` page-builder load() guards with STATE.loading (page-builder.js:331) so a rapid Ap dung/search burst drops intermediate requests, but there is NO request-sequence token: a slow earlier list() can resolve AFTER a faster later one and overwrite STATE.records with stale data (out-of-order fetch). The wi — `web2/shared/page-builder.js:330-355` → Tag each load() with an incrementing requestId; ignore the response if a newer load() started (if(reqId!==STATE.lastReqId) return).
- ⚪ `logic` saveModal edit path discards the 'code' field and only sends {name,data} (page-builder.js:600). Any non-code/non-name top-level field configured as a form field that isn't under data._ is silently dropped on update (setPath into payload then not forwarded). Create sends full payload, update does not — `web2/shared/page-builder.js:579-605` → Forward the full mutated payload (minus immutable code) on update, or document that only name+data._ are editable.
- ⚪ `logic` web2-auth.js verify() swallows network failure ambiguously: on fetch network error it returns the cached stored.user (web2-auth.js:121), so a user whose token was revoked server-side but offline-cached still passes requireAuth client-side. Acceptable for a UX-only guard, but 'logged in' UI can outli — `web2/shared/web2-auth.js:119-122` → Acceptable given server-side write enforcement; no change required if read routes also enforce auth.
- ⚪ `perf` web2-api-fetch withFallback tries WEB2_API (render, cold-start prone) BEFORE WORKER_URL (web2-api-fetch.js:62-63). The worker is documented as absorbing Render cold-start 502s and being the standard path, yet the fallback order hits the slow render base first. If render is asleep, the first attempt — `web2/shared/web2-api-fetch.js:61-78` → Order bases [WORKER_URL, WEB2_API] to match the 'worker is the standard path' intent, or add an AbortController timeout on the first base.
- ℹ️ `other` web2-jwt-utils.decode does NOT verify signature (documented), and isExpired returns true when exp is missing (web2-jwt-utils.js:81) — callers using this to gate token reuse will treat exp-less but otherwise valid tokens as expired. Confirm Pancake/Zalo tokens always carry exp before relying on isExp — `web2/shared/web2-jwt-utils.js:72-84` → No change needed if all consumed tokens carry exp; otherwise add an explicit hasExp() check at call sites.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 Stored XSS in sidebar user footer: escapeHtml() at web2-sidebar.js:344-349 uses textContent->innerHTML round-trip which escapes < > & but NOT double-quote. The escaped username/displayName are then placed into ATTRIBUTE context title="${username}" and title="${displayName} (${username})" (web2-sideb — `web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js:344-349, 572-574` → Replace the sidebar's local escapeHtml with the 5-char escaper used in page-builder.js:35-44 (also escape " and '), or reuse window.Web2Escape.escapeHtml. Never place attribute values through a textCo
- 🟡 Auth token sent in URL query string: verify() does GET /api/web2-users/me?token=<token>. Tokens in query strings leak into server access logs, proxy/CDN logs, Referer headers, and browser history. This runs whenever verify()/requireAuth is invoked. — `web2/shared/web2-auth.js:102` → Send the token via Authorization header or x-web2-token header instead of ?token=; the project already standardizes on x-web2-token for writes.
- 🟡 Client-side page guard is purely cosmetic and trivially bypassable: guardPage() only checks localStorage 'web2_auth' presence + non-expired expiresAt (no signature/server validation). A user can set localStorage.web2_auth={token:'x',expiresAt:<future>} to pass the guard and render every page shell. — `web2/shared/web2-auth.js:212-223` → Acceptable as UX-only only if every read endpoint also enforces x-web2-token server-side; document that the guard is not a security boundary and ensure data-bearing GET routes require auth (not just w
- ⚪ Web2Deeplink.linkBtn() interpolates opt.url and opt.label into HTML without escaping: href="${opt.url}" and <span>${opt.label||''}</span> (web2-deeplink.js:94-95). Current callers pass enc()-encoded URLs + empty/static labels so no live break-out, but it is a latent injection sink if any caller late — `web2/shared/web2-deeplink.js:87-97` → HTML-escape opt.url and opt.label inside linkBtn (title is already quote-escaped); do not rely on callers to pre-encode.
- ⚪ PII (username) written to console on permission failure. — `web2/shared/web2-auth.js:165-167` → Drop username from the log line or gate behind a debug flag.
- ℹ️ Cache-version drift: pages load web2-auth.js?v=20260613guard directly, but if a page omits it the sidebar auto-injects web2-auth.js?v=20260518a (stale). Mixed versions across pages can serve different guard/config logic. — `web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js:74` → Centralize a single ?v= version constant for shared modules so direct-load and auto-load agree.

**Ghi chú:** web2-menu.json is a static 2026-04-25 crawl of the TPOS sidebar and is NOT fetched at runtime — the live NAV is hardcoded in web2-sidebar.js:108-341. Reference data only (no TPOS API coupling at runtime).; modules-manifest.js is auto-generated (only 2 entries currently) and not consumed by the in-scope bootstrap files.; No TPOS API or Web 1.0 pool/table coupling found in this unit. All routes target /api/web2\*. The only cross-layer dependency is auto-loading shared/js/notification-system.js and shared/js/service-health-monitor.js, which are intentionally Web1+Web2 shared infra.; Timezone handling is correct: page-builder.fmtTime pins Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh (page-builder.js:71-84) and prefers Web2Format.dateTime; no naive new Date(naiveString) on server-naive strings in these files.; Write-auth is correctly attached: web2-api.js.\_authHeaders, web2-api-fetch.authHeaders, and Web2Auth.authHeaders all inject x-web2-token from localStorage. Generic CRUD create/update/delete go through these, so WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE writes won't silent-401 from this unit.; page-builder save has a working double-submit guard (disable #w2pModalSave during await, page-builder.js:595-611) and delete uses Web2Optimistic with rollback.

### shared:chat

test

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `logic` Reply-to is silently dropped: doSend passes adapter.send with replyToId but buildPancakeAdapter.send destructures only text and attachment, so replyToId never reaches Web2Chat.sendMessage which supports opts.repliedMessageId. — `web2-customer-chat-core.js:360 vs web2-chat-panel-compose.js:68 and web2-chat-ap` → Forward replyToId through buildPancakeAdapter.send and \_performSend into sendMessage as repliedMessageId.
- 🟡 `race` Compose send has no in-flight guard and no send-button disable; a double Send-button click in the same tick can call adapter.send twice. Web2Optimistic.run has no busy lock. Also tempId from Date.now collides on same-millisecond sends and \_convCache caches a conv mutated in place by adapters so re-o — `web2-chat-panel-compose.js:21-88` → Add a per-instance sending flag set in doSend and cleared in onSuccess and rollback; disable the send button while sending; use a uuid for tempId; clone the conv before use.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟡 JWT is embedded in the fb-avatar image URL querystring (token=jwt) used as an img src; leaks via Referer, history, proxy and CDN logs. Also attachment URLs go into anchor href and media src after only esc with no scheme check so a javascript or data url could execute on click. — `web2-customer-chat-core.js:454` → Resolve the avatar server-side via the session token; allowlist http https blob schemes before emitting href or src.

### shared:commerce

Shared Web 2.0 commerce toolkit: receipt/bill generation (Web2Bill, 72mm thermal HTML/CSS with QR/Code128, image export, iframe printing), multi-printer management with ESC/POS + TSPL raster over a localhost print-bridge (Web2Printer), a POS installer .bat generator (Web2PosInstaller), a return-bill collector (NativeReturnBill), So Order reader/parser utilities (Web2SoOrder, Web2SoOrderUtils), two SePay CK reconciliation pickers (Web2CkAssignPicker, Web2CkReview), a Vietnam-address delivery-method picker (DeliveryMethodPicker), and a vendored ReceiptLine library. These shared modules are consumed by native-orders, fastsaleorder-invoice, printer-settings, purchase-refund, supplier-debt and balance-history. All correctly sit on the Web 2.0 layer (web2:_ SSE topics, /api/web2_ routes, x-web2-token on writes); no TPOS or Web 1.0 pool/table coupling found.</summary> <parameter name="loadsOnEnter">["web2-printer.js IIFE boot: seeds _printers from localStorage (web2_printers_cache), then _migrateToServer() (one-time push of legacy local printers) + loadPrinters() (GET /api/web2/printer/list?limit=200, credentials:omit, unauthenticated read)","web2-printer.js:698-701: Web2SSE.subscribe('web2:printer') -> loadPrinters() (never unsubscribed; acceptable for a singleton service)","web2-ck-review.js:491: injectCss() appends <style id=w2ck-style> at module load","delivery-method-picker.js: lazy - fetchFromBackend (GET /api/web2/deliveryzone/list) only fires on pickAsync/pickRobust/getOptionsAsync, geocodeGoong only on pickRobust","Web2Bill / NativeReturnBill / Web2SoOrder / Web2SoOrderUtils / Web2PosInstaller / Web2CkAssignPicker: no boot work, expose API only (idempotent guards on global.*)","receiptline.js: vendored Apache-2.0 lib, defines window.receiptline.transform, no boot side effects"]

| Control                                                            | Handler                                    | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Web2Bill.generateHTML(pbh, opts)                                   | generateHTML web2-bill-service.js:415      | Builds 72mm thermal bill HTML. Money: subtotal=totals.untaxed, discount, shipping=delivery.price, finalTotal=totals.total OR subtotal-discount+shipping, prepaid=payment.amount, cod=payment.residual OR max(0,finalTotal-prepaid). sellerName overridden by logged-in Web2UserInfo. All customer fields escaped via \_esc/\_nl2br. |
| Web2Bill.openPrint(pbh, opts)                                      | openPrint web2-bill-service.js:562         | If Web2Printer has a bridge printer for role 'pbh' and opts.method!=='dialog': calls printBillHtml(html,'pbh') and toasts; on error falls back to \_printViaIframe. Else prints via reused hidden iframe.                                                                                                                           |
| Web2Bill.openCombinedPrint(pbhs, opts)                             | openCombinedPrint web2-bill-service.js:590 | Regex-extracts <style> and <body> from per-bill HTML, joins with page-break divs, prints via \_printViaIframe (dialog only, never bridge).                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Web2Bill.openPreview(pbh, opts)                                    | openPreview web2-bill-service.js:614       | Renders bill into a modal iframe; 'In bill' button calls opts.onPrint(pbh) or openPrint; close via X/backdrop/Esc. Does NOT touch print_count.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Web2Bill.generateImage(pbh, opts)                                  | generateImage web2-bill-service.js:687     | Renders bill in hidden iframe, html2canvas->JPEG, progressively re-encodes to stay <480KB. Throws if html2canvas missing (iframe cleaned up in catch).                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Web2Printer.upsertPrinter(p)                                       | upsertPrinter web2-printer.js:130          | POST /create or PATCH /update/:id to /api/web2/printer with \_w2Auth (x-web2-token), then loadPrinters(). Server-shared printer list.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Web2Printer.removePrinter(id)                                      | removePrinter web2-printer.js:167          | DELETE /api/web2/printer/delete/:id with \_w2Auth, strips matching roles from localStorage, reloads.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Web2Printer.printBillHtml(html, roleKey)                           | printBillHtml web2-printer.js:631          | escposRasterFromHtmlPhysical(ss:3, coverage:0.14) -> ESC/POS GS v 0 raster -> printEscpos -> POST bridgeUrl(localhost:17777)/print {ip,port,b64}.                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Web2Printer.printHtml(html, roleKey)                               | printHtml web2-printer.js:621              | Label printers (paper==='label' or lang==='tspl') -> TSPL BITMAP stream; else ESC/POS physical-mm raster. POST to bridge.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Web2Printer.testConnection / bridgeAlive                           | web2-printer.js:658/647                    | POST bridge/tcp-test (raw IP:port to printer) / GET bridge/health (1.5s timeout).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Web2PosInstaller.downloadInstaller / renderButtons                 | web2-pos-installer.js:106/130              | Generates cai-may-pos.bat (downloads print-bridge.ps1 + vieneu setup.ps1 from siteRoot, registers Startup autorun) and triggers browser download. Uninstaller kills processes + removes startup VBS.                                                                                                                                |
| NativeReturnBill.collect(phone)                                    | web2-return-bill.js:37                     | GET /api/web2-returns/queued-by-phone/:phone, shows Popup.confirm; returns {returnLines, returnCodes} (0d lines) to attach to /from-native-order, or null.                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Web2SoOrder.load()                                                 | web2-so-order-reader.js:36                 | GET /api/web2-so-order/get with x-web2-token; returns data object or null. Postgres-backed (post-C8, no Firestore).                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Web2SoOrderUtils.parseReceivedItems / groupByOrder / orderGroupKey | web2-so-order-utils.js:42/96/30            | Flattens tabs->shipments->rows; group key = supplier + '::' + (shipmentId\|\|''). Must match purchase-refund \_orderGroupKey for over-refund guard.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Web2CkAssignPicker.open({phone,name,total,orderCode,onDone})       | web2-ck-assign-picker.js:237 / pick:197    | Modal lists balance-history NO_PHONE 'in' transactions; on click -> Popup.confirm -> PATCH /api/web2/balance-history/:id/link with x-web2-token (assigns phone + credits wallet); calls onDone.                                                                                                                                     |
| Web2CkReview.openSignalList / openReview                           | web2-ck-review.js:230/284                  | Lists pending payment-signals; openReview scores unassigned SePay tx, Approve POSTs /payment-signals/:id/approve (money op, await+disable, x-web2-token, optional notifyCustomer), Dismiss POSTs /dismiss. Subscribes web2:payment-signals and web2:balance-history.                                                                |
| DeliveryMethodPicker.pick / pickOffline / pickRobust(address)      | delivery-method-picker.js:143/417/556      | Normalizes VN address (diacritics, Q.1->quan 1), keyword/fuzzy(Levenshtein) zone match + province detection; pickRobust cross-validates with Goong geocode (GET /api/web2/geocode). Returns option+confidence.                                                                                                                      |

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-printer.js (Web2Bill bridge printing), web2/shared/receiptline.js (vendored, loaded by fastsaleorder-invoice + printer-settings), web2/shared/web2-qr.js (Web2QR for bill QR), web2/shared/jsbarcode-code128.min.js + qrcode.min.js (bill code rendering), web2/shared/popup.js (window.Popup in return-bill + ck pickers), web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE in printer + ck-review), web2/shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders / API_CONFIG), web2/shared/web2-wallet-balance.js (Web2WalletBalance pills in ck-review), native-orders/index.html (consumes Web2Bill + NativeReturnBill + ck pickers), web2/fastsaleorder-invoice/pbh-actions.js (Web2Bill), web2/printer-settings/index.html (Web2Printer + Web2PosInstaller), web2/purchase-refund + supplier-debt (Web2SoOrderUtils), Render routes: /api/web2/printer/\* (web2-generic), /api/web2/balance-history/:id/link, /api/web2/payment-signals/:id/approve|dismiss, /api/web2-returns/queued-by-phone, /api/web2-so-order/get, /api/web2/deliveryzone/list, /api/web2/geocode, print-bridge: scripts/print-bridge.ps1 (localhost:17777 TCP relay to printer:9100)

**SSE:** web2-printer.js subscribes 'web2:printer' -> loadPrinters() (no debounce, no unsubscribe; singleton); web2-ck-review.js subscribeRefresh: 'web2:payment-signals' (openSignalList) and 'web2:balance-history' (openReview) -> 500ms debounce -> pager.load(true); unsub stored in ov.\_subs and called on closeOverlay (cleaned up); web2-ck-assign-picker.js: NO SSE subscription (manual refresh only); No module publishes SSE directly (writes go to backend routes which \_notify)

**console.log:** 9 — web2-bill-service.js:58,87,111,535,576 - console.warn on barcode/QR/iframe-print failures (error messages only, no PII); web2-so-order-reader.js:46 - console.warn('[Web2SoOrder] load fail:', e.message) (no PII); web2-ck-review.js:52 - console.log('[ck-review]', msg) fallback toast (could surface customer-facing message text but only when notificationManager missing); delivery-method-picker.js:234,536 - console.warn on backend/Goong geocode failure (e.message only; address NOT logged); No tokens, phone numbers, or customer PII are logged in any module

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `memory-leak` openPreview adds a document-level 'keydown' listener (onKey) that only removes itself when Escape is pressed. Closing the preview via the X button, backdrop click, or 'In bill' button calls close() but never calls document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey). Each preview open leaks a keydown hand — `web2-bill-service.js:659-683` → In close() also call document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey); (move onKey declaration above close or store it so close can remove it).
- 🟡 `race` \_printViaIframe reuses a single shared \_printFrame. The 'printed' guard is per-call (local var), not per-frame. Two rapid openPrint/openCombinedPrint calls reuse the same iframe: the second doc.open()/write() can clobber the first document before its rAF/onload 'go' fires, so the first bill is never — `web2-bill-service.js:514-560` → Either serialize prints (queue), create a fresh iframe per print job, or key the printed-guard to the document instance and await completion before the next write.
- ⚪ `logic` shipmentId normalization differs between the two consumers of the over-refund grouping key. Web2SoOrderUtils.parseReceivedItems sets shipmentId = (sh.id != null ? sh.id : '') while orderGroupKey uses (it.shipmentId || ''); purchase-refund-api sets shipmentId = sh.id directly. Today sh.id is always a — `web2-so-order-utils.js:30-32,79; web2/purchase-refund/js/purchase-refund-api.js:` → Use String(sh.id ?? '') consistently in both and avoid || coercion in orderGroupKey (use ?? or explicit String) so any valid id (including 0) is preserved identically.
- ⚪ `logic` finalTotal fallback (totals.total || subtotal-discount+shipping) treats a legitimate totals.total of 0 as missing and recomputes. cod likewise uses payment.residual || max(0,finalTotal-prepaid); a real residual of 0 (fully paid) falls through to the computed value. For an already-paid order this is — `web2-bill-service.js:442-444` → Use Number.isFinite / != null checks (e.g. residual != null ? residual : max(...)) instead of || so an explicit 0 is respected.
- ⚪ `race` web2-ck-assign-picker search debounce timer (t) is declared inside ensureDom and not cleared on close(). If the user types then closes the modal before the 350ms timer fires, load() still runs against a now-hidden modal (writes into #w2capList). Harmless but wasteful; also \_el is a reused singleton — `web2-ck-assign-picker.js:144-154,157-161` → Clear the debounce timer in close() and/or guard load() with a check that \_ctx is still set / modal not hidden.
- ⚪ `logic` makePager.hasMore derivation: st.hasMore = d.meta?.hasMore ?? (st.offset + got.length < st.total). st.offset is incremented AFTER this expression by got.length, so the inline computation double-counts got.length (offset already includes prior pages, plus got.length added again here while the post-in — `web2-ck-review.js:213-216` → Compute hasMore from the pre-increment offset consistently: hasMore = (st.offset + got.length) < st.total then increment, or just use got.length === PAGE.
- ⚪ `bug` ck-assign-picker pick(): when a transaction is already linked to a different phone, the confirm dialog returns and then unconditionally returns again (lines 207-208), so even confirming 'continue/skip' does nothing. The double return makes the confirm pointless and the action a silent no-op. — `web2-ck-assign-picker.js:201-209` → Remove the redundant inner return or implement the intended 'skip' behavior; currently the confirm result is ignored.
- ⚪ `perf` \_fmtDate / dateStr in the bill use local getDate/getHours with no timezone pinning. Render server runs TZ=Asia/Saigon (+7), so server-rendered contexts are fine, but if generateHTML ever runs server-side under UTC or the PBH date string lacks a Z, the printed bill date could be off by hours. Browser — `web2-bill-service.js:219-234,461` → Format with Intl.DateTimeFormat({timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'}) to guarantee GMT+7 per Web 2.0 convention, and ensure incoming ISO has a Z.
- ℹ️ `other` \_renderCodeMarkup uses btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(svg))) to base64 the QR SVG — correct UTF-8-safe pattern. No bug, noted to confirm it was reviewed. — `web2-bill-service.js:83` → None.

**Security (audit):**

- ⚪ Unauthenticated GET reads expose SePay transaction memos (potential customer PII in bank content) and customer phones into the DOM; printer list read is also unauthenticated. — `web2-ck-assign-picker.js:49-59,170; web2-ck-review.js:205; web2-printer.js:109` → Ensure backend GET endpoints for balance-history/payment-signals require a session; add x-web2-token to reads for consistency.
- ⚪ Print-bridge receives stored bridgeUrl + arbitrary printer ip:port and opens a raw TCP socket; a tampered printer record could pivot the local relay (SSRF-ish). — `web2-printer.js:408-422,658-668` → Validate bridgeUrl is localhost and ip is a private LAN address before POSTing.
- ℹ️ POS installer .bat fetches PowerShell scripts from computed siteRoot and registers Startup autorun without SRI/signing. — `web2-pos-installer.js:40-83` → Pin to the production host rather than computed siteRoot to avoid execution from a spoofed origin.
- ℹ️ XSS surfaces (bill customer fields, CK tx content/names, linked phone) are all escaped via \_esc/\_nl2br/esc; no unescaped innerHTML of untrusted data. — `web2-bill-service.js:206-213; web2-ck-assign-picker.js:183-188; web2-ck-review.j` → None.

**Ghi chú:** receiptline.js (5355 lines) is vendored ReceiptLine (Apache-2.0); it is loaded by fastsaleorder-invoice and printer-settings but the actual bill template is the hand-rolled HTML/CSS in web2-bill-service.js (comment at :268 says it replaced ReceiptLine for box/frame drawing). Treat receiptline.js as third-party; do not hand-edit.; Printer list is server-shared (entity 'printer' via web2-generic), role assignment (which printer per function) is per-POS in localStorage web2_printer_roles — intentional split.; All modules are idempotent singletons (guard on global.\*); SSE cleanup is correct in ck-review (ov.\_subs) but printer SSE intentionally persists for the app lifetime.; No Web 1.0 / TPOS / chatDb coupling found; topics and routes are all web2-prefixed.; Backend write gating verified: web2-generic create/update/delete and balance-history/payment-signals mutations all use requireWeb2AuthSoft, and every client write path attaches x-web2-token.

### shared:data-caches

Eleven shared single-source modules for Web 2.0 data access. Web2ProductsCache (kho SP, IDB stale-while-revalidate + SSE web2:products), Web2SuppliersCache (NCC names from /api/web2-supplier-wallet + SSE web2:supplier-wallet), Web2CustomerStore (authoritative read/write to /api/web2/customers with strict /^0\d{9}$/ phone validation + x-web2-token), Web2CustomerLookup (back-compat shim → Web2CustomerStore), Web2IdbStore (generic IDB key-value), Web2PhoneUtils (canonical phone norm/validate), Web2ProductCode (auto product-code suggest), Web2ProductPicker (kho-SP picker overlay), and three Pancake helpers (accounts manager, JWT token monitor/auto-refresh via extension, Pancake customer fallback search). They are correctly Web 2.0 isolated (no TPOS API call, no chatDb/Web 1.0 table access; pancake_accounts table is intentionally shared with Web 1.0 per design). Phone validation is strict everywhere (no loose >=9), which is the headline correctness property the audit was hunting.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** Web2ProductsCache.init(): \_loadFromPersist() reads IDB db 'web2_cache' store 'kv' key 'products' (24h TTL); if hit → initialized=true + \_setupRealtime() (subscribe SSE web2:products) + emit 'persist-restore' + non-awaited background \_loadList() revalidate; if miss → await \_loadList() (paginated Web2ProductsApi.list page/limit=1000, cap 20 pages) then \_setupRealtime(); Web2SuppliersCache.init(): await \_loadFromServer() GET /api/web2-supplier-wallet/suppliers (no auth header on GET) → \_setNames; \_attachSse() subscribe web2:supplier-wallet (debounce 600ms→refresh); Web2CustomerStore: no auto-init; pure on-demand fetch helpers; subscribe(cb) wires SSE web2:customers on call; Web2IdbStore: lazy single IDB connection 'web2_kv_v1' store '\_default'; open(name,{migrateFromLs}) fires \_maybeMigrateFromLs (localStorage→IDB, one-shot); Web2ProductPicker.open(): awaits Web2ProductsCache.init() before drawing list; Web2PancakeToken / Web2PancakeAccounts / Web2PancakeImport: no boot side effects; helpers invoked on demand; All modules guard re-definition (if(global.X) return) → idempotent under double script-tag include

| Control                                                                 | Handler                                                        | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Web2ProductsCache.findByName(query, limit)                              | findByName (web2-products-cache.js:315)                        | Diacritic-normalized exact/startsWith/contains tiering; query<4 chars merges all tiers and sorts by composite score (stock+pending)\*1000+nameLen; query>=4 keeps tier order. Reads state.list snapshot only, no fetch.                                         |
| Web2ProductsCache.pushTickle({action,code})                             | pushTickle (web2-products-cache.js:399)                        | Only calls \_scheduleRefresh('local') → 400ms-debounced full \_loadList refetch. Does NOT write any SSE/Firestore tickle (relies on server-side \_notify after mutation). Does NOT use action/code args.                                                        |
| Web2ProductsCache.\_upsertLocal/\_removeLocal                           | web2-products-cache.js:413/422                                 | Optimistic in-place mutation of state.byCode + state.list + \_saveToPersist. Can be clobbered by a concurrent background \_loadList (see bugs).                                                                                                                 |
| Web2SuppliersCache.ensure(name)                                         | ensure (web2-suppliers-cache.js:179)                           | If name already in cache → {ok,created:false} (no network). Else POST /suppliers with \_authHeaders(x-web2-token); on success adds normalized key to state.names+originals and \_notify('ensure-created'). Server uses atomic ON CONFLICT (no RMW lost-update). |
| Web2CustomerStore.batchByPhones(phones)                                 | batchByPhones (web2-customer-store.js:174)                     | normPhone+filter isValidPhone(/^0\d{9}$/), dedupe, single POST /batch-by-phone. Map keyed by normPhone. fb_ids cannot leak in (filtered out).                                                                                                                   |
| Web2CustomerStore.batchByFbIds(fbIds)                                   | web2-customer-store.js:184                                     | Chunks of 500 POST /batch-by-fbid; Map keyed by fbId.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Web2CustomerStore.patch/updateStatus/upsert/harvestComments             | web2-customer-store.js:305/320/328/345                         | All writes attach x-web2-token via authHeaders; PATCH/POST with AbortSignal.timeout; return ok bool / {ok,data}. Swallow errors → return false/{} (silent).                                                                                                     |
| Web2ProductPicker.open({multi,onPick,onConfirm})                        | open (web2-product-picker.js:36)                               | Builds overlay innerHTML; draw() renders rows from getAll()/findByName(q,80) sliced 80; search input debounced 220ms; single-mode click → close+onPick(prod); multi-mode toggles selected Map + applyRowState; confirm → onConfirm([...selected.values()]).     |
| Web2ProductCode.suggest(opts)                                           | suggestWithMap→_originalSuggest (web2-product-code.js:530/345) | resolvePrefix(NCC)+extractType+extractSize+extractColor(WithMap); counter from regex match of existingCodes (bare=first, numbered from 2); throws if supplierName empty. Returns {code,parts}.                                                                  |
| Web2PancakeToken.ensureFresh(opts)                                      | web2-pancake-token.js:170                                      | If state in none/expired/critical (or force) → fetchFromExtension (postMessage GET_PANCAKE_TOKEN, 4.5s timeout, listener cleaned up) → applyToken → setJwt/localStorage.                                                                                        |
| Web2PancakeAccounts.addFromToken/remove/setEnabled/saveCreds/refreshNow | web2-pancake-accounts.js:109/144/184/241/270                   | All go through \_json choke point which attaches x-web2-token via \_authHeaders. addFromToken decodes JWT client-side, posts {accounts:{uid:{token,...}}} to /sync. remove clears local JWT if it was active.                                                   |
| Web2PancakeImport.lookupDeep(query,opts)                                | web2-pancake-import.js:105                                     | KHO-first: if /^0\d{9}$/ digits → Web2CustomerStore.getByPhone; if found returns {source:'kho'}. Else (pancakeFallback!==false) searchByPhone across all page tokens, dedupe phone\|name, sort by suffix match, slice 8.                                        |

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE.subscribe — topics web2:products, web2:supplier-wallet, web2:customers), web2/shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders, window.API_CONFIG.WORKER_URL base URL), web2/shared/web2-escape.js (Web2Escape.escapeHtml used by product-picker), web2/shared/web2-chat-client.js (Web2Chat.decodeJwt/setJwt/searchConversations/getAllPageAccessTokens/syncFromRenderDB), render route /api/web2-products (Web2ProductsApi.list + server \_notify web2:products), render route /api/web2-supplier-wallet/suppliers, render route /api/web2/customers (batch-by-phone, batch-by-fbid, list, upsert, harvest-comments, PATCH :id), render route /api/pancake-accounts + /api/web2/pancake-refresh, Consumers: web2/products/_, so-order/_, web2/purchase-refund/_, web2/supplier-wallet/_, web2/supplier-debt/_, web2/balance-history/_, native-orders/_, web2/fb-posts/_, web2/product-card/\*

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:products (Web2ProductsCache.\_setupRealtime, web2-products-cache.js:262) — echo-check msg.data.by===clientId then \_scheduleRefresh debounce 400ms; unsubscribe stored in state.unsubscribe but init() is one-shot singleton so it is effectively never torn down (process-lifetime listener — acceptable for a singleton, but never cleaned).; SUBSCRIBE web2:supplier-wallet (Web2SuppliersCache.\_attachSse, web2-suppliers-cache.js:94) — debounce 600ms→refresh; unsub stored in state.unsubSnapshot, never called (singleton).; SUBSCRIBE web2:customers (Web2CustomerStore.subscribe, web2-customer-store.js:364) — returns unsubscribe fn to caller; cleanup is caller's responsibility.; PUBLISH: none from this unit (server routes publish web2:products etc. after DB commit; these caches are pure subscribers).

**console.log:** 25 — web2-idb-store.js:137 console.log(`[Web2IdbStore] migrated "${lsKey}" → IDB`) — leftover debug log on migration path (no PII, but noise in prod console); No token/PII logging found: pancake-accounts.js and pancake-token.js never log token strings; customer-store warns log only e.message, not phone/name. Remaining console.warn/error are error-context only (acceptable).

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `logic` Dead echo-suppression → every client (incl. the mutator) double-refetches on its own write. Web2ProductsCache.\_setupRealtime skips refresh only when msg.data.by===state.clientId, but the server's web2:products notify payload (render.com/routes/web2-products.js:93) emits {action,code,codes,ts} with N — `web2/shared/web2-products-cache.js:264 (guard) vs render.com/routes/web2-product` → Either have the server include `by: req body clientId` in the notify payload and have the mutation send the cache clientId, or drop the dead `by` guard and rely solely on the 400ms debounce to coalesc
- 🟡 `race` Optimistic apply vs background revalidate clobber. \_upsertLocal/\_removeLocal mutate state.list immediately, but any SSE event or pushTickle schedules a full \_loadList() that overwrites state.list wholesale with server data. If the server has not yet committed/propagated the write when \_loadList reso — `web2/shared/web2-products-cache.js:228 (_loadList overwrite) vs 413/419 (_upsert` → After \_loadList, re-apply any pending optimistic ops not yet reflected, or gate revalidate behind a per-code version/updatedAt compare; alternatively only refetch the changed code(s) instead of the wh
- 🟡 `race` init() concurrency: when persist hit, \_setupRealtime() subscribes to web2:products BEFORE the non-awaited background \_loadList() completes. An SSE event arriving during that window calls \_scheduleRefresh→_loadList concurrently with the in-flight revalidate \_loadList; two overlapping \_loadList runs e — `web2/shared/web2-products-cache.js:282-291 + 211 (_loadList has no concurrency g` → Add an in-flight token to \_loadList (ignore stale completions) or a simple mutex/sequence number so only the latest fetch wins and persists.
- ⚪ `logic` Web2ProductCode counter/regex built from user supplier name without escaping regex metacharacters. typePrefix = prefix+type where prefix derives from supplierName via clean() — clean() strips to [A-Z0-9 ] so metacharacters are removed in normal flow, BUT existingCodes are matched with `new RegExp('^ — `web2/shared/web2-product-code.js:366-367, 559-560` → Escape typePrefix before RegExp construction (replace([-/\^$\*+?.()|[\]{}],'\$&')) to be defensive.
- ⚪ `logic` Web2PancakeImport.searchByPhone limit uses (pageIds && pageIds.\_limit) — pageIds is an array, so reading .\_limit (a non-existent property on an array) is almost always undefined → falls back to 8. The intended per-call limit override is unreachable; callers passing {\_limit} on a non-array, or expect — `web2/shared/web2-pancake-import.js:99` → Take limit as an explicit named param (e.g. opts.limit) instead of stashing it on the pageIds array.
- ⚪ `data-loss` convToCustomer takes recent_phone_numbers[0] without validating it is a 10-digit VN phone (/^0\d{9}$/). A malformed/foreign number can be stored as the customer phone in downstream harvest/upsert, conflicting with the strict validation enforced elsewhere in Web2CustomerStore. Inconsistent dedupe key — `web2/shared/web2-pancake-import.js:36-42` → Run the candidate phone through Web2PhoneUtils.isValid before returning it (set phone='' if invalid, keep fbId), and prefer fbId as dedupe key when available.
- ℹ️ `logic` Web2ProductsCache.findByName early-break `if (exact+startsWith+contains > limit*4) break` can truncate the candidate pool before all high-stock items are seen, so the post-sort top-N may miss a better-scoring product that appears later in state.list. Mild ranking inaccuracy, not a correctness failur — `web2/shared/web2-products-cache.js:327` → Either remove the early break for small catalogs (<5k) or raise the cap; the loop over up to 20k items is still cheap.
- ℹ️ `other` Singleton SSE subscriptions in ProductsCache/SuppliersCache store their unsubscribe fns (state.unsubscribe / state.unsubSnapshot) but never invoke them — there is no teardown path. Fine for page-lifetime singletons, but means a re-init or SPA navigation could leak/duplicate if the guard were ever by — `web2/shared/web2-products-cache.js:262, web2-suppliers-cache.js:94` → No action needed for current MPA usage; document that these are process-lifetime listeners.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟡 CSS-injection via product image URL in Web2ProductPicker. rowHtml inserts imgOf(p) into inline style `url('${esc(im)}')`. With Web2Escape present, esc() escapes ' to HTML entity &#39; which the HTML parser decodes back to ' BEFORE the CSS parser reads the style attribute — so a single-quote in the i — `web2/shared/web2-product-picker.js:91 (and fallback esc at :18)` → Use window.Web2Escape.safeImageUrl(im) to allowlist the URL, and additionally strip/encode quotes for the CSS context (e.g. encodeURI or set the background via element.style after creation rather than
- ⚪ Web2SuppliersCache GET /suppliers is fetched with no auth header; only the POST /suppliers (ensure) attaches x-web2-token. If WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE gates the read it would 401 silently → empty NCC dropdown with no user feedback (load fail is only console.warn). — `web2/shared/web2-suppliers-cache.js:76` → If reads are auth-gated, send \_authHeaders on the GET too; surface load failure to the UI instead of silent empty list.
- ⚪ JWT decoded client-side with atob(payload) and stored in localStorage as plaintext (pancake_jwt_token). Token at-rest is plaintext and readable by any same-origin script. This matches existing project posture (noted elsewhere) but remains a token-at-rest exposure. — `web2/shared/web2-pancake-token.js:154, web2-pancake-accounts.js:213` → Acceptable for now given project constraints; long-term move JWT to httpOnly/server-held session. No new regression.
- ℹ️ Hardcoded worker URL fallback 'https://chatomni-proxy.nhijudyshop.workers.dev' present in 3 modules as a fallback when window.API_CONFIG is missing. This is the documented single-source pattern (web2-auth.js sets API_CONFIG first) — fallback only, not a secret. — `web2-customer-store.js:26, web2-suppliers-cache.js:28, web2-pancake-accounts.js:` → Keep; ensure web2-auth.js loads before these so the literal is never the live value.

**Ghi chú:** Phone validation is CORRECT and strict everywhere: web2-phone-utils.js:27 and web2-customer-store.js:59 both use /^0\d{9}$/; both deliberately avoid slice(-10) so fb_ids (15-17 digits) cannot masquerade as phones. batchByPhones/enrich/listByPhones all filter isValidPhone before the network call — no fb_id leaks into phone batch lookups. This is the headline FOCUS item and it passes.; Product-code suggest rule matches the documented shop convention (PREFIX_NCC+LOAI+counter+MAU+SIZE; first item bare, second starts at 2; throws when supplierName missing so UI forces NCC entry). buildColorShortMap handles collision groups via progressive char extension then numeric fallback.; Web 2.0 isolation is clean: no TPOS API calls, no chatDb/Web 1.0 table reads. pancake_accounts being shared with Web 1.0 is intentional/documented (shared token store), not a coupling bug.; IDB databases are correctly partitioned: products-cache uses db 'web2_cache' store 'kv'; Web2IdbStore uses db 'web2_kv_v1' store '\_default' — no version/store collision. All Web2IdbStore callers (so-order/supplier-wallet/purchase-refund) namespace by prefix key in the single \_default store.; No timezone handling in this unit (no date formatting/parsing) — no GMT+7 bugs to flag here.; Writes consistently attach x-web2-token (customer-store, suppliers-cache ensure, pancake-accounts via \_json choke point). Suppliers GET read is the one auth-less request (flagged in security).

### shared:media

A family of 10 on-device (browser-only) media engines shared across Web 2.0: barcode/QR scanner (Sec-ant ponyfill), product counter (MediaPipe ObjectDetector), pack counter (opencv.js + manual markers), label OCR (tesseract.js printed + TrOCR handwritten), logo eraser (pure-JS content-aware inpaint), canvas utils, image editor (Filerobot/Photopea iframe), and a beauty stack (MediaPipe FaceLandmarker landmarks + pure-pixel liquify/skin filters + studio UI). All lazy-load heavy WASM/models from CDN only when the user opens the tool, run 100% client-side (no frames sent to server), and are consumed by feature pages (reconcile, product-counter, product-card, photo-editor, video-beauty). They are NOT autoloaded by the sidebar and touch NO Web2 API/SSE/DB — purely client compute, so there is no x-web2-token / pool / timezone surface here. Primary risk areas are camera-stream / listener leaks on close, shared-singleton concurrency (one MediaPipe detector reused by concurrent video loops), and large-canvas memory.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** NONE auto-loads on page enter — every module is an IIFE that registers window.Web2\* and self-guards `if (global.Web2X) return;`.
