No fetch/DB/SSE/listener runs at registration time.; On first user open(): barcode-scanner dynamic-imports CDN ESM `barcode-detector@3/dist/es/ponyfill.min.js`, injects #w2bc-styles, calls getUserMedia({video:environment}).; product-counter open()/mount(): dynamic-imports `@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.18` + FilesetResolver wasm + downloads efficientdet_lite0.tflite (~4MB) from storage.googleapis.com (or WEB2_CONFIG.OBJECT_MODEL_URL), injects #w2pc-styles, getUserMedia.; pack-counter open(): injects script tag `@techstark/opencv-js@4.11.0` (~8MB WASM), getUserMedia, injects #w2pk-styles.; label-ocr open(): injects `tesseract.js@5` script (printed) and/or dynamic-imports `@huggingface/transformers@3` + `Xenova/trocr-base-handwritten` (handwritten), getUserMedia, injects #w2ocr-styles.; beauty-face getLandmarker(): dynamic-imports tasks-vision, \_streamFetch vision_wasm_internal.wasm (~9.5MB) + face_landmarker.task (~3.7MB) with Cache API ('web2-mp-models-v1'); progress emitted to UI.; image-editor open(): injects `filerobot-image-editor@4` (jsdelivr then scaleflex fallback) OR loads photopea.com iframe + window 'message' listener.; logo-eraser/beauty-filters/beauty-studio/canvas-utils: no network at all — pure canvas/ImageData compute; styles injected on open().

| Control                                                                                         | Handler                                                                         | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Web2BarcodeScanner.open(opts) / mount(target,opts)                                              | createScanner() + start() (web2-barcode-scanner.js:169,269)                     | getUserMedia env camera, loadModule() dynamic import, requestAnimationFrame loop throttled to ~120ms calls detector.detect(video); on hit -> dedupe by code+dedupeMs, beep()+vibrate()+flash frame, emit('scan') + opts.onScan(code,raw); !continuous -> close(). |
| Barcode torch button (open overlay)                                                             | torchBtn click (web2-barcode-scanner.js:425)                                    | ctrl.setTorch(!torchOn) via track.applyConstraints advanced torch; toggles is-on class; notify if unsupported.                                                                                                                                                    |
| Barcode close button / Escape                                                                   | cleanup (web2-barcode-scanner.js:414) / onKey (421)                             | ctrl.destroy() (stop tracks+cancelRAF+clear DOM), root.remove(), removeEventListener keydown. (open() path cleans up correctly; mount() path destroy() does NOT clear any keydown since it adds none.)                                                            |
| Web2ProductCounter toggle 'Bật/Tắt camera'                                                      | toggleBtn click -> toggle() -> start()/stop() (web2-product-counter.js:449,429) | start: getUserMedia, getDetector() (cached), RAF loop detectForVideo every intervalMs=350ms, filterDets, push count to history, setCount(median(history)) -> emit('count'); stop: cancelRAF, stopTracks, hide count.                                              |
| Product-counter flip camera button                                                              | flipBtn click -> flipCamera() (web2-product-counter.js:450,432)                 | toggles facingMode, if running: stop() then await start(). RACE: stop() is sync but start() re-acquires getUserMedia + a possibly-different detector; rapid double-click can interleave two start()s.                                                             |
| Product-counter 'Bỏ qua người' checkbox                                                         | xPerson read in filterDets() (web2-product-counter.js:295)                      | Live-filters 'person' class out of detections on next loop tick; no re-render forced (changes apply on next 350ms tick).                                                                                                                                          |
| Product-counter open() close button / Escape                                                    | close (web2-product-counter.js:513) / onKey (520)                               | close(): ctrl.destroy()+root.remove() but does NOT remove the keydown 'onKey' listener; Escape branch removes it. LEAK on X-button close.                                                                                                                         |
| Web2PackCounter 'Đếm' (shoot)                                                                   | shoot() (web2-pack-counter.js:301)                                              | freeze video frame to canvas+dataURL, loadCv(), recount() runs opencv contour estimate -> markers; switches UI to result mode.                                                                                                                                    |
| Pack-counter tap on overlay (add/remove marker)                                                 | overlay click -> onTap() (web2-pack-counter.js:360,378)                         | hit-test markers within HIT_RADIUS=22px -> splice (remove) else push (add); drawMarkers() updates count = markers.length.                                                                                                                                         |
| Pack-counter sensitivity slider                                                                 | sensInp change -> recount(global.cv) (web2-pack-counter.js:416)                 | re-runs estimateCenters with new sensitivity, REPLACES all markers (discards user manual edits).                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Pack-counter 'Dùng' / 'Chụp lại' / close                                                        | use()/showCamera()/cleanup (web2-pack-counter.js:382,390,401)                   | use: opts.onResult(markers.length)+cleanup; showCamera: reset to live; cleanup: stopTracks+root.remove+removeEventListener keydown.                                                                                                                               |
| Web2LabelOcr mode tabs 'Chữ in'/'Chữ tay'                                                       | modeBtns click (web2-label-ocr.js:258)                                          | sets currentMode; printed=tesseract getWorker(lang), handwritten=TrOCR getTrocr().                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Label-ocr 'Chụp & đọc'                                                                          | shoot() (web2-label-ocr.js:334)                                                 | captureRoi(video) crop+grayscale+contrast, printed: worker.setParameters(whitelist) then worker.recognize(canvas) -> lines; handwritten: recognizeHandwritten(dataUrl); showResult lines as chips + editable input.                                               |
| Label-ocr chip click / 'Dùng' / Enter                                                           | chip click sets editEl.value (282); use() (393)                                 | use(): trims editEl.value, opts.onResult(val); continuous -> showCamera else cleanup.                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Web2LogoEraser drag-select region                                                               | pointerdown/move/up (web2-logo-eraser.js:252-282)                               | draws selection rect; pointerup pushes natural-px rect if >6px; pointercapture used.                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Logo-eraser 'Tự dò'/'Xoá vùng'/'Hoàn tác'/'Xong'                                                | autoDetect/applyErase/undo/done (web2-logo-eraser.js:305,284,314,343)           | autoDetect: edge-density grid flood-fill -> suggest boxes; applyErase: push ImageData to history (cap 8), \_inpaintRect bilinear fill each rect; done: work.toDataURL('image/png') resolves promise.                                                              |
| Web2ImageEditor 'Lấy ảnh về' (Filerobot)                                                        | take() (web2-image-editor.js:120)                                               | editor.getCurrentImgData() -> resolve imageBase64; on error console.error + notify + resolve(null).                                                                                                                                                               |
| Web2ImageEditor Photopea 'Lấy ảnh về'                                                           | bar click 'save' (web2-image-editor.js:261)                                     | saveRequested=true, postMessage saveToOE('png') to iframe; onMsg accepts ArrayBuffer only if saveRequested -> Blob->FileReader->dataURL resolve.                                                                                                                  |
| Web2BeautyStudio sliders / 'Áp dụng'                                                            | apply()->doApply() (web2-beauty-studio.js:308,329)                              | defer 2 RAF, pushHistory, run F.buildSkinMask/smoothSkin/adjustSkinTone/beautify or Web2BeautyFace.buildBrushes+F.warp on work ImageData, putImageData, redraw.                                                                                                   |
| Beauty-studio leg handle drag                                                                   | pointerdown/move/up (web2-beauty-studio.js:240-258)                             | sets legState.y0/y1 in work px; apply -> F.stretchBand.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Beauty-studio 'Lấy ảnh về'/'Hoàn tác'/'Đặt lại'/close                                           | back click delegated (web2-beauty-studio.js:387)                                | done: work.toDataURL (try/catch CORS) resolve; undo: pop history putImageData; reset: redraw orig; close: cleanup()+resolve(null).                                                                                                                                |
| Web2CanvasUtils.\* (canvasToBlob/imgToCanvas/loadImage/base64ToBlob/fileToDataUrl/blobToBase64) | pure helpers (web2-canvas-utils.js)                                             | Promise-based image<->canvas<->blob<->dataURL conversions; imgToCanvas revokes blob: URL of source img after draw.                                                                                                                                                |
| Web2BeautyFilters.warp/buildSkinMask/smoothSkin/adjustSkinTone/beautify/stretchBand             | pure pixel ops (web2-beauty-filters.js)                                         | warp does backward-map liquify only over brush bounding union; skin ops use YCbCr mask + separable box blur; all return new/mutated ImageData.                                                                                                                    |
| Web2BeautyFace.detect/buildBrushes/buildAutoBrushes/warmup                                      | MediaPipe landmarker (web2-beauty-face.js)                                      | detect downsizes to <=1024px, returns 478 pixel landmarks; buildBrushes maps landmarks to liquify brushes for eyes/nose/face/lips.                                                                                                                                |

**Liên kết:** web2/reconcile/index.html + js/reconcile-app.js (uses Web2BarcodeScanner, Web2LabelOcr, Web2PackCounter for camera scan/OCR in reconcile flow), web2/product-counter/index.html + js/product-counter.js (mounts Web2ProductCounter, opens Web2PackCounter), web2/product-card/js/product-card.js (Web2LogoEraser, Web2ImageEditor), web2/photo-editor/js/photo-editor.js (Web2LogoEraser, Web2ImageEditor, Web2BeautyStudio, Web2BeautyFace), web2/video-beauty/js/video-beauty.js + video-beauty-render.js + video-beauty-export.js (Web2BeautyFilters, Web2BeautyFace), CDN deps: cdn.jsdelivr.net (barcode-detector, @mediapipe/tasks-vision, @techstark/opencv-js, tesseract.js, @huggingface/transformers, filerobot-image-editor), storage.googleapis.com (mediapipe models), scaleflex.cloudimg.io (filerobot fallback), photopea.com (iframe). Browser Cache API store 'web2-mp-models-v1'., window globals consumed: notificationManager (toasts), lucide (icons), WEB2_CONFIG (OBJECT_MODEL_URL / FACE_LANDMARKER_MODEL overrides).

**SSE:** No SSE publish/subscribe in any file. These are pure client compute modules with zero realtime hub interaction (correct — no web2:<entity> topics expected here).

**console.log:** 10 — web2-product-counter.js:15 (consumer product-counter.js) console.warn module-not-loaded — benign; web2-image-editor.js:125 console.error('[Web2ImageEditor] getCurrentImgData lỗi:', e) — error object only, no PII; web2-image-editor.js:165 console.error('[Web2ImageEditor] init lỗi:', e) — benign; web2-beauty-face.js:246 console.error('[Web2BeautyFace] detect lỗi:', e) — benign; web2-beauty-studio.js:317 console.error('[Web2BeautyStudio] apply lỗi:', e) — benign; barcode/product-counter/pack-counter/label-ocr notify() each have one console.warn fallback when notificationManager missing — benign; No tokens, no customer PII, no order data logged anywhere. Image data is never logged. Clean.

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `memory-leak` Web2ProductCounter.open(): the document keydown 'onKey' listener is only removed inside the Escape branch. Closing via the X button calls close() (destroy + root.remove) but never removes onKey, leaking the listener plus a closure that still references the destroyed controller. Repeated open/close a — `web2-product-counter.js:513-527` → In close() add `doc.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey);` (and drop the duplicate removal inside onKey, or keep both — removeEventListener is idempotent).
- 🟠 `race` Web2ProductCounter shares a single ObjectDetector instance via module-level \_detectorCache keyed only by modelUrl|scoreThreshold|maxResults. If two controllers are mounted on the same page (e.g. two widgets, or open() drawer while an inline mount() is running), both run their own RAF loop calling de — `web2-product-counter.js:158-185 (getDetector cache) + loop():324-343` → Make the detector per-controller (drop the shared cache, or key it per controller instance), or serialize detect calls behind an in-flight flag and reject concurrent use. At minimum guard `if (this.\_i
- 🟡 `race` Web2ProductCounter.flipCamera(): on rapid double-tap, `stop(); await start();` — stop() sets running=false and stopTracks() synchronously, but two flip clicks fire two start() calls that each await getUserMedia; the second start() sees running still false (first hasn't set it yet) and proceeds, prod — `web2-product-counter.js:432-438 + start():346` → Add a `_starting` boolean set at the top of start() and cleared in all exit paths; return early if `_starting`. Disable flip button while transitioning (flipBtn.disabled=true during flip).
- 🟡 `race` Web2LabelOcr caches one tesseract worker per lang in module-level \_workers and mutates it with worker.setParameters({tessedit_char_whitelist}) per shoot. Two overlapping open() instances (or two shoot()s) with different opts.whitelist share the same worker — one call's whitelist clobbers the other, — `web2-label-ocr.js:144-154 (getWorker cache) + shoot():361,368,376` → Serialize recognize calls per worker (a per-worker promise chain), and either reset whitelist after each recognize or key the worker cache by lang+whitelist. Simplest: chain `worker.\_q = (worker.\_q||P
- 🟡 `bug` Web2BarcodeScanner.loop() fires detector.detect(video) (async, returns a Promise) every ~120ms with no in-flight guard. On slow devices (ZXing-WASM fallback on iOS) a single detect can exceed 120ms, so multiple detect() promises stack up against the same detector and against the camera frame, causin — `web2-barcode-scanner.js:250-267` → Track an `_inFlight` flag: skip scheduling a new detect while the previous promise is unresolved (set before .then, clear in .then/.catch).
- ⚪ `bug` Web2BarcodeScanner.loop() always returns the first detected code (codes[0]) even though the comment says 'mã gần tâm khung nhất' (closest to frame center). codes[0] is detector order, not nearest-to-center; the visible frame is decorative only (full video is scanned). User can scan an off-target bar — `web2-barcode-scanner.js:260-263` → Either compute nearest-to-center from boundingBox and pick that, or update the comment/UX to reflect that any visible barcode is accepted.
- ⚪ `bug` Web2PackCounter sensitivity slider listens only on 'change' (fires on release), and recount() unconditionally REPLACES the markers array with fresh opencv estimates, silently discarding any manual taps the user already made. The note tells users to tap to adjust, but nudging sensitivity afterwards w — `web2-pack-counter.js:351-356 (recount replaces markers) + 416 (change listener)` → Confirm before re-estimating after manual edits, or merge new centers with manual markers, or disable the slider once the user has manually edited.
- ⚪ `perf` Web2LogoEraser.\_inpaintRect adds Math.random() noise per pixel and uses per-rect O(area) fill at full natural resolution; for multi-MP product photos with several large rects this runs on the main thread and can freeze briefly. history.push(getImageData(NW,NH)) keeps up to 8 full-res ImageData snaps — `web2-logo-eraser.js:30-66 (_inpaintRect) + 286-288 (history cap 8)` → Reduce history cap to 3-4 for large images, or store downscaled/serialized snapshots; consider offloading inpaint to an OffscreenCanvas/worker for big images.
- ⚪ `memory-leak` Web2BeautyStudio history holds up to MAX_HISTORY=6 full-res work ImageData (work may be up to 1800px edge). reset() clears history.length=0 but undo() never trims when canvas grows from stretchBand; combined with apply()/legs growing canvas height each band-stretch, snapshots can be sizeable. Not ca — `web2-beauty-studio.js:274-280 (pushHistory) + 335-343 (stretchBand grows canvas)` → Lower MAX_HISTORY for very large work canvases, or store snapshots as compressed blobs.
- ⚪ `race` Web2BeautyStudio.open() awaits Web2BeautyFace.detect AFTER the modal is already interactive. A user can click 'Áp dụng' for a face tool before detection resolves: doApply reads `det` which is still null -> buildBrushes returns [] -> 'Không dựng được hiệu ứng' even though a face exists. faceMissing i — `web2-beauty-studio.js:308-380 (apply/doApply reads det) + 416-458 (det resolved ` → Disable the Áp dụng button (setBusy true already disables it during detect — verify) until detection completes for face/auto tools; the current setBusy(true) at :417 does disable apply, but if detect
- ℹ️ `bug` Web2ImageEditor Filerobot mode relies on editor.getCurrentImgData() because onSave 'không fire ổn định'. If getCurrentImgData returns null (no edit made / internal state), finish(null) silently discards — caller sees a cancel. Acceptable but worth noting the result can be a false 'cancelled'. — `web2-image-editor.js:120-129` → None required; optionally fall back to original src when no edits were applied so 'Lấy ảnh về' never returns null on an unedited image.

**Security (audit):**

- ℹ️ All processing is on-device; no images/frames are uploaded to any server (explicitly designed, verified — getUserMedia frames stay in canvas/ImageData). No x-web2-token surface because there are zero /api/web2\* calls. No SQL, no pool usage. — `all files` → No action — confirms correct privacy posture for customer/product photos.
- ⚪ Photopea integration posts the user image (ArrayBuffer of src) into a third-party iframe at https://www.photopea.com and listens for window 'message' with only an `e.source !== frame.contentWindow` guard (no e.origin check). A malicious frame navigation or other window could not easily spoof source, — `web2-image-editor.js:224-250 (onMsg)` → Add `if (e.origin !== 'https://www.photopea.com') return;` before processing messages, and document that product images transit a third-party iframe (data leaves device for Photopea mode only, unlike
- ⚪ postMessage targets use wildcard '_' for both the ArrayBuffer image and the saveToOE command sent to the Photopea iframe — image bytes could be delivered to an unexpected origin if the iframe were redirected. — `web2-image-editor.js:179,183,265 (win.postMessage(ab,'_'), postMessage(..., '_')` → Use the explicit 'https://www.photopea.com' targetOrigin instead of '_'.
- ⚪ Several modules inject opts.title / opts.hint directly into innerHTML template strings without escaping (barcode open title, pack-counter title/hint, label-ocr title/hint, logo-eraser hint). Currently all callers pass static literals, so no live XSS, but the pattern is unsafe if a future caller pass — `web2-barcode-scanner.js:199,401; web2-pack-counter.js:190,198; web2-label-ocr.js` → Escape title/hint with an esc() helper (beauty-studio already has one at web2-beauty-studio.js:479) or set via textContent. Cheap hardening.
- ℹ️ Models/scripts loaded from public CDNs (jsdelivr, googleapis, scaleflex, photopea) without Subresource Integrity. tasks-vision/opencv/tesseract are pinned to specific versions (good), but barcode-detector@3 / transformers@3 / filerobot@4 use floating major-version ranges and could change. — `web2-product-counter.js:148,166; web2-barcode-scanner.js:47; web2-label-ocr.js:3` → Pin exact versions for floating majors and consider SRI where the loader uses <script> tags (opencv, tesseract, filerobot). Aligns with project web/security.md third-party-scripts rule.
- ℹ️ loadImage/\_loadImage set crossOrigin='anonymous' to keep canvases untainted; export via toDataURL is wrapped in try/catch with a clear CORS message. Correct handling. — `web2-canvas-utils.js:111; web2-logo-eraser.js:13; web2-beauty-studio.js:402` → None — good defensive pattern.

**Ghi chú:** These modules correctly avoid all Web2 backend coupling: no /api/web2\* calls, no x-web2-token, no SSE, no web2Db/chatDb, no TPOS, no GMT+7/timestamp logic — so the WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE / pool / timezone audit dimensions are N/A here.; camera-stream cleanup is handled correctly in MOST close paths: barcode (open), pack-counter, label-ocr, and product-counter stop()/destroy() all call stopTracks() which stops every track and nulls srcObject. The one leak is the product-counter open() keydown listener (bug above), not the camera track.; \_modPromise/\_visionPromise/\_landmarkerP/\_cvP/\_tessP/\_trocrP all null themselves on rejection so a failed CDN load can be retried — good. Success-path singletons are intentional double-load guards (correct).; beauty-face uses Cache API ('web2-mp-models-v1') to persist the 3.7MB model across sessions since googleapis cache is only 1h — sensible; cache key is the model URL so a WEB2_CONFIG override naturally gets its own entry.; Web2BeautyFilters.warp restricting work to the brush bounding union is a real perf win for full-body photos; pure-pixel ops are immutable-ish (warp returns new ImageData; skin ops mutate the passed ImageData in place — callers re-getImageData each apply, so OK).; Recommend a tiny shared escapeHtml in web2-canvas-utils (or reuse beauty-studio esc) and route all innerHTML title/hint through it to future-proof against XSS if a caller ever passes customer text.

### shared:msg-fb

Eight shared Web 2.0 modules for Facebook messaging/posting. (1) web2-msg-template._ is a 4-file split (core/ui/send/entry) implementing a bulk Messenger-template modal: load templates from Postgres /api/web2-msg-templates, fill placeholders per order, create a server-side bulk-send job (/api/web2/msg-send), watch progress via SSE + poll, and drain 24h-blocked orders through the browser extension. (2) web2-quick-reply.js is a self-contained quick-reply manager (CRUD over /api/web2-quick-replies, /shortcut autocomplete in textareas, browse modal). (3) web2-fb-client.js is the single Graph-API client wrapper (/api/web2-fb-posts) for posting/insights/ads. (4) web2-fb-share.js hands off images+caption between pages via sessionStorage. (5) web2-fb-post-preview.js renders a Facebook-like preview overlay. All are pure browser modules; none touch TPOS or Web 1.0 pools. The job/SSE topics (web2:bulk-send:_) follow the Web 2.0 convention correctly.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** web2-msg-template-core.js: IIFE only defines W2MT state/utils; no fetch on load. WORKER_URL resolved from window.API_CONFIG (web2-auth.js must load earlier).; web2-msg-template-send.js: IIFE defines send/watch fns; no fetch on load.; web2-msg-template-ui.js: IIFE defines modal DOM builders; no fetch on load.; web2-msg-template.js (entry): injects spinner @keyframes <style>; sets window.Web2MsgTemplate={open}; schedules a 2500ms setTimeout that calls \_maybeReattachActive() -> GET /api/web2/msg-send/active on EVERY page that loads this script, even pages with no bulk-send UI.; web2-quick-reply.js: on load runs \_loadCache() (reads localStorage web2_quick_replies_cache_v1) then fires loadReplies() -> GET /api/web2-quick-replies immediately (background fetch on import).; web2-fb-client.js: IIFE only sets window.Web2FbClient + alias window.FBPostsApi; no fetch on load.; web2-fb-share.js: IIFE only sets window.Web2FbShare; no fetch on load.; web2-fb-post-preview.js: IIFE only sets window.Web2FbPostPreview; no fetch on load.

| Control                                       | Handler                                                | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| --------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Web2MsgTemplate.open({orders}) (public entry) | open() web2-msg-template.js:25                         | \_loadSent(), \_ensureModal(), filters orders requiring fbPageId+conversationId and not \_isSent within 24h, sets S.modalOrders, shows modal, await \_loadTemplates() (GET /api/web2-msg-templates), \_renderCards(), \_maybeReattachActive(). |
| Template card click                           | \_renderCards listener web2-msg-template-ui.js:192     | Sets S.selectedTemplateId=card.dataset.id, re-renders, enables send button.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Send button (#w2tplSendBtn)                   | W2MT.\_handleSend web2-msg-template-send.js:27         | Builds items[] (fills template per order client-side), disables button, POST /api/web2/msg-send/ {createdBy,templateName,items}, optimistically \_markSent each order, toast, \_startWatch(jobId, seed).                                       |
| Cancel/Close footer button                    | anon web2-msg-template-ui.js:134                       | If S.isSending && S.activeJobId -> \_cancelActiveJob() (Popup.danger then POST /cancel); else \_closeModal() (only hides modal, server job keeps running).                                                                                     |
| New / Edit save                               | anon web2-msg-template-ui.js:238                       | Validates name+content, \_saveTemplate -> POST /api/web2-msg-templates (x-web2-token), reload+re-render.                                                                                                                                       |
| Edit delete                                   | anon web2-msg-template-ui.js:225                       | Popup.danger -> \_deleteTemplate -> DELETE /api/web2-msg-templates/:id (x-web2-token).                                                                                                                                                         |
| Search input                                  | anon web2-msg-template-ui.js:143                       | Filter Name/Content, re-render.                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Pill Dung job / X                             | \_cancelActiveJob send.js:404 / \_hidePill send.js:399 | Cancel: Popup.danger -> POST /:id/cancel -> \_stopWatch. X: hides pill only, job continues.                                                                                                                                                    |
| (internal) extension drain                    | \_drainExtension web2-msg-template-send.js:225         | Loop: GET /:jobId/extension-items, per item POST /claim-ext then extension REPLY_INBOX_PHOTO then POST /result. Concurrency from #w2tplConcurrency clamped 1..6.                                                                               |
| Web2QuickReply.attachAutocomplete(input,opts) | attachAutocomplete web2-quick-reply.js:361             | Creates dropdown, wires input/keydown/blur + window resize; on /shortcut match shows candidates; Enter/click inserts chosen.message+signature into input.value; auto-send if shortcut in {/CAMON,/camon}.                                      |
| Web2QuickReply.openModal / form save          | openModal:529 / anon:609                               | Browse+CRUD: updateReply(PUT)/addReply(POST)/deleteReply(DELETE) /api/web2-quick-replies with x-web2-token, update cache, re-render.                                                                                                           |
| Web2FbShare.send / consume                    | send web2-fb-share.js:29 / consume:81                  | send: sessionStorage payload (URL-only fallback on quota) then nav ../fb-posts/index.html?from=share. consume: read+remove payload.                                                                                                            |
| Web2FbPostPreview.open(opts)                  | open web2-fb-post-preview.js:78                        | Builds overlay innerHTML with esc()-escaped name/picture/caption/media, wires close button + overlay-click + Escape keydown.                                                                                                                   |
| Web2FbClient.\* wrappers                      | jget/jpost web2-fb-client.js:31-42                     | GET/POST/DELETE /api/web2-fb-posts/\* with Web2Auth.authHeaders; return r.json() without r.ok check.                                                                                                                                           |

**Liên kết:** render /api/web2/msg-send (render.com/routes/web2-msg-send.js) job create/poll/cancel/extension-items/claim-ext/result/active, render /api/web2-msg-templates (web2Db web2_msg_templates), render /api/web2-quick-replies (render.com/routes/web2-quick-replies.js, web2Db web2_quick_replies), render /api/web2-fb-posts (render.com/routes/web2-fb-posts.js, Graph API), worker /api/imgbb-upload (uploadImage, dead/broken key), window.Web2Chat fetchMessages/fetchConversations, window.Web2Auth.authHeaders, window.Web2SSE.subscribe (web2-sse-bridge.js), window.NativeOrdersApp.\_extensionRequest / window.\_w2ExtensionRequest (web2-extension-bridge.js), window.Popup (web2/shared/popup.js), window.Web2UserInfo / authManager, Callers: native-orders/js/native-orders-bulk-operations.js, web2/shared/chat-panel/web2-chat-panel-compose.js, web2/fb-posts/js/fb-posts-composer.js, web2/photo-studio + web2/product-card

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:bulk-send:<jobId> in \_startWatch (send.js:131); callback -> \_onProgress. Unsubscribed in \_stopWatch (send.js:154). Correct Web2 topic convention.; No debounce on SSE progress (cheap DOM writes). Poll fallback every 3000ms (send.js:140) is source of truth for state==='done'.; LEAK RISK: SSE unsub + pollTimer cleared only in \_stopWatch. If job never reaches done and user navigates away, 3s pollTimer + SSE persist for page lifetime (no beforeunload/pagehide/visibility cleanup). \_drainExtension loop also only exits on drainStop or empty+inactive.; No SSE publish from client modules (publish is server-side in web2-msg-send.js).

**console.log:** 4 — web2-msg-template-core.js:149 console.warn loadTemplates failed (error message only); web2-msg-template-core.js:237 console.log fallback toast when notificationManager missing (could echo template type+msg); web2-quick-reply.js:98 console.log fallback notify (msg text); web2-quick-reply.js:142 console.warn loadReplies failed (error message only). No tokens or customer PII logged in this unit.

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `race` DOUBLE-SUBMIT / duplicate-job race in \_handleSend. Only guard is sendBtn.disabled set after sync validation, but \_markSent + POST are async and S.isSending is set only inside \_startWatch (after POST resolves). Two fast invocations create two server jobs sending the SAME messages to the SAME customer — `web2-msg-template-send.js:27-101` → Add a synchronous guard at top: if (S.isSending||S.\_creating) return; S.\_creating=true; ... finally S.\_creating=false; before any await.
- 🟡 `race` Stale match in quick-reply applySelected. match/start/end captured in onInput; applySelected also fires from dropdown mousedown after onBlur's 120ms hide delay. If input value changed between capture and apply, input.value.slice(match.start) splices at wrong offsets, corrupting the message. signatur — `web2-quick-reply.js:381-396` → Re-run \_matchShortcut(input) inside applySelected, bail if null or offsets exceed value length; append signature only where intended.
- 🟡 `memory-leak` pollTimer + SSE subscription + \_drainExtension loop never cleaned up on page unload/navigation. \_stopWatch only runs when poll sees done or on explicit cancel. After closing modal (job keeps running) and navigating, the 3s interval, EventSource, and the extension drain while-loop leak until teardown — `web2-msg-template-send.js:139-143,225-270` → Add pagehide/beforeunload handler clearing pollTimer/sseUnsub and setting drainStop; optionally gate drain on document.visibilityState.
- 🟡 `logic` \_maybeReattachActive runs on EVERY page loading web2-msg-template.js (2500ms boot timer). It GETs /api/web2/msg-send/active and, if a running job exists, injects the pill + starts a 3s poll + extension drain on unrelated pages, coupling them to bulk-send state and causing site-wide background churn. — `web2-msg-template.js:80-86 + web2-msg-template-send.js:426-439` → Gate boot reattach behind a host flag (e.g. window.\_\_w2BulkSendHost) set only by pages that host the feature.
- 🟡 `data-loss` Optimistic \_markSent is applied to ALL items right after the job-create POST returns, before any message actually sends. If the server job later fails/cancels, those orders stay marked sent for 24h locally with no rollback and are silently skipped on next open() — user believes they sent but recipie — `web2-msg-template-send.js:85` → Mark sent per-item only when the job reports the item delivered; in \_stopWatch unmark orders when finalJob.sent<total.
- ⚪ `logic` Concurrency input #w2tplConcurrency allows max=12 but drain clamps Math.min(6,value)||3, silently capping 7-12 at 6. Separately #w2tplDelay input is never read in send.js — a dead control that misleads the user. — `web2-msg-template-send.js:253-256, web2-msg-template-ui.js:102-103` → Set input max=6 to match the clamp; wire w2tplDelay into the drain sleep or remove the input.
- ⚪ `race` \_drainExtension guarded by a single global S.draining boolean. With the singleton W2MT.state, a drain for one job could block a drain for a different jobId, and \_stopWatch only sets drainStop (relies on the loop finally to clear draining). — `web2-msg-template-send.js:226` → Key the draining guard by jobId, or explicitly reset S.draining=false in \_stopWatch.
- ⚪ `bug` Quick-reply uses loose == for id comparison (\_replies.find(x=>x.id==id) at 506,513) while strict === elsewhere (180,192). With mixed numeric/string ids this can match the wrong row or fail, editing/deleting the wrong reply. — `web2-quick-reply.js:506,513` → Use String(x.id)===String(id) consistently.
- ⚪ `bug` web2-fb-client jget/jpost return r.json() without checking r.ok or guarding non-JSON. A 401/500/HTML error page throws SyntaxError inside r.json() and rejects callers with an opaque error instead of {success:false,error}. — `web2-fb-client.js:31-42` → const j=await r.json().catch(()=>null); return j ?? {success:false,error:'HTTP '+r.status};
- ℹ️ `memory-leak` web2-fb-post-preview attaches a document keydown Escape listener per open(); it self-removes only on the Escape path. Closing via the button or overlay-click does NOT remove it, leaking one document keydown listener per preview. — `web2-fb-post-preview.js:132-142` → Remove the esc2 keydown listener inside close() too, not only in the Escape branch.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟡 Bulk-send PROGRESS/STATE reads are unauthenticated GETs with no x-web2-token: \_pollJob GET /api/web2/msg-send/:jobId, \_fetchJob, \_drainExtension GET /:jobId/extension-items, \_maybeReattachActive GET /api/web2/msg-send/active. extension-items returns per-order message text + customer/page/conversatio — `web2-msg-template-send.js:183,216,233,429` → Add W2MT.\_authHeaders() to all msg-send GET/poll/active/extension-items fetches and require x-web2-token server-side under WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE.
- ⚪ Template card rendering escapes only '<' (replace(/</g,'&lt;')) for Name and Content, not & > ". Values are operator-authored/server-seeded so low risk, but single-char escaping into innerHTML is fragile and inconsistent with proper esc() used in sibling modules. — `web2-msg-template-ui.js:176-177` → Use full HTML escaper (& < > ") like web2-fb-post-preview esc() / Web2Escape.escapeHtml.
- ⚪ data-id="${t.id}" interpolated UNescaped into card markup (template), while quick-reply uses \_escapeHtml(r.id). Inconsistent; a malformed id with a quote breaks attribute parsing / could inject. — `web2-msg-template-ui.js:179, web2-quick-reply.js:479` → Escape t.id when building the data-id attribute.
- ℹ️ Quick-reply topicColor is interpolated into inline style background:${escapeHtml(topicColor)}; escapeHtml does not sanitize CSS so a crafted color could inject CSS (cosmetic, no JS exfil). Normally from a color-picker. — `web2-quick-reply.js:350,477,588` → Validate topicColor against /^#[0-9a-f]{3,8}$/i before persist/render.
- ℹ️ fb-share image url/dataUrl flows via sessionStorage; consumer fb-posts-composer.js:69 correctly requires /^https?:\/\// before adding url images (blocks javascript:). Preview overlay esc()s src. No token at rest here; quick-reply reads localStorage web2_auth token only to forward as header (not logg — `web2-fb-share.js, web2-fb-post-preview.js:113,121` → No change; acceptable.

**Ghi chú:** SSE/topic naming, pool usage, and routes are correct Web 2.0 (web2:bulk-send:_, /api/web2_, no chatDb/TPOS coupling) — no layer-coupling bugs found.; Timezone: web2-fb-post-preview.js:84 correctly formats scheduledTime with timeZone 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' (GMT+7). No naive Date parsing of Pancake timestamps in this unit.; Write auth (x-web2-token) IS present on all mutating template/quick-reply/claim/result/cancel calls via Web2Auth.authHeaders; the gap is only on read/poll/active/extension-items GETs (security #1).; uploadImage()/imgbb path is documented dead (key broken); publish sends bytes directly. Consider removing to avoid confusion.; Files are well under the 800-line limit and cleanly split; main risks are runtime races (double-submit, listener/timer leaks, optimistic mark-sent) rather than structure.

### shared:realtime

The realtime + optimistic-UI backbone for Web 2.0. web2-sse-bridge.js exposes the Web2SSE singleton: one multiplexed EventSource to /api/realtime/web2/sse with per-topic subscriber Sets, exponential reconnect (1.5s→30s), a synthetic 'resync' dispatch on reconnect, topic-change debounce (50ms), and a visibilitychange force-reopen after 60s silence. web2-sse-topics.js is the frozen topic-name registry. web2-realtime.js is a separate Pancake WebSocket client (direct mode disabled, proxy-only to web2-realtime.onrender.com) feeding pages:new_message etc. web2-optimistic.js codifies the snapshot/apply/run/rollback UI-first pattern (Web2Optimistic.run). web2-notify.js is the shared toast bridge. The badge/panel modules (notification-bell, new-msg-badge, unread-panel, db-badge) consume SSE/realtime to surface unread counts and notifications. Pages are full-page-navigation index.html files, so per-page singletons reset on navigation.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** web2-sse-bridge.js: IIFE registers Web2SSE singleton; attaches a document 'visibilitychange' listener immediately (force-reopens EventSource if silent >60s). No EventSource opened until first subscribe(); web2-sse-topics.js: IIFE freezes Web2SSETopics registry object; web2-realtime.js: IIFE registers Web2Realtime; no connection until first subscribe() (lazy \_connectDirect → \_connectProxy since DIRECT_DISABLED=true); web2-optimistic.js: IIFE registers Web2Optimistic.run; web2-notify.js: IIFE registers Web2Notify (autoloaded by web2-sidebar.js for every Web2 page); web2-notification-bell.js: registers Web2NotificationBell; on mount(selector) → \_render, \_attachOutsideClick (permanent document click listener), \_refresh (fetches unread-count + list), \_subscribeSSE (web2:notifications), and setInterval(\_refresh, 60000) poll fallback; web2-new-msg-badge.js: registers Web2NewMsgBadge; on init() (called from native-orders/index.html:566) → \_loadFromStorage, \_ensureStyle, Web2Realtime.subscribe(pages:new_message + pages:update_conversation), reapply, and Web2Realtime.fetchPendingCustomers() initial fetch; web2-unread-panel.js: registers Web2UnreadPanel; on mount(rootEl) → ensureStyles, reload (fetch /api/web2/unread?limit=300), subscribe web2:unread (debounced 400ms reload); web2-db-badge.js: registers Web2DbBadge; auto-mounts on DOMContentLoaded reading <meta name=web2-db> and appending a badge to the page h1

| Control                                               | Handler                                                          | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ----------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Web2SSE.subscribe(topic, callback)                    | subscribe (web2-sse-bridge.js:186)                               | Adds callback to per-topic Set; if topic is new, calls \_refreshConnectionForTopicChange (50ms debounce) which reopens EventSource with merged keys (suppressResyncOnce=true so no resync). Returns an unsubscribe fn that deletes the callback and reopens connection if the topic Set becomes empty. |
| Web2SSE.close()                                       | close (web2-sse-bridge.js:212)                                   | Clears reconnect timer, closes EventSource, clears all subscribers. Not auto-called on navigation (relies on page unload).                                                                                                                                                                             |
| EventSource 'connected' event                         | anonymous (web2-sse-bridge.js:96)                                | Resets reconnectAttempts, sets lastConnectedAt/lastEventAt; if this is a reconnect (everConnected) and not a topic-change reopen, dispatches synthetic 'resync' to every subscriber so pages re-fetch.                                                                                                 |
| EventSource update/created/deleted/change/test events | handleData (web2-sse-bridge.js:110)                              | Parses JSON, looks up subscribers by payload.key (exact match), invokes each callback with {topic,eventType,data,timestamp}. Updates lastEventAt.                                                                                                                                                      |
| document visibilitychange                             | anonymous (web2-sse-bridge.js:229)                               | On tab visible with active subscribers, force-reopens EventSource if not OPEN or silent >60s. This is a reconnect path → triggers resync.                                                                                                                                                              |
| Web2Optimistic.run(opts)                              | run (web2-optimistic.js:69)                                      | snapshot() → apply() (sync UI) → optional successMsg toast → async run() backend; on success calls onSuccess(d); on throw calls rollback(prev) + error toast. Returns undefined (fire-and-forget).                                                                                                     |
| Web2Realtime.subscribe({types,onEvent,debounceMs})    | subscribe (web2-realtime.js:339)                                 | Pushes sub to subscribers[]; lazy \_connectDirect→_connectProxy (proxy WS to web2-realtime.onrender.com). onEvent fired per-type, optionally debounced per-subscriber.                                                                                                                                 |
| Web2Realtime.start({pageIds}) / startMulti()          | start (web2-realtime.js:367) / startMulti (web2-realtime.js:432) | POSTs Pancake account credentials (jwt as token + cookie:jwt=...) to {PROXY_HTTP_URL}/api/realtime/start-multi so the Render broker opens server-side WS to Pancake. Deduped by sorted pageIds key.                                                                                                    |
| Web2Realtime.fetchPendingCustomers()                  | fetchPendingCustomers (web2-realtime.js:508)                     | Fetches Pancake conversations directly per page via Web2Chat, filters INBOX with unread_count>0, returns customer list (psid/name/snippet).                                                                                                                                                            |
| Notification bell toggle button                       | onclick at web2-notification-bell.js:98                          | Toggles \_open, re-renders, and if opening calls \_refresh (fetch unread-count + list with x-web2-token).                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Notification bell 'mark all read' button              | onclick at web2-notification-bell.js:106                         | POST /api/web2/notifications/mark-all-read then \_refresh.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Notification bell item click                          | onclick at web2-notification-bell.js:112                         | POST /api/web2/notifications/{id}/read (fire-and-forget); navigation via the anchor href (safeUrl-guarded).                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Web2NewMsgBadge.onIncomingMessage(payload)            | onIncomingMessage (web2-new-msg-badge.js:196)                    | From a pages:new_message WS event, increments per-psid count in \_pending Map, persists to localStorage, reapply() badges. Skips shop echoes and recently-replied psids.                                                                                                                               |
| Web2NewMsgBadge.clearPendingForCustomer(psid)         | clearPendingForCustomer (web2-new-msg-badge.js:221)              | Deletes pending entry, marks psid recentlyReplied (24h TTL), persists, reapply, best-effort Web2Realtime.markReplied (now a local no-op).                                                                                                                                                              |
| Web2UnreadPanel SSE web2:unread                       | \_debouncedReload (web2-unread-panel.js:128)                     | 400ms-debounced reload() → fetch /api/web2/unread?limit=300, re-render rows, attach wallet balance pills.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Web2DbBadge.mount()                                   | mount (web2-db-badge.js:122)                                     | Reads <meta name=web2-db>, finds target heading, appends a styled badge (idempotent).                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |

**Liên kết:** render.com/routes/realtime-sse-web2.js (SSE hub: /api/realtime/web2/sse, notifyClients, notifyClientsWildcard), web2-realtime.onrender.com (web2-realtime broker: /api/realtime/start-multi, WS broker), chatomni-proxy.nhijudyshop.workers.dev (worker proxy for /api/realtime/web2/_ and /api/web2/_), web2/shared/web2-chat-client.js (Web2Chat: getJwt, decodeJwt, fetchConversationsByPage, getAllPageAccessTokens, getAllAccounts), web2/shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders, getStored; sets window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG), web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js (autoloads web2-notify.js; navigation hrefs), web2/shared/web2-lottie.js (Web2Lottie burst feedback in optimistic \_notify), web2/shared/web2-escape.js, web2-format.js, web2-wallet-balance.js (used by panels), /api/web2/notifications/\* (unread-count, list, {id}/read, mark-all-read), /api/web2/unread (GET list, server route web2-unread.js), native-orders/index.html (calls Web2NewMsgBadge.init), native-orders/js/native-orders-render.js (calls reapply)

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBED web2:notifications (web2-notification-bell.js:143) → \_refresh; NO unsubscribe + a 60s setInterval poll fallback that is never cleared; SUBSCRIBED web2:unread (web2-unread-panel.js:142) → 400ms-debounced reload; guarded by \_subscribed flag but NO unsubscribe on unmount; PUBLISHED/consumed topics registry in web2-sse-topics.js: web2:products, web2:variants, web2:productcategory, web2:native-orders, web2:fast-sale-orders, web2:reconcile, web2:purchase-refund, web2:wallet:\* (wildcard), web2:customer-wallet, web2:supplier-wallet, web2:users, web2:notifications, web2:kpi-dashboard; Bridge synthetic 'resync' event dispatched to ALL subscribers on every reconnect (web2-sse-bridge.js:51) — debounce-less; many pages re-fetch simultaneously on a single backend restart; Bridge topic-change reopen debounced 50ms (web2-sse-bridge.js:169); C16 guard avoids reopen when topic set unchanged; Web2Realtime (Pancake WS) is NOT an SSE topic — separate proxy WS to web2-realtime.onrender.com; subscribers never unsubscribed by new-msg-badge

**console.log:** 20 — web2-realtime.js:165 logs directUserId.slice(0,8) — a truncated Pancake user id; low-sensitivity but identity-adjacent (only reachable if DIRECT_DISABLED is flipped to false); web2-realtime.js:136 'webdriver detected' debug noise on every Playwright/automation run; web2-optimistic.js:45-46 console fallback for notify when notificationManager missing (acceptable); No tokens, phone numbers, or customer names are logged by these modules in the default (proxy-only) path

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `race` Optimistic apply vs SSE echo of the same mutation. Web2Optimistic.run applies UI immediately; the same mutation's backend route fires \_notify → SSE → the SAME page's Web2SSE subscriber re-fetches/re-renders. The bridge has no echo-suppression and run() can't tag a change as locally-originated. When — `web2/shared/web2-optimistic.js:69-105; web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js:110-129` → Thread a clientTxId through run()'s request; backend echoes it in the SSE payload; bridge subscribers skip events whose clientTxId was originated locally within a short window. Interim: pages ignore S
- 🟡 `perf` Resync storm on backend restart: every reconnect dispatches a synthetic 'resync' to ALL subscribers across ALL open tabs with zero debounce. On a deploy/restart, every tab simultaneously re-fetches every subscribed entity, hammering the worker/Render exactly when the backend just recovered (thunderi — `web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js:51-68,104-106` → Jitter the resync (random 0–2s setTimeout per subscriber/tab) and coalesce multiple topics into one re-fetch per page.
- 🟡 `race` EventSource reopen churn / overlap: onerror only reconnects when readyState===CLOSED, but \_refreshConnectionForTopicChange and visibilitychange can both call \_openConnection while a reconnectTimer is pending or a socket is CONNECTING. The just-closed native EventSource can still emit onerror against — `web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js:70-94,140-147,163-184,228-240` → Capture the local es in handlers (const myEs = es) and ignore onopen/onerror when myEs !== es; gate \_openConnection behind a single in-flight flag.
- 🟡 `memory-leak` Notification bell mount() calls setInterval(\_refresh, 60000) and Web2SSE.subscribe('web2:notifications') with NO stored handle and NO clearInterval/unsubscribe. A double mount (re-mount or two bells) yields duplicate 60s polls and duplicate SSE callbacks. Only mitigated by full-page navigation. — `web2/shared/web2-notification-bell.js:146-156` → Store the interval id and unsubscribe fn; guard mount() against double-mount; expose unmount().
- 🟡 `logic` new-msg-badge dedupe/clear key mismatch. \_pending uses String(psid) keys, but \_recentlyReplied is read with raw psid in onIncomingMessage (fromPsid = msg.from?.id, possibly numeric) and reapply (dataset string) yet written as String(psid) in clearPendingForCustomer. A numeric-vs-string psid means a — `web2/shared/web2-new-msg-badge.js:145,205,225` → Normalize every psid to String() at every \_recentlyReplied read/write (e.g. \_recentlyReplied[String(fromPsid)]).
- ⚪ `bug` Stale dedup claim: proxy onmessage comment promises 'dedup by checking conv last_message id' but no dedup exists; it just \_emit()s. Harmless now (DIRECT_DISABLED=true) but if direct mode is re-enabled both sockets deliver duplicate pages:new_message → badge double-counts. — `web2/shared/web2-realtime.js:322-324` → Implement the promised last_message-id dedup Set, or remove the misleading comment and add a guard before re-enabling direct mode.
- ⚪ `bug` Per-subscriber debounce timer in Web2Realtime.\_emit (sub.\_timer) is shared across all event types for that subscriber. A later event of type B cancels a pending debounced type-A call, dropping the type-A delivery. — `web2/shared/web2-realtime.js:76-82` → Key the debounce timer per (subscriber,type), or document that debounced subscribers must use a single type.
- ⚪ `bug` new-msg-badge reapply() injects entry.snippet into a title attribute via string interpolation without escaping (title="${entry.snippet}"). snippet is customer-controlled; a double-quote breaks out of the attribute (attribute injection). — `web2/shared/web2-new-msg-badge.js:159` → Escape snippet for attribute context (escapeAttr), or set element.title = entry.snippet after insertion.
- ⚪ `bug` Notification bell \_relTime uses new Date(iso).toLocaleString('vi-VN') WITHOUT timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'. If created_at is naive or the device is not +7, displayed time is wrong. Project rule mandates GMT+7 display. — `web2/shared/web2-notification-bell.js:158-165` → Pass { timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' } and ensure created_at is ISO-with-offset (append Z if Pancake-style naive).
- ⚪ `bug` unread-panel fmtTime fallback uses toLocaleString('vi-VN') with no timeZone (same GMT+7 risk), active only when Web2Format is absent. — `web2/shared/web2-unread-panel.js:31-36` → Add timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' to the fallback formatter.
- ⚪ `logic` Optimistic run(): if apply() throws, it returns without rolling back even though apply may have partially mutated STATE before throwing, leaving inconsistent UI. — `web2/shared/web2-optimistic.js:74-80` → On apply() throw, attempt rollback(prev) before returning if a rollback fn was supplied.
- ℹ️ `other` Bridge subscribe() returns a no-op unsubscribe for invalid topic/callback, so callers won't notice their subscription silently never registered. — `web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js:187-188` → console.warn on invalid input to aid debugging.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟡 web2-unread-panel.js fetches /api/web2/unread with credentials:'include' but NO x-web2-token header; the server route web2-unread.js GET '/' has no auth middleware. Customer PII (names, phones, message snippets) is served from an unauthenticated endpoint, and the worker is cross-origin so the cookie — `web2/shared/web2-unread-panel.js:74; render.com/routes/web2-unread.js:28` → Gate GET /api/web2/unread with the Web2 auth resolver and send x-web2-token (Web2Auth.authHeaders) from the panel instead of credentials:'include'.
- ⚪ Admin SSE topics (web2:\_admin:\*) authenticate via ?admintoken= query param, which lands in access logs (acknowledged tradeoff). Not in the bridge's normal path. — `render.com/routes/realtime-sse-web2.js:154` → Accept as-is or move to a short-lived signed token; ensure access logs are not shipped to third parties.
- ⚪ Notification bell renders it.title/it.body/it.url into innerHTML. title/body are escaped and url is safeUrl+escapeAttr guarded, so XSS is currently mitigated — but the list is built with template-string innerHTML, so any future field added without escaping is an injection risk. — `web2/shared/web2-notification-bell.js:69-96` → Keep all dynamic fields routed through escapeHtml/escapeAttr; prefer textContent node construction for new fields.
- ℹ️ Optimistic run() leaks the raw backend error message into a toast. If a backend returns sensitive detail in error strings it surfaces to the user. — `web2/shared/web2-optimistic.js:103` → Ensure backend error strings are user-safe.
- ℹ️ web2-realtime.js start/startMulti POST the Pancake JWT both as token and as cookie:jwt=... in the request body to the broker. — `web2/shared/web2-realtime.js:406,467` → Confirm broker is HTTPS-only (it is) and does not log the body.

**Ghi chú:** All Web2 pages are full-page navigations (separate index.html), so EventSource/setInterval/subscriber leaks reset on navigation — capping leak-bug severity to within-page lifetime. Long-lived dashboards (notifications, native-orders) are the exposed cases.; DIRECT_DISABLED=true in web2-realtime.js means the Pancake direct-WS path (and its double-fire + JWT logging) is dormant; those bugs are conditional on re-enabling direct mode.; No TPOS coupling, no chatDb/Web1.0 pool usage, no bare snake_case (Web1.0) topics found — topic discipline is correct (all web2: prefixed). The wildcard web2:wallet:\* subscription correctly round-trips via notifyClientsWildcard which echoes the client's literal key.; web2-sse-topics.js is the single source of truth but several consumers subscribe with hardcoded literals ('web2:notifications','web2:unread') rather than registry constants; 'web2:unread' is not even in the registry — minor drift risk.

### shared:ui (web2/shared UI primitives: popup.js, web2-lottie, web2-effects, web2-motion, web2-command-palette, web2-qr, web2-qr-modal, web2-image-editor, web2-image-lightbox, web2-pwa, web2-mobile.css, web2-components.css)

Shared, framework-free UI primitives for all Web 2.0 pages, each registered as a window.\* singleton and auto-loaded via web2-sidebar.js so every page inherits them without per-page wiring. Popup replaces native alert/confirm/prompt with a Promise-based themed modal (all callers must await); Web2Lottie/Web2Effects/Web2Motion provide lazy-loaded decorative animation (CDN-fetched, reduced-motion aware); Web2CommandPalette is the global Ctrl/Cmd+K launcher; Web2QR renders black-and-white styled QR matrices for labels/bills; Web2QrModal fetches/creates a customer VietQR via /api/web2/customer-wallet; Web2ImageEditor wraps Filerobot/Photopea; Web2ImageLightbox is a shared full-screen image viewer; Web2PWA injects manifest + apple meta for "Add to Home Screen" (no service worker by design). These are pure presentation/utility helpers with one network-touching member (Web2QrModal) and no Web 1.0 / TPOS coupling.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** popup.js: IIFE on load — injects #web2-popup-styles stylesheet (on DOMContentLoaded if loading, else immediately); registers window.Popup. No fetch, no listeners until a popup opens.; web2-lottie.js: IIFE — injects companion CSS link (web2-lottie.css), registers window.Web2Lottie, and on boot() runs scan(document) + starts a global MutationObserver(childList+subtree) on document.body (debounced 150ms) to auto-enhance .empty-state-icon and [data-w2-lottie]. lottie-web library is lazy-loaded from cdnjs ONLY when first animation needed.; web2-effects.js: IIFE init() runs scan(document) + attachHoverZoom() on DOMContentLoaded/now. attachHoverZoom adds document-level mouseover/mousemove/mouseout + window scroll(capture,passive) listeners permanently. Registers window.Web2Effects. canvas-confetti lazy-loaded from jsDelivr on first confetti().; web2-motion.js: ESM top-level await import of motion@11 from jsDelivr (blocking the module's execution); on DOMContentLoaded runs enterOnLoad() stagger reveal of up to 24 static blocks. Registers window.Web2Motion.; web2-command-palette.js: IIFE adds a single document-level keydown listener (Ctrl/Cmd+K toggle, '/' open) immediately; DOM + styles are built lazily on first open(). collectItems() reads sidebar links from .web2-aside a[href] at open time.; web2-qr.js: IIFE registers window.Web2QR; davidshimjs qrcode.min.js lazy-loaded (local then CDN) on first ready()/toDataUrl/card.; web2-qr-modal.js: IIFE registers window.Web2QrModal; DOM/styles + a permanent document keydown(Escape) listener created on first ensureDom(). Network fetch only on open().; web2-image-editor.js: IIFE registers window.Web2ImageEditor; Filerobot CDN (or Photopea iframe) lazy-loaded on first open().; web2-image-lightbox.js: IIFE registers window.Web2ImageLightbox and immediately adds ONE document-level click delegate for [data-w2lb-url] thumbnails. keydown listener added on first open().; web2-pwa.js: IIFE injects <link rel=manifest>, apple-mobile-web-app-\* meta, theme-color, apple-touch-icon into <head> on load (guarded so a page's own tags are kept). Registers window.Web2PWA. NO service worker registered (intentional).; web2-mobile.css / web2-components.css: pure stylesheets; mobile rules are strictly additive inside @media (max-width) and scoped to body:has(.web2-shell).

| Control                                                                                                   | Handler                                                              | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Popup.alert/info/success/warning/error(msg,opts)                                                          | open('alert',...) popup.js:307-432, public map 435-442               | Renders themed modal, lockScroll() (counted, iOS-safe position:fixed+top), focuses OK button, optional Web2Lottie burst for success/error; resolves Promise<void> on OK/Esc/backdrop; cleanup removes node, detaches keydown, unlockScroll().        |
| Popup.confirm/danger/exit(msg,opts)                                                                       | open('confirm',...) popup.js:436,444,446                             | Resolves Promise<boolean> — true on OK/Enter, false on Cancel/Esc/backdrop. Callers MUST await (boolean is a Promise); searched whole repo — no if(Popup.confirm()) misuse found, all 3 call sites use await.                                        |
| Popup.prompt(msg,opts)                                                                                    | open('prompt',...) popup.js:437                                      | Renders input/textarea, resolves Promise<string\|null>. Enter submits (skipped during IME composing / for multiline plain Enter); Esc/Cancel/backdrop → null.                                                                                        |
| Web2Lottie.play/destroy/burst/success/error/loadingOverlay/scan                                           | web2-lottie.js:149/184/206/250/255/333                               | play() registers anim in a Map keyed by element, lazy-loads lib, reaps detached elements on each scan; burst() throttled 1s, appends a transient host to body, auto-cleans on complete or 2.6s safety net.                                           |
| Web2Effects.\* (fadeIn/slideIn/pulse/shake/ripple/countUp/confetti/attachImageDropTarget/attachHoverZoom) | web2-effects.js:95-792                                               | WAAPI-based animations honoring prefers-reduced-motion (durations clamped to 0). attachImageDropTarget wires paste/drag/drop → \_compressImage → onResult(dataURL); returns {detach}. attachHoverZoom floats a fixed clone of hovered content <img>. |
| Web2Motion.staggerIn/reveal/pop/animate/inView                                                            | web2-motion.js:41-69                                                 | Re-exports motion.dev; reveal() sets opacity:0 then animates in on inView (no cleanup of inView observers). Disabled if CDN import fails or reduced-motion.                                                                                          |
| Ctrl/Cmd+K or '/' (global)                                                                                | document keydown web2-command-palette.js:246; open()/run() 223/216   | Opens palette overlay, collectItems() scrapes sidebar links + quick actions, fuzzy-filters, Enter/click runs item (location.href navigation or item.run() e.g. location.reload()).                                                                   |
| Web2QR.toSvg/toDataUrl/card/cardDataUrl                                                                   | web2-qr.js:142/259/269/314                                           | Builds a styled QR SVG from a code string (centerLabel/caption XML-escaped via \_xmlEsc), rasterizes to PNG via canvas; used by product labels and bills.                                                                                            |
| Web2QrModal.open(phone,opts)                                                                              | web2-qr-modal.js:270; fetchOrCreate 215; refresh 248                 | GET /api/web2/customer-wallet/:phone/qr (no auth header — read), on 404 POST upsert (with x-web2-token via \_w2Auth). Sets document.body.style.overflow='hidden', renders VietQR image + customer fields, Copy/Refresh/Open buttons.                 |
| Web2ImageEditor.open(src,opts)                                                                            | web2-image-editor.js:75; \_openPhotopea 191                          | Loads Filerobot (or Photopea iframe), resolves Promise<dataURL\|null>; 'Lấy ảnh về' calls getCurrentImgData (Filerobot) or postMessage saveToOE (Photopea). Cleans up editor.terminate()/removeEventListener('message') on finish.                   |
| Web2ImageLightbox.open / thumb click / arrows / Esc                                                       | web2-image-lightbox.js:144; document click delegate 210; \_onKey 134 | Normalizes+safeImageUrl-filters images, shows fixed overlay, prev/next/Esc navigation; thumbStripHtml renders escaped <button data-w2lb-url> thumbs auto-wired via a permanent document click delegate.                                              |
| Web2PWA.installed()                                                                                       | web2-pwa.js:75                                                       | Returns true if display-mode standalone or navigator.standalone; manifest has NO start_url (intentional — captures the page that was open when added).                                                                                               |

**Liên kết:** web2-sidebar.js (auto-loads all these shared scripts on every Web 2.0 page), Web2Auth / window.Web2Auth.authHeaders (web2-auth.js) — used by web2-qr-modal \_w2Auth, Web2Escape (window.Web2Escape.escapeHtml/safeImageUrl) — used by web2-image-lightbox, Web2Optimistic (wires Web2Lottie.success/error burst feedback), window.notificationManager (shared/js/notification-system.js, Web 1.0-shared) — toast fallback in effects/qr-modal/image-editor, window.lucide (icon rendering in popup, qr-modal), Render route GET/POST /api/web2/customer-wallet/:phone/qr via worker chatomni-proxy (fallback web2-api-kv04.onrender.com), web2-manifest.webmanifest, img/logo-emblem.png (PWA assets), CDN deps: cdnjs lottie-web 5.12.2, jsDelivr motion@11, jsDelivr canvas-confetti 1.9.3, jsDelivr/scaleflex filerobot, photopea.com, jsDelivr davidshimjs qrcodejs

**SSE:** No SSE subscriptions or publishes in this unit. Web2Lottie uses a MutationObserver (debounce 150ms) — runs for page lifetime, never disconnected (acceptable: shared singleton). Web2Effects Mutationless but attaches permanent document mouseover/mousemove/mouseout + window scroll listeners (never removed). Web2CommandPalette + Web2ImageLightbox add permanent document keydown/click delegates (singletons, expected). Web2Motion inView observers are created per reveal() call and never disconnected.

**console.log:** 5 — web2-motion.js:29 console.warn CDN-fail (benign); web2-image-editor.js:125 console.error getCurrentImgData failure (benign, no PII); web2-image-editor.js:165 console.error init failure (benign); web2-effects.js:588 console.warn notify fallback (benign); No console.\* leaks PII, tokens, or customer data in any in-scope file.

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `race` web2-qr-modal scroll-lock collides with popup.js counted lock. Web2QrModal.open() sets document.body.style.overflow='hidden' and close() resets it to ''. If a Popup is open (popup uses body.classList 'w2p-scroll-lock' + position:fixed + top) when the QR modal opens then closes, close() blanks body.s — `web2-qr-modal.js:279,293 vs popup.js:67-82` → Have Web2QrModal reuse the shared counted lockScroll()/unlockScroll() (expose them from Popup) instead of writing body.style.overflow directly.
- 🟡 `race` Web2QrModal.refresh() and fetchOrCreate POST upserts have no in-flight guard. Rapid double-click of 'Refresh QR', or open() racing with a refresh(), fires two concurrent POST upserts to /qr; the later-resolving response wins renderData() and could overwrite the newer QR with stale data (last-writer- — `web2-qr-modal.js:248-268,270-288` → Disable the Refresh button / set an \_inflight flag while a request is pending and ignore stale responses (guard by a request token).
- ⚪ `race` Web2Lottie.play() returns a {\_pending:true} placeholder while the lib lazy-loads. If destroy(el) is called during that window, \_registry.delete(el) runs, but the in-flight ensureLib().then() still calls lottie.loadAnimation and \_registry.set(el, anim) afterward — re-registering an animation for an e — `web2-lottie.js:156-181,184-201` → In the play().then callback, bail if the placeholder was removed/replaced: check that \_registry.get(el) === placeholder before loadAnimation, and destroy immediately if not.
- ⚪ `memory-leak` Web2Motion.reveal() creates an inView observer per matched element and never stores/disconnects it; on SPA-style re-renders or repeated reveal() calls the observers accumulate. Also web2-effects \_scanned is a WeakSet so re-scanned 'ripple' elements are skipped (good), but elements removed and re-add — `web2-motion.js:52-64` → Return a disposer from reveal()/inView usage or rely on motion's stop callback; document that reveal is intended one-shot per page load.
- ⚪ `logic` web2-command-palette.js Tab handler does e.preventDefault() to 'trap' focus but there is only one focusable input and no actual focus cycling — Tab simply does nothing, and clicking a result item or the overlay can move focus out of the dialog (no real focus trap), so the documented A11y focus-trap — `web2-command-palette.js:211-214` → Implement a real focus trap (cycle between input and list options) or remove the misleading 'focus trap' claim; keep Esc/return-focus behavior.
- ⚪ `logic` web2-effects.flash() saves/restores el.style.transition via nested setTimeouts (220ms + 650ms). Calling flash()/highlightRow() again on the same element before the timers fire causes the second call to capture the temporary 'background-color 0.18s' transition as prevTransition, which then gets resto — `web2-effects.js:181-194` → Guard with a per-element flag/dataset to skip overlapping flashes, or store/restore the original transition only on the first concurrent call.
- ℹ️ `logic` web2-pwa.js manifest intentionally omits start_url (documented) so 'Add to Home Screen' captures the current page; scope is '../' (=/web2/). This is by design but means pages OUTSIDE /web2/ that load web2-pwa.js (e.g. native-orders/, so-order/) get a manifest whose scope ('../') may not cover them, — `web2-pwa.js:61, web2-manifest.webmanifest scope:'../'` → Verify Android install works from non-/web2/ pages; if not, compute scope relative to the host page or ship a path-appropriate manifest.
- ℹ️ `logic` web2-qr-modal Escape keydown listener (added once in ensureDom) closes the QR modal on Esc even when another modal/popup is layered on top, because it only checks !el.hidden, not whether it is the top-most overlay. Minor UX overlap with Popup's own Esc handling. — `web2-qr-modal.js:167-169` → Track a top-of-stack modal id or check that the QR modal is the active overlay before handling Esc.

**Security (audit):**

- ⚪ web2-qr-modal.js hardcodes backend URLs (QR_BASE worker + QR_DIRECT web2-api-kv04.onrender.com) instead of reading window.WEB2_CONFIG/API_CONFIG. Per the project base-URL-single-source convention these literals should be fallbacks only; here they are the sole source, so a base-URL change won't propa — `web2-qr-modal.js:16-17` → Read window.API_CONFIG.WORKER_URL / window.WEB2_CONFIG.WEB2_API with these literals as fallback, matching the rest of Web 2.0.
- ⚪ qr.vietqr_url is assigned directly to <img>.src and to an <a>.href without validating the scheme. The value comes from the trusted backend, but an attacker-controlled or malformed value could produce a javascript:/data: href on the 'Mở ảnh QR' anchor. — `web2-qr-modal.js:190,197` → Validate vietqr_url with a https?:/data:image scheme allowlist (reuse Web2Escape.safeImageUrl) before assigning to src/href.
- ℹ️ Customer-facing data in the QR modal (customer_name, phone, qr_code, bank fields) is rendered via textContent (safe). No XSS. Web2QR centerLabel/caption are XML-escaped (\_xmlEsc). Command palette escapes labels (escapeHtml) and sanitizes the empty-state query. Image lightbox escapes URLs/captions. N — `web2-qr-modal.js:188-201; web2-qr.js:338; web2-command-palette.js:168,186` → No change needed — documented as verified-safe.
- ℹ️ GET /api/web2/customer-wallet/:phone/qr is fired without x-web2-token (web2-qr-modal.js:234). This is a READ; WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE gates writes, and the POST upsert/refresh paths DO include \_w2Auth headers (lines 222,239,254). So no silent-401 mutation bug. — `web2-qr-modal.js:222-255` → No change; confirm backend treats this GET as a permitted read.
- ℹ️ web2-image-editor Photopea onMsg validates e.source===frame.contentWindow but the postMessage to Photopea uses targetOrigin '_' (lines 183,247,265). Photopea origin is fixed (photopea.com); using '_' for outbound app.open/saveToOE could in theory be received by a navigated iframe. — `web2-image-editor.js:183,247,265` → Use 'https://www.photopea.com' as the explicit targetOrigin instead of '\*'.
- ℹ️ No hardcoded secrets, no destructive admin endpoints, no PII in logs/SSE. Web2PWA injects only static manifest/meta. — `unit-wide` → None.

**Ghi chú:** No TPOS coupling and no Web 1.0 table/pool/SSE coupling found in this unit — only Web2QrModal touches the network, and it hits /api/web2/customer-wallet (correct Web 2.0 route).; No timezone bugs: the only date render (web2-qr-modal new Date(last_used_at).toLocaleString('vi-VN')) relies on the browser locale; last_used_at is an ISO timestamp from the backend.
