**Ghi chú:** Pool usage correct: backend uses req.app.locals.web2Db || chatDb (web2Db primary); no Web 1.0 table writes; no TPOS coupling (customers come from web2_customers warehouse).; SQL injection: clean — all queries parameterized; ORDER BY via fixed whitelist switch.; Worker forwards all headers (new Headers(request.headers)) in the generic /api/web2 forwarder, so the missing x-web2-token is a frontend+route omission, not a worker strip.; Money-correctness fixes (HIGH-5 double-count of returns, reassign_out) are implemented consistently in BOTH /aggregate and /overlay-by-phones SQL — good — but the client-side modal refresh (app.js:189) diverges from that formula (see medium logic bug).; \_loadSeq guard on load() is well done and prevents most stale-page renders for the main fetch path.; escapeHtml/textContent used consistently for customer data — XSS surface low.; Detail orders fetch hits /api/web2/customers/by-phone/:phone/orders (web2Db join) — Web 2.0 isolated.; /stats endpoint cached 5s in-memory server-side to avoid hammering on filter toggles.

### page:customers

Kho Khách Hàng (Web 2.0 customer warehouse) — a CRUD page over web2_customers (web2Db, pool web2Db||chatDb), fully decoupled from TPOS. The page (index.html + customers-state/render/detail/events/api/app.js) lists/searches/filters/paginates customers, edits via a modal with alt-phones/alt-addresses + status + FB identity, merges duplicate pairs, exports CSV, and falls back to a 3-tier Pancake/live-comment auto-import when the warehouse has no match for a search query. Backend route /api/web2/customers (render.com/routes/v2/web2-customers.js + db/web2-customers-schema.js) enforces strict 10-digit phone normalization (/^0\d{9}$/), non-destructive harvest/import (no overwrite, extra phones→alt_phones, extra addresses→alt_addresses), and publishes SSE topic web2:customers after every mutation. Phone validation, harvest merge, and status normalize all behave as the FOCUS expects; the main issues found are dead UI code, stale selection state across SSE reloads, and a few read endpoints exposing PII without auth.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** index.html head: preconnect fonts.googleapis/gstatic + Inter font stylesheet (render-blocking external font); CSS: web2-sidebar.css, web2-components.css, web2-theme.css, css/customers.css; Script (defer): lucide UMD from unpkg CDN (no SRI); Script: shared/js/notification-system.js, shared/js/core-loader.js (Web 1.0 shared, allowed); Firebase SDK explicitly removed (comment line 25); token-manager.js removed (line 28); Shared web2 modules loaded before page scripts: web2-auth.js (sets API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG), web2-user-info, web2-history-timeline, web2-db-badge, web2-optimistic, web2-sidebar, web2-sse-bridge, web2-qr-modal, web2-wallet-balance, full chat stack (web2-chat-utils/tokens/settings/api/live/tags/client), web2-zalo, web2-extension-bridge, web2-customer-chat-core/modal, web2-customer-chat, web2-customer-detail-modal; Page scripts in strict order: customers-api.js → customers-state.js → customers-render.js → customers-detail.js → customers-events.js → customers-app.js (app LAST, orchestrates); inline: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside') + lucide.createIcons(); customers-app.js init() (DOMContentLoaded or immediate): NS.bind() wires all listeners, load() fetches CustomersApi.list (first page, limit 50), subscribeSse() subscribes Web2SSE 'web2:customers'; beforeunload listener calls NS.\_sseUnsub() to unsubscribe SSE

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-auth.js (API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG base URLs, x-web2-token), web2/shared/web2-customer-store.js (Web2CustomerStore — shared warehouse read/write, strict phone, status normalize — page uses its own CustomersApi though, not this store), web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE.subscribe), web2/shared/web2-customer-detail-modal.js (detail action), web2/shared/web2-qr-modal.js (QR action), web2/shared/web2-wallet-balance.js (Web2WalletBalance pill per row), web2/shared/web2-customer-chat.js + chat stack + web2-zalo.js (loaded for chat, used by detail modal), web2/shared/web2-history-timeline.js (modal history render), web2/shared/web2-user-info.js (actor userId/userName on writes), web2/shared/web2-optimistic.js (loaded but page deliberately keeps await for modal save), Web2Chat.searchConversations / getAllPageAccessTokens / syncFromRenderDB (Pancake fallback in events.js), Backend: render.com/routes/v2/web2-customers.js + db/web2-customers-schema.js, Backend dep: services/web2-livestream-poller.js (lookup-deep tier3 pollNow), Worker route /api/web2/customers/\* → WEB2_GENERIC → web2-api-kv04.onrender.com (chatomni-proxy), localStorage 'pancake_all_accounts' (page id discovery for Pancake fallback)

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBES web2:customers (customers-app.js:63 subscribeSse) → scheduleReload() with 500ms debounce (customers-app.js:55) → load(). Unsubscribed on beforeunload via NS.\_sseUnsub (app.js:85). Single subscription, cleaned up — OK.; PUBLISHES web2:customers from backend \_notify (web2-customers.js:41) after create/upsert/update/merge/delete/archive/import/harvest/alt-phone. Payload {action,id,ts} — id only, no PII — good.; RACE: SSE scheduleReload calls load(), but load() early-returns when state.loading is true (app.js:20). An SSE event arriving during an in-flight load is swallowed (no trailing reload scheduled) → UI can show stale data after a burst of concurrent mutations from other tabs. Low-medium.; Debounce window (500ms) only collapses repeated SSE; a search-input debounce (350ms) shares the same load() and the same loading guard.

**console.log:** 0 — Page JS (web2/customers/_.js) has ZERO console._ calls — clean.; Backend route web2-customers.js logs only e.message on errors (no PII): e.g. console.error('[web2-customers] list error:', e.message) — acceptable.; middleware/web2-auth.js:126 logs req.originalUrl on unauthenticated soft hits (path only, no token/PII) — throttled 60s — acceptable.

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `bug` Dead Pancake manual-add path. runPancakeFallback (events.js:240) was rewritten to a 3-tier auto-import flow and NEVER populates NS.\_pancakeRows nor calls renderPancakeCards. But the click handler on #wcPancakeList (events.js:69) and addPancakeToKho (events.js:337) still read NS.\_pancakeRows[idx] — a — `web2/customers/js/customers-events.js:69,337-370; customers-render.js:96-128` → Either delete renderPancakeCards + addPancakeToKho + the #wcPancakeList listener, or wire runPancakeFallback to populate \_pancakeRows + call renderPancakeCards when auto-import finds nothing (manual r
- 🟡 `race` Stale state.selected across reloads enables merge/select on deleted rows. state.selected is a Set of ids that is NOT pruned when load() (manual, SSE, post-merge, post-delete) replaces state.rows. After another tab merges/deletes one of the two selected customers, an SSE reload refreshes the table bu — `web2/customers/js/customers-app.js:19-53 (load), customers-events.js:80-100, cus` → After each load(), prune state.selected to ids present in state.rows and recompute #wcMergeBtn.disabled (size!==2). Optionally clear selection entirely on filter/page/search change.
- ⚪ `race` SSE reload dropped during in-flight load. load() early-returns if state.loading is true, and scheduleReload's setTimeout fires a single load() with no trailing retry. A burst (mutation in tab A while tab B is mid-load) can leave tab B showing stale data because the SSE-triggered load() hit the loadi — `web2/customers/js/customers-app.js:20 (guard), :55-58 (scheduleReload)` → Track a 'pendingReload' flag: if load() is called while loading, set the flag and re-run load() in the finally block when it clears.
- ⚪ `bug` Status count pills show no numbers except 'Tất cả'. The status buttons (Bình thường/VIP/Cảnh báo/Bom/Nguy hiểm) have no per-status count rendered — load() only sets #wcStatAll. They function as filters but the label implies counts. Minor UX/data inconsistency. — `web2/customers/index.html:120-124, customers-app.js:39` → Either add a GET /list count-by-status aggregate and render counts into each pill, or drop the count affordance from the labels.
- ⚪ `logic` Client normPhone (state.js:54) differs from server normPhoneWeb2 (schema.js:142): client uses slice(-10) for >10 digit strings and does not special-case '84'+9. A 15-17 digit fb_id pasted into the alt-phone or main phone input could pass the client's length===10 check after slice(-10) producing a ju — `web2/customers/js/customers-state.js:54-59; render.com/db/web2-customers-schema.` → Align both with Web2CustomerStore.normPhone: do NOT slice(-10) arbitrary long digit runs; only map '84'+9 digits → '0'+9, otherwise reject. This prevents fb_id/junk runs from being coerced into fake p
- ⚪ `race` runPancakeFallback uses a sequence guard (NS.\_pancakeSeq) to ignore stale tiers, but addPancakeToKho/\_importPancakeConv issue upsert/create with no seq check; combined with the dead-code issue this is latent. More concretely: two overlapping searches both calling lookupDeep can both auto-import; fin — `web2/customers/js/customers-events.js:240-306` → Accept as low-risk (import is non-destructive), but suppress the success notify when seq is stale (move the notify inside the seq check, which finishImported already does — verify the second concurren
- ℹ️ `bug` Merge survivorship keeps primary.status implicitly (status column not in the merge UPDATE), and total_orders/total_spent/bom_count are summed from secondary — but if orders were already counted under primary via shared customer_id this could double count. The repoint UPDATEs run after the stat-sum, — `render.com/routes/v2/web2-customers.js:833-867` → After repointing orders, recompute total_orders/total_spent from the order tables rather than summing cached counters, or document that counters are best-effort.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 Read endpoints expose customer PII with NO auth: GET /list, /search, /:phone, /by-phone/:phone/orders, /:phone/fb-conversation, /lookup-deep and POST /batch-by-phone, /batch-by-fbid have no requireWeb2Auth/Soft middleware. Any unauthenticated caller can dump the entire warehouse (names, phones, addr — `render.com/routes/v2/web2-customers.js:176 (/list), :299 (/batch-by-phone), :265` → Add requireWeb2AuthSoft (→ enforce) to all read endpoints, at minimum to /list, /batch-\*, /by-phone/orders and the side-effecting /lookup-deep. /lookup-deep with live=1 should require auth because it
- 🟡 DELETE /:id?force=true permanently hard-deletes a customer (with linked orders) using only soft web2 auth, no admin secret / role check. force=true bypasses the soft-archive guard and DELETEs even when orders exist (orders are left orphaned with stale customer_id). — `render.com/routes/v2/web2-customers.js:981-1011` → Gate force-delete behind requireWeb2Admin (or x-admin-secret). At minimum repoint/null linked native_orders/fast_sale_orders.customer_id before hard delete to avoid orphan FKs.
- ⚪ Token at-rest: auth uses SHA-256 token_hash (good, C7), but the soft-gate means with WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE unset, all writes are accepted unauthenticated. The audit notes ENFORCE=1 is on in prod (13/06) — verify it stays on; otherwise every mutation endpoint here is open. — `render.com/middleware/web2-auth.js:132 requireWeb2AuthSoft` → Confirm WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1 in prod env; consider hard requireWeb2Auth for destructive ops (merge/delete) regardless of the soft flag.
- ⚪ Third-party scripts loaded from CDNs without SRI: lucide @0.294.0 and Inter font from unpkg/googleapis. No integrity hash → supply-chain risk if CDN compromised. — `web2/customers/index.html:23 (lucide), :11-16 (fonts)` → Add integrity + crossorigin (SRI) to the lucide script tag, or self-host per project security rule (prefer self-hosting critical deps).
- ℹ️ XSS surface is well-handled: all customer-controlled fields rendered via esc() (Web2Escape.escapeHtml) in renderTable/renderPancakeCards. CSV export quote-escapes (""). No innerHTML of raw customer data found. SQL is fully parameterized ($1,$2,…) including search ILIKE (value as param, not concatena — `web2/customers/js/customers-render.js:34-72, customers-detail.js:320` → No action; keep using esc() for any new column. Note title attributes with multi-line alt addresses use &#10; — fine.

**Ghi chú:** FOCUS verification: phone validation IS strict — server normPhoneWeb2 requires /^0\d{9}$/ and create/patch/upsert reject junk (web2-customers.js:621,902; schema.js:148). harvest-comments IS non-destructive — \_harvestOneComment + importPancakeCustomerWeb2 never overwrite existing name/phone/address; extra phone→alt_phones, extra address→alt_addresses, only empty/placeholder fields filled (web2-customers.js:1089, schema.js:386). status normalize IS single-source via Web2CustomerStore.normalize + STATUS map.; batch-by-fbid does NOT leak fb_id→phone: it matches fb_id/fb_psids only and returns lite shape; batch-by-phone filters via normPhoneWeb2 (drops invalid) and only fills requested phones. The historical 'loose phone filter (>=9) swallows fb_id' bug is fixed — no loose length filter remains in this page or its endpoints.; Page is correctly on web2Db (getPool = web2Db||chatDb), routes are /api/web2/customers, SSE is web2:customers (correct hub). No TPOS coupling, no Web 1.0 table writes. No GMT+7/timezone handling on this page (timestamps shown by detail modal, not here) — no tz bug surfaced.; Modal save deliberately keeps await + loading state (no optimistic) per UI-FIRST exception for server-validated saves — correct.; Worker forwards x-web2-token via new Headers(request.headers) on WEB2_GENERIC proxy to web2-api — auth header passes through; CORS is origin-aware wrapped at worker.js.

### page:dashboard-kpi

Three Web 2.0 pages plus their backend routes. (1) web2/dashboard/index.html = F01 aggregate KPI dashboard (revenue today/7d, PBH pending pack, low stock, negative wallets, Sổ Order pipeline, recent PBH, two Chart.js charts) served by GET /api/web2/dashboard-kpi (8 aggregate queries, 30s in-memory cache). (2) web2/kpi/index.html + js/kpi-dashboard.js = per-campaign per-employee KPI leaderboard (Dự báo vs Thực, 5000đ/SP) + audit-log tab, served by GET /api/web2/kpi/kpi and /events. (3) web2/kpi/assignments.html + js/kpi-assignments.js = admin tool to slice STT order ranges to employees (PUT /api/web2/kpi/employee-ranges/:campaignName, admin-gated). All read web2Db pool, route via worker WEB2_GENERIC (/api/web2/\*) and NATIVE_ORDERS, subscribe to SSE topic web2:kpi-dashboard (+web2:fast-sale-orders on dashboard). No TPOS/Web1 coupling in the page reads, but several backend KPI read endpoints leak PII without auth.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** web2/dashboard/index.html: CSS web2-sidebar.css, web2-theme.css; CDN scripts lucide@0.294.0 (defer), chart.js@4.4.6 (defer); shared scripts web2-auth.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-sse-topics.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js; web2/dashboard inline IIFE on DOMContentLoaded: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside'); load() -> fetch GET /api/web2/dashboard-kpi/ with AUTHH() x-web2-token header; if Web2SSE present subscribe('web2:kpi-dashboard') and subscribe('web2:fast-sale-orders') both -> reloadDebounced (600ms) -> load({nocache:true}); setInterval(load, 60000) polling (cached load, no nocache); web2/kpi/index.html: CSS web2-sidebar.css, web2-components.css, web2-theme.css, css/kpi.css; Google Fonts Inter (render-blocking); CDN lucide (defer); shared/js/notification-system.js; shared-auth-manager.js, web2-auth.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sse-topics.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-sidebar.js; js/kpi-dashboard.js; kpi-dashboard.js on DOMContentLoaded init(): loadCampaigns() -> fetch GET /api/native-orders/campaigns (NO auth header); renderCampaignDropdown(); focus #kpiCampaignFilter; wire change/refresh/tab listeners; if Web2SSE subscribe('web2:kpi-dashboard') debounced 600ms -> refresh() (only if currentCampaignId set). No KPI data fetched until a campaign is selected.; web2/kpi/assignments.html: same CSS/font/lucide/notification stack; shared-auth-manager.js, web2-auth.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-sidebar.js; js/kpi-assignments.js; kpi-assignments.js on DOMContentLoaded init(): Promise.all([loadUsers() GET /api/web2-users/list with x-web2-token, loadCampaigns() GET /api/native-orders/campaigns]); renderCampaignDropdown(); wire change/add/save; if URL ?campaign= present auto-select + onCampaignChange; Backend GET /api/web2/dashboard-kpi (dashboard-kpi.js): requireWeb2AuthSoft; 30s cache; runs 8 independent aggregate queries sequentially (revenue today, revenue 7d, pending pack, low stock, wallet overdraft, pbh*by_state, recent_pbh, sepay_pending, so_order pipeline); Backend GET /api/web2/kpi/kpi (kpi.js): no middleware gate, self-resolves token; ensureSchema() runs once on first request to the router (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS web2_kpi*\* + DROP dead caches)

| Control                                                                     | Handler                                      | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Dashboard KPI card #kpiSoUnrecv (onclick inline)                            | web2/dashboard/index.html:185 inline onclick | location.href='../../so-order/index.html'; note path is ../../ from /web2/dashboard/ which resolves to site root /so-order/ (correct), but inconsistent with #recentBody links that use ../                                      |
| Dashboard 'Thu lai' button (error state)                                    | web2/dashboard/index.html:398 onclick=load() | calls load() (no nocache) to retry; load() rebuilds charts via Chart destroy/create                                                                                                                                              |
| Dashboard recent PBH row link                                               | web2/dashboard/index.html:329 anchor href    | navigates to ../fastsaleorder-invoice/index.html?search=<number> (number HTML-escaped via esc())                                                                                                                                 |
| KPI campaign select #kpiCampaignFilter change                               | kpi-dashboard.js:254 change listener         | STATE.currentCampaignId=value; currentCampaignName from dataset; refresh() -> skeleton then loadKpi() or loadEvents() and renders leaderboard/events                                                                             |

| Backend GET /events, /assignments, /employee-ranges GET, /history, /backlog | kpi.js:496/529/596/561/982                   | all UNGATED reads returning KPI/customer/order/assignment data                                                                                                                                                                   |

**Liên kết:** ../../so-order/index.html (dashboard #kpiSoUnrecv card click), ../fastsaleorder-invoice/index.html?search= (dashboard recent PBH rows), web2/kpi/assignments.html <-> web2/kpi/index.html (header nav links), shared modules: web2/shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders/getStored token), web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE.subscribe), web2-sidebar.js (Web2Sidebar.mount), web2-optimistic.js (loaded but UNUSED by these pages), web2-user-info.js (Web2UserInfo.get), shared/js/notification-system.js (notificationManager), Render routes: GET /api/web2/dashboard-kpi (routes/v2/dashboard-kpi.js), GET /api/web2/kpi/kpi|/events|/forecast|/actual|/employee-ranges|/assignments|/backlog (routes/v2/kpi.js), GET /api/native-orders/campaigns (routes/native-orders.js), GET /api/web2-users/list, Data sources: fast_sale_orders, web2_products, web2_customer_wallets, web2_balance_history, web2_so_order, native_orders, web2_kpi_events, web2_kpi_assignments(\_history), web2_user_sessions/web2_users (all web2Db)

**SSE:** dashboard/index.html SUBSCRIBES web2:kpi-dashboard AND web2:fast-sale-orders, both -> same reloadDebounced (600ms) -> load({nocache:true}). Unsubscribe handle from Web2SSE.subscribe discarded; no cleanup on unload (acceptable, page never unmounts; two subscriptions share one timer var so cross-topic bursts collapse into one reload, intended).; kpi/index.html (kpi-dashboard.js) SUBSCRIBES web2:kpi-dashboard -> debounced 600ms -> refresh() only when STATE.currentCampaignId set. Unsubscribe handle discarded; never cleaned up.; PUBLISHER kpi.js emitKpiEvent -> notifyClients('web2:kpi:<beneficiary_user_id>',payload,'update') and notifyClients('web2:kpi-dashboard',payload,'update') AFTER successful insert. dashboard-kpi.js declares initializeNotifiers and stores \_notifyClients but NEVER publishes (dead notifier wiring).; Note: dashboard subscribes web2:fast-sale-orders; within Web 2.0 hub fine, but confirm fast-sale-orders route publishes on web2 hub not legacy hub.

**console.log:** 6 — web2/dashboard/index.html:385 console.warn(err) - logs raw fetch/HTTP error object, low risk; kpi-assignments.js:52 console.log('[KPI]', kind, msg) - leftover debug fallback when notificationManager missing; msg may include campaign/STT text, no token/customer PII; kpi-assignments.js:88,100,122,135 console.warn('[kpi-assign] ... fail:', e.message) - error-message only, no PII/token leak

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `data-loss` onSave PUT replaces the ENTIRE employee_ranges array (ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET employee_ranges=EXCLUDED). No optimistic-concurrency check. If admin A loads ranges, admin B saves a change, then A saves, A silently overwrites B (last-write-wins). The page does not re-fetch ranges before save and assi — `web2/kpi/js/kpi-assignments.js:344-392, render.com/routes/v2/kpi.js:672-679` → Round-trip updated_at as a version token (return on GET, send on PUT, reject 409 if changed); or subscribe the assignments page to an SSE topic and warn on concurrent change.
- 🟠 `race` Assignments table mutates STATE.ranges by array index baked into tr.dataset.idx at render time. onAddRow and delete call renderRangesTable() which destroys focused inputs mid-typing, losing partially-typed values and focus, and any in-flight event whose cached idx pointed at a now-spliced row writes — `web2/kpi/js/kpi-assignments.js:201-245, 333-342` → Update only the affected row instead of full re-render on add/delete; use a stable row id (not array index) for handlers; preserve focus.
- 🟡 `race` emitKpiEvent idempotency key excludes order_code and order_campaign_stt, keying on (actor,customer,product,campaign,event_type,qty_delta,client_event_id). Two distinct orders for the same customer+product+campaign+qty by the same actor with no client_event_id produce the SAME key -> the second INSER — `render.com/routes/v2/kpi.js:140-162, 226-234` → Include order_code (and/or order_campaign_stt) in the idempotency composite, or require a unique client_event_id per emit.
- 🟡 `perf` Dashboard setInterval(load, 60000) runs forever (even tab-hidden), coexists with SSE-driven reloads (redundant), and load() without nocache returns the 30s server cache. Each nocache reload runs 8 sequential aggregate queries on web2Db; SSE bursts (600ms debounce) plus the 60s poll can stack DB load — `web2/dashboard/index.html:427, render.com/routes/v2/dashboard-kpi.js:34-164` → Drop the 60s interval (SSE covers realtime) or gate on document.visibilityState==='visible'; parallelize the 8 backend queries with Promise.all (they are independent).
- 🟡 `logic` Dashboard freshness depends entirely on emitKpiEvent (native/fast-sale routes) and the web2:fast-sale-orders publisher to push web2:kpi-dashboard. Any fast_sale_orders mutation through a path that does NOT emit a KPI event or notify web2:fast-sale-orders leaves the dashboard showing stale revenue_to — `render.com/routes/v2/dashboard-kpi.js:8-11, web2/dashboard/index.html:424-425` → Confirm every fast_sale_orders mutation publishes web2:fast-sale-orders, or document the dependency / keep a short poll.
- ⚪ `logic` Campaign identifier is inconsistent across the flow. renderCampaignDropdown sets option value to (c.name||c.label||c.id); loadRanges/PUT key on campaign NAME (sanitized server-side); loadTotalOrders matches by (x.name||x.label). An id-only campaign yields value=id, so loadTotalOrders finds nothing ( — `web2/kpi/js/kpi-assignments.js:140-143, 152-159, kpi-dashboard.js:60-71` → Standardize on campaign name as the option value and lookup key everywhere (employee-ranges are keyed by sanitized name).
- ⚪ `logic` onSave sends client-supplied editor.userId/userName (Web2UserInfo.get) as the audit-history actor; server (requireWeb2Admin) only verifies the admin token then trusts body userId/userName for the history row. An admin could attribute a change to another user_id in the audit log. — `web2/kpi/js/kpi-assignments.js:354-368, render.com/routes/v2/kpi.js:685-701` → Derive history user_id/user_name from req.web2User on the server; ignore client-supplied identity.
- ⚪ `logic` PUT /employee-ranges history insert is fire-and-forget (.catch) AFTER responding success - a failed insert silently drops the audit entry while the assignment write succeeded. invalidateScopeCache() also clears the ENTIRE \_scopeCache for all users on every save (not selective), causing a scope-recom — `render.com/routes/v2/kpi.js:685-704` → Await the history insert in the same try (or a transaction); make invalidateScopeCache selective to affected userIds.
- ⚪ `logic` Open-ended range semantics are inconsistent: resolveBeneficiary and \_beneficiaryByStt default missing toSTT to Infinity, but the UI and validator treat 0 as the empty default and filter to>=from. The Infinity fallback only triggers when the JSON field is truly absent, which the UI never produces, so — `render.com/routes/v2/kpi.js:196-198, 839-840; kpi-assignments.js:118-119` → Pick one semantic for open-ended ranges (support it in the UI) or remove the Infinity fallback to avoid surprising attribution.
- ⚪ `memory-leak` Both KPI pages call Web2SSE.subscribe and discard the returned unsubscribe fn (dashboard subscribes two topics). No growth today since pages never unmount, but any future soft-navigation/re-init of the sidebar would accumulate subscriptions. Chart.js is handled correctly (destroy before recreate). — `web2/dashboard/index.html:424-425, kpi-dashboard.js:274-279` → Capture unsubscribe handles and call on pagehide/beforeunload.
- ⚪ `other` Dashboard kpiStock and kpiWallet cards have data-clickable + cursor:pointer + title='Bam de xem danh sach' but NO onclick handler, so clicking does nothing - misleading affordance. Only kpiSoUnrecv has a working onclick. — `web2/dashboard/index.html:166-176, 185` → Wire kpiStock/kpiWallet to their list pages or remove the clickable affordance.
- ℹ️ `other` Dashboard revenue_today/7d correctly pin Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh. But recent_pbh created_at is rendered with toLocaleString('vi-VN') which uses the browser's locale TZ, not pinned to Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh - on a non-VN browser it shows wrong local time, violating the Web 2.0 GMT+7 display rule. — `web2/dashboard/index.html:333, kpi-dashboard.js:37-41` → Pin recent_pbh time formatting with timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 GET /api/web2/kpi/events is completely UNGATED (no requireWeb2Auth*). Returns SELECT * FROM web2_kpi_events including customer_id, order_code, product_code, beneficiary_name, actor_name, qty for any campaign to any anonymous caller. The Audit log tab calls it with no token. Customer-linked sales att — `render.com/routes/v2/kpi.js:496-526` → Add requireWeb2AuthSoft (ideally admin for the full ledger) or restrict by req.kpiScope like /kpi; stop SELECT \* and drop customer_id from the response.
- 🟠 GET /employee-ranges/:campaignName, /history, /assignments, and /backlog are all UNGATED reads exposing employee STT assignments, history (user_id/user_name), and backlog events (customer_id/order_code). Any anonymous client can enumerate assignments and read order/customer identifiers. — `render.com/routes/v2/kpi.js:529-611, 982-1008` → Gate these GETs with requireWeb2AuthSoft minimum; /backlog and full ledger should be requireWeb2Admin since they expose customer_id + order_code.
- 🟡 GET /api/web2/kpi/kpi self-resolves token but only blocks anonymous access when process.env.WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE==='1'. If that env flag is ever unset/regressed, anonymous callers get every employee's revenue/KPI (default-open). Revenue + beneficiary names are sensitive. — `render.com/routes/v2/kpi.js:852-869` → Make the 401 unconditional (require valid token regardless of WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE) since the frontend already always sends x-web2-token here.
- 🟡 GET /api/native-orders/campaigns is fetched WITHOUT x-web2-token by both kpi pages (loadCampaigns), so campaign names + order counts pulled unauthenticated; endpoint applies kpiScope but with no token scope is null (see-all). Campaign list leaks to anonymous. — `web2/kpi/js/kpi-dashboard.js:50, kpi-assignments.js:95` → Send x-web2-token on the campaigns fetch and enforce token on the server route.
- ⚪ web2-optimistic.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js are loaded but never referenced by these pages (dead weight). kpi pages render-block on Google Fonts Inter and load lucide from unpkg without SRI. — `web2/dashboard/index.html:264-268, web2/kpi/index.html:11-24` → Drop unused scripts; add SRI/self-host CDN deps; preload only the critical font weight.
- ℹ️ Dashboard renders recent_pbh customer_name and number via esc() (textContent-based) - XSS-safe. kpi-dashboard.js escapes string fields via escapeHtml; raw numeric e.order_campaign_stt/e.qty_delta are numbers (safe). No untrusted-HTML injection found in page render paths. — `web2/dashboard/index.html:403-407, kpi-dashboard.js:201-209` → No action; keep escapeHtml for any newly added string columns (e.g. raw_payload).
- ℹ️ PUT /employee-ranges is correctly requireWeb2Admin and parameterized; campaign name sanitized server-side. dashboard-kpi queries are parameterless aggregates (no injection surface). — `render.com/routes/v2/kpi.js:614, dashboard-kpi.js` → No action.

**Ghi chú:** dashboard-kpi.js uses web2Db pool with chatDb fallback; queries read web2\__ tables + fast_sale_orders/native_orders (Web 2.0 PBH/native data) - no Web1.0 table writes, no TPOS calls. Compliant.; Worker routing: /api/web2/kpi and /api/web2/dashboard-kpi match WEB2_GENERIC (/api/web2/_) -> web2-api; /api/native-orders/\* -> NATIVE_ORDERS. No TPOS catch-all leakage.; ensureSchema in kpi.js is idempotent (CREATE/INDEX IF NOT EXISTS, DROP IF EXISTS dead caches) guarded by \_migrationDone - safe across Render restarts; runs on first request via router.use.; Frontend attaches x-web2-token on dashboard-kpi, /kpi, web2-users/list, and assignments PUT; it does NOT send a token to /events (and the route does not require one - the leak).; \_scopeCache has LRU cap 500 + 5min TTL; \_softWarnLast and idempotency are bounded - no obvious unbounded server-side memory growth.; Chart.js: chartRev/chartState destroyed before recreation each reload - no canvas/chart leak.; No console logs leak tokens or customer PII; the notable ones are error.message strings plus one leftover debug console.log fallback in assignments.

### page:fastsale-delivery-refund

Two near-identical Web 2.0 list pages: Phiếu giao hàng (web2/fastsaleorder-delivery, dlv-app.js → /api/delivery-invoices/_) and Trả hàng (web2/fastsaleorder-refund, rf-app.js → /api/refunds/_). Each renders a paginated/filterable table of delivery-invoice or refund records (created upstream from the PBH page) and lets the user advance a state machine via row action buttons, with optimistic UI + SSE auto-refresh. CRITICAL nuance for the MONEY focus: the refund page is a read-only ledger/status tracker — approve/complete/cancel only mutate state + state_history; they perform NO wallet credit and NO stock restock. The old money-bearing flow (/api/refunds/from-pbh) is killed (HTTP 410) and redirects to web2-returns, which is where the real atomic kho+ví refund happens. So refund double-credit cannot originate in this unit; amount_refund here is purely informational and decoupled from any wallet movement. Both routes correctly hit web2-api (worker DELIVERY_INVOICES/REFUNDS patterns) on pool web2Db, but read/write Web 1.0 tables fast_sale_orders only for snapshot reads on create (which lives on the PBH page, not here).

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** Google Fonts preconnect + Inter stylesheet (both index.html); CSS: web2-sidebar.css, web2-base.css, web2-components.css, page-builder.css, web2-theme.css (versioned query strings); lucide UMD icon lib (unpkg, defer) — lucide.createIcons() called in init() and after each render; web2-auth.js?v=20260613guard — sets window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG (WORKER_URL source) BEFORE app script; web2-user-info.js (provides Web2UserInfo used by refund \_by() audit label); web2-history-timeline.js (loaded but not referenced by these page scripts); web2-optimistic.js?v=20260601a — window.Web2Optimistic.run used by changeState; web2-sidebar.js?v=20260620a — mounts aside AND autoloads shared modules (popup.js, web2-format.js, web2-escape.js, web2-lottie.js, notification-system.js, web2-pwa.js, command-palette...) via async=false injected <script> tags; web2-sse-bridge.js?v=20260613h — provides window.Web2SSE singleton EventSource; DOMContentLoaded: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside'); dlv-app.js / rf-app.js IIFE: defines STATE {orders:[],total:0,page:1,limit:200,state:'',search:''}; init() wires button/select/search listeners, calls load() (GET /api/.../load), then Web2SSE.subscribe('web2:delivery'|'web2:refunds', debounced load)

| Control                                                                      | Handler                                                                           | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| GET /api/delivery-invoices/load (and /api/refunds/load) — initial data fetch | load() dlv-app.js:46 / rf-app.js:57                                               | Builds URLSearchParams from STATE.search/state/page/limit, fetches WORKER+/load, sets STATE.orders/total, calls renderRows+renderCounters+renderPagination. On error replaces tbody with escaped error message. No auth header sent.                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Search input #dlvSearch/#rfSearch (Enter key)                                | applyFilters() dlv-app.js:200 / rf-app.js:206                                     | Sets STATE.search=trim(value), STATE.state=select value, STATE.page=1, load().                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Status <select> #dlvState/#rfState (change)                                  | applyFilters via change listener (dlv-app.js:228 / rf-app.js:234)                 | Same as applyFilters — refetch page 1 with new state filter.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Áp dụng button #dlvApply/#rfApply                                            | applyFilters                                                                      | Refetch with current input+select values.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Xóa lọc button #dlvClear/#rfClear                                            | clearFilters() dlv-app.js:206 / rf-app.js:212                                     | Clears inputs and STATE filters, page=1, load().                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Tải lại button #dlvReload/#rfReload                                          | load                                                                              | Re-fetch current page.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Search clear #dlvSearchClear/#rfSearchClear                                  | inline listener dlv-app.js:229 / rf-app.js:235                                    | Clears search input + STATE.search, load() — NOTE: does not reset STATE.state or STATE.page (minor inconsistency vs clearFilters).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Row eye button → DlvApp.detail / RfApp.detail                                | detail() dlv-app.js:132 / rf-app.js:141                                           | GET /api/.../:number, then Popup.alert with full record incl partner name+phone+address, COD, state history (with by/at). PII rendered into a popup but via Popup.alert text (not innerHTML).                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Delivery row: Bắt đầu giao / Giao thành công / Bị trả / Hủy buttons          | DlvApp.ship\|deliver\|return\_\|cancel → changeState(n,path,label) dlv-app.js:142 | Popup.confirm → Web2Optimistic.run: snapshot row opacity, apply opacity 0.6 + pointerEvents none, POST /api/delivery-invoices/:number/{ship\|deliver\|return\|cancel} with EMPTY body {} (no by, no x-web2-token). On success: load() (full refresh). On failure: rollback opacity + error toast. Backend \_changeState validates DELIVERY_TRANSITIONS in a FOR UPDATE txn and publishes SSE web2:delivery. |
| Refund row: Duyệt / Hoàn thành / Hủy buttons                                 | RfApp.approve\|complete\|cancel → changeState(n,path,label) rf-app.js:151         | Popup.confirm → Web2Optimistic.run: POST /api/refunds/:number/{approve\|complete\|cancel} with body {by:\_by()} (client-supplied audit label from localStorage Web2UserInfo, NO x-web2-token). Backend \_changeState validates REFUND_TRANSITIONS in FOR UPDATE txn, appends history, publishes SSE web2:refunds. NO wallet/stock side effect — pure status change.                                         |
| Pagination ‹ / page-n / › buttons                                            | goPage(p) dlv-app.js:214 / rf-app.js:220                                          | STATE.page=max(1,p), load().                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Header checkbox #dlvCheckAll/#rfCheckAll and per-row .row-check              | NONE                                                                              | DEAD CONTROLS: checkboxes are rendered but no listener is wired — selecting rows does nothing (no bulk action exists).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| GET /api/delivery-invoices/:number and /api/refunds/:number                  | detail()                                                                          | Read single record; 404 returns {error}. No auth.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Backend POST /from-pbh (refunds)                                             | refunds.js:219                                                                    | Returns HTTP 410 — legacy refund creation killed, redirects to /api/web2-returns. (delivery-invoices /from-pbh is live and creates a record with 23505 retry-on-unique number generation.)                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Backend DELETE /:number (both routes)                                        | delivery-invoices.js:450 / refunds.js:370                                         | Deletes record; default guard state IN (pending/cancel) or (draft/cancel); force=1 query param bypasses ALL guards and hard-deletes ANY state with NO admin secret and NO auth. Not invoked by these pages but reachable via worker.                                                                                                                                                                        |

**Liên kết:** web2/fastsaleorder-invoice/index.html (PBH list — rows link the PBH cell here, though links are static href with no number param), web2/returns/ + /api/web2-returns (the real money+stock refund flow; refunds /from-pbh 410-redirects here), web2/shared/web2-auth.js (API_CONFIG.WORKER_URL source), web2/shared/web2-optimistic.js (Web2Optimistic.run), web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE), web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js (mount + autoload format/escape/popup/lottie), web2/shared/web2-format.js + web2-escape.js (Web2Format.dateTime GMT+7, Web2Escape.escapeHtml — autoloaded, race-prone), web2/shared/popup.js (window.Popup), web2/shared/web2-user-info.js (Web2UserInfo for refund \_by()), render.com/routes/delivery-invoices.js, render.com/routes/refunds.js (web2Db, fast_sale_orders snapshot read), render.com/db/with-transaction.js, cloudflare-worker/modules/config/routes.js (DELIVERY_INVOICES, REFUNDS patterns → web2-api)

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:delivery (dlv-app.js:239) — debounce 600ms → load(); single Web2SSE.subscribe in init(); SUBSCRIBE web2:refunds (rf-app.js:245) — debounce 600ms → load(); PUBLISH web2:delivery on create + ship/deliver/return/cancel (delivery-invoices.js:320,387) via web2RealtimeSseNotify, eventType 'update', payload {action,number,ts} — NO PII; PUBLISH web2:refunds on (legacy-disabled create) + approve/complete/cancel (refunds.js:290,354) payload {action,number,ts} — NO PII; Cleanup: the unsubscribe fn returned by Web2SSE.subscribe is IGNORED and there is no page-unload/visibilitychange teardown. Acceptable for a whole-page app (page lifetime == subscription), but if these pages were ever embedded as a partial, the EventSource/callback would leak.; Synthetic 'resync' event on SSE reconnect is treated like any event (debounced load) — fine.

**console.log:** 0

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `logic` Optimistic successMsg fires BEFORE the backend confirms. Web2Optimistic.run shows successMsg immediately on apply() (web2-optimistic.js:81), so on a server rejection (e.g. 409 invalid transition, 404, or network error) the user first sees a green success toast ('Bắt đầu giao DLV-...' / 'Duyệt RF-... — `dlv-app.js:181 / rf-app.js:190 (successMsg passed) + web2-optimistic.js:81` → Drop successMsg from changeState and instead notify success inside onSuccess (after run() resolves), or have Web2Optimistic defer successMsg until backend ok.
- 🟡 `race` Double-submit window on rapid clicks. changeState disables the row only inside Web2Optimistic.apply() AFTER Popup.confirm resolves; between two fast clicks (or clicking ship then deliver before the first load() completes) two POSTs can be issued. The backend FOR UPDATE + transition validation preven — `dlv-app.js:142-198 / rf-app.js:151-204` → Add a per-row in-flight guard (dataset.busy) set before Popup.confirm and cleared on settle; ignore clicks while busy.
- ⚪ `tpos-coupling` Backend create paths read Web 1.0 table fast*sale_orders directly (delivery-invoices.js:242, refunds legacy:235) from the web2Db pool. This relies on web2Db holding a copy of fast_sale_orders. fast_sale_orders is documented as a Web 2.0-adjacent legacy table (no web2* prefix) — acceptable per conven — `render.com/delivery-invoices.js:241-244; render.com/refunds.js:235` → Document the web2Db.fast_sale_orders dependency; ensure it is the web2Db copy, not a chatDb read.
- ⚪ `bug` GMT+7 timezone race on first render. Neither HTML loads web2-format.js explicitly; it is autoloaded asynchronously by web2-sidebar.js via injected <script async=false> at HTML line ~133, while the app script (line 141) runs init()→load()→renderRows() on DOM ready. Dynamically-injected scripts execut — `dlv-app.js:10-15 fmtDate fallback; rf-app.js:21-26; web2-sidebar.js:92 autoload` → Either load web2-format.js with an explicit <script> before the app script in both index.html, or have fmtDate fallback compute via Intl.DateTimeFormat('vi-VN',{timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'}).
- ⚪ `logic` Search-clear (X) button only resets STATE.search and reloads, but does NOT reset STATE.state or STATE.page, unlike clearFilters(). Clicking it on page 3 with a state filter keeps page 3 and the state filter, which can yield an empty page when total shrinks — inconsistent UX vs the 'Xóa lọc' button. — `dlv-app.js:229-233 / rf-app.js:235-239` → Reset STATE.page=1 in the search-clear handler (and consider whether state filter should persist).
- ⚪ `bug` CheckAll and per-row checkboxes are dead UI — rendered in markup (index.html:97 / row-check in renderRows) but no handler is wired and no bulk operation exists. Misleads users into thinking bulk actions are available. — `dlv-app.js:90 (row-check), index.html:97 #dlvCheckAll; rf-app.js:100, index.html` → Remove the checkboxes or implement bulk state-change/delete with proper auth.
- ⚪ `data-loss` refunds.amount_refund / total_quantity are computed at create time and are decoupled from any actual wallet or stock movement — these are display-only ledger numbers and the page presents amountRefund in red as if it were a real money figure (rf-app.js:116). Because the real refund money+stock is ex — `rf-app.js:116; refunds.js:128-139 computeRefundTotals (only used by 410-disabled` → Either remove the money column from this read-only legacy view or label it clearly as a recorded/legacy figure not reflecting actual wallet movement; source the displayed refund amount from web2-retur
- ℹ️ `race` SSE-event + optimistic-update interplay is benign: after a local mutation the page calls load() in onSuccess AND receives its own web2:delivery/web2:refunds SSE (debounced 600ms) → a second load(). Both refetch authoritative state so there is no divergence, just one redundant fetch. No stale-cursor/ — `dlv-app.js:174 onSuccess load() + :239 SSE load(); rf-app.js:183 + :245` → Optional: skip the SSE-triggered reload when the local mutation just reloaded (suppress window), but current behavior is correct, only slightly wasteful.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 All write endpoints are completely unauthenticated. /api/delivery-invoices and /api/refunds are mounted in server.js (lines 761-762) WITHOUT requireWeb2Auth, and neither route file applies any auth middleware. The page scripts send NO x-web2-token on any POST/DELETE. Under WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1 this s — `render.com/server.js:761-762; dlv-app.js:162-169 (empty body, no header); rf-app` → Apply requireWeb2Auth (or requireWeb2AuthSoft gated by WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE) to both routers in server.js, and have the page changeState() attach Web2Auth.authHeaders()/x-web2-token like other web2 mutat
- 🟠 Destructive DELETE with force=1 bypasses ALL state guards and hard-deletes a record in ANY state (delivered/completed/approved) with no admin secret and no auth. Reachable through the public worker even though the pages don't call it. — `render.com/refunds.js:370-388; render.com/delivery-invoices.js:450-468` → Gate force=1 deletes behind x-admin-secret, or remove force from the public path. At minimum require web2 auth.
- 🟡 Audit 'by' field on refund state changes is client-supplied and spoofable — \_by() reads window.Web2UserInfo from localStorage and is sent in the request body; the backend stores it verbatim in state_history with no server-side identity verification. Anyone can forge who approved/cancelled a refund. — `rf-app.js:9-13 (_by), :176; refunds.js:326 (history.push by)` → Derive 'by' server-side from the authenticated web2 token claim instead of trusting the body.
- ⚪ detail() popups render customer PII (name, phone, address, full state history) — fine via Popup.alert text, but the data path relies on Web2Escape autoload; if escapeHtml fallback weren't textContent-based this would be XSS. Current fallback escapeHtml uses textContent (safe). — `dlv-app.js:137-140; rf-app.js:146-149; escapeHtml dlv-app.js:16 / rf-app.js:27` → Keep textContent-based escaping; ensure no future migration to innerHTML for record fields.
- ℹ️ WORKER URL hardcoded as fallback literal but primary is window.API_CONFIG.WORKER_URL (per base-url-single-source convention). No secrets in client code. — `dlv-app.js:4-6; rf-app.js:4-6` → OK — matches WEB2_CONFIG convention; literal is documented fallback only.

**Ghi chú:** MONEY focus verdict: NO refund double-credit and NO status-race data-corruption risk exists WITHIN this unit. Refund approve/complete/cancel here are pure state transitions guarded by FOR UPDATE + REFUND_TRANSITIONS inside withTransaction (real atomic txn). The actual money+stock refund lives in web2-returns; the legacy money-bearing /api/refunds/from-pbh is hard-disabled (HTTP 410). The most material risk surfaced is the HIGH unauthenticated-write exposure on both routes.; wallet-refund.js (services) is Web 1.0 PROD (customer_wallets/wallet_transactions/pending_wallet_withdrawals) and is NOT called by /api/refunds — it is well-engineered (idempotent, atomic, FIFO virtual-credit restore, never-drop-obligation). Reported here only to confirm it is decoupled from this Web 2.0 unit.; withTransaction helper (db/with-transaction.js) is correct: single client, real BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK, post-commit hook queue — prevents the multi-connection pseudo-transaction bug. Both state machines use it properly.; Worker routing confirmed: DELIVERY_INVOICES (/api/delivery-invoices/_) and REFUNDS (/api/refunds/_) have explicit patterns in cloudflare-worker/modules/config/routes.js:110-113,242-243 → reach web2-api, NOT the TPOS catch-all. No TPOS coupling and no chatDb-only coupling in the request path (pool = web2Db || chatDb fallback).; Both page scripts are clean of console.\* (0 calls) and use parameterized SQL throughout the backend (no string-built queries). Error responses leak raw e.message to the client (e.g. load() catch renders escaped DB error text) — minor info disclosure, low severity, already escaped.

### page:fastsale-invoice

Web 2.0 PBH (Fast Sale Order / invoice) list page at web2/fastsaleorder-invoice/. Lists fast_sale_orders from Render Postgres (web2Db) via worker /api/fast-sale-orders/load with search/state/limit filters, Customer-360 scoping (?customerId), KPI restricted-scope banner, CSV export, detail/history/customer-360 modals, per-row print via a separate print.html A4 view, cancel (UI-first optimistic, backend restock+wallet refund), bulk-cancel, create-delivery, create-refund (nav to ../returns/), reset-stt. Split into 6 small modules (state/api/render/actions/filters/app) via window.Pbh\* + a window.PbhApp inline-onclick shim. Realtime is SSE-only (web2:fast-sale-orders + web2:native-orders).

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** index.html:10-15 Google Fonts preconnect + Inter (render-blocking external); index.html:17-23 CSS: web2-sidebar/base/components/page-builder/theme; index.html:22 lucide UMD (defer); index.html:192 web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders + API_CONFIG, loads first); index.html:193-195 web2-user-info, web2-history-timeline, web2-optimistic; index.html:196 web2-sidebar.js -> DOMContentLoaded Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside') (auto-loads Popup/notification/command-palette/Lottie); index.html:202 web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE); index.html:204-210 jsbarcode/qrcode/web2-qr/receiptline/web2-bill-service(Web2Bill)/web2-printer; index.html:213-218 pbh-state->api->render->actions->filters->app; pbh-app.js:47 init(): lucide.createIcons, \_loadAndRenderScopeBanner GET /api/web2/kpi/scope, parse ?customerId into STATE, subscribe SSE web2:fast-sale-orders+web2:native-orders, wire buttons, injectHistoryCss, load(); pbh-api.js:28 load(): GET /api/fast-sale-orders/load?search&state&customerId&page&limit with \_authHeaders -> render rows/counters/chip/pagination; print.html:353 render(): GET /api/fast-sale-orders/:number then fire-and-forget POST /:number/print

| Control                                                   | Handler                                                    | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                           |
| --------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| #pbhSearch Enter / #pbhState / #pbhLimit / #pbhApply      | PbhFilters.applyFilters (pbh-filters.js:59)                | reads inputs into STATE, page=1, load()                                                                                                                                          |
| #pbhSearchClear                                           | inline (pbh-app.js:96)                                     | clears search, STATE.search='', page=1, load()                                                                                                                                   |
| #pbhClear (Xoa loc)                                       | PbhFilters.clearFilters (pbh-filters.js:66)                | clears search+state only; BUG: leaves customerId filter                                                                                                                          |
| #pbhReload                                                | PbhApi.load                                                | refetch with current STATE                                                                                                                                                       |
| #pbhExportCsv                                             | PbhActions.exportCsv (pbh-actions.js:165)                  | anchor download GET /api/fast-sale-orders/export?search&state&customerId (no auth header)                                                                                        |
| #pbhResetStt                                              | PbhActions.resetStt (pbh-actions.js:323)                   | confirm renumber-vs-reset, POST /reset-stt {renumber}, notify, load() (no x-web2-token, blocking await)                                                                          |
| #pbhCheckAll / per-row .row-check                         | inline + document change delegate (pbh-app.js:80,86)       | toggle checkboxes -> updateBulkBar() shows/hides #pbhBulkBar + count                                                                                                             |
| #pbhBulkCancel                                            | PbhActions.bulkAction('bulk-cancel') (pbh-actions.js:180)  | confirm, POST /bulk-cancel {numbers}, notify changed/requested, uncheck-all, load(); backend restocks+refunds wallet per PBH (no auth header)                                    |
| #pbhBulkUnselect                                          | PbhFilters.unselectAll (pbh-filters.js:50)                 | uncheck all + updateBulkBar                                                                                                                                                      |
| row eye (Chi tiet)                                        | PbhRender.detail (pbh-render.js:122)                       | GET /:number, Popup.alert with totals/payment/printCount                                                                                                                         |
| row user-circle (KH 360)                                  | PbhRender.openCustomer (pbh-render.js:163)                 | modal, GET /api/web2/customer-orders/:id?limit=20, native+pbh tables (escaped), Loc PBH -> filterByCustomer                                                                      |
| row history                                               | PbhRender.openHistory (pbh-render.js:261)                  | GET /:number/history?limit=100, timeline modal (userName/changes escaped)                                                                                                        |
| row printer (In)                                          | PbhActions.printOrder (pbh-actions.js:115)                 | window.open print.html?number, warn if blocked, setTimeout(load,3000)                                                                                                            |
| row truck (Tao phieu giao)                                | PbhActions.createDelivery (pbh-actions.js:124)             | confirm, POST /api/delivery-invoices/from-pbh {pbhNumber}, notify (no auth header, awaited)                                                                                      |
| row undo (Tra hang)                                       | PbhActions.createRefund (pbh-actions.js:150)               | find row in STATE.orders, nav ../returns/index.html?prefillPhone&prefillOrder&prefillName                                                                                        |
| source-order link                                         | anchor href (pbh-render.js:75,95)                          | open ../../native-orders/index.html?search= or #code                                                                                                                             |
| customer chip X                                           | PbhFilters.clearCustomerFilter (pbh-filters.js:25)         | STATE.customerId=null, delete ?customerId via history.replaceState, page=1, load()                                                                                               |
| pagination prev/page/next                                 | PbhFilters.goPage (pbh-filters.js:74)                      | STATE.page=max(1,p), load()                                                                                                                                                      |
| window.PbhApp.confirm/cancel (no row button renders them) | PbhActions.confirmOrder/cancelOrder (pbh-actions.js:20,63) | confirm -> Web2Optimistic.run dims/strikes row, POST /:number/confirm\|cancel, onSuccess load(), rollback restores styles; buttons intentionally not rendered (pbh-render.js:70) |
| print.html In / Dong                                      | window.print() / window.close()                            | browser print dialog / close popup                                                                                                                                               |

**Liên kết:** worker /api/fast-sale-orders/\* (load,export,:number,:number/history,:number/print,:number/confirm,:number/cancel,bulk-cancel,reset-stt,merge,batch) -> render.com/routes/fast-sale-orders.js (web2Db), worker /api/web2/kpi/scope (scope banner), worker /api/web2/customer-orders/:id (customer-360), worker /api/delivery-invoices/from-pbh, ../returns/index.html (createRefund), ../../native-orders/index.html (source links), print.html (separate print view, hardcoded WORKER URL), shared: web2-auth, web2-optimistic, web2-sse-bridge, web2-sidebar, web2-bill-service (Web2Bill), web2-printer, web2-qr, receiptline, Popup, notificationManager, web2-history-timeline

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:fast-sale-orders (pbh-app.js:68) -> debounced 500ms -> load(); SUBSCRIBE web2:native-orders (pbh-app.js:69) -> same shared debounce -> load(); Backend PUBLISH web2:fast-sale-orders on create/update/confirm/cancel/print/merge/bulk-cancel; web2:native-orders on pbh-state-sync; single shared sseTimer for BOTH subs (pbh-app.js:59-69); NO unsubscribe/cleanup (benign on full-page-reload site, would leak if embedded); print.html does not subscribe; list print_count refresh relies on setTimeout(load,3000)

**console.log:** 4 — pbh-app.js:64 console.log('[PBH-SSE]', topic, action) leftover debug, fires on every SSE reload; pbh-state.js:44 console.log('[pbh]', msg) notify fallback logs message text; pbh-app.js:43 console.warn scope banner fail (benign); pbh-api.js:49 console.error(e) on load failure (benign)

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `race` confirm/cancel/\_stateChange + native sync on the backend are multi-statement and NOT serialized with an advisory lock (only create-from-native at fast-sale-orders.js:1667, merge:966 and DELETE FOR UPDATE are guarded). A concurrent /confirm and /cancel|/bulk-cancel on the same number can interleave: — `render.com/routes/fast-sale-orders.js:2526 (/confirm), 2286 (/cancel); frontend ` → Wrap /confirm and /cancel \_stateChange in withTransaction + pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext(number)) like merge so transitions on one number serialize.
- 🟡 `race` SSE reload races optimistic cancel/confirm. The handler calls load() on success while the same tab also receives backend \_notify('cancel') on web2:fast-sale-orders and schedules a debounced load() (pbh-app.js:65). Two near-simultaneous load() calls race with NO request-sequence guard or AbortControl — `pbh-api.js:28 + pbh-app.js:60 + pbh-actions.js:42,93` → Add a monotonic request token in load() and ignore stale responses, or use AbortController to cancel the prior fetch.
- 🟡 `logic` clearFilters() (Xoa loc) resets search+state but does NOT clear STATE.customerId or the ?customerId URL param, so the button appears to do nothing while a Customer-360 filter is active; only the customer chip X removes it. — `pbh-filters.js:66-73` → In clearFilters also set STATE.customerId=null and delete the ?customerId URL param.
- 🟡 `bug` setTimeout(load,3000) after opening the print popup is a fixed-delay guess for print_count refresh; if the popup POSTs /print later than 3s the list reloads before the count increments. The subscribed SSE print event already refreshes correctly, so the timer is redundant and racy. — `pbh-actions.js:121` → Remove the setTimeout and rely on the SSE print notify -> debounced load.
- ⚪ `bug` detail() accesses o.partner.name, o.totals.quantity, o.payment.amount, o.sourceLink.code with NO optional chaining; if the API omits any of those objects it throws TypeError and shows a confusing 'Cannot read properties of undefined'. renderRows uses safe (o.partner||{}) but detail does not. — `pbh-render.js:146-155` → Use optional chaining: o.partner?.name, o.totals?.quantity, o.payment?.amount, o.sourceLink?.code.
- ⚪ `logic` openCustomer renders it.totalQuantity under a column header labeled 'SP' (product), mislabeling quantity as product. — `pbh-render.js:217,228` → Relabel header to 'SL' or render product/line info.
- ⚪ `logic` bulkMerge/bulkPrint are exported but no UI calls them; bulkMerge guards on o.state !== 'draft' yet the live state model is only done/cancel (draft kept for render compat, pbh-state.js:57), so the guard rejects every current-model row -- dead/misaligned code. — `pbh-actions.js:216-274 + pbh-state.js:57-65` → Wire merge UI and fix its guard to the 2-state model, or remove dead code.
- ⚪ `bug` print.html prints 'Phieu in lan printCount+1' computed BEFORE the increment POST while the list count comes from DB; if the fire-and-forget /print POST fails (swallowed .catch) the paper says N+1 but DB stays N -- off-by-one on failure. — `print.html:339,344-346` → Show the printed-count line only after a successful increment, or surface the failure.
- ℹ️ `bug` GMT+7 not pinned: fmtDate (pbh-state.js:30) uses new Date(s)+local getHours(); openHistory (pbh-render.js:316) and print.html fmtDate use toLocaleString('vi-VN') with NO timeZone. Render stores UTC TIMESTAMPTZ, so a non-+7 viewer sees wrong invoice times. — `pbh-state.js:30-34, pbh-render.js:316, print.html:207-217` → Pass { timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' } to all date formatters.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 Destructive money/stock writes on /api/fast-sale-orders/\* are NOT auth-gated server-side. server.js:759 mounts the router with no requireWeb2AuthSoft, so even with WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1, POST /:number/cancel, /bulk-cancel, /reset-stt, /merge and DELETE /:number (which restock inventory and refund cust — `render.com/server.js:759 + pbh-actions.js:34,85,107,133,197,334` → Apply requireWeb2AuthSoft to the fast-sale-orders mount and send Web2Auth.authHeaders() on all mutating fetches; at minimum gate /cancel, /bulk-cancel, /reset-stt, /merge, DELETE.
- 🟡 KPI restricted-scope is enforced only on GET /load (applyKpiScope); per-record write/print/detail/history/customer-360 endpoints do not re-check scope, so a restricted NV who knows a PBH number can read or cancel invoices outside their assigned STT range. — `pbh-render.js:124,287 + backend fast-sale-orders.js (no applyKpiScope except /lo` → Enforce scope on :number routes, or document scope as display-only.
- ⚪ print.html hardcodes the worker URL instead of reading window.API_CONFIG.WORKER_URL (violates single-source base-URL convention) and does not load web2-auth, so its POST /print is unauthenticated. — `print.html:200` → Read WORKER from window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG or pass it from the opener.
- ⚪ Customer PII (name, phone) is placed in document.title in print.html, leaking to browser history/tab; the print_count POST swallows errors (.catch(()=>{})). — `print.html:347,344-346` → Avoid phone in document.title; surface print POST failures.
- ℹ️ All customer-supplied fields rendered via innerHTML are escaped (escapeHtml/esc in pbh-render.js renderRows/openCustomer/openHistory and print.html esc); scope banner campaign_name is regex-stripped of <>& (pbh-app.js:34). XSS surface appears covered. — `pbh-render.js:35,64-96; print.html:218` → No action; keep escaping when adding new fields.

### page:fb-posts

Web 2.0 "Đăng bài Facebook" page (web2/fb-posts/) for composing, scheduling, previewing, and managing Facebook posts across 2 pages via Meta Graph API (Pancake is read-only and cannot post). It is a 3-tab orchestrator (Soạn bài / Bài viết / Lịch &amp; Nháp) built from small IIFE modules: fb-posts-app.js (tabs, FB connect overlay, SSE, status), fb-posts-composer.js (page chips, AI caption, media, schedule, publish), fb-posts-media.js (URL/upload/Kho-SP media picker), fb-posts-list.js (published+scheduled posts, infinite scroll, viewer, edit caption), fb-posts-drafts.js (draft/schedule agenda). All Graph calls go through shared window.Web2FbClient (alias FBPostsApi) → worker /api/web2-fb-posts → Render route web2-fb-posts.js (pool web2Db, tables web2_fb_post_tokens/web2_fb_posts, SSE web2:fb-posts). The page never holds a FB token: connect is via OAuth or a one-time pasted user token sent to the server, and /status returns only id/name/picture/canPost. No TPOS coupling and no Web 1.0 pool/table usage.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** CSS: ../shared/web2-sidebar.css, ../shared/web2-theme.css, fb-posts.css (index.html:10-12); JS defer: lucide 0.294.0 from unpkg CDN (index.html:14) — third-party, no SRI; JS: ../../shared/js/notification-system.js (index.html:15); Shared infra loaded before app: web2-auth.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-products-cache.js, web2-product-picker.js, web2-fb-share.js, web2-fb-post-preview.js, web2-fb-client.js (index.html:65-73); Page modules: fb-posts-media.js, fb-posts-composer.js, fb-posts-list.js, fb-posts-drafts.js, fb-posts-app.js (index.html:76-80); init() (fb-posts-app.js:225): mounts sidebar via Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside'); wires tab click listeners; wires #fbpConnBtn → openConnect; lucide.createIcons(); init() detects ?fb_connected=1 in URL → success toast + history.replaceState to strip param (fb-posts-app.js:233-236); loadStatus() on init: GET /status → sets state.connected/expired/pages/aiAvailable/oauthAvailable/user, then renderPill()+renderActive() (fb-posts-app.js:70-85); setupSSE() on init: subscribes Web2SSE 'web2:fb-posts' with 600ms debounce (fb-posts-app.js:213-223); Default active tab 'composer' renders product/media/schedule form; on render, maybeConsumeShare() pulls any Web2FbShare sessionStorage handoff (fb-posts-composer.js:184,52)

| Control                                       | Handler                                           | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| --------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Tab buttons (Soạn bài / Bài viết / Lịch&Nháp) | switchTab (fb-posts-app.js:32)                    | sets state.activeTab, toggles .on classes, calls renderActive() which dispatches to Composer.render/List.render/Drafts.render                                                                                                                                 |
| Kết nối / Quản lý button (#fbpConnBtn)        | openConnect (fb-posts-app.js:88)                  | builds a fixed-overlay modal with OAuth login button (if oauthAvailable) + manual-token textarea + refresh/logout (if connected). No focus trap; closes on backdrop click or Đóng                                                                             |
| Đăng nhập bằng Facebook (OAuth) #fbpCxOauth   | oauthBtn.onclick (fb-posts-app.js:144)            | GET /auth/login-url?return=<current page> → location.href = FB OAuth dialog URL; on FB return server stores long-lived token + page tokens server-side, redirects back with fb_connected=1                                                                    |
| Kết nối bằng token #fbpCxConnect              | connectBtn.onclick (fb-posts-app.js:161)          | reads pasted token, POST /connect {token} → server exchanges long-lived + fetches pages; on success closes overlay + loadStatus(). Token is in plaintext in the textarea DOM until close                                                                      |
| Đồng bộ page #fbpCxRefresh                    | refreshBtn.onclick (fb-posts-app.js:185)          | POST /refresh-pages → re-fetch pages+tokens server-side, reloads status                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Ngắt kết nối #fbpCxLogout                     | logoutBtn.onclick (fb-posts-app.js:198)           | Popup.danger confirm → POST /disconnect → server runs DELETE FROM web2_fb_post_tokens (deletes ALL rows), clears selectedPages, reloads                                                                                                                       |
| Page chip toggle (composer)                   | wire() chip click (fb-posts-composer.js:189)      | adds/removes pid in state.selectedPages Set, toggles .on. No auto-select to avoid posting to wrong page                                                                                                                                                       |
| Chọn SP từ Kho (cho AI) #fbpPickKho           | openKhoPicker (fb-posts-composer.js:256)          | opens Web2ProductPicker multi; onConfirm stores \_selectedProducts, fills name/price if single, auto-adds product image URLs to media, renders chips                                                                                                          |
| Style buttons (sale/new/live/restock/simple)  | wire() style click (fb-posts-composer.js:199)     | sets module-local \_style, toggles .on                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Tạo nội dung (AI) #fbpGen                     | generate (fb-posts-composer.js:314)               | builds payload from selected products or manual fields; POST /caption {product\|products,style,ai}; on success sets textarea value + dispatches input; AI key check via state.aiAvailable selects ai=true. Falls back to template server-side                 |
| Message textarea input #fbpMessage            | wire() msg input (fb-posts-composer.js:210)       | updates char count span                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Media: Từ Kho SP / Tải ảnh lên / Dán URL      | Media.mountGrid btns (fb-posts-media.js:182)      | product→openProductPicker overlay (Web2ProductsCache, adds {url}); upload→file input→handleFiles reads as dataURL and add({dataUrl}); url→promptUrl validates http(s) + mp4 detection                                                                         |
| Schedule radio (now/sched) + datetime-local   | wire() radio change (fb-posts-composer.js:230)    | shows/hides #fbpSchedAt; gather() converts datetime-local string via new Date(v).getTime() to ms                                                                                                                                                              |
| Xem trước #fbpPreview                         | openPreview (fb-posts-composer.js:367)            | gather() then Web2FbPostPreview.open with selected pages/caption/media/scheduledTime — FB-like preview overlay, no network                                                                                                                                    |
| Lưu nháp #fbpSaveDraft                        | saveDraft (fb-posts-composer.js:386)              | POST /draft {id?,pageIds,message,media,scheduledTime}; on success clears editingDraftId + resetForm()                                                                                                                                                         |
| Đăng / Lên lịch #fbpPublish                   | publish (fb-posts-composer.js:410)                | confirmDo dialog with page names + GMT+7 time; POST /publish {pageIds,message,media,scheduledTime,draftId?,createdBy}; server loops pages 1.5s apart, returns per-page results; success toast + resetForm; failures listed via Popup.error; rateLimited shown |
| List page chip / Tải lại                      | render()+load (fb-posts-list.js:81,87)            | sets \_pageId, re-renders, GET /list?pageId&limit=25 → scheduled section + posts; client filter chips (all/live/video/photo/text)                                                                                                                             |
| Infinite scroll sentinel                      | setupInfinite/loadMore (fb-posts-list.js:212,225) | IntersectionObserver on #fbpSentinel (root main.web2-main, rootMargin 400px) → GET /list with \_after cursor, appends to \_posts; disconnects when no \_after                                                                                                 |
| Xem / thumbnail click (post)                  | openViewer (fb-posts-list.js:273)                 | GET /post-detail?pageId&postId → modal with images/videos/engagement/comments (all esc()), permalink link, Sửa caption button                                                                                                                                 |
| Sửa caption in viewer                         | editCaption (fb-posts-list.js:344)                | inline textarea → POST /post-edit {pageId,postId,message} (does NOT delete post, preserves link); updates local \_posts item + re-renders                                                                                                                     |
| Xoá bài (list)                                | del (fb-posts-list.js:255)                        | Popup.danger → POST /delete {pageId,postId} → removes from FB; awaits then reloads list (no optimistic — acceptable per DELETE exception)                                                                                                                     |
