| Drafts filter chips + Tải lại                 | render()+load (fb-posts-drafts.js:63,77)          | GET /drafts?status=all\|scheduled\|draft\|published; groups by day (scheduled_at\|\|updated_at) in GMT+7; renders agenda rows                                                                                                                                 |
| Sửa (draft row)                               | load() data-edit click (fb-posts-drafts.js:109)   | FBPostsComposer.loadDraft(d) then switchTab('composer') — prefills form with draft message/media/pages/schedule                                                                                                                                               |
| Xoá (draft row)                               | del (fb-posts-drafts.js:149)                      | Popup.confirm → POST /draft/:id DELETE → removes draft record only (not FB post); reloads                                                                                                                                                                     |

**Liên kết:** window.Web2FbClient / window.FBPostsApi (web2/shared/web2-fb-client.js) — sole Graph API client; also used by fb-insights, fb-ads-stats pages, window.Web2FbShare (web2/shared/web2-fb-share.js) — handoff from product-card/photo-studio etc. via sessionStorage key web2_fb_share_payload, window.Web2FbPostPreview (web2/shared/web2-fb-post-preview.js) — FB-like preview overlay, window.Web2ProductPicker (web2/shared/web2-product-picker.js) — multi product select for AI/media, window.Web2ProductsCache (web2/shared/web2-products-cache.js) — Kho SP images, window.Web2Sidebar, window.Web2Auth, window.Web2SSE (web2-sse-bridge.js), window.Web2Optimistic, window.Popup, window.notificationManager, Render route /api/web2-fb-posts (render.com/routes/web2-fb-posts.js) + services web2-fb-graph-service.js, web2-caption-service.js, Cloudflare worker route WEB2_FB_POSTS → handleCustomer360Proxy (cloudflare-worker/modules/config/routes.js:158,283; worker.js:226), OAuth callback served by Render at /api/web2-fb-posts/auth/callback (must be whitelisted in FB App)

**SSE:** Subscribes 'web2:fb-posts' in setupSSE() (fb-posts-app.js:216) with a 600ms debounce; on event re-renders only the active tab (drafts or list). NOT cleaned up: the EventSource subscription has no unsubscribe on page hide/unload and the debounce timer 't' is module-scoped (low risk for a single-page-lifetime SPA, but the subscription persists for the page lifetime).; Server publishes 'web2:fb-posts' via \_notify(action,id) after connect/disconnect/publish/draft/delete (route web2-fb-posts.js:56-63,271,306,318,467). Payload is {action,id,ts} — no PII, good.; Composer tab is NOT refreshed by SSE (only list/drafts), so a draft edited in another tab won't reflect while composing — acceptable.

**console.log:** 0

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `data-loss` POST /disconnect runs DELETE FROM web2*fb_post_tokens with no WHERE clause (web2-fb-posts.js:317), deleting ALL stored FB connections, not just the current user's. Combined with the missing auth gate, any caller can disconnect the whole shop. Even with auth, it is a global wipe rather than per-user* — `render.com/routes/web2-fb-posts.js:314-323` → DELETE only the active row: load the token, DELETE WHERE user_id=$1; or accept that single-tenant design is intended but still gate it behind auth.
- 🟡 `logic` datetime-local <-> ms timezone handling can drift. defaultSchedule (composer:100-105) builds an ISO slice using getTimezoneOffset of the BROWSER, and gather() (composer:361) does new Date(v).getTime() interpreting the datetime-local string in the BROWSER's local timezone. If a user's machine is NOT — `web2/fb-posts/js/fb-posts-composer.js:100-105,361; loadDraft:499-501` → Treat the datetime-local input explicitly as Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh: compute ms by constructing the instant for +07:00 (append '+07:00' / use a tz lib) rather than new Date(localString).getTime(), and likew
- 🟡 `race` loadDraft() calls render() (which async rebuilds the composer DOM and calls maybeConsumeShare) then SYNCHRONOUSLY reads #fbpMessage and sets values (composer:489-502). render() also re-runs wire() and may consume a pending Web2FbShare payload, which could overwrite the just-loaded draft message/medi — `web2/fb-posts/js/fb-posts-composer.js:489-503 + maybeConsumeShare:52-82` → Guard maybeConsumeShare so it does not run when editingDraftId is set, or apply draft values after share consumption with an explicit precedence. Set the message after render completes in a single cod
- 🟡 `logic` Stale shared-module state across draft edits/handoff: \_selectedProducts, \_style, \_media and \_shareConsumed are module-scoped singletons. \_shareConsumed is set true once and never reset, so a SECOND Web2FbShare handoff within the same page session is ignored (maybeConsumeShare returns early at compos — `web2/fb-posts/js/fb-posts-composer.js:16,51-53,471-486` → Reset \_shareConsumed when a new payload arrives (or key off payload.ts), and reset \_style in resetForm if a fresh-compose default is desired.
- 🟡 `race` Publish has no double-submit guard beyond disabling the button after the confirm dialog. The async confirmDo (Popup.confirm) awaits user input; if the user rapidly triggers publish via keyboard/Enter twice before the button disables (btn.disabled is set only AFTER confirm resolves, composer:431), tw — `web2/fb-posts/js/fb-posts-composer.js:427-435` → Set an in-flight flag before awaiting confirmDo, or disable the publish button immediately on click. Consider a server-side dedupe (e.g. short-window hash of pageIds+message).
- ⚪ `race` List infinite-scroll cursor: load() resets \_after/\_posts/\_loading and disconnects the observer, but switching page chips calls render()→load() which rebuilds DOM; a still-in-flight loadMore() from the previous page could resolve after the reset and push() stale posts into \_posts of the new page (loa — `web2/fb-posts/js/fb-posts-list.js:155-210,225-253` → Capture a request token/epoch in load() and ignore loadMore results whose epoch != current; or snapshot pageId locally in loadMore and bail if it changed.
- ⚪ `logic` saveDraft does not require a page to be selected (only message-or-media, composer:386-390), but publish requires >=1 page. A draft saved with empty page_ids will, when loaded and published, fail the 'Chọn ít nhất 1 page' check — acceptable, but pageNames(d.page_ids) renders '—' and the agenda gives — `web2/fb-posts/js/fb-posts-composer.js:386-408; drafts.js:138` → Allow page-less drafts (current behavior) but surface a 'chưa chọn page' badge in the agenda row.
- ⚪ `logic` Media dedupe key uses url||dataUrl (media.js:31-33). Two different products sharing the same image URL are correctly deduped, but a photo added as dataUrl and the same photo later available as a public URL are treated as different items (different keys), allowing a visual duplicate. Minor. — `web2/fb-posts/js/fb-posts-media.js:30-39` → Acceptable; if needed, normalize by a content hash.
- ⚪ `memory-leak` SSE subscription in setupSSE has no teardown and the IntersectionObserver in the list is only disconnected on load()/end-of-feed, not on tab switch away from list. Switching tabs leaves the observer observing a sentinel that may be removed from DOM on next list render; low impact but unbounded for l — `web2/fb-posts/js/fb-posts-app.js:213-223; fb-posts-list.js:212-223` → Disconnect \_observer when leaving the list tab (in switchTab) and provide an unsubscribe for the SSE callback if Web2SSE supports it.
- ℹ️ `logic` toMs() in the route (web2-fb-posts.js:483-487) uses a 1e12 heuristic to distinguish seconds vs ms. Client always sends ms (new Date(v).getTime()), so this is fine, but normalizeScheduleSec in the service applies the same 1e12 heuristic — consistent. No bug, noted for clarity. — `render.com/routes/web2-fb-posts.js:483-487; services/web2-fb-graph-service.js:17` → None; keep client sending ms.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 The Render route /api/web2-fb-posts has NO auth gate. The router (render.com/routes/web2-fb-posts.js) defines no requireWeb2/softAuth middleware and is not in the WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE/x-web2-token enforcement set; server.js mounts it bare at app.use('/api/web2-fb-posts', web2FbPostsRoutes) (server.js:9 — `render.com/routes/web2-fb-posts.js (whole router, no middleware); server.js:937-` → Mount the shared web2-auth soft/hard gate on this router (require x-web2-token like other web2 write routes), at minimum on all POST endpoints. Since WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1 is live, add require(middlewar
- 🟠 FB page access tokens are stored at-rest in plaintext (user_token TEXT and pages JSONB containing page access_token) in web2_fb_post_tokens (route web2-fb-posts.js:69-78, saveToken:140-149). A DB compromise yields long-lived page tokens that can post/delete on the brand pages. Other web2 modules mov — `render.com/routes/web2-fb-posts.js:70-78,140-149` → Encrypt user_token and page access_token at rest (e.g. AES-GCM with a Render env key) or store only what is needed; never log them.
- 🟡 Manual-connect flow puts a raw FB User Access Token into a DOM textarea and POSTs it in the request body (fb-posts-app.js:127,162,171). The token persists in the textarea value until the overlay is removed; if the user navigates away without closing, it lingers in DOM. Token is also transmitted to t — `web2/fb-posts/js/fb-posts-app.js:127,162-171; web2-fb-client.js:72` → Clear the textarea value immediately after read; prefer the OAuth path (already default). Optionally validate it looks like an EAA token before POST.
- ⚪ third-party lucide loaded from unpkg CDN without SRI/integrity (index.html:14). Project security rules require SRI for CDN scripts. — `web2/fb-posts/index.html:14` → Add integrity+crossorigin or self-host lucide (consistent with web/security.md).
- ℹ️ XSS surface is well-handled: all post messages, comments (FB customer data), page names, captions are passed through esc() before innerHTML, and the preview/viewer use esc()+attribute quoting (fb-posts-list.js:97,318-319; fb-posts-composer.js; web2-fb-post-preview.js:14-19). renderCaption only color — `web2/fb-posts/js/*.js` → No action; keep esc() usage consistent for any new fields.
- ℹ️ Schedule time is correctly validated server-side: normalizeScheduleSec enforces FB 10-min minimum window and converts ms/sec/ISO to unix seconds (web2-fb-graph-service.js:163-177); /status never returns access_token (safePages strips it, route:166-178); no SQL injection (all queries parameterized); — `render.com/services/web2-fb-graph-service.js:163-177; routes/web2-fb-posts.js:16` → None.

**Ghi chú:** Pool/layer correctness: route uses getDb = web2Db || chatDb (web2-fb-posts.js:22), tables web2*fb_post_tokens/web2_fb_posts (web2* prefix), SSE web2:fb-posts via web2 hub — all compliant. No TPOS API and no Web 1.0 table/pool/SSE usage.; Timezone display is correct GMT+7 everywhere it formats (toLocaleString timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' in list/drafts/preview/composer confirm). The only TZ risk is the datetime-local INPUT interpretation (bug above), not display.; FB token never reaches the browser: /status and /connect return safePages() which strips access_token (route:166-178). This satisfies the FOCUS 'token leak to browser' check — no leak found in /status, /connect, /refresh-pages responses.; No console.\* calls in any fb-posts frontend file or the three shared fb modules — clean, no debug noise or PII logging on the client.; Server-side logs use console.warn/error with e.message only (route:61,124,...) — not token values; acceptable.; Web2FbShare handoff travels via sessionStorage (one-shot, removed on consume) — does not leak to URL/history (web2-fb-share.js:9,81-91).; saveDraft/list/drafts are GET/POST that, like all writes here, currently bypass server auth — same high finding as security[0].

### page:fb-stats (web2/fb-insights/ + web2/fb-ads-stats/)

Two read-mostly Web 2.0 analytics pages for Facebook. fb-insights computes engagement stats (followers, total like/comment/share, best posting hour/day-of-week in GMT+7, top posts, real page Insights 28d when read_insights granted) from posts returned by GET /api/web2-fb-posts/engagement. fb-ads-stats has two modes: (a) "auto" pulls ad-account insights/campaign breakdown from FB Ads API (GET /ad-accounts + /ad-insights), and (b) "manual" — a CRUD ledger (web2/fb-ads-stats/js/fb-ads-manual.js) where users record ad spend + orders + revenue per post/live to compute CP/order and ROAS, persisted to web2_fb_ad_entries (web2Db) via POST /ad-entry and DELETE /ad-entry/:id. All FB data flows through the shared window.FBPostsApi (web2/shared/web2-fb-client.js). The pages render entirely via innerHTML string templates and re-fetch on every interaction (no client cache, no SSE subscription).

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** fb-insights/index.html: <link> web2-sidebar.css?v=20260613z, web2-theme.css?v=20260613ns1, ../fb-posts/fb-posts.css?v=20260619a; fb-insights/index.html:14 <script defer> unpkg lucide@0.294.0 (third-party CDN, no SRI); fb-insights/index.html:15 ../../shared/js/notification-system.js?v=20260521b; fb-insights/index.html:41-45 web2-auth.js, web2-sidebar.js?v=20260620a, web2-sse-bridge.js?v=20260614ux2, web2-fb-client.js?v=20260619b, js/fb-insights.js?v=20260619d; fb-insights.js:336-337 init() runs on DOMContentLoaded (or immediately): mounts Web2Sidebar, lucide.createIcons, then await Api().status(); fb-insights.js:298 on connect: await Api().engagement(\_pageId,\_limit) -> render(); fb-ads-stats/index.html: same shared chain + js/fb-ads-manual.js?v=20260619a then js/fb-ads-stats.js?v=20260619b; fb-ads-stats.js:286-287 init() on DOMContentLoaded: Web2Sidebar.mount, await Api().status(); on connect defaults to switchMode('manual') -> FBAdsManual.mount(box(),\_pages) -> load() -> await Api().adEntries(); web2-sse-bridge.js loaded on BOTH pages but NEITHER page calls Web2SSE.subscribe — bridge loaded but unused (dead load / opens no EventSource because no subscribe call)

| Control                                                             | Handler                                                                                 | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| fb-insights: page chip click (#fbiPages .fbp-page-chip)             | wirePageSelector closure -> sets \_pageId then load() (fb-insights.js:274-280)          | Re-fetches engagement for selected page and re-renders full body. No debounce: rapid clicks fire concurrent load() calls (see race bug).                                                                                                                               |
| fb-insights: limit <select> #fbiLimit (25/50/100)                   | change -> \_limit=Number(lim.value)\|\|50; load() (fb-insights.js:284-287)              | Re-fetches engagement with new limit.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| fb-insights: top-post external-link <a>                             | plain href target=\_blank rel=noopener (fb-insights.js:257)                             | Opens FB permalink in new tab. permalink is esc()'d inside href; rel=noopener present.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| fb-ads-stats: ad-account <select> #fbaAcct                          | change -> \_actId=acct.value; \_currency=found.currency; load() (fb-ads-stats.js:92-98) | Re-fetches ad insights for chosen account.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| fb-ads-stats: preset buttons #fbaPresets [data-p]                   | click -> \_preset=b.dataset.p; load() (fb-ads-stats.js:99-104)                          | Re-fetches ad insights with new date preset.                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| fb-ads-stats: #fbaReload                                            | click -> load (fb-ads-stats.js:105)                                                     | Re-fetches current account/preset.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| fb-ads-stats: mode toggle #fbaModeTog [data-m] (Nhập tay / Tự động) | switchMode(m) (fb-ads-stats.js:245-252)                                                 | manual -> FBAdsManual.mount(box(),\_pages); auto -> loadAuto() fetches ad-accounts.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| fb-ads-manual: #fbmAdd 'Thêm bản ghi'                               | openModal() (fb-ads-manual.js:155,191)                                                  | Builds an overlay modal appended to document.body with form fields.                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| fb-ads-manual: period buttons #fbmPeriod [data-p]                   | click -> \_period=b.dataset.p; render() (fb-ads-manual.js:156-161)                      | Re-groups existing \_entries by day/week/month; no fetch.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| fb-ads-manual: month filter #fbmMonth                               | change -> \_filterMonth=m.value; render() (fb-ads-manual.js:162-163)                    | Client-side filter of \_entries by YYYY-MM; no fetch.                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| fb-ads-manual: row edit [data-edit]                                 | click -> find entry by id; openModal(e) (fb-ads-manual.js:166-171)                      | Opens modal pre-filled to edit.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| fb-ads-manual: row delete [data-del]                                | del(id) (fb-ads-manual.js:172-188)                                                      | Popup.confirm (awaited) -> Api().deleteAdEntry(id) -> on success load(). NOT optimistic; no Web2Optimistic; awaits before reload.                                                                                                                                      |
| fb-ads-manual: modal #fbmSave                                       | onclick async (fb-ads-manual.js:246-275)                                                | Builds payload (pageId/post/entryDate/adSpend/orders/revenue/reach/messages/note/createdBy), validates only entryDate present, disables btn, await Api().saveAdEntry(payload), on success close()+load(), else re-enable btn. Sends x-web2-token via shared headers(). |
| fb-ads-manual: modal #fbmPick 'Chọn bài'                            | pickPost(pageId,onPick) (fb-ads-manual.js:239-245,279-326)                              | Opens second overlay, await Api().list(pageId,25), renders post grid; click sets chosen post.                                                                                                                                                                          |
| fb-ads-manual: modal close / overlay backdrop click                 | close=ov.remove() (fb-ads-manual.js:234-238)                                            | Removes modal DOM node.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| FBPostsApi.saveAdEntry/deleteAdEntry (shared client)                | web2-fb-client.js:109-110 jpost('/ad-entry'...) / jpost('/ad-entry/:id',null,'DELETE')  | POST/DELETE to /api/web2-fb-posts with headers() that include x-web2-token when Web2Auth present.                                                                                                                                                                      |
| backend POST /ad-entry                                              | routes/web2-fb-posts.js:718-795                                                         | Parameterized UPSERT into web2_fb_ad_entries (web2Db); validates entryDate only; \_notify('ad-entry') to topic web2:fb-posts. NO auth middleware on router.                                                                                                            |
| backend DELETE /ad-entry/:id                                        | routes/web2-fb-posts.js:798-807                                                         | Parameterized DELETE; \_notify('ad-entry-delete'). NO auth middleware, NO ownership check, NO admin secret.                                                                                                                                                            |

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-fb-client.js (window.FBPostsApi / Web2FbClient — single source for all FB Graph calls), web2/shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders -> x-web2-token; Web2Auth.getUserName for createdBy), web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js (Web2Sidebar.mount, also autoloads notification-system/popup/lottie/command-palette), web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (loaded but unused — no subscribe), web2/shared/web2-theme.css, web2-sidebar.css, web2/fb-posts/ (index.html linked as the connect/login entry point; fb-posts.css reused for styling), window.Popup (web2/shared/popup.js) used in fb-ads-manual del(), render route /api/web2-fb-posts/\* (status, engagement, ad-accounts, ad-insights, ad-entries, ad-entry, list), render service web2-fb-graph-service.js (Graph API), Postgres web2Db table web2_fb_ad_entries, SSE hub realtime-sse-web2 topic web2:fb-posts

**SSE:** Backend PUBLISHES web2:fb-posts on ad-entry create/update (routes/web2-fb-posts.js:765,790) and ad-entry-delete (:802), plus connect/disconnect/publish/draft actions.; NEITHER frontend page SUBSCRIBES: fb-insights.js and fb-ads-stats.js never call Web2SSE.subscribe despite loading web2-sse-bridge.js. Manual-entry ledger does NOT live-update across tabs/machines — violates CLAUDE.md SSE-first rule; user must manually reload. No EventSource opened, so no listener-leak risk, but also no realtime/cross-machine sync (which the rule mandates for mutating data).; No debounce windows exist client-side because there is no subscription; reload after own mutation is an explicit load() call, not SSE-driven.

**console.log:** 0

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `race` Concurrent load() with no in-flight guard. Rapid page-chip / preset / account changes (fb-insights wirePageSelector, fb-ads-stats wireSelector) each call load() which awaits a fetch then overwrites innerHTML. A slow earlier request can resolve AFTER a faster later one, rendering stale data for the w — `fb-insights.js:291-309 (load), 274-289 (wirePageSelector); fb-ads-stats.js:195-2` → Add a request token: const myReq = ++\_seq before fetch; after await, if (myReq !== \_seq) return; before mutating innerHTML. Or disable the controls while a load is in flight.
- 🟡 `logic` Best-posting-hour/day stats divide engagement totals by counts but p.total may be undefined for posts lacking engagement data; byHour[h].e += p.total||0 treats missing as 0, so a page with no per-post engagement shows all-zero 'best hours' yet still renders bars implying signal. Also when hasInsight — `fb-insights.js:100-123,194 vs 106-111` → Use one consistent engagement metric (prefer reactions+comments+shares) for totals AND hour/day aggregation; suppress the hour/day cards when every p.total is 0.
- ⚪ `logic` isoWeek/periodKey for manual entries use new Date(d+'T00:00:00') (LOCAL time) and getDay(). The grouping page is meant to display GMT+7. On a Render server this is irrelevant (client-side), but if a user's browser is in a non-+7 timezone the week/day bucket can shift by a day vs the stored DATE. ent — `fb-ads-manual.js:31-46` → Parse the YYYY-MM-DD string components directly (year/month/day) without Date timezone coercion, or compute ISO week from explicit UTC to avoid TZ drift.
- ⚪ `logic` del() is not optimistic and not double-submit guarded: clicking the trash icon twice quickly fires two Popup.confirm dialogs / two deleteAdEntry calls for the same id; the second DELETE is a harmless no-op but triggers a redundant load(). More importantly del() does not disable the button, and a fai — `fb-ads-manual.js:177-188` → Disable the row's delete button on click; or route through Web2Optimistic.run with snapshot/rollback per CLAUDE.md rule 8.
- ⚪ `logic` Modal save: ad_spend/revenue/orders/reach/messages parsed by n() which strips all non [\d.-]; a value like '1.2.3' or '5-3' yields NaN->0 silently (no validation feedback). Negative spend (e.g. '-500') is accepted and stored as negative NUMERIC, corrupting CP/order and ROAS aggregates. Only entryDat — `fb-ads-manual.js:21-23,246-263; routes/web2-fb-posts.js:722-736` → Validate numeric fields >= 0 client and server side; reject malformed input with a clear message instead of coercing to 0.
- ⚪ `memory-leak` openModal/pickPost append overlays to document.body and remove on close, but if the user navigates away (page chip reload happens only in fb-insights, not here) or if saveAdEntry throws synchronously before close(), the overlay can linger. Also stacked modals: opening pickPost over the save modal — — `fb-ads-manual.js:203-326` → Guard backdrop-close to ignore when a child overlay is open, or use a single modal manager; ensure overlays are removed in a finally.
- ⚪ `bug` box() returns #fbaContent || #fbaBody. In init() error paths and the not-connected branch, only #fbaBody exists; but switchMode('manual') calls FBAdsManual.mount(box(),...). If a render error wipes #fbaContent out of the DOM (e.g. selectorHtml replaced #fbaBody innerHTML that contained #fbaContent), — `fb-ads-stats.js:51-53,250,271-275` → Cache the content element reference once after building the shell rather than re-querying by id each call.
- ℹ️ `logic` fb-insights pageSelectorHtml renders the limit <select> with the 50 option hardcoded selected in markup, then wirePageSelector sets lim.value=String(\_limit) after render. If \_limit is 25/100 there is a brief flash where 50 appears selected; harmless but the 'selected' attribute should be data-driven — `fb-insights.js:267-271,283` → Set the selected option from \_limit in the template instead of a fixed selected on 50.

**Security (audit):**

- 🔴 Backend router /api/web2-fb-posts has NO auth middleware on any route. server.js:942 mounts it with no requireWeb2Auth/requireWeb2AuthSoft, and it is absent from the WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE-wired file list. The frontend dutifully sends x-web2-token (web2-fb-client.js headers()), but the server never valid — `render.com/server.js:937-942; render.com/routes/web2-fb-posts.js (entire router,` → Apply requireWeb2AuthSoft (or requireWeb2Auth) to the router or at least to all write routes: app.use('/api/web2-fb-posts', requireWeb2AuthSoft, web2FbPostsRoutes) or router.post('/ad-entry', requireW
- 🟠 Stored XSS via FB-sourced content rendered with innerHTML. Top-post/live message text IS escaped via esc(), but image URLs are interpolated raw into src attributes only through esc() (which does NOT escape '\'' single-quote or backtick and is applied inside double-quoted attrs — acceptable for src) — `fb-insights.js:246,257; fb-ads-manual.js:136,138,309` → Validate URL scheme (allow only http/https) before placing into href/src; reject javascript:/data: for permalink. Keep esc() for text but add a urlSafe() helper for any href/src interpolation.
- 🟡 Manual-entry write trusts client-supplied createdBy (payload.createdBy from window.Web2Auth.getUserName) and the server stores b.createdBy verbatim (routes:738). With no server auth, attribution is forgeable. — `fb-ads-manual.js:258; routes/web2-fb-posts.js:738` → Once auth is enforced, set created_by = req.web2User.name server-side and ignore the client value.
- ⚪ GET /ad-entries returns SELECT \* with LIMIT 1000 and no auth; manual ad-spend/revenue/orders business data is readable by anyone hitting the worker. Not PII but is competitively sensitive financial data. — `routes/web2-fb-posts.js:688-715` → Gate reads behind requireWeb2AuthSoft as well.
- ⚪ Third-party lucide CDN script loaded without SRI integrity hash on both pages. — `fb-insights/index.html:14; fb-ads-stats/index.html:14` → Add integrity + crossorigin or self-host per web/security.md.

**Ghi chú:** Pool usage is correct: backend getDb = web2Db || chatDb, table web2*fb_ad_entries is web2*-prefixed, SSE topic web2:fb-posts — no Web 1.0 / TPOS / chatDb coupling found.; All SQL in /ad-entries, /ad-entry, /ad-entry/:id is parameterized ($1..$N) — no SQL injection.; Frontend has ZERO console.\* calls (clean per coding rules).; ensureSchema uses CREATE TABLE/INDEX IF NOT EXISTS — idempotent, safe on Render restart.; GMT+7 handling in fb-insights is correct for display (Intl.DateTimeFormat timeZone Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh in hourVN/dowVN/fmtDate). parseTs uses new Date(s) directly — if FB/engagement timestamps ever arrive without trailing Z this would mis-parse, but engagement times come from Graph API (ISO with Z) so OK; the manual-entry side is the TZ risk (see bug).; These pages are genuinely READ-ONLY for FB data; the only mutations are the manual ad-ledger CRUD (web2_fb_ad_entries) and they correctly avoid touching FB/Pancake/Zalo send APIs.; web2-sse-bridge.js is loaded on both pages but no subscription exists — recommend either wiring Web2SSE.subscribe('web2:fb-posts', debounced reload) for the manual ledger (per SSE-first rule) or dropping the unused bridge load to save bytes.

### page:jt-tracking

Web 2.0 J&T Express tracking page (Báo cáo area). Collects 12-digit waybill codes from three sources — (a) auto-ingest from incoming Zalo group messages, (b) manual "Quét/Quét lịch sử/Dán lịch sử" scans of Zalo history, (c) manual code entry — and stores them in Postgres web2Db table web2_jt_tracking. The server fetches jtexpress.vn (server-side rendered HTML), parses delivery events, derives a status, and shows a KPI strip + filterable list + per-code timeline modal. Users approve finished orders (fade + auto-delete after 7 days via \_purgeApproved on every /list), refresh a single row or auto-refresh active orders while the tab is visible, message customers via Web2CustomerChat (Pancake/Zalo), and toggle a Pancake "XỬ LÝ BC" tag mirrored in web2_jt_bc_tags. Realtime is via SSE topic web2:jt-tracking. The frontend is split into 7 small modules (const/api/state/render/modals/actions/app) plus the route web2-jt-tracking.js.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** CSS: ../shared/web2-sidebar.css, ../shared/web2-theme.css, css/jt-tracking.css; Scripts (head, defer): lucide@0.294.0 UMD CDN, lottie-web 5.12.2 CDN, ../../shared/js/notification-system.js; Scripts (body end, dependency order): web2-auth.js (sets window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG), web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-zalo.js, web2-chat-\* (utils/tokens/settings/api/live/tags/client), web2-extension-bridge.js, web2-customer-chat-core/modal/.js, then jt page modules constants/api/state/render/modals/actions/app; init() in jt-tracking-app.js: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside'); capture-phase document click listener (data-copy copy / data-msg-phone open chat); document keydown listener (Enter/Space on data-copy / data-msg-phone); lucide icons(); form submit + button click handlers wired; jtKpis click → filter; jtSearch input (debounce 350ms); jtList click/keydown; Web2SSE.subscribe('web2:jt-tracking', debounce(load,600)); load(); A.startAutoRefresh(); load(): Promise.all([api('/list?'+query), S.loadBcTags()]) → renderKpi + renderList. /list GET runs \_purgeApproved on server (deletes approved>7d on EVERY list call); startAutoRefresh(): setTimeout(tick,2500) once + setInterval(tick, 90000) + visibilitychange listener → autoRefreshActive() POSTs /refresh {mode:'active',limit:15} when tab visible

| Control                                                                | Handler                                     | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Quick-add form submit (#jtQuickForm)                                   | A.quickAdd (jt-tracking-actions.js:25)      | Extracts unique \d{12} from textarea + 4-digit cell. 1 code → POST /track {billcode,cellphone,source:'manual'} (server fetches jtexpress, upserts, \_notify('track')), clears input, reload, openTimeline. Multiple → POST /add then POST /refresh {codes}, reload, then refreshAll().                                      |
| Quét Zalo button (#jtScan)                                             | A.scanZalo (actions.js:57)                  | POST /scan → server scans web2_zalo_messages for 'shop nhi judy' lines, upserts pending rows (xmax=0 dedupe), \_notify('scan'). Toast found/added, reload, if added → refreshAll().                                                                                                                                         |
| Quét lịch sử button (#jtScanHistory)                                   | A.scanHistory (actions.js:73)               | POST /scan-history {days:14,count:1000} → server calls zca.getGroupHistory per tracked group (LONG-running external Zalo calls), upserts, \_notify('scan'). Reload + refreshAll() if added.                                                                                                                                 |
| Dán lịch sử button (#jtPaste)                                          | M.openPasteModal (modals.js:137)            | Opens modal with a copyable console script (type=text/plain) + paste textarea. Submit → POST /scan-text {text,convId} → server parses lines for order codes, upserts pending, optionally inserts synthetic web2_zalo_messages rows ('paste:'+code) with dedup, \_notify('scan') + zalo SSE. Reload + refreshAll() if added. |
| KPI chips click (#jtKpis)                                              | inline (app.js:87)                          | Sets S.state.status (total→all) and calls load() → re-fetch filtered list.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Search input (#jtSearch)                                               | debounced inline (app.js:93)                | Sets S.state.search, load(). Server /list builds ILIKE on billcode/note/latest_event/src_message + digits-only regexp on src_message.                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Row click / Enter (data-open)                                          | R.openTimeline (render.js:202)              | Opens timeline modal; GET /:billcode (auto-fetches jtexpress if never fetched), renders events. Adds a NEW document keydown Esc listener each open (see bug).                                                                                                                                                               |
| Row refresh icon (data-act=refresh)                                    | A.rowAction('refresh') (actions.js:166)     | await POST /track {billcode} (heavy J&T fetch), toast, reload. No optimistic.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Row approve/unapprove (data-act=approve\|unapprove)                    | A.rowAction (actions.js:177)                | UI-first via Web2Optimistic.run: sets row.approved_at=Date.now()\|null, renderList+renderKpi immediately, POST /:code/approve\|unapprove in background, rollback on error. SSE reload is authoritative.                                                                                                                     |
| Row chat icon (data-act=chat)                                          | M.openChat (modals.js:105)                  | Web2CustomerChat.open({conversationId, channel:'zalo'}) → onReady findMessageInChat(billcode) scrolls/highlights the message containing the code (setInterval polling up to 40 tries + 8 'load older' clicks).                                                                                                              |
| Row tag icon (data-act=tag)                                            | A.tagPancake (actions.js:269)               | resolvePancakeConv(phone) scans all Pancake pages via Web2Chat.searchConversations; fetchTags; toggles 'xử lý bc' tag on Pancake (add/remove, custom confirm before remove); mirrors to web2_jt_bc_tags via S.markTagged/\_persistTag (POST /bc-tag) + localStorage.                                                        |
| Inline code (data-copy) click/Enter                                    | R.copyText (render.js:65)                   | Copies billcode to clipboard (navigator.clipboard or execCommand fallback), success toast.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Inline phone (data-msg-phone) click/Enter                              | M.openMsgModal (modals.js:130)              | Web2CustomerChat.open({phone,name}) → full Pancake+Zalo chat drawer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| endpoint POST /clear                                                   | web2-jt-tracking.js:430                     | DELETE ALL rows from web2_jt_tracking (requires body/query confirm=YES-CLEAR). NO auth. Destructive, unauthenticated.                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| endpoint POST /scan, /scan-history, /scan-text, /add, /track, /refresh | web2-jt-tracking.js:443/500/598/728/760/801 | All upsert codes / fetch jtexpress / re-derive stored status. None require x-web2-token.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| endpoint GET /list, GET /:billcode                                     | web2-jt-tracking.js:888/951                 | List runs \_purgeApproved (DELETE approved>7d) every call; detail auto-fetches jtexpress on first view.                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| endpoint POST /:billcode/approve\|unapprove, GET/POST /bc-tag(s)       | web2-jt-tracking.js:978/998/692/704         | Set/clear approved_at; mirror BC tag set/delete. None require auth.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| exported autoIngestFromZalo(db,msg)                                    | web2-jt-tracking.js:206                     | Called fire-and-forget from web2-zalo on each incoming GROUP message; extracts order codes, upserts pending rows, \_notify('auto-add'), then background fetchJt per new code + \_notify('refresh').                                                                                                                         |

**Liên kết:** render route: /api/web2-jt-tracking/_ (render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js, pool web2Db), worker route: WEB2_JT_TRACKING /api/web2-jt-tracking/_ → handleCustomer360Proxy → render origin (cloudflare-worker/modules/config/routes.js:281, worker.js:224), shared: web2-sidebar.js/.css, web2-theme.css, web2-auth.js (API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG), web2-optimistic.js (Web2Optimistic.run), web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE), shared chat: web2-zalo.js (Web2Zalo.mountChat), web2-chat-client.js + sub-modules (Web2Chat.searchConversations/fetchTags/toggleTag/getAllPageAccessTokens/syncFromRenderDB), web2-customer-chat\*.js (Web2CustomerChat.open), extension: web2-extension-bridge.js (Pancake bypass-24h), DB cross-deps: web2_zalo_messages, web2_zalo_conversations, web2_zalo_tracked_groups (read for scan/scan-history/scan-text ingest), web2_jt_bc_tags (own), service web2-zalo-zca (getGroupHistory), caller: render.com/routes/web2-zalo.js (calls autoIngestFromZalo on incoming group msgs), SSE hub: render.com/routes/realtime-sse-web2.js (notifyClients)

**SSE:** Subscribes: web2:jt-tracking via Web2SSE.subscribe in init() (app.js:121), debounced reload 600ms. NOT cleaned up — page is full-page so no unmount, but no es.close()/unsubscribe stored; acceptable for a page but listener is permanent for tab lifetime.; Publishes (server \_notify → notifyClients('web2:jt-tracking', {action,code,ts}, 'update')): actions clear/scan/add/track/refresh/approve/unapprove/auto-add/purge/bc-tag/bc-untag.; Cross-topic publish from /scan-text: web2:zalo:messages and web2:zalo:thread:<thread_id> when synthetic messages added.; Note: every successful approve/scan/refresh triggers a broadcast; many tabs each reload (debounced) — no payload PII (only action+code+ts), good.; Auto-refresh (client-side, NOT SSE): setInterval 90s + visibilitychange both call autoRefreshActive(); \_autoTimer is created once (guarded) but never cleared, and the visibilitychange listener is never removed (page lifetime).

**console.log:** 6 — render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js:115 console.log backfill src_at rowCount (no PII); render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js:118 console.log 'schema ready' (boot noise, benign); render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js:47/117/120/260 console.warn/error with e.message only (no PII). Frontend JS has ZERO console.\* calls — clean.

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `race` Worker fetchWithRetry retries POST on timeout/5xx/429 (proxy-handler.js:565 passes maxRetries=3, timeout=15000), and /scan-history and /refresh routinely run >15s server-side (sequential external jtexpress + zca.getGroupHistory calls with \_sleep pacing). When the worker times out at 15s it RE-FIRES — `cloudflare-worker/modules/handlers/proxy-handler.js:565 + shared/universal/fetch` → For these long write endpoints, return 202 quickly and process in background, OR make the worker NOT retry non-idempotent methods (retry only GET/HEAD), OR add an idempotency/lock key per scan job. At
- 🟠 `data-loss` \_purgeApproved (DELETE approved_at < now-7d) runs on EVERY GET /list (line 891), and approve uses UI-first optimistic apply that sets row.approved_at=Date.now() immediately. Approve is also reflected via SSE which triggers reload→/list→_purge. If a user approves a row, then later un-approves elsewhe — `render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js:265-275 (_purgeApproved), :891 (called in ` → Soft-delete (set a deleted_at / move to archive) instead of hard DELETE; run purge on a scheduled job, not on every list read (a burst of list calls = repeated full-table delete scans). Compute the 7-
- 🟡 `race` Concurrent SSE reload vs optimistic approve: rowAction sets row.approved_at then Web2Optimistic.run POSTs in background. Meanwhile the same approve broadcasts SSE web2:jt-tracking → debounced load() (600ms) re-fetches authoritative list and replaces S.state.list. If the optimistic POST then fails an — `web2/jt-tracking/js/jt-tracking-actions.js:179-213 (row captured by closure) vs ` → In rollback, re-find the row by billcode in current S.state.list rather than mutating the closure-captured row; or refetch after failure.
- 🟡 `memory-leak` openTimeline adds a NEW document-level 'keydown' Esc listener every time a timeline is opened (render.js:238). It self-removes only when Esc is actually pressed. Closing via the X button or backdrop click (close()) does NOT remove the keydown listener. Opening many timelines without ever pressing Es — `web2/jt-tracking/js/jt-tracking-render.js:238-243` → Store the onEsc handler and removeEventListener inside close(); or use { once:true } is insufficient (need removal on any close). Register/deregister symmetrically.
- 🟡 `perf` findMessageInChat polls every 250ms up to 40 tries AND can click '#wzcvOlder' up to 8 times to load older messages. If the chat engine remounts or the pane selector never matches (e.g. Pancake pane instead of zalo), the setInterval runs the full 10s. Multiple rapid chat-open clicks each start an ind — `web2/jt-tracking/js/jt-tracking-modals.js:44-101` → Track the active timer in module state and clearInterval before starting a new findMessageInChat; cap olderClicks globally.
- 🟡 `logic` Wrong dedupe/order key for src_at on re-post: /scan and /scan-history use src_at = GREATEST(existing, EXCLUDED) so a code re-posted in Zalo bumps src_at to newest — intended. BUT autoIngestFromZalo (the realtime path, line 231) does NOT set src_at at all on insert and its ON CONFLICT does not update — `render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js:231-240 (autoIngest INSERT lacks src_at) v` → In autoIngestFromZalo, set src_at = now() (or the message sent_at) on insert and GREATEST on conflict, consistent with /scan.
- ⚪ `race` refreshAll has a module-level \_refreshing guard, and autoRefreshActive checks \_refreshing/\_autoBusy — good. But quickAdd (multi-code path) calls /refresh directly (not refreshAll) bypassing the \_refreshing guard, so it can run concurrently with an in-flight refreshAll/autoRefresh against the same ro — `web2/jt-tracking/js/jt-tracking-actions.js:44-45 (quickAdd) vs :97-118 (refreshA` → Route all refresh through refreshAll() or share the \_refreshing guard.
- ⚪ `logic` KPI total is computed as sum of all status counts (line 938) INCLUDING approved rows, while 'approved' KPI is a separate overlapping count. Filtering 'approved' uses approved_at IS NOT NULL regardless of status, so a delivered+approved row is counted in both 'delivered' and 'approved' and in 'total' — `render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js:935-943` → Document that approved is an orthogonal flag, or exclude approved from status counts if the UX expects mutually-exclusive buckets.
- ⚪ `logic` \_parsePasteDate builds Date.UTC(y,mo-1,d,5,...) to mean 12:00 GMT+7; correct. But it only inspects the FIRST plausible date token and returns null if out-of-window, then caller uses ts=now(). A paste line whose only date is a valid order date slightly older than 180 days is silently bucketed to 'now — `render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js:148-170` → Acceptable; optionally widen window or log when a date is rejected for visibility.
- ⚪ `other` \_pool module-level variable is set in ensureSchema and used by autoIngestFromZalo's caller (web2-zalo.js passes \_pool), but within this route file \_pool is only assigned, never read — autoIngest receives db as a param. Harmless dead assignment but signals confusion about pool ownership; if web2-zalo — `render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js:23,53; web2-zalo.js:341 uses its own _pool` → Remove the unused module \_pool here or clearly document that autoIngest always uses the caller-supplied db (web2Db).

**Security (audit):**

- 🔴 ENTIRE route mounted with NO auth middleware. server.js:932 app.use('/api/web2-jt-tracking', web2JtTrackingRoutes) attaches no requireWeb2Auth/requireWeb2AuthSoft, and the route file never imports web2-auth. Despite WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1 being enabled project-wide, every endpoint here is fully unauthe — `render.com/server.js:932; render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js (no auth import ` → Mount with requireWeb2AuthSoft (or requireWeb2Auth for writes): app.use('/api/web2-jt-tracking', requireWeb2AuthSoft, web2JtTrackingRoutes). Gate POST /clear behind requireWeb2Admin AND an x-admin-sec
- 🟠 src_message stores the FULL raw Zalo message (customer name + phone + free-text notes, slice 2000) and is broadcast nowhere but is rendered into the DOM. fmtSrcMsg() (render.js:49) calls esc(raw) first then injects spans — that path is escaped and safe. BUT the J&T timeline event desc passes through — `render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js:278-291 (_decodeEntities), web2/jt-trackin` → Keep all src_message/desc rendering routed through esc()/fmtDesc only. Add a comment guard; never innerHTML raw src_message. Consider storing original (not entity-decoded) text to avoid double-decode
- 🟡 PII (customer phone) extracted client-side from src_message via parseOrderInfo regex \b0\d{8,10}\b — accepts 9-11 digit sequences, contradicting the project rule that VN phones are exactly /^0\d{9}$/. A random 9- or 11-digit token can be mis-detected as a phone, then used as data-msg-phone to open a — `web2/jt-tracking/js/jt-tracking-render.js:29 (parseOrderInfo), :59 (regex 0\d{8,` → Tighten to /\b0\d{9}\b/ (exact 10 digits) for phone detection to match Web2 phone validation and avoid mis-tagging.
- ⚪ web2_jt_bc_tags mirrors a Pancake tag keyed only by phone with no tenant/page scoping; /bc-tag accepts any phone string with no format validation (just non-empty trim). A bad phone pollutes the tagged set shared across all machines. — `render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js:704-725` → Validate phone matches /^0\d{9}$/ before insert; reject otherwise.
- ⚪ jtexpress.vn is fetched server-side with a spoofed desktop User-Agent and no rate limit beyond a small internal batch; combined with the unauthenticated /refresh and /scan-history, an attacker can drive heavy outbound traffic from the shop's Render egress IP, risking jtexpress throttling/ban (the co — `render.com/routes/web2-jt-tracking.js:350-373 (fetchJt), :801 (/refresh)` → Add auth (covers it) + a per-IP/global rate limiter on /refresh and /scan-history.

**Ghi chú:** Pool usage is correct: getDb = web2Db || chatDb, table web2_jt_tracking, SSE web2:jt-tracking — no Web 1.0 coupling, no TPOS coupling. Compliant.; Timezone handling is mostly correct: server \_toEpoch appends +07:00 to naive J&T strings; client fmtAbs uses Intl timeZone Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh and handles the '24' midnight quirk; \_parsePasteDate maps 12:00 GMT+7 → 05:00 UTC. The only TZ risk is the client-side approvedTag countdown comparing client Date.now() against server-stored approved_at (skew → off-by-one day display).; Schema migration is idempotent: ALTER ... ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS + CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS + backfill guarded by WHERE src_at IS NULL (self-terminating). Safe to re-run on every boot.; Upserts use ON CONFLICT(billcode) with xmax=0 inserted detection — correct dedupe by billcode primary key across all ingest paths.; \_notify is fire-and-forget after writes (correct SSE pattern), payload carries only {action,code,ts} (no PII) — good.; The console-injection 'Quét Zalo' helper script is stored as type=text/plain (never executed by the page), only read as text for copy — not an XSS vector in this page.; frontend JS has zero console._ (clean); backend has 6 benign console._ (no PII).; Worker forwards all request headers including x-web2-token (new Headers(request.headers)) to Render — so adding auth middleware on the route would work end-to-end without worker changes.

### page:live-chat-comments-video

Two Web 2.0 read-only pages. (1) live-chat/comments-mobile.html is a mobile-optimized, view-only livestream-comment viewer (no order creation, no send). It loads shared SSE bridge + Web2Chat + Web2CustomerStore + LiveCommentsStream/LiveCustomerSync/LiveStatus/LiveHiddenCommenters and a 4-file app split (state/render/actions/entry, namespace window.LCM). It pulls comments from /api/web2-live-comments (web2Db), enriches name/phone/address/status from web2_customers, overlays native-orders STT, displays live posts via a picker, and stays realtime via SSE topics web2:live-comments / web2:native-orders / web2:customers / web2:live-hidden-commenters. It has its OWN PWA manifest (comments-mobile.webmanifest, scope only, no start_url -> 'save current page' add-to-homescreen). (2) live-chat/fb-video-player.html is a standalone FB-live wrapper that embeds the FB video plugin and seeks to ?t=N via player.seek, with iframe-direct fallback; it is opened from backend-generated livestream deep-links. Element Capture (restrictTo) for frame capture actually lives in the desktop index.html snap-\* modules, NOT in these two pages (comments-mobile intentionally does not fetch thumbnails).

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** comments-mobile.html head: meta theme-color #0068ff, no-store cache, apple-touch-icon + icon (web2/shared/img/logo-emblem.png), OWN manifest comments-mobile.webmanifest?v=20260620b, apple-mobile-web-app-\* meta, preconnect chatomni-proxy + fonts.googleapis, Inter font stylesheet, large inline <style>; Scripts in order: web2-sse-bridge.js, shared/js/notification-system.js, web2-chat-utils/tokens/settings/api/live/tags/client.js (Web2Chat stack), js/shared/live-time.js, js/shared/live-comments-stream.js, web2-customer-store.js, js/shared/live-status.js, js/shared/live-customer-sync.js, comments-mobile-state.js, -render.js, -actions.js, -entry.js, live-hidden-commenters.js; comments-mobile-state.js IIFE: reads window.API_CONFIG for WORKER/RENDER base; sets window.LiveState.workerUrl + window.LiveCommentList.renderComments shim; grabs DOM refs; defines all helpers + LCM namespace with getter/setter state accessors; comments-mobile-entry.js (runs at load, no DOMContentLoaded wait): wires listeners on list/sheetBack/pickerBack/postSel/pickerBody/btnHidden/btnRefresh/btnFull/chips/newpill/lightbox; pull-to-refresh touchstart/touchend (passive); boot: sets label, Web2Chat.syncFromRenderDB().then(loadPosts); LCM.load(); LCM.loadPosts(); LCM.loadNativeOrders(); LCM.wireSse(); subscribes 3 SSE topics (web2:live-comments throttled 30s loadPosts, web2:native-orders debounced loadNative, web2:customers debounced 600ms refreshWarehouse); visibilitychange -> stream.fetchNow()+loadPosts; LiveTime.js auto-starts a 30s setInterval ticker + visibilitychange listener on load to update relative timestamps; live-hidden-commenters.js boots 1200ms after load: mounts btn (no-op on mobile, no #liveTopbarActions), \_load(true) GET /api/web2/live-hidden-commenters/get/global (seeds 2 default shop pages on 404), subscribes SSE web2:live-hidden-commenters; fb-video-player.html on load: parses ?v/?t/?page, builds FB plugin div, injects connect.facebook.net/vi_VN/sdk.js (async/defer/crossorigin anonymous), 4s fallback timer to location.replace plugin URL

| Control                                                    | Handler                                                                                                                   | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ---------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Tap a comment card (#list click)                           | listEl click delegate -> LCM.openSheet(card.dataset.id) (comments-mobile-entry.js:26-35; openSheet render.js:234)         | Builds bottom-sheet innerHTML with name/message/SDT/address/status/page/fb_id/time; thumbnail only if THUMBS[id] present (mobile never fetches -> always absent); shows hide-person + optional livestream link; locks body scroll |
| 'Xem them N comment' button (#moreBtn)                     | listEl delegate -> renderCap += 100 + scheduleRender (entry.js:28-31)                                                     | Raises render cap by RENDER_CAP_STEP and re-renders more rows (anti-jank cap)                                                                                                                                                     |
| Filter chips Tat ca/Store/House/Da tao don/Co SDT (#chips) | #chips click delegate (entry.js:80-90)                                                                                    | Sets LCM.filter, resets renderCap, scheduleRender, scrolls to top. BUG: header count uses realCommentTotal() which ignores this filter (see bugs)                                                                                 |
| Post/livestream selector (#postSel)                        | postSel click -> LCM.openPicker (render.js:338)                                                                           | Renders picker (live/ended groups), opens sheet, triggers loadPosts() if posts empty                                                                                                                                              |
| Picker rows (#pickerBody)                                  | pickerBody delegate -> selectLive/selectAll/selectPost (entry.js:39-50; render.js:363-377 -> applyView:350)               | Sets liveMode/selectedPost, updates label+tag, closePicker, CLEARS LCM.ALL=[] + topId=null + renderCap, then LCM.load({silent:false}) (full reload for new scope)                                                                 |
| Hidden-people button (#btnHidden)                          | LiveHiddenCommenters.openManager (entry.js:51-54)                                                                         | Opens manager modal listing hidden commenters with unhide buttons; unhide is UI-first + rollback via \_unhideRemote POST with x-web2-token                                                                                        |
| 'An tat ca comment cua nguoi nay' in sheet (#shHidePerson) | openSheet inner handler -> LiveHiddenCommenters.hide(fbId,name) (render.js:270-278; hide() live-hidden-commenters.js:161) | UI-first: add to \_map, re-render hides all their cards instantly, POST /hide/:fbId atomic with x-web2-token, rollback+toast on failure                                                                                           |
| Refresh button (#btnRefresh)                               | loadPosts()+load({silent:false}) (entry.js:55-58)                                                                         | Re-fetches posts + comments; spins icon while load() runs (btn.classList add/remove spin)                                                                                                                                         |
| Fullscreen button (#btnFull)                               | requestFullscreen/exitFullscreen toggle (entry.js:61-79)                                                                  | Toggles document fullscreen; updates btn .on via fullscreenchange listener; toast on unsupported                                                                                                                                  |
| New-comments pill (#newpill)                               | scrollTo top + hide pill (entry.js:91-94)                                                                                 | Scrolls list to top; pill shown by doRender when newEls + scrollY>240                                                                                                                                                             |
| Thumbnail in sheet / lightbox click                        | shThumb click opens lightbox; lightbox click closes (render.js:264-269; entry.js:95)                                      | Opens/closes fullscreen image overlay (dead path on mobile since thumbnails never fetched)                                                                                                                                        |
| Pull-to-refresh (touchstart/touchend window, passive)      | entry.js:97-120                                                                                                           | If pulled >90px at scrollY<=0 -> LCM.load({silent:false}) + toast                                                                                                                                                                 |
| fb-video-player ?v/?t/?page params                         | IIFE in fb-video-player.html:91-200                                                                                       | Embeds FB plugin, on xfbml.ready calls player.seek(offsetSec)+play; 4s timeout or SDK error -> location.replace to facebook.com/plugins/video.php with autoplay+t param                                                           |

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE singleton), web2/shared/web2-customer-store.js (Web2CustomerStore - single source of truth for web2_customers read/write+auth), web2/shared/web2-chat-_.js (Web2Chat stack - fetchLivePosts/syncFromRenderDB for real Pancake comment_count), shared/js/notification-system.js (notificationManager, Web 1.0 shared), live-chat/js/shared/live-comments-stream.js, live-customer-sync.js, live-status.js, live-time.js (shared with desktop live-chat/index.html), live-chat/js/live/live-hidden-commenters.js (shared hide-by-person, desktop+mobile), live-chat/fb-video-player.html (opened via backend-generated livestream deep-links from render livestream-snapshots/images routes), Render routes: GET /api/web2-live-comments (list/delta), /posts, /page-posts, /api/native-orders/load, /api/web2/customers/batch-by-phone|batch-by-fbid|harvest-comments, /api/web2/live-hidden-commenters/_, /api/livestream/snapshots/by-comment-ids (mobile unused), /api/fb-avatar (worker), desktop index.html snap-\* modules generate the deep-links fb-video-player consumes (Element Capture lives there, not here)

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:live-comments - primary realtime. Via LiveCommentsStream.start() (actions.js wireSse): debounce 400ms then GET delta by sinceUpdated cursor. ALSO a second raw subscribe in entry.js:146 throttled 30s -> loadPosts(). Fallback path (no LiveCommentsStream) does silent full load() debounced 800ms.; SUBSCRIBE web2:native-orders - entry.js:154 -> scheduleLoadNative (debounce 500ms) -> reload NATIVE map (fbUserId->{stt,code}) -> re-render order badges; SUBSCRIBE web2:customers - entry.js:158 -> refreshWarehouse (debounce 600ms): wipes custMap.phone/fb, re-enriches LCM.ALL, re-renders; SUBSCRIBE web2:live-hidden-commenters - live-hidden-commenters.js:366 -> \_load(true) (debounce 600ms); Cleanup: NO unsubscribe / stream.stop() is ever called (no beforeunload/unmount). Acceptable for a single-page mobile viewer but means LiveCommentsStream keeps subscription + LiveTime keeps its 30s interval for page lifetime. wireSse keeps stream ref; getStream() exposes it but nothing stops it.; Server publishes web2:live-comments after upsert (relay Pancake WS -> /ingest -> DB -> SSE), payload is tickle {action,postId,ts} (no PII - client re-fetches). Topic naming correct (web2: prefix -> web2 hub).

**console.log:** 4 — live-chat/js/shared/live-comments-stream.js:125 console.warn delta fail (message only, no PII); live-chat/js/shared/live-customer-sync.js:177 console.warn harvest fail (message only); live-chat/js/live/live-hidden-commenters.js:55 console.log fallback toast text + :95 console.warn load fail (no PII/tokens); fb-video-player.html uses status.textContent (page UI) not console; no console.\* - no leakage

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `bug` Broken livestream deep-link: backend generates https://nhijudy.store/tpos-pancake/fb-video-player.html?... but commit f1f0b7690 renamed tpos-pancake/ -> live-chat/. No tpos-pancake/ directory and no redirect config exist, so every 'Xem khoanh khac trong livestream' link (t.livestreamUrl shown in the — `render.com/routes/livestream-snapshots.js:207 and render.com/routes/livestream-i` → Change both hardcoded URLs to https://nhijudy.store/live-chat/fb-video-player.html (or add a tpos-pancake->live-chat redirect). Verify \_computeLivestreamUrl in both route files.
- 🟡 `logic` Header count badge mismatch with active filter. doRender shows realCommentTotal() (sum of Pancake comment_count for in-view posts) as the comment header whenever real counts exist, but realCommentTotal ignores the chip filter (store/house/order/phone) AND hidden-person filtering. So tapping Co SDT/H — `comments-mobile-render.js:199-203 + comments-mobile-actions.js:138-154` → When LCM.filter is set, prefer the filtered visible count (rows.length) for the header, or compute a filtered total; only show the Pancake grand-total when filter==='' and no hidden filtering is activ
- 🟡 `race` load() has no in-flight guard or sequence token. In liveMode the boot LCM.load() issues ?limit=200 (livingIds empty since posts not yet loaded), while loadPosts()->overrideRealCounts() later issues load({silent:true}) with the correct postIds. If the broader/slower first response resolves AFTER the — `comments-mobile-actions.js:213-254 (load) racing with :130 (overrideRealCounts->` → Add a monotonically increasing loadSeq token captured before fetch and discard the response if a newer load started (if mySeq!==currentSeq return); or AbortController to cancel the previous in-flight
- 🟡 `tpos-coupling` page-posts tech debt: loadPosts() fetches /api/web2-live-comments/page-posts which calls poller.listLivePostsForAssign() - documented to return 0 posts on web2-api after the DB split (depends on server-side poller JWT/state). So living/title from /page-posts is empty and all posts start living=false — `comments-mobile-actions.js:60-96 (loadPosts via /page-posts) + 101-134 (override` → Per CLAUDE.md realtime rule, drop /page-posts and source living/title solely from direct browser Pancake fetch (Web2Chat.fetchLivePosts) which is already wired; remove the dead /page-posts dependency.
- ⚪ `race` 30s loadPosts throttle in the raw web2:live-comments subscribe is trailing-suppressing, not leading-debounced as the comment claims. \_postsAt guards now-\_postsAt<30000 then sets \_postsAt - so the FIRST event runs immediately (leading edge OK) but subsequent events within 30s are DROPPED entirely (no — `comments-mobile-entry.js:144-151` → If timely new-post detection matters, add a trailing setTimeout to run loadPosts once after the window when events were suppressed.
- ⚪ `memory-leak` No teardown: LiveCommentsStream subscription, the 4 SSE subscriptions, and LiveTime 30s setInterval are never stopped (no stop()/unsub on pagehide/beforeunload). getStream() exposes stream but nothing calls stop(). Acceptable for a single-page viewer but means re-navigation within an SPA shell would — `comments-mobile-actions.js:330-351 (wireSse, no stop), live-time.js:96-104 (inte` → Add a pagehide/visibilitychange-hidden teardown that calls stream.stop() and clears subscriptions if/when this is embedded in a longer-lived shell.
- ⚪ `logic` applyDelta unshifts fresh rows; a concurrent full load() that resolves and replaces LCM.ALL = data drops any fresh delta rows appended just before; self-heals only if the full load already contains them. Dedup key is id (correct), so no duplicate, but a momentary new-comment-vanished-then-reappeared — `comments-mobile-actions.js:309-328 vs 213-254` → Same loadSeq guard as the main race fix; or merge full-load results into existing ALL by id instead of wholesale replacement.
- ⚪ `bug` fb-video-player.html FB SDK 4s timeout is not cancelled when xfbml.ready fires. If the SDK renders at ~4.0s, the timer could race location.replace and briefly navigate away from an otherwise-working player. fallbackTriggered guards double-fire but not this timing race. — `live-chat/fb-video-player.html:151-199` → Cancel the 4s timeout inside xfbml.ready (clearTimeout) once seekDone is set.

**Security (audit):**

- ⚪ fb-video-player.html does not validate ?v (videoId) is numeric before embedding it into FB URLs (watch/?v=${videoId} line 110 and videos/${videoId}/ line 109 unencoded). It is injected only via textContent, dataset.href (attribute) and URLSearchParams (encoded for plugin variant) - no innerHTML sink — `live-chat/fb-video-player.html:102-110,143` → Validate videoId with /^\d+$/ (after stripping pageId\_ prefix) and reject otherwise; encode it in the path variant too.
- ⚪ fb-video-player.html has no CSP and loads FB SDK from connect.facebook.net without SRI. The standalone wrapper executes inline script and embeds cross-origin iframes. — `live-chat/fb-video-player.html:8 (no meta CSP), 181-192` → Add a tight CSP meta (script-src self connect.facebook.net; frame-src facebook.com); FB SDK is versionless so SRI is impractical, but frame-src/script-src allowlist limits surface.
- ℹ️ comments-mobile.html does not load web2-auth.js, so window.Web2Auth is undefined. Writes (harvest, hide/unhide) rely on the localStorage web2_auth fallback inside Web2CustomerStore.authHeaders / live-hidden-commenters.\_lhcHeaders to attach x-web2-token. If localStorage lacks web2_auth (fresh device — `comments-mobile.html (no web2-auth script); web2-customer-store.js:34-40; live-h` → Load web2-auth.js (or guard writes when no token) so token is reliably present; surface a not-signed-in notice instead of silent 401.
- ℹ️ live-hidden-commenters.\_save('create') path (used on first-load 404 seed) sends NO x-web2-token (uses plain {Content-Type} headers), unlike \_hideRemote/\_unhideRemote which use \_lhcHeaders(). Under WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE the seed create may 401. — `live-chat/js/live/live-hidden-commenters.js:114-145` → Route create/update through \_lhcHeaders() too.
- ℹ️ Comment message + customer_name + address are rendered into card/sheet/picker HTML, but all values pass through LCM.esc()/\_esc() before interpolation; data-live-ts attribute uses a numeric ms only. No unsanitized innerHTML of customer data found. — `comments-mobile-render.js:46-74,246-263; live-time.js:72-81` → No change needed; keep esc() on every dynamic value if markup is extended.
- ℹ️ Render list/delta SQL is fully parameterized (ANY($n)), limit clamped numerically; getDb uses web2Db (correct pool). No SQLi / no chatDb leakage observed in the comment route consumed here. — `render.com/routes/web2-live-comments.js:25-26,495-535` → None.

**Ghi chú:** GMT+7 handling is correct in scope: parseTs (state.js:108-109) and LiveTime.parseMs (live-time.js:30) both append Z to naive Pancake timestamps before new Date(); all display uses Intl.DateTimeFormat with timeZone Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh. Server route also has the documented +7h migration + naive-string parse fix (web2-live-comments.js:74-128,168-180). No timezone bug found in these pages.; PWA design is intentional and correct: comments-mobile.webmanifest deliberately omits start_url (scope './' only) so Add-to-Home-Screen saves the currently open page rather than redirecting to overview - matches the recent fix. Icon web2/shared/img/logo-emblem.png exists.; Element Capture (RestrictionTarget.fromElement/restrictTo, CropTarget/cropTo) and captureVisibleTab live in live-chat/js/live/live-livestream-snap-\*.js loaded only by the DESKTOP index.html, NOT by comments-mobile.html or fb-video-player.html. comments-mobile intentionally does not fetch thumbnails (load() comment, actions.js:244-246) so there is no captureVisibleTab leak in this scoped unit; the leak risk is in the desktop snap modules (separate unit).; Pool correctness verified: web2-live-comments route getDb = web2Db||chatDb (web2Db primary); SQL parameterized; no Web 1.0 table writes from these pages.; Write auth: harvest + hide/unhide attach x-web2-token via Web2CustomerStore.authHeaders / \_lhcHeaders reading localStorage.web2_auth even without web2-auth.js loaded - works IF token present; the seed-create path in live-hidden-commenters omits the header (info-level).; reconcileList is a keyed DOM reconcile (no innerHTML nuke) with avatar transplant to avoid refetch flicker - solid anti-jank implementation; burst guard shouldAnimateNew disables fade on >5 batch or >12/2s.

### page:live-chat-core

The live-chat desktop "Live" column is a read-only livestream comment hub for Web 2.0. It reads per-comment rows from Postgres web2_live_comments (web2Db) via the worker route /api/web2-live-comments, renders them newest-first with infinite scroll, and stays realtime via the shared LiveCommentsStream engine subscribed to SSE topic web2:live-comments (PUSH-only, polling removed). On each SSE tickle it debounce-fetches a delta (cursor = updated_at) and prepends/patches rows. It enriches rows from the web2_customers warehouse (Web2CustomerStore), harvests new customers into the warehouse (non-overwrite), captures alt-phones, and drives an auto-snap leader-lock (web2:capture-lock) for livestream thumbnails. It correctly uses web2Db, /api/web2\* routes, x-web2-token headers, and the web2: SSE hub — no TPOS/Web1 coupling found. The legacy LiveRealtime SSE/WS transport is fully neutered to no-ops.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** app-init.js runs on DOMContentLoaded -> initializeApp() -> ColumnManager.initialize(), sharedDebtManager.startCleanup(), LiveColumnManager.initialize('liveContent'), SettingsManager.initialize(); LiveColumnManager.initialize() (live-init.js:32): state.startCacheCleanup(), LiveCommentList.renderContainer(), setupEventListeners() (eventBus on live:crmTeamChanged/liveCampaignChanged/campaignsChanged/refreshRequested/loadMoreRequested), setupRealtimeListeners() (window addEventListener liveRealtimeConnected/Disconnected); await \_waitForPancakeAccounts(9000) -> pancakeTokenManager.initialize() + Web2Chat.syncFromRenderDB() (polls up to 9s for valid JWT); LiveApi.loadCRMTeams() -> LiveSource.fetchPagesAsCrmTeams() (Pancake pages); renderCrmTeamOptions(); restoreSelection() -> onCrmTeamChange -> loadLiveCampaigns(FB Graph) -> \_restoreCampaignSelection -> onMultiCampaignChange -> GET /api/web2-live-comments?postIds=...&limit=5000; LiveCommentsStream.create({...}).start() -> Web2SSE.subscribe('web2:live-comments') (retries every 1s if bridge not loaded); Web2SSE.subscribe('web2:customers') -> debounce 600ms -> clear customerKhoCache/partnerCache, LiveKhoEnricher.reset()+scan(), renderComments(); SharedCache partnerCache (maxSize 2000, ttl 10min) + customerKhoCache Map created at module load in live-state.js; IntersectionObserver scroll sentinel wired on first render (\_ensureScrollSentinel); document 'dragend' listener bound once for deferred-prepend flush

| Control                                                              | Handler                                                                                                                                            | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| -------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| CRM team / page <select> change -> eventBus 'live:crmTeamChanged'    | onCrmTeamChange (live-init-wiring.js:113)                                                                                                          | Sets selectedTeamId/selectedPage/selectedPages, savePageSelection(localStorage web2_selected_page), loads FB-Graph campaigns (loadLiveCampaigns / loadLiveCampaignsFromAllPages), renders campaign options, then \_restoreCampaignSelection() which calls onMultiCampaignChange. On empty -> stopSSE + clear comments + render.                                                                                                                                  |
