| Campaign multi-select checkboxes -> eventBus 'live:campaignsChanged' | onMultiCampaignChange via 500ms debounce (live-init-wiring.js:47,248)                                                                              | Bumps \_loadGen (race guard), clearAllCaches, resetRenderLimit, LiveKhoEnricher.reset, stopSSE, prefetch live videos per page, resolves postIdSet, GET /api/web2-live-comments?postIds&limit=5000, dedup-by-id, sort created_time DESC, sets state.comments, primes \_lastCommentMaxMs/\_lastUpdatedMaxMs + \_liveStream.primeCursor, \_harvestCommentCustomers, renderComments, loadSessionIndex, loadPartnerInfoForComments, offline batch snap if live ended. |
| SSE web2:live-comments tickle                                        | LiveCommentsStream schedule()->fetchDelta (live-comments-stream.js:84) -> onDelta -> prependComments + \_harvestCommentCustomers (live-init.js:79) | Debounce 400ms, GET delta with sinceUpdated=lastUpdatedMs-3000 (overlap 3s), advances cursor from raw rows, maps rows, prependComments inserts fresh rows in-place / patches updated rows, harvests new customers, emits live:newComment for auto-snap.                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Infinite scroll near bottom (IntersectionObserver sentinel)          | \_appendOlderBatch (live-comment-list-state.js:224)                                                                                                | Slices \_filteredAll()[oldLim:oldLim+STEP], chunked render (25/frame) before sentinel, bumps \_renderLimit, re-observes sentinel. Generation token \_renderGen aborts batch if full re-render happens mid-flight.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Toggle hide/show comment                                             | toggleHideComment (live-init-lifecycle.js:469)                                                                                                     | Optimistic comment.is_hidden=hide + render, then LiveApi.hideComment(pageId,commentId,hide) -> PancakeAPI.hideComment (WRITE to Pancake). Reverts is_hidden + re-render + error toast on failure. NOTE: show (hide=false) not supported by Pancake API -> always fails to un-hide on FB.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Refresh requested -> eventBus 'live:refreshRequested'                | refresh (live-init-lifecycle.js:449)                                                                                                               | stopSSE then reloads comments / campaigns / CRM teams depending on selection depth.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Drag product onto comment (dragstart sets LiveState.\_dragActive)    | prependComments buffering + \_flushDeferredAfterDrag (live-comment-list-events.js:159)                                                             | While dragging, incoming SSE deltas are buffered in \_dragDeferredPrepend; on document 'dragend' the buffer is replayed via prependComments and any deferred full render runs.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Force-extract / auto-snap on new comment                             | \_runAutoSnapOnComment (live-livestream-snap-extract.js) + \_harvestCommentCustomers                                                               | Acquires capture leader lock (web2:capture-lock), captures FB live frame via extension/stream, POSTs snapshot for comment, harvests comment customers to warehouse (non-overwrite).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| endpoint GET /api/web2-live-comments (server)                        | router.get('/') web2-live-comments.js:495                                                                                                          | Parameterized WHERE on post_id/page_id/campaign_id + since(created_time)/sinceUpdated(updated_at), ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT min(limit,5000). Uses web2Db. Returns {success,data}.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| endpoint POST /api/web2-live-comments/bulk + /saved (server)         | \_saveCommentsToDb / LiveApi.saveToLive                                                                                                            | Auto-save fetched comments and Save-to-Live; both send x-web2-token via \_w2AuthHeaders.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE singleton), web2/shared/web2-customer-store.js (Web2CustomerStore enrich/harvest/patch), web2/shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders, API_CONFIG/WORKER_URL), web2/shared/web2-chat-client.js (Web2Chat fetchLivePosts/syncFromRenderDB), web2/shared/web2-wallet-balance.js (Web2WalletBalance pill), web2/customers/index.html (warehouse target of harvest, reloaded via web2:customers SSE), native-orders (NativeOrdersApi.list for order badges), render route render.com/routes/web2-live-comments.js, render service render.com/services/web2-livestream-poller.js (writes web2_live_comments), worker route cloudflare-worker/modules/config/routes.js (/api/web2-live-comments proxy), live-chat/comments-mobile.html (mobile sibling sharing LiveCommentsStream + LiveCustomerSync)

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:live-comments (LiveCommentsStream, live-comments-stream.js:147; fallback live-init.js:88) — debounce 400ms then delta fetch; unsub returned to stream but stream.stop() is NEVER called on desktop -> listener lives for page lifetime (acceptable single-page, but destroy() does not clean it); SUBSCRIBE web2:customers (live-init.js:100) — debounce 600ms, clears caches + re-enrich + render; unsub return value DISCARDED, not cleaned in destroy(); SUBSCRIBE web2:capture-lock (live-livestream-snap-lock.js:159) — guarded by \_subscribeLockSse.\_done; takeover logic; no unsubscribe; PUBLISH: none directly from client; server route \_notify('web2:live-comments') after upsert; client is read/render only; Note: legacy LiveRealtime.startSSE/initializeWebSocket are no-ops (no EventSource/WS opened)

**console.log:** 112 — live-livestream-snap-extract.js:211 console.warn logs Object.keys(comment).join(',') — comment field NAMES only (no values), low risk but leaks internal shape; No PII (phone/name/fb_id/message/token) found in any console.\* — all logs use e.message + static labels (verified across js/live, js/shared, js/layout); live-init.js:35 console.log('[Live-INIT] Initializing... containerId') — debug noise, harmless; live-livestream-snap-extract.js:131 console.log('[snap-auto] skip ... commentId', commentId) — logs comment id (not PII, internal id)

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `race` Lost-message race on delta cursor under LIMIT truncation. Delta query is `WHERE updated_at >= sinceUpdated ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT N` but the client advances lastUpdatedMs to MAX(updated_at) among RETURNED rows. Because ordering is by created_time (not updated_at), if more than N rows match — `live-comments-stream.js:96-119 (cursor advance) + render.com/routes/web2-live-co` → Order the delta query by updated_at ASC (or DESC) when sinceUpdated is present, OR have client only advance cursor to the min(updated_at) when rows.length === limit (i.e. detect truncation and re-fetc
- 🟡 `race` Cross-campaign stale cursor. LiveCommentsStream.primeCursor only moves cursor FORWARD (c.updatedMs > lastUpdatedMs). When the user switches to an OLDER campaign, onMultiCampaignChange re-primes with that campaign's (lower) max updated_at, but the stream keeps the high cursor from the previous campai — `live-comments-stream.js:74-78 (primeCursor forward-only), live-init-wiring.js:38` → Add a stream.resetCursor() (set lastUpdatedMs/lastCreatedMs=0) called by onMultiCampaignChange in the non-silent branch before primeCursor, so the cursor is rebased to the newly-loaded set rather than
- 🟡 `memory-leak` Unbounded dedup Sets in shared LiveCustomerSync. _seen (harvest dedup key fbId|phone) and \_queue grow for the entire session and LiveCustomerSync.reset() is never called from desktop (only mobile/never). Similarly \_altSeen Set in \_captureAltPhones grows unbounded. On a long livestream with thousands — `live-customer-sync.js:133,182 (no desktop reset) + live-init-lifecycle.js:364 (_` → Call LiveCustomerSync.reset() and clear this.\_altSeen inside onMultiCampaignChange non-silent branch (alongside LiveKhoEnricher.reset), and/or cap the Sets with an LRU eviction.
- 🟡 `memory-leak` SSE subscriptions not cleaned up. The web2:customers subscription (live-init.js:100) and the fallback web2:live-comments subscription (live-init.js:88) discard their unsubscribe return values, and destroy() (live-init-lifecycle.js:515) does not unsubscribe any Web2SSE topic nor stop \_liveStream. If — `live-init.js:88,100 (unsub discarded); live-init-lifecycle.js:515-531 (destroy o` → Capture unsub handles (this.\_unsubCustomers, this.\_unsubLiveFallback) and call them + this.\_liveStream?.stop() in destroy(); guard initialize() against double-invocation.
- ⚪ `logic` toggleHideComment optimistically toggles is_hidden for show (hide=false) but LiveApi.hideComment ignores the show case (Pancake API cannot un-hide; void hide). When un-hiding, the Pancake call may return success (it 'hides' or no-ops) yet the comment is not actually shown on FB; UI shows a success t — `live-api.js:414-422, live-init-lifecycle.js:482-488` → Disable/hide the 'show' action or surface that un-hide is not supported via Pancake, to avoid false success feedback.
- ⚪ `race` \_loadGen race guard checks gen between awaits in onMultiCampaignChange, but loadPartnerInfoForComments(), loadSessionIndex(), and \_harvestCommentCustomers() are fired without gen re-check after their own awaits. A stale (superseded) load can still re-render via loadPartnerInfoForComments -> renderCo — `live-init-wiring.js:391,410-415 (fire-and-forget after final gen point)` → Pass/capture gen into loadPartnerInfoForComments and bail (no render) if gen !== this.\_loadGen after its batch await.
- ⚪ `logic` prependComments UPDATE path only patches DOM rows currently rendered, and emits live:newComment only for fresh.length <= 50; a backfill/cursor-reset burst >50 is correctly skipped for snap, but those fresh rows are still spliced into state.comments and harvested. Harvest of a large backfill batch is — `live-comment-list-render-list.js:615 (cap 50)` → Distinguish backfill (cursor reset) from genuine burst by comparing created_time recency rather than batch size, so large but recent live bursts still snap.

**Security (audit):**

- ℹ️ Write routes correctly send x-web2-token via \_w2AuthHeaders (live-init-state.js:93, live-api.js:14) for bulk save, saved, add-alt-phone, harvest-comments, customer PATCH/upsert. WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE compliance looks correct across all mutations in this unit. — `live-init-state.js:93, live-api.js:14, live-init-lifecycle.js:221/393/416` → No change needed; confirm Web2Auth.authHeaders is always loaded before first mutation.
- ⚪ x-web2-token read from localStorage('web2_auth').token at-rest as plaintext JWT (consistent with rest of Web 2.0). Token is placed in headers, not URLs, in this unit — good. Capture-lock SSE/read uses GET /get/global without auth (read-only lock state). — `live-init-state.js:97, live-livestream-snap-lock.js:54` → Accept as known Web 2.0 design debt (token plaintext); ensure capture-lock /acquire/release remain auth-gated server-side (they send token).
- ⚪ prependComments builds DOM via renderCommentItem(cur).outerHTML / insertAdjacentHTML with customer message/name/phone. XSS safety depends entirely on renderCommentItem escaping. showError() does escape (SharedUtils.escapeHtml), and list click handlers were moved to delegation/dataset (XSS-safe per c — `live-comment-list-render-list.js:577,684,691,694` → Verify renderCommentItem() escapes all untrusted fields (message, from.name, phone, address) — if any are interpolated raw into innerHTML, a malicious FB comment is stored-XSS. Audit live-comment-list
- ℹ️ Comment customer PII (fb_id, phone, name) is NOT broadcast in SSE payloads — server \_notify sends only {action,postId,ts} tickle and client re-fetches. Good. — `live-comments-stream.js:147` → None.
- ℹ️ Worker proxies /api/web2-live-comments; server query is fully parameterized ($n via add()), ANY($n) for arrays — no SQL injection. — `render.com/routes/web2-live-comments.js:502-529` → None.

**Ghi chú:** Pool usage is correct: server route getDb() = web2Db || chatDb fallback (render.com/routes/web2-live-comments.js:25-26); no Web 1.0 table writes from this unit.; Timezone handling is correct: SharedUtils.parseTimestamp appends 'Z' to naive Pancake timestamps (utils.js:57-62); server has idempotent marker-gated tz_fix migrations for created_time. No GMT+7 display bug found in this slice.; Legacy realtime transport (LiveRealtime SSE to /facebook/comments/stream + WS to n2store-realtime) is fully neutered to idempotent no-ops — no stray EventSource/WebSocket opened.; \_loadGen generation counter is a solid race guard for the main load path (checked after each await in onMultiCampaignChange).; Auto-snap leader lock (web2:capture-lock) has TTL 90s, heartbeat 30s, stall detection 75s, 3-min cooldown after stall, and CAS-style acquire with force-takeover confirm — reasonably robust against split-brain; minor: SSE takeover uses random 0-1500ms jitter to reduce thundering herd.; harvest-comments / add-alt-phone are documented server-side as non-overwrite (only fill empty / append alt_phones) — matches the no-overwrite requirement.; prependComments has careful invariant maintenance (DOM == filtered.slice(0,\_renderLimit)) and a \_renderGen abort token for in-flight append batches — good defensive design.

### page:multi-tool

web2/multi-tool is the "Đa dụng → Tăng số lượng comment" (comment-boost) page. It lets an operator pick a Facebook Page, a livestream post (living-first), and one COMMENT conversation, then makes the PAGE itself spam N random `reply_comment` messages onto that thread to inflate the live's visible comment count (NOT messages to customers). It fetches Pancake livestream posts and COMMENT conversations DIRECTLY from the browser via the worker `/api/pancake/*` + user JWT (no server poller), and sends comments through `Web2Chat.sendLiveComment` using one JWT per Pancake admin account (parallel workers). It also calls the Web 2.0 route `/api/web2-live-comments/boost-mark` to suppress/purge these page-authored comments from live-chat/comments-mobile so they don't pollute the real customer comment feed. The naming ("multi-tool", a tab framework) is vestigial — only one panel exists.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** CSS: ../shared/web2-sidebar.css, web2-components.css, web2-theme.css; Google Fonts Inter+Manrope (render-blocking external stylesheet, no preload of just critical weight); Scripts in <head> order: lucide UMD (defer), ../../shared/js/notification-system.js (Web 1.0 shared notification — OK, shared layer); Scripts at end of body: web2-auth.js (runs guardPage() early -> redirects to /web2/login if no valid token; sets window.API*CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG), web2-sidebar.js, web2-pancake-token.js, web2-pancake-accounts.js, then 7 web2-chat-\* modules building window.Web2Chat (utils/tokens/settings/api/live/tags/client), then js/multi-tool.js; init() (multi-tool.js:465) runs on DOMContentLoaded: mounts Web2Sidebar into #web2Aside, calls wireTabs() (no-op — #mtTabs absent from DOM), wires boostReloadPost/boostReloadConv/boostRun/boostClean/boostStop click handlers, wires boostDelay input->updateHint, calls loadPages(), lucide.createIcons(); loadPages() (73) awaits Web2Chat readiness (waitWeb2Chat polls up to ~6s), calls Web2Chat.listPages() (worker /api/pancake/pages?access_token=JWT), filters out Instagram igo* pages, populates #boostPage and sets onchange->loadPosts; No data fetch of livestream posts on load until a page is selected; NO setInterval/poll anywhere; NO EventSource/SSE subscription on this page

| Control                                       | Handler                       | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| --------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| #boostPage select change                      | loadPosts (multi-tool.js:121) | Reads getJwt(); builds worker URL /api/pancake/pages/{id}/posts?access_token=JWT&start_time=now-14d&end_time=now; fetch().then(json); filters raw to type==='livestream' OR is_live_video OR live_video_id; maps to {postId,title,date,living}; sorts living-first then newest; renders optgroups (🔴 Đang Livestream / Đã Livestream); auto-selects index 0 and calls loadConvs(). Appends 'Z' to inserted_at via parseTs() before Date for GMT+7 display (fmtDate timeZone Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| #boostReloadPost button click                 | loadPosts (468->121)          | Re-fetches livestream posts for current page; resets \_posts/\_convs and the conv dropdown.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| #boostPost select change                      | loadConvs (192)               | Reads selected post; fetch worker /api/pancake/pages/{id}/conversations?type=COMMENT&post_id&since=now-30d&until=now&access_token=JWT; filters type==COMMENT; sorts by updated_at desc; renders conv options (customer name + 24-char snippet, esc-wrapped); auto-selects newest (index 0).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| #boostReloadConv button click                 | loadConvs (469->192)          | Re-fetches COMMENT conversations for the selected post.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| #boostCount / #boostDelay / #boostText inputs | read inside run() (318-321)   | count clamped 1..500; delay = max(0.5s,parse)\*1000 rounded ms; text template trimmed (empty => randText 5-9 alnum chars per comment).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| #boostDelay input event                       | updateHint (479)              | Updates ms hint text only.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| #boostRun button click                        | run (309)                     | Guarded by _running. Captures conv locally; computes messageId=conv.id (top-level), postId. Calls markBoost(conv.id) (POST /boost-mark with x-web2-token) to suppress+purge from live-chat. Builds 1 worker per Pancake admin account (getPageAccountJwts) or single active JWT fallback. Each worker loops claiming indices via nextIdx() (claimed++), calls Web2Chat.sendLiveComment(pageId,conv,text,{jwt,messageId}) -> worker POST /api/pancake/.../messages?access_token=JWT body action:reply_comment; on success collects `${postId}_${res.id}` boosted conv ids and fire-and-forget markBoostIds batches (>=5) to purge them from live-chat; on FB rate-limit (e_subcode 3252001 / e_code 368 / regex) sets \_stop and aborts all workers; sleeps delay between sends. After Promise.all: flushes remaining marks, waits 1800ms, final markBoostIds purge of all boostedConvIds, updates stats, notify. |
| #boostStop button click                       | inline (472)                  | Sets \_stop=true and disables Stop button; workers exit their loops at next nextIdx/sleep boundary.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| #boostClean button click                      | cleanConv (288)               | Reads selected conv; POST /boost-mark {convId} via markBoost; toasts purged count. Used to manually purge boost/spam comments typed directly in Pancake.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

**Liên kết:** window.Web2Chat (web2/shared/web2-chat-client.js + web2-chat-{utils,tokens,settings,api,live,tags}.js) — provides getJwt, listPages, sendLiveComment, getPageAccountJwts, \_internal.WORKER_URL, web2/shared/web2-auth.js — Web2Auth.authHeaders (x-web2-token), guardPage redirect to /web2/login, sets WEB2_CONFIG/API_CONFIG.WORKER_URL, web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js + .css — sidebar nav (Đa dụng menu), web2/shared/web2-pancake-token.js, web2-pancake-accounts.js — Pancake token/account loading from Render DB, shared/js/notification-system.js — window.notificationManager toasts (Web 1.0 shared), Worker route /api/pancake/\* (cloudflare-worker worker.js PANCAKE case) -> pancake.vn/api/v1 (posts, conversations, messages), Render route /api/web2-live-comments/boost-mark (render.com/routes/web2-live-comments.js:406) — purge+suppress, web2Db pool, SSE web2:live-comments, Consumers downstream: live-chat/ and comments-mobile read web2_live_comments; this page suppresses page-authored comments there

**SSE:** This page does NOT subscribe to or open any EventSource/Web2SSE — no realtime listener, no cleanup needed.; It PUBLISHES indirectly: /boost-mark purges rows and the route calls \_notify('reconcile') -> notifyClients('web2:live-comments', {action,postId,ts}, 'update') on the Web 2.0 SSE hub, so open live-chat tabs reload and drop the boosted comments. No debounce on this publish (each purge>0 emits once).; Topic web2:live-comments is correctly web2: prefixed and wired via web2RealtimeSseRoutes (Web 2.0 hub), not the Web 1.0 hub.

**console.log:** 1 — multi-tool.js:10 console.log('[notify]', type, msg) — fallback only when window.notificationManager is absent; logs UI message text (no tokens/PII; benign but leftover debug-style fallback)

**Bugs (audit):**

- ⚪ `logic` wireTabs() (24) queries '#mtTabs .mt-tab' but the HTML has no #mtTabs container and no .mt-tab elements — only a single #panel-boost panel. wireTabs is a dead no-op left over from a multi-tab 'multi-tool' design. Harmless but misleading dead code. — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:23-34, index.html (no #mtTabs/.mt-tab in markup` → Remove wireTabs() and its call in init(), or restore the tab markup. Update page title/comments since it is now a single-purpose boost tool.
- 🟡 `race` loadPosts()/loadConvs() (and the reload buttons) are NOT disabled during an active run(). If the operator clicks 'Tải lại bài live'/'Tải lại hội thoại' or changes the Page select mid-run, \_posts/\_convs are reset and re-sorted. run() captured `conv` into a local so the spam target itself stays correc — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:121-187,192-247,288-301,309-317` → Disable page/post/conv selects and reload/clean buttons while \_running; add a monotonically-increasing request token in loadPosts/loadConvs and ignore stale responses (or AbortController), so the last
- ⚪ `race` Stale-cursor / duplicate-target after first boost round: comment notes (336) that reply*comment creates nested replies; messageId is fixed to conv.id (top-level) to keep each reply counting +1. This is correct, but `conv.post_id || String(conv.id).split('*')[0]`(325) assumes conv.id is always`<pos — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:325,408-409` → Validate conv.post_id is present (prefer it over split); if neither conv.post_id nor a valid split is available, warn and skip purge-id construction; log a diagnostic when postId cannot be derived.
- ⚪ `logic` fire-and-forget markBoostIds (flushMarks at 384 and periodic markBoost at 394) are unawaited promises; if any reject (network/401) the rejection is swallowed inside markBoostIds' try/catch (returns {ok:false}) but the boost comments are NOT purged and the user sees no error — they silently leak into — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:379-386,392-395,450-456` → Track a failed-purge counter and surface a warning toast at the end ('N boost comments may still appear in live-chat'); optionally retry the final markBoostIds once.
- ⚪ `logic` Off-by-one in pacing: worker sleeps `if (!_stop && claimed < total) await sleep(delay)` (439) AFTER each send using the shared `claimed` counter rather than the worker's own index. With multiple parallel account-workers, `claimed` reflects total claimed across all workers, so a worker can skip its t — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:439,372-374` → Gate the trailing sleep on whether THIS worker will claim another index, or simply always sleep(delay) before the next nextIdx() rather than after the send.
- ℹ️ `race` nextIdx() relies on single-threaded JS atomicity of claimed++ between awaits (commented at 372). This is correct for browser JS (no true concurrency), so no duplicate index is handed out — flagged only to confirm: the claim is taken synchronously before any await, so it is safe. — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:372-374,388-390` → No change; the atomicity assumption holds in a single-threaded event loop.
- ℹ️ `other` GMT+7 handling is CORRECT: parseTs (97) appends 'Z' to timezone-less Pancake inserted_at before new Date, and fmtDate uses timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'. No timezone bug found. loadConvs sort uses Date.parse(updated_at) (231) without Z-append, but that only affects relative ordering of conversations ( — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:95-114,138-143,209-217,231` → For consistency, route conv updated_at sorting through parseTs() too, though it does not change correctness.
- ℹ️ `other` loadPosts time window is 14 days while loadConvs uses 30 days (since=now-30d). A post can be 14 days old but its comment thread updated within 30 days — not a bug, just an inconsistency worth noting. — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:141,215` → Align windows or document why posts use 14d and conversations 30d.

**Security (audit):**

- ℹ️ User Pancake JWT is passed in the query string (access_token=JWT) on every worker fetch for posts, conversations, and message sends (multi-tool.js:140-144, 210-218; web2-chat-live.js:222). This is the documented Pancake pattern (matches pancake.vn's own requests) and the worker proxies to pancake.vn — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:140-144, web2/shared/web2-chat-live.js:222` → Acceptable given Pancake API requires it; ensure the worker does not log full URLs with access_token. Consider moving JWT to a header forwarded by the worker if Pancake supports it.
- ℹ️ Pancake JWT and per-account JWTs are stored in localStorage in plaintext (web2-chat-tokens.js getJwt/getAllAccounts read LS.JWT / LS.ALL_ACCOUNTS). XSS on any web2 page could exfiltrate page-admin Pancake tokens. — `web2/shared/web2-chat-tokens.js:27-37,63-70,237-253` → Known shared-layer token-at-rest pattern; out of scope for this page. Keep all customer/page data esc()-escaped (this page does) to prevent the XSS that would read these tokens.
- ⚪ loadPages line 82 interpolates r.reason into innerHTML WITHOUT esc() while other branches escape. r.reason comes from Web2Chat.listPages (worker/Pancake response), not direct user input, so XSS risk is low, but it is inconsistent with the esc() used elsewhere (lines 90,154,175,224,243). — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:82` → Wrap with esc(): `Lỗi/không có page (${esc(r.reason || '...')})`.
- ℹ️ Write to /api/web2-live-comments/boost-mark correctly attaches x-web2-token via authHeaders() (markBoost:256, markBoostIds:275). With WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1 the route (requireWeb2AuthSoft) will 401 without a token; the page guard (web2-auth guardPage) redirects unauthenticated users to login first, so — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:64-66,256,275; render.com/middleware/web2-auth.` → OK. Note markBoost/markBoostIds swallow non-OK responses (catch returns {ok:false}); a 401 would silently report purged:0 with no user feedback during a run — consider surfacing auth failure.
- ℹ️ boost-mark DELETE uses parameterized query with starts*with(id, $1 || '*') (not string-built) — no SQL injection. Pool is web2Db (getDb = web2Db || chatDb) — correct Web 2.0 isolation, no Web 1.0 table access. — `render.com/routes/web2-live-comments.js:418-427,25-27` → No action.
- ⚪ This page is a mass-action tool (page self-comments up to 500 times across multiple admin accounts in parallel) with only client-side count clamp (1..500) and client delay min 0.5s. The /boost-mark route does not rate-limit, and the actual sends go straight to Pancake from the browser. Abuse/FB-poli — `web2/multi-tool/js/multi-tool.js:318-320,422-432` → Acceptable for an internal admin tool behind the web2 login guard; ensure access to /web2/multi-tool is role-gated if non-admin staff have web2 logins.

**Ghi chú:** No TPOS coupling and no Web 1.0 table/pool/SSE coupling found. Backend route correctly uses web2Db and the web2:live-comments topic on the Web 2.0 SSE hub.; Complies with the REALTIME-not-poller rule: zero setInterval, fetches Pancake directly from browser via worker /api/pancake/\* + JWT, exactly the documented pattern (loadPosts is the canonical example referenced in CLAUDE.md).; FOCUS verified: loadPosts() filters type==='livestream' (plus is_live_video/live_video_id fallbacks), Z-appends inserted_at for GMT+7, and there is no poll loop.; Page is behind the web2-auth guardPage login redirect; all customer/post strings rendered into <option> innerHTML are esc()-escaped except r.reason (line 82).; The 'multi-tool' name and tab framework are vestigial — the page now only hosts the comment-boost panel; title/comments are slightly stale.; This tool drives the PAGE to self-comment; it explicitly does not message customers. The /boost-mark + page-authored heuristic keep these comments out of the live-chat customer feed. Treat as an internal growth/vanity tool, not customer-facing messaging.

### page:native-orders (Đơn Web / PBH)

Đơn Web (native orders → PBH) page. Modularized from the former 9456-line native-orders-app.js into ~20 small modules under a shared window.NativeOrders namespace (state → render → feature → chat → init → public-api built last). Lists native_orders (channel web2_livestream / web2_inbox) from /api/native-orders/load via the Cloudflare worker, supports edit/quick-status (UI-first optimistic), create/bulk-create PBH (/api/fast-sale-orders/from-native-order), merge/split/cancel orders, bill printing, KPI strip, campaign filtering, hover customer 360 panel, and embeds the shared Web2CustomerChat / Web2ChatPanel for messages+comments. Realtime via Web2SSE topics web2:native-orders, web2:payment-signals, web2:customers with a 600ms debounced full reload. Role: the central order-fulfillment screen converting live/inbox orders into fast-sale invoices (money: deposit, COD, delivery price, wallet thu hộ).

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** CSS: web2-sidebar.css, web2-effects.css, web2-base.css, web2-components.css, chat-panel/web2-chat-panel.css (all ?v=20260615u) + Inter/Manrope Google Fonts + inline mobile bulk-bar style; Head scripts: lucide@0.294.0 (defer), shared-auth-manager.js, notification-system.js, web2-effects.js; Body shared scripts (pre-app): web2-auth.js (sets window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG — base-url source of truth), web2-user-info.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js?v=20260620a → Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside') on DOMContentLoaded (auto-injects mobile.css, PWA manifest, command palette, notification); Chat stack: web2-chat-utils/tokens/settings/api/live/tags/client + chat-panel state/render/compose/panel + web2-zalo + web2-extension-bridge + web2-customer-chat-core/modal/customer-chat; Realtime/shared: web2-realtime.js, web2-new-msg-badge.js, web2-quick-reply, web2-msg-template-\*, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-wallet-balance.js, web2-return-bill.js, web2-ck-review.js, web2-ck-assign-picker.js; Bill stack: jsbarcode, qrcode, web2-qr, receiptline, web2-bill-service, web2-printer; App modules (ordered): native-orders-api, packing-slip, state, snapshots, customer-panel, render, delivery, modal-edit, product-picker, pbh-bill, inbox-add, bulk-operations, filters-campaigns, realtime-init, customer360, interactions, inbox-resolve, chat-send, public-api (builds window.NativeOrdersApp + calls NO.init), kpi, web2-motion (module); NO.init() runs: lucide.createIcons; \_loadAndRenderScopeBanner() (GET /api/web2/kpi/scope); hydrate customerId+search from URL; \_sseConnect() (3 SSE subscriptions); wire search debounce(350ms)/status/limit/channel-tabs/add-inbox/campaign dropdown+parent campaigns/check-all/bulk buttons/column toggle/modal close+ESC; loadCampaignSelection+renderCampaignLabel+loadAvailableCampaigns+loadParentCampaigns+loadPagePosts; first NO.load(); NativeOrdersKpi.init(): GET /api/web2/kpi/kpi + subscribe web2:native-orders & web2:fast-sale-orders (700ms debounce); Web2NewMsgBadge.init() on DOMContentLoaded

| Filter by customer (from 360)                                 | filterByCustomer (render.js:636)                                                                         | STATE.customerId set, URL replaceState, NO.load()                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Column show/hide toggle                                       | toggleColumnPanel/renderColumnTogglePanel (state.js:148)                                                 | per-column visibility persisted localStorage nativeOrdersColVisibility_v3; applyColumnVisibility injects <style>                                                                                                                                                                  |

**Liên kết:** worker /api/native-orders/\* (load, create-manual, campaigns, by-user/:id, :code PATCH/DELETE, mark-printed, merge, :code/split-order, :code/cancel), worker /api/fast-sale-orders/from-native-order, /by-source/:code/cancel (PBH create/cancel — Web 2.0 unprefixed route), worker /api/web2-products/list, /mark-printed (product picker + tem), worker /api/web2/kpi/scope, /api/web2/kpi/kpi (KPI strip + scope banner), worker /api/web2/customers/search, /:phone, /batch-by-fbid (customer enrich), worker /api/web2/customer-orders/:id (Customer 360 aggregate), worker /api/web2-live-comments/campaigns, /posts, /page-posts, /unassign (parent campaign linkage; /page-posts returns 0 on web2-api post-split per CLAUDE.md), worker /api/pancake/conversations, /api/fb-avatar (hover panel + avatars), web2-api (RENDER_API web2-api-kv04.onrender.com) /api/livestream/snapshots/by-comment-ids + /snapshot/ (line thumbnails), shared modules: Web2CustomerChat/Web2ChatPanel, Web2Chat, Web2Zalo, Web2MsgTemplate, Web2Bill, Web2Optimistic, Web2SSE bridge, Web2WalletBalance, Web2CkReview, Web2CkAssignPicker, Web2NewMsgBadge, DeliveryMethodPicker, NativeReturnBill, Web2UserInfo, Web2Auth, Popup, Web2Effects, navigates to ../web2/products/index.html (Kho SP); web2/delivery-zone (delivery options admin); business.facebook.com (FB login prompt)

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:native-orders (realtime-init.js:41) → \_scheduleReload 600ms debounce → NO.load(); SUBSCRIBE web2:payment-signals (realtime-init.js:46) → \_scheduleReload → reload (CK badge); SUBSCRIBE web2:customers (realtime-init.js:51) → \_scheduleReload → reload to re-enrich; KPI module subscribes web2:native-orders + web2:fast-sale-orders (kpi.js:102-103) → scheduleReload 700ms; NO CLEANUP: unsub handles stored in NO.\_sseUnsubscribe/\_sseUnsubCk/\_sseUnsubCust but never invoked; no beforeunload/unmount teardown. Acceptable for a full page but the unsub handles are dead code. \_sseConnect guarded by `if (NO._sseUnsubscribe) return` so init re-entry won't double-subscribe.; PUBLISH: none from client; server \_notify('web2:native-orders') after mutations drives the reload

**console.log:** 30 — js/native-orders-interactions.js:146 console.log('[NativeOrders] n2store-extension ready v'+version) — version string only, leftover info log; js/native-orders-realtime-init.js:29 console.log('[NativeOrders-SSE] reload:', reason) — reason includes order code on every SSE reload (low-sensitivity); js/native-orders-state.js:336 console.log(`[${type}]`, msg) — notify fallback may log user-facing messages to console; Other 27 are console.warn/error with static labels + e.message (no phone/name/token/PII values logged)

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `bug` cancelOrder success path calls undefined renderOrders(). After a SUCCESSFUL POST .../cancel, line 760 calls renderOrders() (real fn is NO.renderRows). This throws ReferenceError caught by the surrounding try/catch, so the user sees 'Huỷ đơn thất bại: renderOrders is not defined' even though the orde — `native-orders-pbh-bill.js:760` → Replace renderOrders() with NO.renderRows(); ensure the success toast/render is not inside the throwing path.
- 🟡 `bug` splitPbh calls window.NativeOrdersApi.\_getBaseUrl() which does not exist (the same file's cancelOrder comment at 735-736 documents this). Invoking splitPbh throws TypeError before any fetch. splitPbh is exposed on window.NativeOrdersApp.splitPbh but appears NOT wired to any row button (only splitOrd — `native-orders-pbh-bill.js:684` → Use NO.WORKER_URL + '/api/fast-sale-orders/from-native-order' directly (as createPbh/cancelOrder do) + add x-web2-token; or remove splitPbh if superseded by splitOrder.
- 🟡 `race` load() drops concurrent reloads with no retry. `if (NO.STATE.loading) return;` means an SSE event or filter change arriving during an in-flight load is silently ignored — STATE.orders can stay stale until the next event. A burst all firing during one slow load loses the final state; no pending flag — `native-orders-render.js:658-660` → Set NO.\_reloadPending when a load is skipped due to loading, and in the finally block re-call load() once if pending was set.
- 🟡 `race` Optimistic update + SSE reload race. saveEdit/quickStatus/setDeliveryMethod apply an optimistic order to STATE then PATCH; the same PATCH triggers server \_notify('web2:native-orders') → debounced NO.load() replacing STATE.orders wholesale from /load. If the optimistic onSuccess and the SSE-driven re — `native-orders-modal-edit.js:348-375; native-orders-render.js:693` → Reconcile by code on reload (preserve in-flight optimistic codes) or suppress the self-triggered SSE reload for a short window after a local mutation.
- ⚪ `logic` \_rowSignature omits printCount/lastPrintedAt. After markPrinted bumps o.printCount locally and calls renderRows(), the reuse-existing-DOM optimization (oldSig===sig) SKIPS rebuilding the 🖨 print badge because printCount is not part of the signature — badge does not update until a full reload. — `native-orders-render.js:412-448` → Add o.printCount and o.lastPrintedAt to \_rowSignature.
- ⚪ `logic` fetchCustomerFromWeb2 onSuccess recomputes 'filled' labels using the OUTER `order` reference captured at call time (lines 374-376) after STATE.orders[idx] was already replaced. Correct by luck (pre-patch order still reflects emptiness), but if an SSE reload swapped STATE.orders between apply and onS — `native-orders-customer-panel.js:364-387` → Snapshot the pre-patch emptiness booleans before run() and use them in onSuccess.
- ⚪ `bug` Bulk PBH/PBH-SHOP create has no client double-submit guard (unlike inbox-add which disables the button). A double-click of the toolbar button could re-enter; server advisory lock per order (CLAUDE.md A1) mitigates duplicate creation, but the client offers no guard and can fire concurrent passes. — `native-orders-bulk-operations.js:209,482` → Disable the bulk toolbar buttons while a run is in progress; rely on server advisory lock as backstop.
- ⚪ `memory-leak` SSE subscriptions (web2:native-orders, web2:payment-signals, web2:customers, + web2:fast-sale-orders in kpi) are never unsubscribed; stored unsub handles are dead. Multiple document-level click/keydown listeners added in init without removal. Low impact on a non-SPA full page; accumulates only if in — `native-orders-realtime-init.js:39-53; kpi.js:100-104` → Remove the unused unsub vars or wire a teardown; keep init idempotent.
- ⚪ `web1-coupling` filters-campaigns uses /api/web2-live-comments/page-posts which is documented to return 0 results on web2-api after the split (campaign picker depends on a stale poller route); base URLs hardcoded rather than via WEB2_CONFIG. Not a layer violation but a known-degraded dependency. — `native-orders-filters-campaigns.js:139,222` → Migrate campaign/page-posts picker to direct-Pancake fetch (multi-tool loadPosts pattern) per CLAUDE.md realtime rules; derive base URL from config.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 PBH money mutations omit x-web2-token. createPbh/\_doCreatePbh, bulkCreatePbh, bulkCreatePbhShop POST to /api/fast-sale-orders/from-native-order with only Content-Type; cancelPbh, cancelOrder, splitOrder also raw-fetch without auth headers. Under WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE these would 401 (silent lost mutatio — `native-orders-pbh-bill.js:490,528,737; native-orders-bulk-operations.js:423,534` → Route all fast-sale-orders + native-orders cancel/split/PBH writes through a helper injecting window.Web2Auth.authHeaders() (same as bulkMergeOrders 89-99). Confirm server enforcement on these routes.
- 🟡 Pancake JWT propagated into avatar image URL query string (?token=jwt). \_avatarUrl builds /api/fb-avatar?...&token=<Web2Chat.getJwt()>. JWT in <img src> leaks via referrer, history, proxy logs, DOM. — `native-orders-inbox-resolve.js:23-26` → Resolve token server-side or fetch+blob with the token in a header; never embed JWT in img URLs.
- ⚪ Large volume of innerHTML template building with customer data (order.note auto-captured FB comment, customerName, address). All checked sites escape via NO.escapeHtml so no stored-XSS found, but fragile to future edits. — `native-orders-render.js:392-401; native-orders-interactions.js:203-235` → Keep escapeHtml discipline; prefer textContent for title-attribute note values.
- ⚪ SSE reload reason logged to console includes order code on every realtime event. — `native-orders-realtime-init.js:29` → Drop the code from the log or gate behind a debug flag.
- ℹ️ Hardcoded base URLs as fallbacks throughout; LIVE_COMMENTS_API hardcoded with no API_CONFIG fallback (filters-campaigns.js:139). — `native-orders-filters-campaigns.js:139` → Per CLAUDE.md route all base URLs through window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG.

**Ghi chú:** Scope said native-orders-app.js is ~9456 lines; that monolith has been fully split into ~20 modules (6926 total JS lines) under window.NativeOrders. No app.js remains; index.html loads modules in dependency order.; UI-first optimistic (Web2Optimistic.run snapshot/apply/run/onSuccess/rollback) correctly applied to saveEdit, quickStatus, setDeliveryMethod, fetchCustomerFromWeb2 per CLAUDE.md rule 8. Money ops (PBH create) correctly keep await+loading (documented exception).; channel values consistently web2_livestream / web2_inbox everywhere (state restore literal, index.html data-channel, API list param, load() isInbox check). No drift found.; Timezone: formatTimeSplit/formatFullTime use local getHours/toLocaleString (browser +7 = server +7 = GMT+7, correct). \_dateInputToIsoWithNowTime builds local Date + current H:M:S then toISOString — correct absolute dateInvoice (documented fix, not a bug).; Double-submit: inbox-add createManual guards via btn.disabled; saveEdit closes modal in apply() so cannot double-submit; bulk PBH buttons do NOT guard (see bug).; XSS: customer/order data escaped via NO.escapeHtml (delegates to Web2Escape) across the many innerHTML builders examined; no unescaped customer data found.; crm_team_id INT overflow (BIGINT fix) is a backend/relay concern — no crm_team_id reference exists in the native-orders frontend folder.; FB/Pancake/Zalo sends delegated to shared Web2MsgTemplate / Web2CustomerChat / Web2Chat / extension bridge — this page only assembles order payloads and calls them.

### page:notifications-audit

Two read-mostly Web 2.0 admin pages. notifications/ (F06) is the in-app Notification Center: lists alerts from web2_notifications, supports filter (all/unread), per-row mark-read, mark-all-read, and a manual 'scan' that materializes alerts from Web 2.0 pain points (PBH draft >24h, low stock, negative customer wallets, overdue returns, unreceived so-order shipments). audit-log/ (F05) is a read-only union view over four Web 2.0 audit tables (web2_product_history, fast_sale_order_history, pbh_fulfillment_logs, web2_wallet_adjustments) with entity/user/date filters. Both hit /api/web2/\* via the chatomni-proxy worker → web2-api (web2Db pool), gate with requireWeb2AuthSoft (+x-web2-token), and escape all rendered output. notifications subscribes to SSE web2:notifications; audit-log does not. No TPOS or Web 1.0 pool/table coupling found.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** notifications: CSS web2-sidebar.css, web2-theme.css, web2-notification-bell.css; notifications: scripts (defer/order): lucide@0.294.0 (CDN, unpinned SRI), web2-auth.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-sse-topics.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js, then inline IIFE; notifications: on DOMContentLoaded (:358) → Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside',{activeRoute:'notifications'}); load(); Web2SSE.subscribe('web2:notifications', debounced 500ms reload); notifications: load() (:193) immediately fetches GET /api/web2/notifications/list?limit=100&unreadOnly=0 with credentials:'include'+x-web2-token, renders skeleton rows first; audit-log: CSS web2-sidebar.css, web2-theme.css; audit-log: scripts: lucide CDN, web2-auth.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js, then inline IIFE; audit-log: on DOMContentLoaded (:256) → Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside',{activeRoute:'audit-log'}); load() (auto-fetches GET /api/web2/audit-log/list?limit=200 on entry); audit-log: keydown(Enter) listeners attached to fUser/fFrom/fTo inputs (:250-255) with IME guard

| endpoint GET /api/web2/audit-log/entities           | audit-log.js:184                                            | returns list of entity names whose backing table exists                                                                                                                                                                                          |

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js (Web2Sidebar.mount), web2-sidebar.css, web2/shared/web2-theme.css, web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders), web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2/shared/web2-sse-topics.js, web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE — notifications only), web2/shared/web2-optimistic.js (Web2Optimistic.run), web2/shared/web2-notification-bell.css (notifications only), Render routes: /api/web2/notifications/_ (routes/v2/notifications.js), /api/web2/audit-log/_ (routes/v2/audit-log.js); aliases /api/v2/notifications, /api/v2/audit-log, Worker: chatomni-proxy WEB2_GENERIC → handleCustomer360Proxy → web2-api, Deep-link targets from notification url: /web2/fastsaleorder-invoice/, /web2/products/, /web2/balance-history/, /web2/returns/, /so-order/, CDN: unpkg.com/lucide@0.294.0 (unpinned, no SRI)

**SSE:** notifications SUBSCRIBES web2:notifications (web2/notifications/index.html:366) via Web2SSE.subscribe; debounce 500ms before load(); unsubscribe fn DISCARDED and \_sseT never cleared (leak only matters if SPA-embedded; benign for full-page nav); notifications PUBLISHES web2:notifications (event 'update', payload {ts} only — no PII) from \_notifyUpdate (notifications.js:406-411) after read/mark-all/create/delete/scan; wired via web2NotificationsRoutes.initializeNotifiers(web2RealtimeSseRoutes.notifyClients) at server.js:1143-1144 (correct web2 hub); Self-trigger race: a client's own mutation broadcasts web2:notifications back to itself → its debounced SSE load() races with the optimistic onSuccess load(); audit-log: NO SSE subscription or publication (static read view; user must click Tải / Enter to refresh)

**console.log:** 0

Clicking 'Thử lại' throws ReferenceError: load is not defined — the error-recovery button is completely dead. WHERE read_at IS NULL` for EVERY user; /:id/read and DELETE — `render.com/routes/v2/notifications.js:84,117,131,194` → Decide intentionally: if this is a single shared inbox, drop the user_id column/index to remove the false impression of per-user scoping. - 🟡 `perf` GET /scan triggers up to 5 full scans (fast_sale_orders, web2_products, web2_customer_wallets, web2_returns, full JSONB web2_so_order parse) plus up to ~225 per-row dedupe SELECTs + INSERTs, and is exposed as an unthrottled user button (btnScan).
