- 🟡 `race` mark-all-read optimistic flow + concurrent SSE: btnMarkAll captures `rows = querySelectorAll('.noti-row.unread')` (count prevCount), POSTs mark-all-read, and on success calls load(). The same POST server-side calls \_notifyUpdate → web2:notifications broadcast → the page's own SSE subscriber (debounc — `web2/notifications/index.html:278-318,362-370; notifications.js:131-133` → Suppress the self-induced SSE reload right after a local mutation (e.g. set a `mutatingUntil = Date.now()+800` guard the SSE callback checks), or skip broadcasting for the originating client. At minim
- ⚪ `bug` GMT+7 display drift: both pages render timestamps with `new Date(it.created_at).toLocaleString('vi-VN')` which uses the BROWSER's local timezone, not the project-mandated Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh. Per project rules Render runs TZ=Asia/Saigon and all Web 2.0 UI must pin GMT+7. created_at is a TIMESTAMPTZ ser — `web2/notifications/index.html:230; web2/audit-log/index.html:223` → Pass options: `.toLocaleString('vi-VN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' })`, or reuse SharedUtils.formatTime.
- ⚪ `bug` No pagination beyond the first page. notifications /list hardcodes limit=100 with no offset and no UI to page; older notifications are unreachable (DELETE never auto-fires and there is no retention/cleanup of web2_notifications, so the table grows unbounded). audit-log frontend hardcodes limit=200 a — `web2/notifications/index.html:199; web2/audit-log/index.html:187; notifications.` → Add offset-based paging UI to audit-log (it already computes total) and to notifications. Add a retention/cleanup job for web2_notifications (delete read rows older than e.g. 30 days) to bound table g
- ⚪ `logic` Dedupe pre-check window (rolling INTERVAL '1 hour') and the unique index (calendar date_trunc('hour')) use different bucketing. At an hour boundary the unique index permits two rows with the same dedupe_key in adjacent calendar hours; only the rolling pre-check prevents it, and that pre-check is not — `render.com/routes/v2/notifications.js:150-159,164-165,378-403` → Make the unique index match the dedupe intent (e.g. a single uniqueness scope per dedupe_key for the active window) or accept that the rolling pre-check is best-effort and document that boundary dups
- ⚪ `memory-leak` SSE subscription is never torn down. Web2SSE.subscribe('web2:notifications', cb) returns an unsubscribe function (per bridge contract) but the return value is discarded and no beforeunload/close cleanup exists. Benign for full-page navigation (EventSource dies with the document) but leaks if this pa — `web2/notifications/index.html:362-370` → Store the unsubscribe fn and call it on pagehide/beforeunload; clearTimeout(\_sseT) on teardown.
- ℹ️ `logic` Shape-normalization `d.items || d.records || d.data || []` is defensive but if a future generic route returns an object map (not array) under one of these keys, `.length`/`.map` would still break. Also `!d.success || !items.length` collapses 'request failed' and 'empty result' into the same empty-st — `web2/notifications/index.html:219-226; web2/audit-log/index.html:214-219` → Guard with Array.isArray(items) before .map; keep as-is otherwise.

**Security (audit):**

- ⚪ Both pages call write endpoints (POST /:id/read, /mark-all-read, /scan) and reads under requireWeb2AuthSoft, which only 401s when WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1. Per MEMORY that env is now ON in prod, and the frontend does attach x-web2-token via AUTHH(). The fallback AUTHH reads token from JSON.parse(localSto — `web2/notifications/index.html:169-177,253-258,265-269` → Keep AUTHH but add a `.ok` check on the single-row read fetch and surface failures; ensure Web2Auth.authHeaders is the primary path so token refresh is consistent.
- ⚪ Token at-rest in browser: AUTHH parses the web2 session token from localStorage on every call. This is the established project pattern (web2_auth) but the token is a bearer credential in JS-readable storage; any XSS on these pages would exfiltrate it. The pages do escape all rendered values (esc/esc — `web2/notifications/index.html:172; web2/audit-log/index.html:171` → Out of scope to fix per-page; note as systemic. Consider httpOnly cookie session for web2 long-term.
- ℹ️ XSS surface is well-handled. Notification title/body/severity/meta rendered via esc() (textContent-based); href via escAttr(safeUrl(url)); server \_safeUrl() rejects javascript:/data: and stores null (defense-in-depth on both ends). Audit-log escapes every cell incl. the JSON.stringify(changes) diff — `web2/notifications/index.html:332-357; web2/audit-log/index.html:224,229-238,243` → No action; this is the correct pattern. Keep server-side \_safeUrl as the primary URL guard.
- ℹ️ PII exposure in SSE payloads is avoided: \_notifyUpdate broadcasts only { ts } on web2:notifications (no titles/phones/customer names), forcing clients to re-fetch under auth. Good. However the audit-log /list response itself returns customer phones (wrong_customer_phone/correct_customer_phone), inte — `render.com/routes/v2/audit-log.js:42,109-119; notifications.js:406-411` → Audit log exposes financial + PII data with only requireWeb2AuthSoft (any active user). Consider requireWeb2Admin for the audit trail, or document that all web2 users are trusted operators.
- ℹ️ SQL injection: limit/offset are interpolated directly into the audit-log SQL string (LIMIT ${limit} OFFSET ${offset}, line 171) but both pass through Number()/Math.min coercion (:45-46) so non-numeric input becomes a safe number. entity/user/from/to are all parameterized ($n). notifications limit is — `render.com/routes/v2/audit-log.js:45-46,171` → Low risk as-is; for hardening, parameterize limit/offset too ($n) rather than relying on Number() coercion.
- ℹ️ Worker forwards the request verbatim (new Headers(request.headers)) for WEB2_GENERIC → handleCustomer360Proxy → renderOriginFor, so x-web2-token passes through and the route correctly reaches web2-api (not TPOS catch-all). Routing classification (/api/web2/\* → WEB2_GENERIC) is correct and ordered be — `cloudflare-worker/modules/handlers/proxy-handler.js:552-585; cloudflare-worker/m` → No action.

**Ghi chú:** No write-on-read in audit-log: /list is purely SELECT (0 INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE) — the 'audit-log write-on-read' hypothesis is NOT present.; Pool correctness verified: all scan sources (fast_sale_orders, web2_products, web2_customer_wallets, web2_returns, web2_so_order, web2_notifications) and all 4 audit tables resolve to web2Db (req.app.locals.web2Db || chatDb). No chatDb-only Web 1.0 table reads; no TPOS API calls. Clean layering.; Cron: single scheduler — server.js:2984-3002 runs scanAndCreateNotifications at boot+90s then every 10min, gated by DISABLE_WEB2_JOBS && web2Pool. cron/scheduler.js explicitly migrated this out (line 599). No duplicate cron. Multi-instance dup rows prevented by unique index uq_web2_noti_dedupe_hour.; Dedupe design: rolling 1h pre-check (SELECT) + calendar-hour unique index + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING — atomic against concurrent inserts within a calendar hour; minor non-alignment at hour boundary (see bugs).; ensureSchema guarded by \_migrationDone module flag (idempotent via CREATE TABLE/INDEX IF NOT EXISTS); date_trunc made IMMUTABLE via AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' for the partial unique index — correct.; audit-log GMT+7 date filters correctly pinned to Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh with half-open [from, to+1) interval (fixes the -7h drift and last-day exclusion) — server side is right; only the client toLocaleString lacks the timeZone option.; web2_notifications has no retention/cleanup → unbounded growth; only first 100 reachable in UI (no pagination).; lucide loaded from unpkg CDN without SRI/pinned integrity on both pages — third-party script supply-chain note (low).

### page:overview-system

page:overview-system covers four Web 2.0 admin/config surfaces. (1) web2/overview/index.html — a large (~3280 line) mostly-static "living documentation" hub describing all Web 2.0 pages; its only runtime JS mounts the shared sidebar and renders a login/identity card from Web2Auth. (2) web2/system/index.html — the merged "Cấu hình & Hệ thống" page with three tabs: Services & System (DB/process/cost cards from GET /api/services-overview), Realtime SSE (admin-gated live feed of the web2 SSE hub), and Pages inventory (derived from the mounted sidebar DOM). (3+4) services-dashboard/ and admin-sse-monitor/ are thin redirect stubs preserving old deep-links into the merged system page (?tab=services / ?tab=sse). The system page lazy-inits each tab; the SSE tab verifies admin role server-side before connecting an EventSource to the admin log topic.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** overview/index.html HEAD: lucide UMD (unpkg, defer), web2-sidebar.css, web2-theme.css, overview.css. No data fetch on load — page body is static HTML.; overview/index.html BODY scripts (in order): web2-auth.js?v=20260613guard, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js (which auto-injects popup.js, web2-command-palette.js, web2-lottie.js, web2-pwa.js, notification-system.js, web2-mobile.css).; overview inline script DOMContentLoaded: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside',{activeRoute:'overview'}); lucide.createIcons(); renderOvAuth() reads Web2Auth.getStored().user (localStorage web2_auth) and renders identity card — no network call.; system/index.html HEAD: web2-sidebar.css, web2-theme.css, css/system.css, lucide UMD defer, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, ../../shared/js/notification-system.js.; system/index.html BODY scripts: web2-auth.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js (auto-injects Popup/lottie/palette/pwa), js/system-services.js, js/system-sse.js, js/system-app.js.; system-app.js init(): Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside',{activeUrl}); wireTabs(); wireReload(); read ?tab= and activate(initial). Default tab 'services' lazy-starts SystemServices.start().; SystemServices.start(): fetch GET /api/services-overview (NO auth header) → render DB cards / service inventory / process stats; schedules 60s setTimeout refresh chain (skips when tab hidden); pagehide+beforeunload stop refresh.; SystemSSE.start() (only when SSE tab opened): isAdmin() via GET /api/web2-users/me with x-web2-token; if admin → bootstrapLog() GET /sse/log?limit=200, subscribeLive() new EventSource(/sse?keys=web2:\_admin:sse-log&admintoken=...), pollStats() GET /sse/stats every 2s via setTimeout chain; adds visibilitychange + pagehide listeners.; buildPages() (Pages tab): no network — scrapes the mounted sidebar DOM (a.web2-nav-link, .web2-nav-group) to build a page inventory + counters.; services-dashboard/ and admin-sse-monitor/: meta-refresh + location.replace redirect to ../system/index.html?tab=services|sse — run immediately on load.

| Control                                                      | Handler                                                          | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| ------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| overview: 'Đăng xuất' button (#ovAuthLogout)                 | inline listener in renderOvAuth (overview/index.html:3257)       | Calls Web2Auth.logout({redirect:true}) — clears session and navigates to login.                                                                                                                                                                                |
| overview: '→ Đăng nhập' / 'Quản lý người dùng' links         | static <a> built in renderOvAuth (overview/index.html:3268-3275) | Navigate to ../login/index.html?next=<encoded path> or ../users/index.html.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| system: tab buttons (.sys-tab data-tab=services\|sse\|pages) | activate() (system-app.js:17, wired at :55)                      | Toggle is-active/aria-selected, show/hide #sysConn pill (only on sse), lazy-init the tab module once via \_inited Set, history.replaceState ?tab=. Invalid tab falls back to 'services'.                                                                       |
| system: 'Tải lại' button (#sysReloadBtn)                     | wireReload() (system-app.js:60)                                  | Reloads only the active tab: SystemServices.reload (re-fetch services-overview) / SystemSSE.reload (re-poll stats, does NOT reopen EventSource or refetch log) / buildPages(true).                                                                             |
| system SSE: '⏸ Pause/▶ Resume' (#ssPause)                    | wireToolbar (system-sse.js:279)                                  | Toggles `paused`; while paused the live 'log' EventSource handler early-returns (feed frozen, stats keep polling).                                                                                                                                             |
| system SSE: '🗑 Clear' (#ssClear)                            | wireToolbar (system-sse.js:286)                                  | Empties #ssLog innerHTML, resets eventCount + #ssStatEvents to 0 (client-only; server ring buffer untouched).                                                                                                                                                  |
| system SSE: filter text input (#ssFilter)                    | wireToolbar input listener (system-sse.js:292)                   | Sets filterText then calls bootstrapLog() — RE-FETCHES /sse/log?limit=200 from server on EVERY keystroke with no debounce (see bugs).                                                                                                                          |
| system SSE: '🚀 Send test' (#ssTrigger)                      | wireToolbar async click (system-sse.js:297)                      | Popup.prompt for topic (default web2:test-topic) → POST /sse/test with x-web2-token + {key,data:{action:'admin-trigger',ts}} → server broadcasts a test SSE event to that topic; Popup.alert shows clientsNotified. Admin-only server-side (requireWeb2Admin). |
| system Pages: page cards                                     | buildPages() (system-app.js:92)                                  | Implemented pages render as <a href> navigation cards; coming-soon items render as non-clickable divs. Built purely from a sidebar DOM scrape.                                                                                                                 |
| GET /api/services-overview (backend)                         | render.com/routes/services-overview.js:3 router.get('/')         | UNAUTHENTICATED. Returns chatDb+web2Db sizes, top table names+rowcounts+sizes, pg version, pool internals, DB connection states, process uptime/memory/node version, full service+cost inventory.                                                              |
| GET /sse/stats, /sse/log, POST /sse/test (backend)           | realtime-sse-web2.js:384/441/394 requireWeb2Admin                | All admin-gated server-side (resolveWeb2User → role==='admin'). stats=per-topic subscriber counts; log=ring buffer 500; test=broadcast synthetic event.                                                                                                        |
| GET /sse?keys=web2:\_admin:sse-log&admintoken= (backend)     | realtime-sse-web2.js:132                                         | Admin topics require valid ?admintoken= resolving to role admin; invalid → drops admin keys (403 if no other keys). Token passed via query (acknowledged: appears in access logs).                                                                             |

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js (mount + auto-injects popup.js, web2-command-palette.js, web2-lottie.js, web2-pwa.js, notification-system.js, web2-mobile.css), web2/shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.getStored/logout/loginUrl + sets window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG), web2/shared/web2-optimistic.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2/login/index.html, web2/users/index.html (auth card CTAs), render route GET /api/services-overview (services-overview.js) — DB/process/service stats, render route GET /api/web2-users/me — admin role check, render hub /api/realtime/web2/sse{,/stats,/log,/test} (realtime-sse-web2.js), worker chatomni-proxy: cloudflare-worker/modules/config/routes.js (SERVICES_OVERVIEW, WEB2_USERS) + proxy-handler.js forwards /api/services-overview and /api/realtime/web2

**SSE:** Subscribed: web2:\_admin:sse-log via EventSource in system-sse.js subscribeLive() — admin-only (admintoken query). Listens 'connected' + 'log' events; eventCount + #ssStatBuffer updated per event.; Published (admin-triggered): POST /sse/test broadcasts to an arbitrary topic chosen by admin (default web2:test-topic).; Stats polling: GET /sse/stats every 2s (setTimeout chain, gated on document.visibilityState==='visible').; LEAK: EventSource `es` in subscribeLive() is a local var, never stored, never .close()'d. On 'pagehide' only \_statsTimer is cleared; stream relies on browser teardown at full-page navigation. Switching tabs away from SSE within the page does not close it.; No debounce on filter-triggered bootstrapLog() re-fetch (every keystroke). The live 'log' appender does not dedupe by seq vs the bootstrap currentSeq, so events between bootstrapLog() and subscribeLive() can render twice or be missed (server supports ?since=<seq> but client never uses it).

**console.log:** 1 — system-services.js:54 console.error('[system-services] load fail:', e) — benign, error object only, no PII/token. (overview/index.html:258 'console.error' is documentation prose, not a call.)

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `perf` Filter input fires a full server re-fetch (bootstrapLog → GET /sse/log?limit=200) on EVERY keystroke with no debounce. Fast typing spawns N concurrent fetches; the filter is purely client-side text matching so no server round-trip is required at all. — `web2/system/js/system-sse.js:292-295` → Filter the already-loaded buffer client-side, or wrap bootstrapLog in a 300-400ms debounce. Do not re-fetch on keystroke.
- 🟡 `race` bootstrapLog() is async and unconditionally sets lastSeq = d.currentSeq (line 217). Invoked per-keystroke from the filter with no request sequencing, an earlier/slower response can land after a newer one and clobber both the rendered log and lastSeq with stale data (out-of-order last-write-wins). — `web2/system/js/system-sse.js:206-226,294` → Add a request token/AbortController so only the latest bootstrapLog result is applied; or remove the per-keystroke refetch entirely (filter client-side).
- ⚪ `logic` No seq-based dedupe between bootstrap buffer and live stream. start() calls bootstrapLog() (renders up to currentSeq) then subscribeLive(); appendLogRow only advances lastSeq (line 144) and never skips entries with seq <= bootstrapped currentSeq. Events in the gap, or any server replay, can appear t — `web2/system/js/system-sse.js:125-145,206-217,338-355` → Track a seen-seq set or compare entry.seq>lastSeq before appending from the live stream; subscribe first, capture earliest live seq, then backfill via /sse/log?since=.
- ⚪ `memory-leak` EventSource opened in subscribeLive() (es = new EventSource(url)) is a local variable, never stored or closed. pagehide only clears the stats timer (line 360); the stream is never explicitly closed. start() is guarded by \_started so reload won't open a second stream, but there is no teardown API and — `web2/system/js/system-sse.js:240-273,357-361` → Store es at module scope and es.close() on pagehide/visibility-hidden; expose a stop() to close it when leaving the SSE tab.
- ⚪ `race` On returning to a visible tab, pollStats() can fire twice near-simultaneously: once from the visibilitychange listener (line 357) and once from the resumed \_scheduleStatsPoll timer (line 330). Redundant /sse/stats fetch; renders are idempotent so harmless but wasteful. — `web2/system/js/system-sse.js:327-333,357-359` → Reset/realign the timer in the visibilitychange handler instead of issuing an immediate extra poll, or coalesce.
- ⚪ `logic` SystemSSE.reload = () => (\_started ? pollStats() : start()) only re-polls stats and never re-fetches the log buffer or verifies the EventSource is still open. After a long disconnect the 'Tải lại' button on the SSE tab refreshes only topic/subscriber counts, not the activity log — confusing for the — `web2/system/js/system-sse.js:363` → reload should also call bootstrapLog() (and reconnect EventSource if closed) when \_started.
- ℹ️ `logic` buildPages() relies entirely on the sidebar DOM being mounted before the Pages tab is opened. mount() is synchronous in init() so this holds today, but if Web2Sidebar.mount ever becomes async the inventory renders empty without error (early return at system-app.js:97). — `web2/system/js/system-app.js:92-156` → Guard with a readiness check/retry if aside has no nav links yet.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 GET /api/services-overview is mounted with NO auth middleware (router.get('/') in services-overview.js:3) and the client fetches it with no x-web2-token (system-services.js:49). Any unauthenticated visitor hitting the worker route can enumerate both Postgres DB real names (n2store-chat-db / n2store- — `render.com/routes/services-overview.js:3; web2/system/js/system-services.js:49` → Gate the route with requireWeb2Admin (or at least requireWeb2Auth) and send x-web2-token from system-services.js load(). At minimum strip Web 1.0 table names and pg version from any unauthenticated pa
- ⚪ Self-XSS / unescaped innerHTML of user identity fields. renderOvAuth injects user.displayName||username||email||name||role into statusEl.innerHTML without escaping (overview/index.html:3251). Values come from web2_users via localStorage web2_auth. A user whose own profile field contains HTML/script — `web2/overview/index.html:3251` → Escape name/role before innerHTML (textContent-based escaper) or build the node via textContent.
- ℹ️ Admin SSE stream passes the auth token as a URL query param (?admintoken=) because EventSource cannot send headers; the token lands in server/proxy access logs. Tradeoff explicitly documented in code. — `web2/system/js/system-sse.js:244; render.com/routes/realtime-sse-web2.js:154-181` → Acceptable given EventSource limits; consider short-lived scoped admin SSE tokens or a fetch+ReadableStream transport so the token travels in a header.
- ℹ️ The web2 SSE hub sets Access-Control-Allow-Origin: \* on the event stream. With token-in-query a cross-origin page still cannot read it without the token, but the wildcard is broad. — `render.com/routes/realtime-sse-web2.js (CORS headers ~:190)` → Restrict ACAO to the known Web 2.0 origins for the SSE hub.
- ℹ️ Client-side admin gate only in SystemSSE (shows #ssApp after isAdmin() at system-sse.js:343). This is correctly backed by server-side requireWeb2Admin on stats/log/test, so a forged client cannot read data; noted for completeness. — `web2/system/js/system-sse.js:26-40,343` → No change needed; server gating is authoritative.

**Ghi chú:** No TPOS coupling and no Web-2.0-writes-to-Web-1.0 coupling in this unit. services-overview reads chatDb stats read-only for the dual-DB dashboard (legitimate for a system/config surface), not a mutation — not flagged as coupling.; GMT+7 handling is correct: system-sse.js fmtTime/pollStats and system-services.js renderAll all use Intl.DateTimeFormat with timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'; server entry.ts is epoch ms (Date.now()), so no missing-Z bug here.; All SSE log fields rendered to innerHTML (connectionId, topic, action, code, keys, type) ARE escaped via esc() in system-sse.js. system-services.js escapes all DB/service strings via escapeHtml. The only unescaped innerHTML in the unit is the overview auth card (flagged).; services-dashboard/ and admin-sse-monitor/ are pure redirect stubs (meta-refresh + location.replace) preserving ?tab deep-links; no logic, no security surface.; No x-web2-token write-auth gap on mutations: the only mutation in this unit is POST /sse/test which correctly sends x-web2-token and is server-gated by requireWeb2Admin.; Sidebar auto-injects popup.js, so Popup.\* used in system-sse.js click handlers resolves by the time a user clicks; no load-order race in practice.

### page:pancake-settings

Web 2.0 settings page for managing Pancake JWT auth used by Web2Chat (chat/comment send across Tab1, native-orders, live). It manages four concerns: (1) multi-account JWT store backed by Render Postgres table `pancake_accounts` (via /api/pancake-accounts*), with a per-device "active" account in localStorage; (2) per-page admin aggregation showing how many accounts can drive each page for "Tăng comment"; (3) the web2-realtime WS relay page-selection (join/leave per pageId via /api/web2-live-relay/*); (4) the single active JWT + page_access_tokens lifecycle (save/test/generate/clear/nuke) plus an expiry monitor that auto-refreshes via the N2Store browser extension and a server-side credential-based auto-renew (AES-encrypted password stored server-side via /api/web2/pancake-refresh\*). It is purely orchestration over window.Web2Chat / Web2PancakeToken / Web2PancakeAccounts; it exposes no public API and stores tokens in localStorage (pancake_jwt_token, pancake_jwt_token_expiry, pancake_page_access_tokens) which Web2Chat reads.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** <link> Google Fonts Inter+Manrope (index.html:13-16); <link> web2-sidebar.css, web2-components.css, web2-theme.css (index.html:18,19,23); <script defer> lucide 0.294 UMD from unpkg CDN — no SRI (index.html:21); <script> shared notification-system.js (index.html:22); <script> web2-auth.js?v=20260613guard — sets window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG, auth gating (index.html:1148); <script> web2-user-info, web2-history-timeline, web2-db-badge, web2-optimistic (index.html:1149-1152); <script> web2-sidebar.js?v=20260620a (index.html:1153); <script> web2-chat-\* chain: utils, tokens, settings, api, live, tags, client (index.html:1154-1160); <script> web2-pancake-token.js, web2-pancake-accounts.js (index.html:1161-1162); <script> page modules in order: state -> api -> render -> actions -> app (index.html:1163-1167); DOMContentLoaded -> Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside') then init() (pancake-settings.js:69-78); init(): wires ~20 button click listeners; wireModal()+wireCredsModal() attach 2 document keydown(Escape) listeners (pancake-settings.js:29-53; actions.js:225,440); init(): renderJwtInfo(), renderExtStatus(), loadAccounts() [GET /api/pancake-accounts + GET /api/web2/pancake-refresh/status], loadRelayPages() [GET /api/web2-live-relay/pages], conditional loadPages() if JWT present [Web2Chat.listPages] (pancake-settings.js:55-62); init(): lucide.createIcons() (pancake-settings.js:63); setTimeout(runMonitor, 350): reads Web2PancakeToken.getStatus(); if state none/expired/critical and extension present, silently ensureFresh() and may call loadPages() again, else openExpiryModal() (pancake-settings.js:66; actions.js:274-302)

| Control                                                       | Handler                                          | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| btnSaveJwt (Lưu token)                                        | saveJwt (actions.js:21)                          | Trim+strip token= prefix, Web2Chat.decodeJwt; reject if undecodable or exp<now; Web2Chat.setJwt -> localStorage; renderJwtInfo; await persistActiveToDb -> Web2PancakeAccounts.addFromToken (POST /api/pancake-accounts/sync) + setActiveLocal + loadAccounts; then loadPages. No button-disable -> double-submit possible. |
| btnTestJwt (Test /pages)                                      | testJwt (actions.js:48)                          | If JWT present, notify then await loadPages (Web2Chat.listPages -> renders pageList).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| btnClearJwt (Xoá JWT)                                         | clearJwt (actions.js:57)                         | await Popup.danger confirm; Web2Chat.setJwt(null); renderJwtInfo; reset pageList+pagesBadge. Does NOT clear active_account_id or DB row.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| btnRefreshPages (Tải lại danh sách)                           | loadPages (api.js:16)                            | Web2Chat.listPages(); on ok set S.\_pagesCache + renderPageList; on fail show reason. No throw guard around listPages (assumes it returns {ok}).                                                                                                                                                                            |
| btnGenerateAll (Generate tất cả)                              | generateAll (actions.js:86)                      | Filter out igo\_ pages; sequential loop Web2Chat.generatePageAccessToken with 200ms delay; count ok; re-render. Button not disabled -> concurrent click re-enters loop; also races per-row Generate buttons writing same pancake_page_access_tokens.                                                                        |
| btnClearPageTokens (Xoá page tokens)                          | clearPageTokens (actions.js:73)                  | Popup.danger; localStorage.removeItem('pancake_page_access_tokens'); re-render from S.\_pagesCache.                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| btnNuke (Xoá toàn bộ token)                                   | nuke (actions.js:104)                            | Popup.danger; Web2Chat.clearAllTokens(); reset pagesCache/UI. Does not delete DB accounts nor active_account_id.                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| per-page Generate/Refresh button (data-act=gen)               | inline listener in renderPageList (render.js:87) | Disable button, spinner; Web2Chat.generatePageAccessToken(pid); notify; re-render full list. Listener re-bound on every render (innerHTML replaced, so no accumulation).                                                                                                                                                    |
| btnAutoJwt (Lấy tự động)                                      | doAutoFetch (actions.js:127)                     | Web2PancakeToken.ensureFresh({force}) via extension postMessage; on refresh: renderJwtInfo+renderBanner, await persistActiveToDb, loadPages.                                                                                                                                                                                |
| btnAddAccount / btnAddCancel                                  | toggleAddPanel (actions.js:521)                  | Toggle hidden attr on addAccountPanel; focus textarea.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| btnReloadAccounts                                             | loadAccounts (api.js:145)                        | GET /api/pancake-accounts; render accounts + page-admin stats; kick getRefreshStatus() promise (stored in S.\_refreshStatusPromise) and re-render on resolve.                                                                                                                                                               |
| btnSyncAccountPages (Đồng bộ pages từ token)                  | syncAccountPages (api.js:54)                     | For each non-expired account: GET {worker}/api/pancake/pages?access_token=<JWT-IN-URL>; diff page ids; if changed call PA.updatePages (PUT /api/pancake-accounts/:id); then Web2Chat.syncFromRenderDB({force}) and loadAccounts. JWT placed in GET query string (leak).                                                     |
| btnAddSave (Thêm vào danh sách)                               | addAccountFromInput (actions.js:530)             | PA.addFromToken(txt) -> POST sync; on ok setActiveLocal + loadAccounts + renderJwtInfo + renderBanner + loadPages. Button loading guarded.                                                                                                                                                                                  |

| account row Dùng (data-act=use)                               | useAccount (actions.js:445)                      | If token expired -> Popup.confirm; setActiveLocal(acc) writes localStorage JWT/exp/active id; re-render accounts/jwt/banner; loadPages. No double-submit guard.                                                                                                                                                             |
| account row Gia hạn (data-act=renew)                          | renewAccount (actions.js:309)                    | Race-guarded: awaits S.\_refreshStatusPromise before reading has_creds; if no creds open creds modal; else PA.refreshNow(id) (POST /api/web2/pancake-refresh/:id) -> loadAccounts+renderJwtInfo+renderBanner.                                                                                                               |

| account row Xoá (data-act=del)                                | deleteAccount (actions.js:468)                   | Popup.danger; optimistic Web2Optimistic.run snapshot/apply/run(PA.remove DELETE)/rollback. Good optimistic+rollback pattern.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| credsSaveRefresh / credsSaveOnly                              | credsSave (actions.js:369)                       | Validate identity+password; refreshNow with save:true (login+save) OR saveCreds (PUT credentials). Sends plaintext password over network to server for AES encrypt-at-rest. Button loading guarded.                                                                                                                         |
| credsDelete                                                   | credsDelete (actions.js:412)                     | Popup.danger; PA.deleteCreds (DELETE credentials); loadAccounts.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |

Auth headers attached (good). No rollback on partial fail; reads live DOM checkbox state at call time.                                                       |
| btnRelayReload                                                | loadRelayPages (api.js:181)                      | GET /api/web2-live-relay/pages (25s timeout); render relay page checkboxes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| expiry modal Auto/Paste/Copy + dismiss/close + overlay/Escape | wireModal (actions.js:211)                       | Auto -> doAutoFetch; Paste -> Web2PancakeToken.applyToken + persistActiveToDb + loadPages; Copy -> clipboard snippet; Escape/overlay/close hide modal.                                                                                                                                                                      |

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-chat-client.js (+ web2-chat-tokens/api/settings/live/tags/utils) — Web2Chat: getJwt/setJwt/decodeJwt/listPages/generatePageAccessToken/getAllPageAccessTokens/clearAllTokens/syncFromRenderDB, web2/shared/web2-pancake-token.js — Web2PancakeToken: getStatus/ensureFresh/fetchFromExtension/applyToken (extension postMessage bridge), web2/shared/web2-pancake-accounts.js — Web2PancakeAccounts: list/addFromToken/remove/updatePages/getRefreshStatus/saveCreds/deleteCreds/refreshNow, web2/shared/web2-auth.js — Web2Auth.authHeaders (x-web2-token) + API_CONFIG.WORKER_URL, web2/shared/web2-optimistic.js — Web2Optimistic.run (delete account optimistic), web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js / popup.js (Popup._) / web2-db-badge / web2-user-info, Render routes via CF worker: /api/pancake-accounts_, /api/pancake/pages, /api/web2/pancake-refresh*, /api/web2-live-relay/{pages,connect}, /api/pancake-official/* (page send), Consumers of the localStorage tokens this page writes: orders-report Tab1, native-orders, live-chat (Web2Chat send/comment)

**SSE:** No SSE subscribe/publish in this page. It does not use Web2SSE/realtime-sse-web2. Relay status is fetched on-demand (GET /pages) and refreshed via setTimeout(loadRelayPages,3000) after connect — polling-by-timeout, not SSE. Account/refresh-status changes made on another device are NOT pushed; user must hit 'Tải lại'. Consider subscribing web2:pancake-accounts topic if one exists for cross-device freshness.

**console.log:** 1 — pancake-settings-state.js:57 — console.log('[notify]', type, msg) fallback when notificationManager missing; logs only UI message text (no token/PII). Low concern but is leftover debug-style fallback noise.

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `race` Double loadPages on init. init() calls loadPages() when a JWT exists (pancake-settings.js:59-62), and 350ms later runMonitor() can call loadPages() again after a silent ensureFresh (actions.js:288-292). Two concurrent Web2Chat.listPages() resolve and both write S.\_pagesCache + #pageList innerHTML. L — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings.js:59-66; pancake-settings-actions.js:` → Guard loadPages with an in-flight flag / request sequence id (ignore stale responses), or have runMonitor skip loadPages when init already loaded pages this tick.
- 🟡 `bug` Several mutation buttons lack a double-submit guard. saveJwt (no btn disable), generateAll (btnGenerateAll never disabled — concurrent clicks run overlapping loops hammering generatePageAccessToken and racing per-row Generate buttons writing the same pancake_page_access_tokens object), useAccount (n — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-actions.js:21,48,86,445` → Wrap each handler with NS.\_setBtnLoading/\_restoreBtn (already used elsewhere) or a per-action in-flight boolean; disable btnGenerateAll for the duration of the loop.
- 🟡 `data-loss` clearJwt and nuke do not clear web2_pancake_active_account_id (and clearJwt does not remove the active account from the DB). After clearJwt, getActiveId() still returns the old id while the JWT is gone, so renderAccountList still marks an account 'Đang dùng' though there is no active token, and a la — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-actions.js:57-71,104-120` → In clearJwt/nuke also localStorage.removeItem('web2_pancake_active_account_id') (mirror what remove() does at web2-pancake-accounts.js:149-156) and re-render account list so the active pill clears.
- ⚪ `race` saveRelaySelection reads checkbox state from the live DOM at call time and writes per-uid sequentially with no snapshot/rollback. If a relay connect partially fails, okCount>0 still shows success toast and schedules a reload, leaving some uids connected and others not, with no indication of which fa — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-api.js:204-245` → Track per-uid failures and report them explicitly; consider disabling checkboxes during save; only schedule loadRelayPages when all succeed or after surfacing which uid failed.
- ⚪ `memory-leak` wireModal (actions.js:225) and wireCredsModal (actions.js:440) each attach a document-level keydown(Escape) listener that is never removed. On this single-load page this is fine, but init() is not idempotent — if init() ever runs twice (e.g. a future SPA mount or hot reload), duplicate global keydow — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-actions.js:225-227,440-442` → Attach the keydown listener once (module-scope guard) or store/remove it on modal close; or scope it to the overlay element instead of document.
- ⚪ `logic` Timezone: formatExpiry / 'Issued at' / renew toast use toLocaleString('vi-VN') WITHOUT timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'. They render in the viewer's local browser timezone, not the enforced GMT+7. On a device set to another timezone the displayed expiry/issued times are wrong relative to the rest of Web — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-state.js:81-83; pancake-settings-rende` → Pass { timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' } to the toLocale\* calls (or use SharedUtils.formatTime) so all timestamps display GMT+7 consistently. Note: the underlying epoch math (secondsLeft/daysLeft) is tim
- ⚪ `logic` formatExpiry dead branch: line 82 (days<30) and line 83 (else) produce identical output ('toLocaleString (còn N ngày)'); the days<30 special-case adds nothing. Harmless but dead code. — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-state.js:82-83` → Remove the redundant days<30 branch or differentiate it (e.g. add a warning style) to justify the condition.
- ⚪ `bug` loadPages assumes Web2Chat.listPages() always resolves a {ok,...} object; there is no try/catch. If listPages throws (network/exception inside the shared client) the await rejects, the #pageList stays on 'Đang load…', and the rejection is unhandled (no catch on the init-time loadPages call either), — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-api.js:16-26; pancake-settings.js:59-6` → Wrap listPages in try/catch and render an error state; or ensure the shared client never throws and always returns {ok:false,reason}.
- ℹ️ `race` renewAccount race-guard is correct (awaits S.\_refreshStatusPromise before reading has_creds, actions.js:313-321), preventing the 'click Gia hạn before status loaded -> wrongly opens creds modal' bug. Noted as verified-good, not a defect. — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-actions.js:309-342` → No change; keep the pattern. Apply the same await-status guard to any future action that reads S.\_refreshStatus synchronously.
- ℹ️ `logic` deleteAccount correctly uses Web2Optimistic.run with snapshot/apply/run/rollback and a non-optimistic fallback (actions.js:468-519). Good pattern; the captured `snapshot` is the array reference, and apply() reassigns S.\_accountsCache to a filtered copy, so rollback restores the original reference cl — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-actions.js:468-519` → No change. Note that concurrent deletes of two rows would each snapshot a different array; rollback of one could restore a row the other deleted — edge case only under rapid multi-delete.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 JWT placed in GET URL query string. syncAccountPages builds `${workerUrl}/api/pancake/pages?access_token=${encodeURIComponent(token)}` with the full Pancake JWT. Tokens in query strings leak into CF worker access logs, Render request logs, browser history, and any Referer header. This is a long-live — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-api.js:92` → Pass the token in a header (e.g. POST body or `x-pancake-token` header) instead of the query string, and ensure the worker does not log it. Other calls in this codebase pass page_access_token in URLs
- 🟡 Pancake JWT is stored at-rest in localStorage in plaintext (pancake_jwt_token / per-account ALL_ACCOUNTS) and rendered into a DOM <input>.value by addAccountAuto. Any XSS or shared-machine access exposes a credential capable of messaging customers. The page even prints a console snippet that copies — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-actions.js:580-581; web2/shared/web2-p` → Accepted design for this app, but minimize: clear the add-account textarea after save (done), avoid leaving the auto-fetched token in the input longer than needed, and never log token values.
- 🟡 Server-side credential storage: credsSave sends the Pancake account password in plaintext JSON to /api/web2/pancake-refresh/:id/credentials for AES encryption at rest. Confidentiality depends entirely on TLS + server key (PANCAKE_CREDS_KEY). The page surfaces a warning if the key is unconfigured, wh — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-actions.js:369-409; web2/shared/web2-p` → Disable credsSaveRefresh/credsSaveOnly (or block submit) when S.\_credsKeyConfigured is false so a password is never POSTed to a server that cannot encrypt it. Confirm the refresh route requires x-web2
- 🟡 Web1 coupling on the credential store: pancake_accounts table is explicitly SHARED with Web 1.0 per the shared module header ('CHIA CHUNG với Web 1.0'). A Web 2.0 settings page writes/deletes rows in a store that Web 1.0 also consumes. Deleting or overwriting an account here affects Web 1.0 token av — `web2/shared/web2-pancake-accounts.js:6-8` → Intentional shared-token design, but flag per Web2/Web1 isolation rules. Document that pancake_accounts is a deliberate cross-layer shared credential table; ensure DELETE is guarded server-side and th
- ⚪ lucide UMD loaded from unpkg CDN with no SRI integrity attribute and no async/defer fallback (defer present). A CDN compromise could inject script. — `web2/pancake-settings/index.html:21` → Add integrity+crossorigin SRI, or self-host lucide. Project-wide pattern, not unique to this page.
- ⚪ loadRelayPages GET /api/web2-live-relay/pages is sent without x-web2-token (only the POST /connect attaches auth headers). If the GET is meant to be auth-gated it would silently fail; if not, it's inconsistent. — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-api.js:187-189 vs 227-229` → Attach Web2Auth.authHeaders to the relay GET as well for consistency, or confirm the endpoint is intentionally public read.
- ℹ️ All untrusted Pancake-sourced strings (page name, username, fb_id, account name, image URLs) are passed through NS.escapeHtml before innerHTML interpolation. No unescaped customer/page data injection found. — `web2/pancake-settings/js/pancake-settings-render.js (escapeHtml used throughout)` → No action; XSS surface is properly escaped. Keep escapeHtml on any new fields.

**Ghi chú:** Page correctly uses web2Db-backed routes (/api/pancake-accounts, /api/web2/pancake-refresh, /api/web2-live-relay) via the CF worker; no direct chatDb/Web1 table access from the page. The only Web1 coupling is the deliberately shared pancake_accounts token store (documented in the shared module).; No TPOS API usage — compliant with Web 2.0 'no TPOS' rule.; Writes go through Web2PancakeAccounts.\_authHeaders which attaches x-web2-token (WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE compliant) for /api/pancake-accounts* and /api/web2/pancake-refresh*; relay /connect attaches Web2Auth.authHeaders; relay GET /pages does not (see security finding).; Module split is clean (state/api/render/actions/app) and within size limits (largest 608 lines). Good adherence to the 'small modules' rule.; This page is the single source of truth for the localStorage tokens consumed by Tab1/native-orders/live-chat send paths; bugs here (stale active id, expired token marked active) propagate to those send surfaces.

### page:photo-editor-video-beauty

Two on-device (no-server) media tools for Web 2.0: photo-editor (Meitu-style beauty + Photopea-grade advanced editing + logo erase, plus a product-image picker from the shared products cache) and video-beauty (skin-smooth/whiten/color-filter live preview + optional per-frame face warp on export). Both are pure client-side launchers over shared beauty engines (Web2BeautyFilters/Face/Studio) and export locally via canvas dataURL or MediaRecorder/WebCodecs+mp4-muxer; nothing is uploaded, no /api/web2 writes, and no SSE. Their role is the media/AI utility surface under the Web 2.0 'Đa dụng' menu. The main risks are client resource leaks (un-revoked blob URLs, un-stopped capture-stream tracks, un-closed WebCodecs encoders, per-frame canvas allocation) rather than data or backend bugs.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** photo-editor/index.html: stylesheets web2-sidebar.css, web2-theme.css, photo-editor.css; script lucide UMD (defer, from unpkg CDN); photo-editor scripts (in order): ../../shared/js/notification-system.js, ../shared/web2-auth.js (sets WEB2_CONFIG/API_CONFIG + auth guard), web2-sidebar.js, web2-products-cache.js, web2-image-editor.js, web2-logo-eraser.js, beauty/web2-beauty-filters.js, beauty/web2-beauty-face.js, beauty/web2-beauty-studio.js, js/photo-editor.js; photo-editor DOMContentLoaded: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside',{activeRoute:'photo-editor'}); PhotoEditorPage.init(); lucide.createIcons(); photo-editor init(): wires upload/paste/tool-grid/edit-again/download/copy listeners, wirePicker(), and Web2ProductsCache.init() (async — this DOES fetch the product list from the products API/cache on enter); MediaPipe model is NOT loaded until first image (warmup on setSource); video-beauty/index.html: stylesheets web2-sidebar.css, web2-theme.css, video-beauty.css; lucide UMD CDN (defer); video-beauty scripts (in order): notification-system.js, web2-auth.js, web2-sidebar.js, beauty/web2-beauty-filters.js, beauty/web2-beauty-face.js, ../video-maker/js/video-audio.js (cross-folder dep), js/video-beauty-render.js, js/video-beauty-export.js, js/video-beauty.js; video-beauty DOMContentLoaded: Web2Sidebar.mount(activeRoute:'video-beauty'); VideoBeautyPage.init(); lucide.createIcons(); video-beauty init(): creates hidden <video> appended to body, creates work canvas (willReadFrequently), grabs #vbCanvas ctx, renderFilters(), wireSliders(), wires upload/play/pause/export + window resize; checks Web2VideoBeautyExport.hasWebCodecs() to adjust face note. No data fetch on enter.; Lazy/on-demand (NOT on enter): MediaPipe tasks-vision ESM + ~13MB wasm/model from cdn.jsdelivr.net + storage.googleapis.com (warmup on first image); mp4-muxer@5 ESM from cdn.jsdelivr.net (only when exporting with face>0)

| Control                                                                                     | Handler                                                                      | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| #peUpload file input (photo-editor)                                                         | init change listener -> fileToDataUrl -> setSource (photo-editor.js:159-163) | Reads file as dataURL, sets it as \_src, shows #peSource preview + tools, warms up MediaPipe FaceLandmarker once (warmStarted guard), probes natural dimensions; resets input.value so re-selecting same file refires.                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Paste (Ctrl/⌘+V) anywhere on photo-editor                                                   | global paste listener (photo-editor.js:164-167)                              | Finds first image clipboard item, converts to dataURL, setSource(name='paste'). No size/type guard beyond type.startsWith('image/').                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| #peProdSearch product picker input                                                          | wirePicker input listener (photo-editor.js:116-144)                          | Debounced 200ms; calls Web2ProductsCache.findByName(q,8) (in-memory, no fetch), renders escaped name/code rows via innerHTML; clicking a row setSource(p.imageUrl) — a REMOTE cross-origin URL (TPOS/storage), which later taints toDataURL (handled with CORS notify). Document-level click closes dropdown.                                                                                                   |
| #peToolsGrid beauty tool buttons (auto/smooth/tone/eyes/nose/face/lips/legs/erase/advanced) | runTool(tool) (photo-editor.js:61-88, wired :168-171)                        | erase->Web2LogoEraser.open; advanced->Web2ImageEditor.open (Photopea if #peAdv checked); else Web2BeautyStudio.open(\_src,{tool}). On success: setSource(out) (allows chained editing) + showResult(out) + success notify. Errors caught -> notify. No backend mutation.                                                                                                                                        |
| #peEditAgain button                                                                         | runTool('advanced') (photo-editor.js:172)                                    | Re-opens advanced editor on current \_src.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| #peDownload button                                                                          | download() (photo-editor.js:90-96)                                           | Creates <a download> with \_result dataURL, clicks it. No object URL (dataURL), no leak.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| #peCopy button                                                                              | copy() (photo-editor.js:97-105)                                              | fetch(\_result)->blob->navigator.clipboard.write(ClipboardItem image/png). Fallback notify if unsupported.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| #vbUpload file input (video-beauty)                                                         | init change listener -> loadFile (video-beauty.js:268-272)                   | loadFile sets state.file, creates object URL (LEAK: prior not revoked), assigns to hidden video, awaits loadedmetadata, sizes work canvas, seeks to 0.01 to draw first frame, reveals stage/controls, warms FaceLandmarker, notifies dimensions+duration.                                                                                                                                                       |
| Mịn da / Trắng da / Tông ấm / Chỉnh mặt sliders                                             | wireSliders bind input listeners (video-beauty.js:230-248)                   | Updates state.settings[key] live; if not playing and not exporting, drawCurrent() re-renders preview frame through Web2VideoBeautyRender.applyFrame (skin smoothing/whiten/warmth on canvas pixels).                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Bộ lọc màu chips (Gốc/Tươi/Ấm/Lạnh/Đen trắng/Cổ điển)                                       | renderFilters chip click (video-beauty.js:216-228)                           | Sets state.settings.filter, toggles 'on' class, redraws preview. ctx.filter applied GPU-side in applyFrame.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| #vbPlay button                                                                              | playPreview (video-beauty.js:80-90)                                          | Sets playing=true, unmutes, awaits videoEl.play() (errors swallowed), starts previewLoop (rVFC or RAF). Handle for rVFC NOT stored -> stop relies on pause-then-early-return.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| #vbPause button                                                                             | stopPreview (video-beauty.js:91-99)                                          | playing=false, pauses video, toggles buttons, cancelAnimationFrame(state.\_raf) — does NOT cancel the rVFC callback (only RAF fallback).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| #vbExport button                                                                            | doExport (video-beauty.js:152-213)                                           | Stops preview, sets exporting, disables button, shows progress. If face>0 and WebCodecs available -> exportRenderPass (per-frame detect+warp+VideoEncoder+mp4-muxer, mux original AAC); else exportRealtime (MediaRecorder, keeps original audio). On render-pass failure with face>0, retries exportRealtime. Downloads blob via temporary object URL revoked after 8s. Streams/encoders not torn down (leak). |
| window resize                                                                               | fitView (video-beauty.js, wired :276)                                        | Recomputes preview canvas size and redraws current frame.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js + web2-sidebar.css (shell/nav, autoloads notification-system, command palette, lottie, popup, mobile, pwa), web2/shared/web2-theme.css (global theme), web2/shared/web2-auth.js (WEB2_CONFIG base-URL + auth guard), web2/shared/web2-products-cache.js (photo-editor product picker; findByName, init fetches product list), web2/shared/web2-image-editor.js (Web2ImageEditor.open — Photopea/Filerobot advanced editor), web2/shared/web2-logo-eraser.js (Web2LogoEraser.open — logo/watermark removal), web2/shared/beauty/web2-beauty-filters.js (Web2BeautyFilters: buildSkinMask, smoothSkin, adjustSkinTone, warp, beautify, stretchBand), web2/shared/beauty/web2-beauty-face.js (Web2BeautyFace: detect/warmup/buildBrushes — MediaPipe FaceLandmarker), web2/shared/beauty/web2-beauty-studio.js (Web2BeautyStudio.open — Meitu-style editing modal), web2/video-maker/js/video-audio.js (Web2VideoAudio.decodeFile — original audio decode for muxing; cross-folder dependency), External CDNs: unpkg.com (lucide), cdn.jsdelivr.net (@mediapipe/tasks-vision, mp4-muxer), storage.googleapis.com (face_landmarker.task model), No /api/web2\* routes are called directly by these two pages except indirectly via Web2ProductsCache (product list) — both pages run 100% client-side for editing/export

**SSE:** No SSE subscribe or publish in either page. Neither photo-editor nor video-beauty connects to realtime-sse-web2 or any web2:<entity> topic — they are stateless client-side media tools. No EventSource, no Web2SSE.subscribe, so no debounce/cleanup concerns for SSE.

**console.log:** 5 — web2/photo-editor/js/photo-editor.js:80 console.error('[photo-editor] runTool', tool, e) — logs error object only, no PII; web2/video-beauty/js/video-beauty.js:192 console.error('[video-beauty] export', e) — error only, no PII; web2/video-beauty/js/video-beauty-export.js:147 / :190 / :202 — WebCodecs encoder errors, no PII (all 5 console.\* are error/warn diagnostics, none leak customer data, tokens, or image content)

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `memory-leak` loadFile() creates URL.createObjectURL(file) for every uploaded video (line 105) and assigns it to v.src, but never revokes the PREVIOUS object URL. Each new upload leaks the prior blob URL (the underlying decoded video buffer stays pinned in memory). Uploading several large videos in one session ac — `web2/video-beauty/js/video-beauty.js:105-107` → Track the current object URL on state (e.g. state.srcUrl). At the top of loadFile, if state.srcUrl, call URL.revokeObjectURL(state.srcUrl). Set state.srcUrl = url after creating it. Also revoke on pag
- 🟠 `memory-leak` exportRealtime() builds a MediaStream via work.captureStream(fps) and adds audio tracks from videoEl.captureStream(); after rec.stop() none of these tracks are stopped (no stream.getTracks().forEach(t=>t.stop())). The captured canvas/video stream keeps running and the videoEl capture stream stays li — `web2/video-beauty/js/video-beauty-export.js:57-101` → In a finally block after `await done`, call stream.getTracks().forEach(t=>{try{t.stop()}catch{}}); and stop the videoEl capture stream's tracks too. Store both streams in locals so they can be torn do
- 🟡 `race` previewLoop() uses videoEl.requestVideoFrameCallback(previewLoop) but does NOT store the returned handle. stopPreview() only does cancelAnimationFrame(state.\_raf), which only cancels the requestAnimationFrame fallback path. On browsers with requestVideoFrameCallback (Chrome/Edge), the rVFC callback — `web2/video-beauty/js/video-beauty.js:72-99` → Capture the rVFC handle (state.\_rvfc = v.requestVideoFrameCallback(previewLoop)) and in stopPreview call v.cancelVideoFrameCallback(state.\_rvfc) when available, plus guard previewLoop with a generatio
- 🟡 `perf` Web2BeautyFace.detect() allocates a brand-new <canvas> via document.createElement('canvas') on every call when the source exceeds 1024px (line 236). In exportRenderPass face mode this runs once per frame (25 fps), so a 30s clip creates ~750 throwaway canvases plus their backing buffers, churning GC — `web2/shared/beauty/web2-beauty-face.js:228-241 (called from web2/video-beauty/js` → Reuse a single module-scoped scratch canvas for downscaling across detect() calls instead of allocating per call; resize it in place.
- 🟡 `memory-leak` fileToVideo() creates a hidden <video>, appends it to document.body and it is never removed; loadFile() reuses the same single element (good), but the element's old object-URL src + decoded frames are not released between loads (see leak above). There is no teardown on navigation. Combined with the — `web2/video-beauty/js/video-beauty.js:250-258, 101-108` → On loadFile, before setting new src: pause, clear v.src, call v.load() to drop the decoded buffer, and revoke the prior object URL. Add a beforeunload handler to revoke and null the src.
- ⚪ `logic` In doExport()'s catch-retry path (face>0 fallback to realtime), state remains exporting=true during the retry which is fine, but if the retry's exportRealtime also leaves streams running (see export leak) and then throws e2, the finally only resets UI — no stream cleanup happens for either the faile — `web2/video-beauty/js/video-beauty-export.js:104-195 and web2/video-beauty/js/vid` → Wrap exportRenderPass body in try/finally that calls venc.close() and aenc.close() (guarded) regardless of success/failure; same for the muxer.
- ⚪ `logic` setupOutputSize/fitView read stage.clientWidth/Height; if the export is triggered while #vbStage is hidden or the panel is collapsed, view.width can be 0, and exportRealtime's vctx.drawImage(work,0,0,view.width,view.height) draws into a zero-size area (harmless for output since output is from `work` — `web2/video-beauty/js/video-beauty.js:40-58, video-beauty-export.js:85` → Skip preview drawImage when view.width===0; output blob is unaffected since it captures `work`.
- ⚪ `logic` photo-editor setSource() spawns a fresh Image() probe on every setSource call (line 46-50) to read naturalWidth/Height; runTool() calls setSource(out) after every applied tool, so each successive edit allocates another probe Image holding a full data URL. With repeated 'chỉnh chồng' edits these prob — `web2/photo-editor/js/photo-editor.js:45-50` → Reuse a single module-scoped probe Image, or read dimensions from the already-loaded #peSourceImg via its onload instead of a second decode.
- ⚪ `logic` stopPreview() does not reset state.\_raf to 0 after cancelAnimationFrame. If preview is started then stopped then started again, a stale non-zero \_raf id remains; harmless here but the pattern is fragile and could cancel an unrelated future RAF if the id is reused. — `web2/video-beauty/js/video-beauty.js:91-99` → Set state.\_raf = 0 after cancelAnimationFrame.
- ⚪ `logic` Web2BeautyStudio history pushes full ImageData snapshots (up to 1800px long edge) capped at MAX_HISTORY=6. Six 1800x1800 RGBA snapshots ≈ 78MB held in JS heap during an edit session; on low-end mobiles this can OOM. The cap exists but the per-entry size is unbounded relative to image dimensions. — `web2/shared/beauty/web2-beauty-studio.js:274-281` → Either reduce MAX_HISTORY for large canvases or store history as compressed canvases (toBlob) instead of raw ImageData.

**Security (audit):**

- ℹ️ Product picker dropdown builds innerHTML from product name/code but both are passed through esc() (HTML-entity escape via Web2Escape or local fallback). No unescaped customer/untrusted data is injected. The only innerHTML in video-beauty (renderFilters) uses a static FILTER_LIST. No XSS found. — `web2/photo-editor/js/photo-editor.js:127-132, web2/video-beauty/js/video-beauty.` → No change required; keep esc() on all picker output.
- ℹ️ These pages perform NO writes to /api/web2* (no POST/PATCH/PUT/DELETE), so the WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE x-web2-token requirement does not apply. All processing is on-device; no images/videos are uploaded anywhere (confirmed: only URL.createObjectURL/FileReader/canvas, no fetch of user media to a server). N — `web2/photo-editor/*, web2/video-beauty/\*` → None — privacy posture is good (matches the 'không gửi đi đâu' claim).
- ⚪ Remote product imageUrl is loaded with crossOrigin='anonymous' for editing; if the remote (TPOS/storage) lacks CORS headers the canvas becomes tainted and toDataURL throws SecurityError. This is handled gracefully (notify), but it means picking a stock-image product silently fails to export. Not a v — `web2/photo-editor/js/photo-editor.js:139 setSource(p.imageUrl); web2/shared/beau` → Pre-validate the image URL origin or proxy product images through the web2 worker with proper CORS so on-device editing/export works for stock images.
- ⚪ Third-party scripts/models loaded from public CDNs (unpkg.com lucide, cdn.jsdelivr.net mediapipe + mp4-muxer, storage.googleapis.com model) with no Subresource Integrity (SRI) hashes and via dynamic import() at runtime. A CDN compromise could inject code that runs with full page privileges (includin — `photo-editor/index.html:17, video-beauty/index.html:17,134-136; web2-beauty-face` → Add integrity+crossorigin to the lucide <script> and pin/self-host the MediaPipe + mp4-muxer ESM where practical, or at minimum pin exact versions (already done) and document the supply-chain risk.

**Ghi chú:** No camera/getUserMedia access exists in this unit despite the focus hint — 'camera/stream' here means HTMLVideoElement + canvas.captureStream/videoEl.captureStream for export. Primary leak surface is therefore object URLs, capture-stream tracks, and WebCodecs encoders, all of which lack teardown.; No Web 1.0 (chatDb) or TPOS coupling found; pages are layer-clean. Product images are the only remote dependency (via shared products cache) and are cross-origin, causing CORS-taint export failures (handled).; Timezone: only Date.now() is used (for download filenames and watchdog timing) — no GMT+7 display logic, so no timezone bug here.; video-beauty depends on ../video-maker/js/video-audio.js (cross-folder) for original-audio decode during render-pass mux; if that file moves, export-with-face loses audio silently (caught, warns 'xuất không tiếng').; exportRenderPass throttles encode queue with setTimeout(6ms) when encodeQueueSize>8 and audio at >16 — reasonable backpressure; no obvious deadlock.; Recommend a single shared teardown(): revoke object URL, stop all capture-stream tracks, close venc/aenc, clear v.src + v.load(), reset state.\_raf/\_rvfc — wire it on export finally and on page beforeunload.

### page:photo-studio

web2/photo-studio is a mobile-first, fully client-side "chụp tách nền" (background-removal) studio. It opens the camera (or accepts uploaded/batch images), runs realtime segmentation (MediaPipe Tasks-Vision / legacy Selfie Segmentation for "AI nhanh"), or on capture produces a high-quality cutout via cloud (withoutbg proxy → @imgly local fallback) for "AI nét", or chroma-key for "Phông xanh". The review screen composites the cutout over backgrounds (transparent/color/gradient/Unsplash scene/blur/saved image), adds shadow/enhance/logo, supports drag/pinch transform, a brush to fix edges, and AI object-pick (SlimSAM). Output is saved via Web Share API / download, batch-exported as ZIP, or handed to fb-posts via Web2FbShare. The ONLY backend dependency is the cutout proxy POST /api/web2/cutout/withoutbg (rate-limited, soft-auth). No Postgres, no Web 1.0 tables, no TPOS, no SSE — correctly isolated. A scoped service worker caches CDN models offline.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** index.html head: links web2-sidebar.css?v=20260613z, web2-theme.css?v=20260613z, photo-studio.css?v=20260604q; lucide UMD (defer) from unpkg; PWA manifest ./manifest.webmanifest; Body end scripts (sync, in order): @mediapipe/selfie_segmentation@0.1.1675465747 (pinned+SRI from jsDelivr), shared/js/notification-system.js, web2-auth.js?v=20260613guard, web2-user-info.js, web2-sidebar.js?v=20260620a, web2-fb-share.js?v=20260619a, then page modules photo-studio-state/canvas/bg/edit?v=20260619fb/bgpicker/ui?v=20260619fb/photo-studio.js; DOMContentLoaded: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside',{activeRoute:'photo-studio'}); PhotoStudio.init(); lucide.createIcons(); navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js?v=20260604q'); PhotoStudio.init() (photo-studio.js:30): PS.cache() (DOM lookups), creates offscreen canvases (work/maskC/segInput/maskRaw) with willReadFrequently, PS.bind() (all event listeners), PS.initSegmentation() (async dynamic import tasks-vision vision_bundle.mjs + FilesetResolver + ImageSegmenter, GPU on non-iOS / CPU on iOS; fallback initLegacySeg), PS.applyMobileDefaults() (env camera + mirror off on mobile), PS.loadSavedBgs() (localStorage ps_saved_bgs), PS.renderBgRows(), PS.loadLogo() (localStorage ps_logo), PS.setMode('ai'), PS.autoStartIfAllowed(); autoStartIfAllowed: navigator.permissions.query({name:'camera'}); if granted → startCamera({silent}); registers st.onchange listener to auto-start on grant (never removed); Service worker sw.js: install→skipWaiting; activate→deletes old caches + clients.claim; fetch→cache-first for CDN regex hosts (jsdelivr/esm.sh/googleapis/unsplash/unpkg/staticimgly/huggingface/cdn-lfs), network-first for same-origin /web2/photo-studio/ shell

| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| #psStartCam 'Bật camera' button                                                                                              | PS.toggleCamera → PS.startCamera (photo-studio-ui.js:309/335)                                                                 | getUserMedia({facingMode ideal, 1920x1080}); sets state.stream, source='camera', video.srcObject, waits for video, sets srcNatW/H, recomputeSizes, syncMirrorToFacing, enables capture/switch, startLoop(); on error showStageError/showPermissionHelp + notify                       |
| #psCapture shutter button                                                                                                    | PS.capture (photo-studio-edit.js:15)                                                                                          | Guarded by state.\_capBusy. Builds cropped frameCv at captureSize (≤2400px long edge), calls PS.makeCutout (mode-dependent), sets \_cutout/\_sil/\_capFrame/\_capW/\_capH, resets transform, exits brush/pick, renderReview, showReview. finally clears \_capBusy + re-enables button |

NOTE: blob URL never revoked here                                                                                                                     |

Pushes {name,blob} to PS.batchBlobs, updates count, enables ZIP when done                                                      |
| #psBatchZip 'Tải ZIP'                                                                                                        | PS.downloadBatchZip (photo-studio-edit.js:729)                                                                                | Dynamic import jszip@3.10.1 from esm.sh, zips batchBlobs, saveBlob                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |

| #psShareFb 'Đăng lên FB'                                                                                                     | PS.shareReviewToFb (photo-studio-edit.js:559)                                                                                 | reviewCanvas.toDataURL('image/png') (try/catch CORS), Web2FbShare.send({images:[{dataUrl}],source}); navigates to ../fb-posts/index.html?from=share via sessionStorage handoff                                                                                                        |
| #psBrushToggle / brush bar / #psBrushSize / tools                                                                            | PS.setBrushMode + PS.paintBrush + PS.finishBrush (photo-studio-edit.js:218/249/263)                                           | pointerdown/move paints on \_cutout via destination-out (erase) or clip+drawImage \_capFrame (restore); finishBrush rebuilds silhouette; renderReview each stroke                                                                                                                     |
| #psPickToggle 'Chọn đúng món' + pick bar                                                                                     | PS.enterPickMode → PS.samEmbed / PS.addPickPoint → PS.runSamDecode (photo-studio-edit.js:300/343, photo-studio-bg.js:301/313) | Lazy import @huggingface/transformers@3.7.1 + SlimSAM; encodes frame once; each tap pushes point + runs SAM decode (busy-gated with \_samPending coalescing); renderPick overlays mask; Apply→applyPickMask sets new \_cutout; Extract→extractPickedObject crops+saves PNG            |
