Market chips set aspect+exportPx and recomputeSizes                                                                                                                                                                                          |

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js (sidebar mount + autoloads notification-system, command palette, Lottie, mobile.css, PWA), web2/shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders for x-web2-token; sets window.API_CONFIG), web2/shared/web2-fb-share.js (handoff to ../fb-posts/index.html?from=share via sessionStorage), web2/fb-posts/ (target page for 'Đăng lên FB'), shared/js/notification-system.js (Web 1.0 shared notificationManager), render route /api/web2/cutout/withoutbg (proxied via chatomni-proxy worker) → render.com/routes/web2-cutout.js → services/web2-cutout-service.js (withoutbg/birefnet/photoroom), CDN: @mediapipe/selfie_segmentation + tasks-vision, esm.sh @imgly/background-removal@1.5.5, @huggingface/transformers@3.7.1 SlimSAM, @tensorflow/tfjs + upscaler + esrgan-slim, jszip, images.unsplash.com

**SSE:** No SSE subscribe or publish anywhere in this unit. Page is purely client-side image processing; no realtime topics, no EventSource, no Web2SSE usage. (Correct for this feature — nothing to sync cross-tab.)

**console.log:** 16 — photo-studio-state.js:135 PS.notify fallback console.log('[photo-studio]', type, msg) — logs only UI message strings (no PII/token), acceptable but is a debug fallback; All other 15 are console.warn/console.error for engine/init/upscale/SAM/capture/zip failures logging error.message only — no tokens, no customer data, no base64 image payloads. No leftover debug noise of concern.

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `memory-leak` Multiple object URLs are created but never revoked, causing growing memory use on a long photo session — exactly the kind of churn that triggers OOM on mobile. (1) onSourceFile sets img.src = URL.createObjectURL(file) and never revokes it (photo-studio-ui.js:502). The img is held in state.\_sourceImg — `photo-studio-ui.js:502; photo-studio-edit.js:726,627; photo-studio-canvas.js:34-` → Revoke source img URL in onSourceFile after img.onload (URL.revokeObjectURL(img.src)); revoke each batch thumbnail URL when the batch view is closed (psBatchClose/Close2) or replaced; revoke fileToIma
- 🟡 `perf` Potential OOM / huge allocation on mobile when AI upscale (×2) is enabled on a large capture. CAPTURE_MAX_LONG=2400 → capture/output canvas can be 2400px long edge. saveReview/processOne then call upscaleCanvas: the AI path is guarded (UPSCALE_MAX_IN=1400) so a 2400px image skips AI and falls to lan — `photo-studio-bg.js:216-259 (upscaleCanvas/lanczos2x), photo-studio-edit.js:520-5` → Cap output: if upscaling would exceed a safe long-edge (e.g. >4096px or exportPx already set), skip Lanczos or clamp. Add an explicit max-pixel guard before allocating the 2x canvas, mirroring the pri
- 🟡 `race` Stale realtime-mask race in 'AI nhanh' capture. makeCutout('ai') composites the CAPTURED full-res frameCv with PS.maskC, but PS.maskC is the LAST realtime preview mask produced by the rAF segmentation loop from a _previous_ video frame (different instant, and computed at preview resolution from a do — `photo-studio-edit.js:70-80 (makeCutout ai branch), photo-studio-bg.js:75-95/112-` → For capture, run a fresh synchronous segmentation on frameCv (or grab the exact video frame that produced the latest mask) instead of reusing the live-loop maskC; at minimum gate capture until at leas
- 🟡 `race` tasks-vision segmentation runs every rAF frame with no in-flight gate. The legacy path is gated by state.busy, but the 'tasks' path calls state.\_segmenter.segmentForVideo(inp, performance.now(), PS.onTasksResult) every frame assuming the callback is synchronous. If the GPU/CPU delegate ever invokes — `photo-studio-ui.js:581-590; photo-studio-bg.js:75-95` → Add a busy flag around the tasks path too (set before segmentForVideo, clear at end of onTasksResult), or throttle to a max FPS.
- 🟡 `logic` recomputeSizes() resizes PS.el.output and PS.work but NOT the live mask canvases. When the user changes aspect/market AFTER the camera is running, state.W/H/crop change; the next realtime frame's populateMaskC re-sizes maskC to new W/H, but composeAI for the legacy SelfieSegmentation path passes res — `photo-studio-state.js:191-202 (recomputeSizes); photo-studio-edit.js:76` → Invalidate/clear maskC on aspect/market change and block 'ai' capture until a fresh mask at the new size exists.
- ⚪ `race` autoStartIfAllowed registers st.onchange that calls startCamera on permission grant and is never removed. Combined with the user manually pressing 'Bật camera', or navigating within the SPA shell, two startCamera flows can race: startCamera calls stopStream() at entry which mitigates double-streams, — `photo-studio-ui.js:318-333,335-378` → Guard startCamera with an in-flight flag; ensure the permissions onchange handler is a no-op while a start is pending or the page is hidden.
- ⚪ `logic` Cloud cutout dimension mismatch silently distorts when withoutbg returns a different-sized PNG. makeCutout does imgToCanvas(cloudResult, W, H) forcing the cloud result to the capture W×H via drawImage scaling. If the upstream returns the image at its own resolution (withoutbg/PhotoRoom may resize), — `photo-studio-edit.js:86, photo-studio-canvas.js:15-22` → Validate returned image dims (warn/fallback to local if aspect differs materially).
- ⚪ `bug` saveReview / processOne can produce a 0-byte or null blob silently. canvasToBlob resolves with null if the canvas is tainted or too large; saveReview does `if (blob) PS.saveBlob(...)` so a null blob produces NO file and NO error message — user taps Lưu and nothing happens with no feedback. — `photo-studio-edit.js:550-555` → Else-branch: notify('Không tạo được ảnh (ảnh quá lớn?)','error').
- ⚪ `logic` Comment/docs drift: photo-studio.js header and cutout route docstring say 'PhotoRoom cloud' as default, but cloudCutout actually calls /withoutbg, and the service default engine is withoutbg/fal. The /photoroom and /birefnet endpoints exist but the page never calls them. Dead endpoints + misleading — `photo-studio.js:6-7; photo-studio-bg.js:165; render.com/routes/web2-cutout.js:8-` → Update docstrings to reflect withoutbg as the live engine; remove or wire the unused birefnet/photoroom endpoints.
- ⚪ `bug` GMT+7 note: PS.stamp() uses local-time getFullYear/getMonth/... for filenames. Filenames are cosmetic so this is benign, but on a non-+7 device the stamp won't match Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh. Not user-facing time display, low impact. — `photo-studio-state.js:161-165` → If filename timestamps must be GMT+7, format via Intl with timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'. Otherwise leave as-is.

**Security (audit):**

- ⚪ cloudCutout sends the full captured image as base64 dataURL to the proxy /api/web2/cutout/withoutbg, which forwards to a third-party (withoutbg.com / fal.ai / PhotoRoom). For a product/selfie camera this can include people's faces. This is inherent to the feature, but worth noting the image leaves t — `photo-studio-bg.js:162-178 + render.com/services/web2-cutout-service.js:53-153` → Document the 3rd-party processing in UI; ensure server never logs the base64 body (it currently logs only e.message — good).
- ⚪ x-web2-token read from localStorage('web2_auth') and sent as a header. Token is stored at-rest in plaintext localStorage (project-wide pattern, not unique to this page). authHeaders falls back to no header if Web2Auth missing — under WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1 the cloud cutout then silently 401s and falls — `photo-studio-bg.js:153-161` → Acceptable given the soft-gate design; no action needed for this page beyond the global token-at-rest concern.
- ⚪ innerHTML used to inject permission/error help and stage error messages, but all interpolated values are static Vietnamese strings or PS.browserName() (derived from UA via fixed switch, not raw UA). No untrusted/customer data is injected, so XSS risk is minimal. — `photo-studio-ui.js:397-432 (showStageError/showPermissionHelp/permissionStepsHTM` → No change required; if UA-derived strings ever get embedded raw, escape them.
- ℹ️ Batch thumbnail innerHTML embeds an object URL: `background-image:url(${url})` where url is URL.createObjectURL(blob). Object URLs are same-origin blob refs, not user-controllable strings, so no injection. But these object URLs are never revoked (see memory-leak bug). — `photo-studio-edit.js:632` → Revoke object URLs (see bugs).
- ℹ️ No CSRF concern: the only state-changing request is the cutout POST which is idempotent image processing protected by per-IP rate limit (20/min) and soft auth. No destructive endpoints, no admin secret usage on this page. — `render.com/routes/web2-cutout.js:24-51` → None.

**Ghi chú:** Layer isolation is CORRECT: no web2Db/chatDb, no Web 1.0 tables, no TPOS API, no Firestore. Only backend touch is the cutout proxy, which is a Web 2.0 route (/api/web2/cutout) with x-web2-token attached and per-IP rate limiting.; The prior bug class referenced in the FOCUS (skip-compress when <0.5MB but dim>16384) does NOT recur here in that exact form — there is no file-size-based skip; capture is bounded by CAPTURE_MAX_LONG=2400 and AI-upscale by UPSCALE_MAX_IN=1400. The analogous unguarded path is lanczos2x (no max-pixel cap) flagged as a medium perf/OOM bug.; No double-submit on the cutout POST itself: capture is guarded by state.\_capBusy; batch is sequential; SAM decode coalesces via \_samBusy/\_samPending. The main concurrency risks are the realtime segmentation loop writing shared mask canvases and the stale-mask-at-capture race.; Service worker scope is correctly limited to /web2/photo-studio/ and only caches CDN/model hosts + this app shell — does not interfere with the rest of the site.; Web Share / download fallback (saveBlob) handles AbortError correctly. fb-posts handoff uses one-shot sessionStorage with quota fallback — no URL leakage.

### page:products (web2/products/)

Kho Sản Phẩm (Product warehouse) page for Web 2.0. Lists web2_products via /api/web2-products through the Cloudflare worker, with create/edit modal (supplier dropdown sourced from Web2SuppliersCache=Ví NCC, variant pickers Màu×Size, auto product-code suggestion via Web2ProductCode), CSV/JSON import, bulk multi-select, barcode/QR label printing (local JsBarcode/QR render + optional IP printer bridge), a slide-in detail drawer with 4 tabs, and an edit-history timeline. Realtime sync via SSE topics web2:products/web2:fast-sale-orders/web2:native-orders. The original 2010-line app was split into 6 modules sharing window.Web2ProductsCore; print split into 5 modules sharing window.W2PP. It is a leaf Web 2.0 page that links out to native-orders, variants, supplier-wallet, and depends heavily on shared web2 modules.</summary> <parameter name="loadsOnEnter">["CSS: web2-sidebar.css, web2-effects.css, web2-base.css, web2-components.css, css/web2-products.css, web2-import.css, css/web2-products-print.css, css/web2-product-detail.css, web2-theme.css; Google Fonts Inter+Manrope (preconnect+stylesheet)","Scripts head: lucide UMD (CDN, defer), shared-auth-manager.js, notification-system.js","Scripts body: web2-auth.js (sets window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG base URLs), web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js (mounted via DOMContentLoaded Web2Sidebar.mount)","web2-effects.js, web2-product-code.js, js/web2-products-api.js, ../variants/js/web2-variants-api.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-products-cache.js, web2-variants-cache.js, web2-variant-multi.js, web2-so-order-reader.js, web2-suppliers-cache.js, web2-deeplink.js, web2-import.js","App modules (strict order): state -> render -> modal -> variant-picker -> actions -> filters -> app","Print modules (strict order): print-utils -> print-barcode -> print-render -> print-modal -> print; plus web2-printer.js, web2-qr.js, web2-product-detail.js","init() (app.js:147): lucide.createIcons; wires create/import/sample buttons; \_setupSse() subscribes 3 SSE topics; tbody change delegation for bulk checkboxes; selectAll + bulk clear/print; Web2Effects.attachImageDropTarget on #pmImageDrop; Web2VariantsCache.init().then(\_wireVariantPicker + subscribe \_renderCombinedHint); Web2SuppliersCache.init().then(subscribe -> rebuild supplier dropdown); search/filter/limit listeners; modal open/close/save/suggest listeners + auto-regenerate (debounce 300ms); global keydown ESC/Enter; image preview input; required-field blur feedback; W.load().then(\_handleDeeplink); Web2ProductsCache.init().then(subscribe tickle->load)","Initial data fetch: W.load() -> Web2ProductsApi.list (GET /api/web2-products/list) then background \_loadUsageForCurrentPage() -> GET /api/web2-products/usage","web2-product-detail.js self-wires delegated row-click listener on #productsTbody (retry up to 10x)"]

| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| #btnCreateProduct click                                                      | W.openCreate (modal.js:343)                                              | Resets modal fields, sets supplier='KHO', calls populateSupplierDropdown() (async), opens modal, focuses #pmName.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| #btnSaveProduct click / Enter in modal                                       | W.saveModal (modal.js:538)                                               | Builds fields; if creating + multi-variant combos>1 -> \_bulkCreateVariants (await loop create). Else validates code/name/variant-in-cache. UPDATE: Web2Optimistic.run (optimistic merge in-place, PATCH update, rollback on fail). CREATE: Web2Optimistic.run (prepend optimistic row, POST create, onSuccess pushTickle+W.load(), rollback restores snapshot). |
| #pmSuggestCode click + auto on supplier/name/variant change (debounce 300ms) | W.suggestProductCode (modal.js:60)                                       | Generates product code from supplier prefix map + name keyword + color/size shortCodes via Web2ProductCode.suggest using full-cache existingCodes (~20k) to avoid cross-table collisions; writes #pmCode + hint.                                                                                                                                                 |

On success filters STATE.products, re-renders, pushTickle delete. NOT optimistic, no double-submit guard.                                                                                                                    |
| row In tem (printer) button                                                  | Web2ProductsApp.printBarcode -> W.printBarcode (actions.js:118)          | Finds product, Web2ProductsPrint.open([p]) -> selection modal.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| row Lịch sử button                                                           | Web2ProductsApp.openHistory -> W.openHistory (modal.js:397)              | Creates history modal, raw fetch GET /api/web2-products/:code/history?limit=100 (no auth header), renders timeline via renderHistEntry (escaped).                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| row body click (non-interactive)                                             | Web2ProductDetail.open (web2-product-detail.js:93)                       | Opens slide-in drawer with 4 lazy tabs (overview/orders/history/edit); locks .main-content scroll; ESC/overlay close; edit tab \_saveEdit PATCHes only changed fields (button-disable guard against double-submit).                                                                                                                                              |
| copyCode (code badge onclick)                                                | Web2ProductsApp.copyCode (actions.js:110)                                | navigator.clipboard.writeText(code) + toast.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| usage badge onclick (only reachable via drawer/popover, not table)           | Web2ProductsApp.openUsagePopover (render.js:370)                         | Renders popover grouping orders by campaign with customerName/phone (client-side only), positions near target, click-outside closes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| #filterSearch Enter / #filterActive change / #filterLimit change             | W.applyFilters (filters.js:16)                                           | Reads inputs into STATE, page=1, W.load().                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| #filterSearchClear click                                                     | inline (app.js:217)                                                      | Clears search, page=1, W.load().                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| pagination buttons                                                           | Web2ProductsApp.goPage (filters.js:34)                                   | Clamps page, W.load().                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| selectAll checkbox / row checkboxes                                          | W.\_selectAllVisible / W.\_toggleSelect (render.js:178/139)              | Mutates STATE.selectedCodes Set, repaints checkboxes/row classes, updates bulk bar.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| #w2pBulkPrint click                                                          | W.\_bulkPrint (render.js:203)                                            | Collects selected products from Web2ProductsCache fallback STATE.products, Web2ProductsPrint.open(collected).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| #btnImportProducts / #btnSampleProducts                                      | Web2Import.open/downloadSample with \_productImportConfig (modal.js:145) | Opens import dialog; onCommit \_commitProductImport loops Web2ProductsApi.create per row (auto-gen codes), pushTickle, onDone W.load().                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| print modal In bằng pdf                                                      | generateAndPrint (print-modal.js:460)                                    | \_markProductsPrinted POST /api/web2-products/mark-printed (with x-web2-token); builds labels; pre-renders QR (Web2QR or davidshimjs fallback); buildLabelHTML; prints via Web2Printer bridge ('label') or showPrintOverlay iframe (Blob URL).                                                                                                                   |

**Liên kết:** ../variants/index.html (Kho Biến Thể — link in modal + variant hints), ../../native-orders/index.html?search=<orderCode> (usage popover + drawer orders tab order links), Render route /api/web2-products/\* (list,get,batch,usage,create PATCH DELETE,adjust-stock,upsert-pending,confirm-purchase,pending,adjust-pending,mark-printed,/:code/history) via worker chatomni-proxy, Render route /api/web2-supplier-wallet/suppliers (via Web2SuppliersCache), Shared: web2-sidebar.js, web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders), web2-optimistic.js (Web2Optimistic), web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE), web2-products-cache.js (Web2ProductsCache), web2-variants-cache.js (Web2VariantsCache), web2-suppliers-cache.js (Web2SuppliersCache), web2-product-code.js (Web2ProductCode), web2-variant-multi.js (Web2VariantMulti), web2-import.js (Web2Import), web2-qr.js (Web2QR), web2-printer.js (Web2Printer), web2-deeplink.js (Web2Deeplink), web2-user-info.js (Web2UserInfo), notification-system.js, shared-auth-manager.js (AuthManager)

**SSE:** Subscribes web2:products (app.js:67): on create/delete -> debouncedFullLoad (500ms, \_sseReloadTimer); on update-like with affected codes -> \_updateRowsBatch in-place patch (no debounce on this branch), else debouncedFullLoad. Uses separate \_sseReloadTimer.; Subscribes web2:fast-sale-orders (app.js:109) and web2:native-orders (app.js:113): refreshUsageOnly (600ms debounce, \_sseUsageTimer) -> \_loadUsageForCurrentPage(). NOTE: this fetch is effectively dead because the table has no .usage-cell to update (see bugs).; No unsubscribe on these 3 topics — single-page lifetime, acceptable but listeners persist; Web2SSE bridge is a shared singleton EventSource. \_sseWired flag makes subscribe idempotent within page.; Web2SuppliersCache subscribes web2:supplier-wallet (600ms debounce) -> rebuild supplier dropdown. Web2VariantsCache.subscribe -> \_renderCombinedHint + color-shortmap reset. Web2ProductsCache.subscribe -> W.load() only on reason==='tickle'.; Server \_notify payloads carry only {action, code, codes, ts} — no PII. Good.

**console.log:** 19 — web2-products-app.js:71 console.log('[Web2Products-SSE] web2:products', action, affected.join(',')) — logs product codes on every SSE event (debug noise, low-PII); web2-products-app.js:110/114 console.log SSE fast-sale/native-order refresh — debug noise; web2-products-state.js:100 / print-utils.js:174 / web2-product-detail.js:41 notify() fallback console.log(`[type]`, msg) — message may contain product names; web2-products-render.js:229 console.warn bulk print missing codes — leftover debug; render.js:278/366 console.warn fetch fail (acceptable error logging); No tokens/secrets logged; no customer phone/name logged to console (usage PII is rendered to DOM only, not console).

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `logic` Dead usage-cell update path. renderUsageBadge / \_loadUsageForCurrentPage write into row.querySelector('.usage-cell'), but \_rowHtml (render.js:33-110) and the table header (index.html:165-185) contain NO usage column / no .usage-cell element. So \_loadUsageForCurrentPage runs a GET /api/web2-products/ — `web2/products/js/web2-products-render.js:347-368, 497-499; web2/products/js/web2` → Either re-add a <th>ĐANG DÙNG</th> + <td class="usage-cell"> in header and \_rowHtml, OR remove \_loadUsageForCurrentPage()/renderUsageBadge and the web2:fast-sale-orders/web2:native-orders subscription
- ⚪ `bug` colspan mismatch. index.html initial loading row uses colspan="12" while render.js loading/empty/error rows use colspan="11". The data table has 11 columns (select,#,ẢNH,MÃ SP,TÊN,BIẾN THỂ,GIÁ MUA,GIÁ BÁN,GHI CHÚ,TRẠNG THÁI,THAO TÁC). The static 12 spans one extra column. — `web2/products/index.html:189 vs web2/products/js/web2-products-render.js:116,481` → Change index.html loading row to colspan="11" to match.
- 🟡 `race` Optimistic update vs SSE echo race on the same code. toggleActive/saveModal(update) optimistically mutate the shared product object in STATE.products and call \_updateRowInPlace. Meanwhile the server \_notify('update', code) echoes back to THIS tab, the web2:products handler runs \_updateRowsBatch([cod — `web2/products/js/web2-products-actions.js:22-51; web2/products/js/web2-products-` → Guard in-place replacement with a monotonic field (updated_at/ts): in \_updateRowInPlace/\_updateRowsBatch, skip swap if STATE.products[idx].updatedAt >= incoming.updatedAt; and suppress self-echo by ta
- ⚪ `bug` Local delete leaves stale entry in STATE.selectedCodes. \_doRemove (actions.js:83) removes the code from STATE.products but does NOT call STATE.selectedCodes.delete(code); only the SSE-echo path (app.js:79) deletes from the selection Set. If the deleted product was selected, its code lingers in selec — `web2/products/js/web2-products-actions.js:83-92` → In \_doRemove success branch add STATE.selectedCodes.delete(code); then \_updateBulkBar().
- 🟡 `race` remove() has no double-submit / reentrancy guard. The Xóa button calls async remove() which awaits Popup.danger then \_doRemove. Rapid double-click (or clicking again while the 409 force-confirm dialog is open) can launch two DELETE flows for the same code. \_doRemove is also recursively re-entered fo — `web2/products/js/web2-products-actions.js:73-108` → Track an in-flight Set of codes being deleted; ignore remove(code) if already pending; disable the row delete button while awaiting.
- ⚪ `other` Immutability violations: toggleActive mutates product.isActive in place (actions.js:25,39,45) and saveModal/\_updateRowInPlace assign into STATE.products[idx] / Object.assign(product,...). Shared mutable row objects are also referenced by the snapshot in saveModal CREATE (STATE.products.slice() is a — `web2/products/js/web2-products-actions.js:25; web2/products/js/web2-products-mod` → Snapshot deep-ish copies of affected rows (map to {...p}) before optimistic mutation; apply updates by replacing with new objects rather than mutating in place.
- ⚪ `race` openCreate sets #pmSupplier='KHO' twice — synchronously before populateSupplierDropdown() and again in its .then(). populateSupplierDropdown() is async (awaits loadSuppliersFromSoOrder). If the user changes the supplier select between modal open and the promise resolution, the .then() handler will o — `web2/products/js/web2-products-modal.js:349,362-364` → Only force 'KHO' in the .then() if the select still holds its pre-populate value (or guard with a 'user touched' flag).
- ⚪ `logic` Bulk create variants is sequential await create() with no per-item rollback and a shared existingCodes array grown per iteration; if one create fails midway, earlier creates persist and code uniqueness for the failed batch is only guaranteed client-side (server could still 409 on a concurrent code f — `web2/products/js/web2-products-variant-picker.js:174-249` → Collect failed combos and offer a retry, or use a server bulk-create endpoint that is transactional; surface which combos failed.
- ⚪ `perf` lucide.createIcons() is called globally (whole-document scan) on nearly every in-place row swap (\_updateRowInPlace render.js:252), every usage cell merge, every history render, drawer tab render, and SSE batch patch. On large pages and bursty SSE this re-scans the entire DOM repeatedly. — `web2/products/js/web2-products-render.js:252,364; multiple` → Scope icon creation to the newly inserted node (lucide.createIcons({nameAttr...}) on the subtree) instead of the whole document, or debounce.
- ℹ️ `bug` \_handleDeeplink calls W.load() a second time after the initial load already ran (init: W.load().then(\_handleDeeplink) then \_handleDeeplink itself calls W.load() again). load() is guarded by STATE.loading so the inner call is fine, but if the first load is already finished the deeplink path does a re — `web2/products/js/web2-products-app.js:121-145,285` → Acceptable; could skip the extra load when STATE.search already equals the deeplink code.

**Security (audit):**

- ⚪ openHistory (modal.js:425) and drawer \_renderHistory (web2-product-detail.js:392) use raw fetch GET /:code/history WITHOUT x-web2-token / Web2Auth.authHeaders, unlike all other API calls which go through \_w2Auth. If WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE is ever extended to GETs, history would silently 401. Currently re — `web2/products/js/web2-products-modal.js:425; web2/products/js/web2-product-detai` → Route history through Web2ProductsApi with \_w2Auth() headers for consistency, or add a Web2ProductsApi.history(code) method that attaches auth.
- ⚪ Third-party scripts loaded from CDN without SRI/version pinning: davidshimjs/qrcodejs@master (unpinned, mutable) and jsbarcode@3.11.6 and lucide@0.294.0. @master is a supply-chain risk (silent code change). Also the print iframe loads JsBarcode from jsdelivr inside a Blob-URL document. — `web2/products/js/web2-products-print-barcode.js:33 (QR @master), :16 (JsBarcode)` → Pin QR lib to a release tag and add integrity/crossorigin SRI where feasible; prefer self-hosting per project security rules (avoid @master).
- ℹ️ Usage popover and drawer Orders tab render customer name + phone (PII) into innerHTML. Values are escaped (escapeHtml/esc), so no XSS, but PII is exposed in the product page DOM. This is by-design (operator tool). — `web2/products/js/web2-products-render.js:433; web2/products/js/web2-product-deta` → No action required beyond ensuring page stays auth-gated; keep escaping.
- ℹ️ Large amounts of dynamic HTML built via innerHTML string concatenation across render/modal/detail/print. Audited: code/name/note/variant/supplier/userName/sourcePage/history fields are all passed through escapeHtml/escJs (escJs for inline onclick JS-string contexts). No unescaped untrusted sink foun — `web2/products/js/web2-products-render.js:33-110; web2-products-modal.js:443-520;` → Maintain discipline; any new field added to row/history HTML must be escaped.
- ℹ️ All write endpoints (create/update/remove/adjust\*/confirm/upsert/mark-printed) attach x-web2-token via \_w2Auth/Web2Auth.authHeaders, satisfying WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1. Token read from localStorage web2_auth (at-rest plaintext in localStorage — project-wide known tradeoff, not specific to this page). — `web2/products/js/web2-products-api.js:14-23; web2-products-print-barcode.js:36-4` → None page-specific.

**Ghi chú:** Web 2.0 hygiene: page is correctly decoupled from TPOS and Web 1.0 — all data flows through /api/web2-products and /api/web2-supplier-wallet, SSE uses web2: topics, no chatDb/Web1 table access, no TPOS API. Good.; Timezone: history timestamps use createdAt = epoch ms (BIGINT) rendered with timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' in both modal renderHistEntry and drawer fmtTime — correct GMT+7, no naive-string bug here.; Product-code suggestion correctly uses the FULL Web2ProductsCache (~20k codes) for existingCodes to avoid cross-page collisions, with STATE.products fallback. Bulk/import paths replicate this.; Print is fully local (JsBarcode/Web2QR), no external label API — matches the 'Web 2.0 independent of TPOS' rule. QR EC=H to survive variant overlay.; SSE design intentionally uses two separate debounce timers (\_sseReloadTimer 500ms vs \_sseUsageTimer 600ms) to avoid clearTimeout cross-cancellation between full-load and usage-refresh — well reasoned, but the usage-refresh half is currently dead (see bug).; selectedCodes persists across pagination/filter (intended), with the noted stale-on-local-delete gap.

### page:purchase-refund

Web 2.0 "Trả hàng NCC" (supplier return) page. Section A lists products already received from Sổ Order (so-order ∩ web2_products with stock>0), grouped by ĐƠN = supplier::shipmentId (aggId). User refunds one product (Quick modal) or a whole order (Bulk modal); each submit POSTs to /api/purchase-refund/quick-refund which atomically creates an approved refund record (web2_records, slug=purchase-refund), deducts web2_products.stock per line, and writes a supplier-wallet ledger 'return' entry (web2_supplier_ledger, txId=tx-refund-<code>) reducing NCC debt. Section B is a read-only history of refund vouchers with a legacy create/edit modal + Kho picker (state-machine action buttons are disabled via if(false)). Split into 6 cooperating IIFE modules under window.PurchaseRefund (state/api/render/modal/actions/app).

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** index.html head: lucide UMD (defer), shared/js/notification-system.js, css/purchase-refund.css, web2/shared/web2-theme.css, shared/web2-sidebar.css; Body scripts (in order): web2-auth.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-optimistic.js (loaded but unused here), web2-sidebar.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-idb-store.js, products/js/web2-products-api.js, web2-products-cache.js, web2-suppliers-cache.js, web2-so-order-reader.js, web2-so-order-utils.js, supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-storage.js; purchase-refund module set: state→api→render→modal→actions→app (app last); Sidebar auto-injects popup.js + web2-escape.js (Popup, Web2Escape) + mobile/PWA/lottie/command-palette on mount; init() (app.js:53): Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside'); wires prFilterStatus/prSearch/prForm submit; PR.modal.wirePicker(); wireSourceList(); wireQuickModal(); wireBulkModal(); document-level click listener for img.pr-thumb-zoom lightbox; init() initial data: loadSourceItems() (Web2ProductsCache.init + loadSoOrderReceivedItems join IDB→localStorage→Postgres); loadList() (GET /api/web2/purchase-refund/list?limit=200); setupSSE() subscribes web2:purchase-refund

| Control                                                 | Handler                                                                           | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Section A row 'Trả NCC' button (.pr-source-refund)      | app.js:46 delegated click → PR.actions.openQuickRefund(aggId) (actions.js:135)    | Finds source item by aggId, sets QUICK_STATE.item, prefills qty=item.stock & max=item.stock, price=item.price, renders info HTML, shows #prQuickModal. No fetch.                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Section A group header 'Trả hàng' button (.pr-bulk-btn) | app.js:42 → PR.actions.openBulkRefund(Number(dataset.bulkGroup)) (actions.js:303) | Reads SOURCE_STATE.groups[idx] BY INDEX (rebuilt each render), sets BULK_STATE.group, renders one row per product (qty input default 0, max=stock), shows #prBulkModal.                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Quick modal submit (#prQuickForm)                       | submitQuickRefund (actions.js:201)                                                | Guards submitBtn.disabled re-entry; clamps qty=max(1,min(item.stock,input)); amount=qty\*price; generates random refundCode; POST /api/purchase-refund/quick-refund with products[] but NO rowReturns/ordered; on success toast+close+Web2ProductsCache.refresh().catch(()=>{})+loadSourceItems()+loadList(); finally re-enable button. |
| Bulk modal submit (#prBulkForm)                         | submitBulkRefund (actions.js:391)                                                 | \_collectBulkLines() clamps each qty 0..stock, keep qty>0; if none→warning; builds products[], totalQty/totalAmount via reduce; guards re-entry; POST /quick-refund (multi-line voucher, NO rowReturns/ordered); refresh cache + reload A+B.                                                                                            |
| Bulk qty input (delegated #prBulkRows input)            | wireBulkModal (actions.js:485)                                                    | Floors+clamps value 0..stock in place, toggles row.is-on, updateBulkTotal() recomputes per-line + grand total.                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Quick qty/price input                                   | updateQuickTotal (actions.js:187)                                                 | Recomputes #prQuickTotal=qty\*price (no clamp at input; clamp applied at submit).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Section A search / supplier select                      | wireSourceList (app.js:31,35)                                                     | Sets SOURCE_STATE.search/supplierFilter → renderSourceList() (client filter + regroup by aggId).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Reload button (#prReloadBtn)                            | app.js:28                                                                         | Promise.all([loadSourceItems(), loadList()]).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Section B status filter / search                        | init (app.js:59,63)                                                               | Sets STATE.filterStatus/search → renderList() (client-side applyFilters).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Section B list item click                               | selectRefund (render.js:76)                                                       | Sets STATE.selected, re-renders list + read-only detail (history timeline).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Legacy create/edit modal submit (#prForm)               | handleFormSubmit (modal.js:82)                                                    | Builds payload.data (products from pipe-text), Web2SuppliersCache.ensure(name) fire-and-forget; POST /api/web2/purchase-refund/create or PATCH /update/:code; reload+select. Creates status='draft' (no stock deduction; only /approve deducts).                                                                                        |
| 'Chọn SP từ Kho' button (#prPickFromKho)                | openPicker (modal.js:143)                                                         | Loads so-order received items, groups by aggId, picker with per-row qty inputs + checkboxes; confirmPicker() appends pipe-lines to textarea and recomputes totalQty/totalAmount from FULL textarea.                                                                                                                                     |
| Detail action buttons [data-action]                     | render.js:177 → PR.actions.handleAction (actions.js:20)                           | DEAD on this page (generated inside if(false)); handleAction implements approve/cancel-approve/refunded/reject via SM_API with Popup.confirm/prompt — reachable only if a [data-action] element is injected.                                                                                                                            |

**Liên kết:** render route POST/GET /api/web2/purchase-refund/_ (web2-generic.js — list/create/update, requireWeb2AuthSoft), render route POST /api/purchase-refund/{quick-refund,:code/approve,:code/cancel-approve,:code/refunded,:code/reject} (purchase-refund.js — NO auth middleware), render route /api/web2-supplier-wallet/_ (ledger; ensureLedgerTables reused by purchase-refund), Web2ProductsCache (shared) → /api/web2-products list, Web2SuppliersCache (shared) → /api/web2-supplier-wallet/suppliers, Web2SoOrder reader (shared) → /api/web2-so-order/get (Postgres fallback for source items), SupplierWalletStorage (supplier-wallet/js) — imported, used only by dead updateSupplierWallet(), Web2IdbStore (so_order_storage/soOrder_v1), Web2SoOrderUtils.orderGroupKey, Web2HistoryTimeline, Web2UserInfo, Web2Auth, Web2Sidebar, Popup, Web2Escape, Navigates to ../../so-order/index.html (empty-state link + detail sourcePurchaseCode link)

**SSE:** Subscribes web2:purchase-refund (app.js:20) with 600ms debounce → loadList() ONLY (Section B). Section A (the stock-bearing refund UI) is NOT refreshed by any SSE.; Server publishes web2:purchase-refund via \_notify('approve'|'cancel-approve'|'reject'|'refunded', code) after COMMIT (purchase-refund.js:37).; Server publishes web2:supplier-wallet (action:tx) after quick-refund/cancel/reject COMMIT so wallet pages refresh — this page does NOT subscribe it.; quick-refund deliberately does NOT publish web2:products (comment actions.js:267); client compensates only in the SAME tab via Web2ProductsCache.refresh(); other tabs/users keep stale Section A stock.; STATE.sseUnsub stored but never invoked (no unmount cleanup — acceptable for full page; the unsubscribe is dead). Debounce timer setupSSE.\_t is fine.

**console.log:** 8 — purchase-refund-api.js:142 console.log('[picker] so-order loaded from '+source) — debug noise, harmless; purchase-refund-state.js:98 console.log('['+type+'] '+msg) — fallback when notificationManager missing; could echo any notify message (low risk, no PII/tokens); purchase-refund-actions.js:273 & 469 console.error('[quick/bulk refund] fail', e) — error objects only, no customer PII/tokens

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `race` Cross-tab/cross-user OVER-REFUND window. Section A stock comes from Web2ProductsCache and is only refreshed in the SAME tab after a refund. It is NOT re-rendered by any SSE (page does not subscribe web2:products, and web2:purchase-refund only reloads Section B). If user B refunds an item, user A's S — `purchase-refund-app.js:18-25 (SSE only loadList); purchase-refund.js:128-152 (de` → Subscribe web2:products (and/or web2:purchase-refund) to also debounce-call loadSourceItems(); AND add a server-side received-qty/stock cap in quick-refund (reject when deduction would exceed received
- 🟡 `data-loss` Silent stale-stock after a refund: submitQuickRefund/submitBulkRefund do Web2ProductsCache.refresh().catch(()=>{}). If refresh HTTP fails, the error is swallowed and loadSourceItems() then reads the OLD cache (init() is idempotent and won't re-fetch), so Section A shows pre-refund stock; a quick sec — `purchase-refund-actions.js:269,465` → Do not swallow refresh errors; on failure warn and/or await a successful refresh before re-render.
- 🟡 `race` Bulk group index drift. openBulkRefund(groupIdx) and the 'Trả hàng' button address SOURCE_STATE.groups[idx] BY INDEX, but groups is rebuilt on every renderSourceList() (filter/search/supplier change/reload). If a re-render reorders/removes groups between render and the click handler reading the inde — `purchase-refund-render.js:254 (groups rebuilt); actions.js:303-309 (index lookup` → Address groups by a stable aggId/group key (data-group-key) and resolve the group object at click time by key, not array index.
- 🟡 `logic` Refund amount uses CURRENT Kho price, not price paid to NCC. price = matched.price || r.price (api.js:184) is the current product price; the NCC wallet credit (totalAmount) is based on it, so it can over/under-credit the supplier vs what was actually paid in that shipment. — `purchase-refund-api.js:184; actions.js:207,211` → Prefer the so-order shipment row price (r.price) as source of truth for refund amount, or surface both and confirm.
- ⚪ `logic` refundCode collision drops a real refund. Code = TRA-<ymd>-<NCCshort>-<rand4> with rand4 = base36 random sliced to 4 chars (can be shorter). On collision the server INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING returns success as 'idempotent' WITHOUT deducting stock or writing wallet → a genuine second refund is si — `purchase-refund-actions.js:229-230,430-431; purchase-refund.js:400-417` → Use a guaranteed-unique suffix (crypto.randomUUID slice or timestamp+rand) so accidental idempotent collisions are negligible.
- ⚪ `other` Dead code: PR.api.updateSupplierWallet (api.js:207) and the 3-step wallet flow are no longer used (quick-refund is atomic server-side). It still references SupplierWalletStorage/addTransaction and supplier-wallet-storage.js is loaded only for this dead path — risk that someone re-wires it and double — `purchase-refund-api.js:202-245; index.html:412` → Remove updateSupplierWallet and the supplier-wallet-storage.js include, or mark clearly deprecated to prevent re-wire/double-credit.
- ⚪ `race` handleAction state-machine (actions.js:20) calls Popup.confirm/prompt + SM_API mutations with NO submit re-entry guard. Currently dead (detail buttons inside if(false)), but if re-enabled, rapid double-clicks could fire approve/reject twice (server status checks + FOR UPDATE limit damage, but cancel — `purchase-refund-actions.js:20-132; render.js:101-106 (if(false))` → If re-enabling the detail action buttons, add the disable-before-await guard used in submitQuickRefund.
- ℹ️ `other` Popup/Web2Escape auto-injected by sidebar AFTER page scripts. handleAction uses Popup; brief window where Popup may be undefined if a detail action button were clickable on load (currently dead). thumbHtml relies on escapeHtml fallback if Web2Escape not yet loaded — fallback exists, OK. — `web2-sidebar.js:72,91; actions.js:29` → No action needed while detail buttons are disabled; if enabled, null-check window.Popup.

**Security (audit):**

- 🔴 Money state-machine endpoints are UNAUTHENTICATED on the server. /api/purchase-refund/\* (server.js:786) has NO requireWeb2Auth/requireWeb2AuthSoft (purchase-refund.js has zero auth). POST /quick-refund creates an approved refund, DEDUCTS web2_products.stock, and WRITES a supplier-wallet ledger 'retu — `render.com/routes/purchase-refund.js (whole file); server.js:786` → Add requireWeb2AuthSoft to the router (or per money route) and gate under WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE like /api/web2-supplier-wallet/tx. At minimum require auth on /quick-refund, /approve, /reject, /cancel-appr
- 🟠 Server trusts client-supplied totalAmount verbatim for the NCC wallet credit. quick-refund writes ledger amount = Number(b.totalAmount) (line 344→437) and never recomputes from sum(products.qty*price). A crafted/buggy client can credit the supplier wallet any amount, decoupled from stock actually de — `render.com/routes/purchase-refund.js:344,437-454` → Recompute amount server-side from products (Σ qty*price); reject if |b.totalAmount-computed|>epsilon, or use the computed value for the ledger.
- 🟡 Server-side over-refund cap (HIGH-4: newQty>ordered) is DEAD for this page. The cap only runs when the request includes rowReturns[rid].ordered, but submitQuickRefund/submitBulkRefund NEVER send rowReturns. So returned_row_ids is never populated and the per-row 'trả vượt số đã mua' guard never fires — `render.com/routes/purchase-refund.js:456-482 (skipped, rowReturns null); actions` → Send rowReturns:{aggId:{qty,amount,ordered}} so the server cap engages, or add a server cap from web2_products received qty / stock before deduction.
- ⚪ Image URLs inserted via safeImageUrl permit http:// and data:image/ (state.js:123). Product/supplier strings are escaped via escapeHtml, so no raw HTML injection of customer/supplier names was found. — `purchase-refund-state.js:123-136` → Optionally restrict image src to https:// and the known CDN origin.
- ℹ️ No PII in SSE payloads (only {action,code,ts} and {action,supplier,ts}); supplier is a business name, not customer PII. — `purchase-refund.js:37-48,217-226` → No change.

**Ghi chú:** Group/dedupe key for Section A & picker is aggId = `${supplier}::${shipmentId}::${productCode}` (api.js:169); order group header key is supplier::shipmentId (state.js:163-166) — matches the FOCUS spec.; Money path is now fully server-atomic (quick-refund single transaction: insert record + deductStock + ledger insert + returned_row_ids merge), closing the old draft-orphan/double-write issues. Remaining money risks: (a) no server auth, (b) client-trusted totalAmount, (c) over-refund cap bypassed because rowReturns is never sent, (d) cross-tab stale stock.; deductStock intentionally ALLOWS negative stock (purchase-refund.js:125-128 comment) — so stock alone is NOT a hard server cap against over-refund.; saveRefundData correctly uses BIGINT epoch for updated_at (not NOW()) — prior timezone/type bug is fixed. No GMT+7 display bug observed (fmtDate/fmtDateTime use toLocale\*('vi-VN') on stored epoch/ISO).; Pool usage correct Web 2.0: req.app.locals.web2Db (|| chatDb dead-safe fallback). No Web 1.0 table/pool/TPOS coupling found.; web2-optimistic.js is loaded but this page does NOT use Web2Optimistic.run for money ops — consistent with the CLAUDE.md exception that money ops keep await+loading state.

### page:reconcile

Web 2.0 "Đối soát đóng gói" (PBH packing reconciliation) page. A scanner-driven fulfillment workflow over fast_sale_orders (PBH): scan or hand-tick each product line to verify pick, then drive a state machine pending→picking→picked→packed→shipped→delivered (+ returned/cancel). Front-end is a MOVE-only split into 5 IIFE modules sharing an internal window.RC namespace (state, api, render, actions, app orchestrator). It talks ONLY to Web 2.0 backend route /api/reconcile/\* (render reconcile.js, pool web2Db, tables fast_sale_orders + pbh_fulfillment_logs, SSE topic web2:reconcile). No TPOS API and no Web 1.0 table/pool coupling. Stock was already decremented at PBH creation so this page only verifies picks and restocks web2_products on return-failed. NOTE: the FOCUS mention of "SePay match" does NOT apply — there is no SePay/payment-matching logic anywhere in this unit.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** CSS: Google Fonts Inter (preconnect+stylesheet), ../shared/web2-sidebar.css, ../shared/web2-components.css, css/reconcile.css, ../../web2/shared/web2-theme.css (index.html:10-23); Scripts head: lucide UMD (defer), ../../shared/js/notification-system.js (index.html:21-22); Scripts body ordered: web2-auth.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-optimistic.js (loaded but UNUSED here), web2-sidebar.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-barcode-scanner.js, web2-label-ocr.js (index.html:221-228); DOMContentLoaded inline: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside') which itself ASYNC-injects popup.js, command-palette, lottie, pwa, notification-system, foundation utils (web2-sidebar.js:55-90) (index.html:229-235); App scripts: reconcile-state.js, reconcile-api.js, reconcile-render.js, reconcile-actions.js, reconcile-app.js (index.html:236-240); init() reconcile-app.js:159: merge RC_HISTORY_LABELS into Web2HistoryTimeline.ACTION_LABEL; bindUi(); RC.bindAuditUi(); await loadList(); RC.setupSse(); focusScanner(); lucide.createIcons(); loadList() reconcile-api.js:16: GET /api/reconcile/list?state=active -> STATE.items -> renderList() (runs on enter); setupSse() reconcile-api.js:111: subscribe web2:reconcile + web2:fast-sale-orders; Global capture-phase keydown listener installed in bindUi (reconcile-app.js:128-156) routing barcode-gun keystrokes into scanner input

| Control                                                                                              | Handler                                                               | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Scanner input Enter (reconcile-app.js:50-58) + global keydown router (reconcile-app.js:142-153)      | onScannerSubmit (reconcile-actions.js:227)                            | If value matches PBH_NUMBER_RE (NJ-/HD-) -> selectPbh(value). Else if a PBH is selected -> POST /:number/scan {productCode,userId,userName} -> +1 picked_qty server-side (FOR UPDATE tx), STATE.currentPbh=res.pbh, renderDetail(), loadHistory(); when totals.isComplete server auto-sets state=packed and feedback shown + loadList(). No PBH selected -> error feedback. |
| Camera scan button #rcCameraBtn (reconcile-app.js:81-96)                                             | Web2BarcodeScanner.open({continuous,onScan}) -> onScannerSubmit(code) | On-device barcode/QR camera; each decoded code routed through the same onScannerSubmit path (bill opens PBH, product code +1).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| OCR button #rcOcrBtn (reconcile-app.js:101-122)                                                      | Web2LabelOcr.open({onResult})                                         | OCR text written into scanner input + focus (NOT auto-submitted) so user verifies then presses Enter.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Manual tick checkbox per line (reconcile-render.js:162-168)                                          | toggleManualPick (reconcile-actions.js:53)                            | await Popup.confirm; on confirm POST /:number/manual-pick {productCode,pickedQty,note}; on cancel renderDetail() reverts. Sets line to need (checked) or 0; logs 'manual-pick' with camera-audit note.                                                                                                                                                                      |
| PBH list item click (reconcile-render.js:59-64)                                                      | selectPbh (reconcile-actions.js:23)                                   | STATE.selectedNumber=number, reset history, renderList(), GET /:number, race-guard drops result if selection changed, STATE.currentPbh=res.pbh, renderDetail(), scroll+focus.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| State tabs #rcStateTabs (reconcile-app.js:36-46)                                                     | inline click handler                                                  | STATE.filterState=tab -> loadList() refetch filtered.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Search input #rcSearch (reconcile-app.js:26-34)                                                      | debounced 250ms loadList                                              | STATE.search set -> loadList() refetch with ?search=.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Reset pick #rcBtnReset                                                                               | resetPick (reconcile-actions.js:96)                                   | Popup.danger confirm -> POST /:number/reset-pick (FOR UPDATE) -> pending; renderDetail+loadHistory.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Pack #rcBtnPack                                                                                      | packOrder (reconcile-actions.js:113)                                  | POST /:number/pack (tx, verifies all lines picked, blocks if missing) -> packed; loadList().                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Cancel pack #rcBtnCancelPack                                                                         | cancelPack (reconcile-actions.js:132)                                 | Popup.danger -> POST /:number/cancel-pack -> recompute state from picked_lines; loadList().                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Ship #rcBtnShip                                                                                      | shipOrder (reconcile-actions.js:156)                                  | POST /:number/ship (must be packed, blocks cancelled PBH) -> shipped.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Deliver #rcBtnDeliver                                                                                | deliverOrder (reconcile-actions.js:170)                               | Popup.confirm -> POST /:number/deliver (must be shipped) -> delivered.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |

| History toggle #rcHistToggle (reconcile-render.js:148-159)                                           | inline                                                                | Toggles STATE.historyOpen; first open lazily loads GET /:number/logs via loadHistory().                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

Rows PBH-clickable -> closeAuditModal()+selectPbh().                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| GET /api/reconcile/list (backend)                                                                    | reconcile.js:260                                                      | Lists PBH where state in draft/confirmed/done filtered by fulfillment_state; parameterized search; LIMIT interpolated from clamped int.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| POST /:number/scan (backend)                                                                         | reconcile.js:458                                                      | FOR UPDATE row lock in tx, findLineByCode, +1 with maxQty cap, autoPack when complete; logAction+\_notify AFTER commit.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| POST mutation endpoints manual-pick/reset-pick/pack/cancel-pack/ship/deliver/return-failed (backend) | reconcile.js:540/591/646/740/809/870/934                              | All use FOR UPDATE locks (applyPick or withTransaction) + state whitelists; broadcast web2:reconcile + web2:fast-sale-orders after mutation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

**Liên kết:** Backend render route /api/reconcile/\* (render.com/routes/reconcile.js) via worker isWeb2Path -> web2-api origin, Shares table fast_sale_orders + restockOrderLines() imported from render.com/routes/fast-sale-orders.js (DRY restock), Restocks web2_products.stock on return-failed, web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js (sidebar + auto-injects popup.js/lottie/command-palette/pwa/notification), web2/shared/web2-auth.js (sets window.API_CONFIG.WORKER_URL base), web2/shared/web2-user-info.js (attachToBody userId/userName), web2/shared/web2-history-timeline.js (render audit timeline), web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE singleton), web2/shared/web2-barcode-scanner.js + web2-label-ocr.js (camera scan/OCR), web2/shared/popup.js (Popup.confirm/danger/prompt — used but only loaded via sidebar auto-inject), SSE cross-topic web2:fast-sale-orders couples this page to the PBH/native-orders surface

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:reconcile (reconcile-api.js:114): on event debounce 500ms \_scheduleSseList()->loadList; if event.number===STATE.selectedNumber also debounce 500ms \_scheduleSseDetail()->GET /:number+renderDetail+loadHistory; SUBSCRIBE web2:fast-sale-orders (reconcile-api.js:125): debounce 500ms loadList only; PUBLISH (backend reconcile.js:35 \_notify): every mutation broadcasts web2:reconcile {action,number,ts} AND cross-broadcasts web2:fast-sale-orders {action:reconcile:<a>,number,ts} via web2RealtimeSseRoutes.notifyClients (correct web2 hub); NO unsubscribe: Web2SSE.subscribe never torn down (single-page, acceptable); debounce timers \_sseListTimer/\_sseDetailTimer module-scoped, never cleared on teardown (minor)

**console.log:** 11 — Client JS: 0 console._ calls (clean); Backend reconcile.js: 11 console._ (warn/error) — all log only e.message / action / counts; no PII, tokens, phone, or customer name leaked. e.g. reconcile.js:303 list error, :528 scan error, :47 \_notify warn

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `race` Scan double-+1 race within the SAME selected PBH. Server scan handler is atomic (FOR UPDATE) and caps at maxQty so DB integrity is safe, BUT the client allows concurrent in-flight scans: onScannerSubmit is async and not serialized — a fast gun or held key fires two POST /:number/scan before the firs — `web2/reconcile/js/reconcile-actions.js:227-274` → Add a client in-flight sequence token (ignore responses whose seq < latest) or a boolean lock that queues scans, mirroring the selectPbh race-guard at actions.js:35.
- 🟡 `race` selectPbh race-guard is incomplete vs SSE detail refresh. selectPbh drops a stale GET if STATE.selectedNumber changed (actions.js:35), but \_scheduleSseDetail (api.js:99) fires a delayed GET /:number whose .then() unconditionally does STATE.currentPbh=res.pbh + renderDetail() with NO check that STATE — `web2/reconcile/js/reconcile-api.js:99-110` → In \_scheduleSseDetail .then guard `if (STATE.selectedNumber !== number) return;` before assigning currentPbh/renderDetail (same pattern as selectPbh:35).
- 🟡 `race` Optimistic-vs-SSE clobber. After a local mutation the handler sets STATE.currentPbh from the response AND \_notify broadcasts web2:reconcile; the same browser receives its own SSE event and 500ms later \_scheduleSseDetail refetches and re-renders. Usually converges, but combined with the missing numbe — `web2/reconcile/js/reconcile-api.js:95-123; reconcile-actions.js scan/manual-pick` → Suppress self-originated SSE (echo/client id) or at least add the selectedNumber guard; the \_scheduleSseList debounce already dedupes list reloads.
- 🟡 `race` manual-pick confirm-then-server gap: toggleManualPick awaits Popup.confirm then POSTs with no checkbox disable/lock, so a double-click can stack two confirm dialogs + two POSTs. Last write wins on server (qty capped), but displayed state can flip-flop. — `web2/reconcile/js/reconcile-actions.js:53-94` → Disable the checkbox / show busy during the await and ignore change events while a manual-pick request is in flight.
- 🟡 `bug` Popup global timing race. Popup.confirm/danger/prompt are used in reconcile-actions.js but popup.js is NOT a script tag in index.html — it is async-injected by web2-sidebar.js autoLoad (sidebar.js:72) inside DOMContentLoaded. If a user triggers a Popup-requiring mutation before popup.js finishes loa — `web2/reconcile/index.html (no popup.js tag); web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js:72; rec` → Add an explicit <script src="../shared/popup.js"> to index.html (do not rely on async sidebar injection), or guard each call with `if(!window.Popup){notify(...);return;}`.
- ⚪ `bug` GMT+7 not pinned. fmtTs (state.js:84), fmtDateInvoice (state.js:93), fmtTsFull/tsToInput (actions.js:285-300) use new Date(...).toLocaleString('vi-VN') / get\* WITHOUT timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' — they render in the BROWSER timezone. Correct for VN (+7) users but violates the project rule that all W — `web2/reconcile/js/reconcile-state.js:84-103; reconcile-actions.js:285-300` → Use Intl.DateTimeFormat with { timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' } (or SharedUtils.formatTime) for display and keep a consistent +7 conversion for the datetime-local round-trip.
- ⚪ `logic` logAction runs AFTER COMMIT and outside the transaction for scan/manual-pick (and after withTransaction for the others). If the process or DB hiccups between COMMIT and the INSERT into pbh_fulfillment_logs the mutation succeeds but the audit row is missing — gaps in the camera-reconciliation audit t — `render.com/routes/reconcile.js:511-521, 564-574, 122-142` → For audit-critical actions (manual-pick especially) write the log row inside the same transaction as the mutation.
- ⚪ `logic` selectPbh never throws on fetch error (it catches + notifies), yet onScannerSubmit does `await selectPbh(value)` inside a try/catch expecting a throw to drive its error feedback branch (actions.js:233-239). So a failed bill-scan still reports success feedback. Audit-modal handler also calls selectPb — `web2/reconcile/js/reconcile-actions.js:23-46,233-239,408-414` → Make selectPbh reject on failure (re-throw) if onScannerSubmit relies on it, or remove the misleading try/catch around it.
- ⚪ `race` Concurrent ensureTables on first request. ensureTables is gated by a WeakSet but called at the top of every endpoint; under the first burst of concurrent requests multiple CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS can run before the pool is added to the set. Idempotent so harmless, but an avoidable redundant DDL r — `render.com/routes/reconcile.js:54-79` → Run ensureTables once at boot (initialize) rather than per-request, or memoize the in-flight promise.
- ℹ️ `tpos-coupling` FOCUS asked to flag SePay match and TPOS coupling. There is NO SePay matching code in this unit and NO TPOS API coupling (pool is web2Db, worker routes to web2-api, no tomato.tpos.vn). Reporting the absence so it is not mistaken for missing analysis. — `web2/reconcile/* and render.com/routes/reconcile.js` → None — confirms scope is clean of TPOS/SePay coupling.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 NO authentication on any /api/reconcile endpoint. Route mounted at server.js:760 with NO requireWeb2Auth/requireWeb2AuthSoft middleware unlike other web2 routes, so WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE does NOT cover it. Every destructive mutation (cancel via return-failed, restock web2_products, ship/deliver/reset) i — `render.com/server.js:760; render.com/routes/reconcile.js (no auth middleware); w` → Mount reconcile with requireWeb2Auth (or at least requireWeb2AuthSoft) and have RC.api attach Web2Auth.authHeaders()/x-web2-token. Derive userId/userName server-side from the verified token instead of
- ⚪ return-failed is a destructive cancel+restock endpoint with no admin secret and no auth. It mutates accounting (state=cancel) and inventory. Idempotency via stock_restored is good but lack of auth means anyone can cancel a shipped PBH. — `render.com/routes/reconcile.js:934-1015` → Gate behind auth; consider elevated role for cancel/restock.
- ⚪ Audit-log user identity taken from client-supplied body/headers (req.body.userId, x-user-id, x-user-name) -> forgeable, undermining the manual-pick camera-accountability the feature exists for. — `render.com/routes/reconcile.js:115-120` → Populate user from authenticated token (req.web2User) once auth is added.
- ℹ️ All SQL parameterized; LIMIT interpolated but from clamped parseInt (reconcile.js:267,323,353) so not injectable. innerHTML rendering of customer name/phone/address/productName escaped via RC.escapeHtml/Web2Escape; imageUrl attribute-escaped. No XSS or SQLi found. — `render.com/routes/reconcile.js; web2/reconcile/js/reconcile-render.js` → No action; keep escaping all customer-derived fields.
- ℹ️ Worker proxy correctly routes /api/reconcile to web2-api origin (isWeb2Path proxy-handler.js:34); not falling through to TPOS catch-all. No TPOS/Web1 coupling. — `cloudflare-worker/modules/handlers/proxy-handler.js:34, routes.js:107/241` → None.

**Ghi chú:** Frontend modules are an explicit MOVE-only split of an original reconcile-app.js; logic preserved byte-for-byte (per file headers).; web2-optimistic.js is loaded (index.html:224) but Web2Optimistic is never used here; money/order surface intentionally keeps await+confirm+rollback manually (reconcile-actions.js:5 header).; Backend state-machine endpoints were hardened 2026-06-12 (1D-reconcile-no-lock fix): pack/cancel-pack/ship/deliver/return-failed now use withTransaction+FOR UPDATE+state whitelist — locks look correct and close the prior backend races. Remaining races I flag are CLIENT-side (out-of-order scans, SSE detail clobber) plus the AUTH gap.; return-failed restock is atomic and idempotent via stock_restored flag + restockOrderLines(client) sharing the tx — good.; mapPbh normalizes product codes (normCode upper/trim) consistently on read and write, fixing the earlier picked-saved-under-wrong-key class of bug.; Route name /api/reconcile is neutral (no web2- prefix) but correctly classified Web 2.0 by the worker and uses web2Db.

### page:reports

Two Web 2.0 read-only analytics dashboards. report-revenue/index.html renders PBH (fast_sale_orders) revenue KPIs, a daily revenue bar chart, state breakdown, top customers, by-campaign, and a unified Customer-360 table (native_orders + fast_sale_orders) with a per-customer drill-down modal. report-delivery/index.html renders delivery stats (order/amount/COD/shipped/cancel) grouped by carrier_name over a from/to date range. Both fetch from /api/pbh-reports/\* on the chatomni-proxy worker, send a soft x-web2-token header, and use web2Db (pool web2Db||chatDb) server-side. report-revenue also subscribes to SSE topics web2:fast-sale-orders + web2:native-orders to auto-reload. Data is read-only (no mutations); chief risks are an internally-broken drill-down modal (response-shape mismatch), GMT+7 inconsistencies in a few aggregate filters and the delivery 'today' calc, and an entirely-unauthenticated customer-orders PII endpoint.</summary> <parameter name="loadsOnEnter">["report-revenue: <link> Google Fonts Inter (preconnect googleapis/gstatic + css2)", "report-revenue: <link> ../../web2/shared/web2-sidebar.css?v=20260613z", "report-revenue: <link> ../shared/web2-components.css?v=20260613z", "report-revenue: <link> ../shared/web2-theme.css?v=20260613ns1", "report-revenue: <script defer> unpkg lucide@0.294.0 UMD (3rd-party CDN, no SRI)", "report-revenue: <script> web2-sse-bridge.js?v=20260613h, web2-auth.js?v=20260613guard, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js?v=20260620a", "report-revenue: DOMContentLoaded -> Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside'), lucide.createIcons(), wire range buttons, loadAll() (5 parallel fetches: summary/revenue/top-customers/by-campaign/top-customers-360), subscribe Web2SSE web2:fast-sale-orders + web2:native-orders", "report-delivery: <link> web2-sidebar.css?v=20260613z, web2-theme.css?v=20260613ns1", "report-delivery: <script defer> unpkg lucide@0.294.0 (CDN, no SRI)", "report-delivery: <script> ../../shared/js/notification-system.js?v=20260521b (Web 1.0 SHARED notification system loaded into a Web 2.0 page)", "report-delivery: <script> web2-auth.js?v=20260613guard, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js?v=20260620a, web2-sse-bridge.js?v=20260614ux2 (loaded but NEVER used — no subscribe)", "report-delivery: init() -> set rdFrom/rdTo to todayLocal(), wire reload/today/Enter handlers, Web2Sidebar.mount, loadStats() for today"]

| backend GET /api/pbh-reports/top-customers?days&limit                                         | render.com/routes/pbh-reports.js:233                                     | groups fast_sale_orders by partner_phone/partner_name, top by revenue                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| backend GET /api/pbh-reports/by-campaign?days                                                 | render.com/routes/pbh-reports.js:274                                     | groups fast_sale_orders by live_campaign_id/name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| backend GET /api/pbh-reports/top-customers-360?days&limit                                     | render.com/routes/pbh-reports.js:316                                     | FULL OUTER JOIN native_orders+fast_sale_orders on customer_id, LEFT JOIN web2_customers, returns combined totals + unlinked counts                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| backend GET /api/web2/customer-orders/:phoneOrId                                              | render.com/routes/v2/web2-customer-orders.js:42                          | NO auth middleware; resolves numeric id<10 digits to phone, aggregates native/pbh/refund orders, returns customer PII + orders + summary                                                                                                                                                                                                        |

**Liên kết:** worker: https://chatomni-proxy.nhijudyshop.workers.dev (hardcoded WORKER const, not WEB2_CONFIG), render route: /api/pbh-reports/summary|revenue|delivery|top-customers|by-campaign|top-customers-360 (render.com/routes/pbh-reports.js), render route: /api/web2/customer-orders/:phoneOrId (render.com/routes/v2/web2-customer-orders.js), shared: web2/shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders / WEB2_CONFIG), shared: web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE), shared: web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js (Web2Sidebar.mount), shared: web2/shared/web2-optimistic.js (loaded but unused on both), shared: web2/shared/web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-components.css, web2-theme.css, web2-sidebar.css, Web 1.0 cross-load: shared/js/notification-system.js (report-delivery), db tables read: fast_sale_orders, native_orders, delivery_invoices, refunds, web2_customers (web2Db)

**SSE:** report-revenue SUBSCRIBES web2:fast-sale-orders and web2:native-orders (web2/report-revenue/index.html:712-713); shared 600ms debounce timer \_sseTimer -> loadAll(); loadAll version-guarded by \_loadSeq/\_loadAbort so concurrent SSE reload + button reload are safe. NO explicit unsubscribe/cleanup (acceptable for a full-page dashboard; subscription lives for page lifetime).; report-delivery LOADS web2-sse-bridge.js (web2/report-delivery/index.html:227) but NEVER calls Web2SSE.subscribe — dead include; delivery stats do not auto-refresh (stale until manual Áp dụng). Either wire web2:fast-sale-orders or drop the script.
