**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** CSS: Google Fonts Inter (preconnect+stylesheet); ../shared/web2-sidebar.css; ../shared/web2-components.css; css/styles.css; ../../web2/shared/web2-theme.css; JS (head): lucide UMD (defer); ../../shared/js/notification-system.js; ../../shared/js/core-loader.js; JS (body end, ordered): web2-deeplink.js, web2-auth.js (sets window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG, base-URL source-of-truth), web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js, web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE), web2-so-order-reader.js (Web2SoOrder), web2-suppliers-cache.js (Web2SuppliersCache), then 6 page modules state/api/render/actions/filters/app; init() (app.js:165): wireUi() attaches ~20 listeners; updateSortIcons(); setDefaultDateRange() (defaults to current calendar month in BROWSER-local TZ); readFilters(); renders 5-row skeleton; await SD.loadAll() → loadWeb2() → Promise.all([loadSoOrder(), loadServerState()]); applyFilterAndRender(); lucide.createIcons(); loadSoOrder(): Web2SoOrder.load() → fetch /api/web2-so-order/get with x-web2-token (so-order purchases source); loadServerState(): SD.api('/state') → GET /api/web2-supplier-wallet/state (wallets ledger + suppliers meta), dual-base worker→Render fallback; Deep-link: Web2Deeplink.param('supplier') → set search filter, NFC-normalize match, expand+scrollIntoView+flash target row, else info toast; \_sseConnect(): subscribes 4 SSE topics (web2:supplier-wallet, web2:wallet:\*, web2:products, web2:fast-sale-orders), debounce 1500ms shared timer → loadAll()+render; Sidebar mounted via Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside') inline script

| Control                                                 | Handler                          | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| #sdSearchBtn (Áp dụng button)                           | app.js:23 inline async           | readFilters() → STATE.page=1 → await loadAll() (refetch so-order+ledger) → applyFilterAndRender()                                                                                                                                          |
| #sdSearch (search input, type=search)                   | app.js:56 input listener         | STATE.filters.search=value, page=1, applyFilterAndRender() (client-side filter only, no refetch — substring match on r.supplier.toLowerCase)                                                                                               |
| #sdResetBtn                                             | app.js:37 inline async           | resets date inputs to currentMonthRange(), clears search, sets display radio to 'all', readFilters(), page=1, await loadAll(), render                                                                                                      |
| #sdDateFrom / #sdDateTo (change)                        | \_onDateChange app.js:62         | readFilters(), page=1, await loadAll(), render — fires per date field; rapid edits can stack concurrent loadAll (no in-flight guard)                                                                                                       |
| input[name=sdDisplay] radios (all \| endnonzero)        | app.js:71                        | STATE.filters.display=value, page=1, applyFilterAndRender() → endnonzero filters rows with Math.abs(ending)>0.5                                                                                                                            |
| th.sortable headers (code/opening/debit/credit/ending)  | app.js:78                        | toggle sortField/sortDir (default desc on new field), updateSortIcons(), applyFilterAndRender()                                                                                                                                            |

| #sdExportBtn                                            | SD.exportCsv (render.js:453)     | builds CSV from STATE.rows (CSV-injection-escaped via csvEscape), Blob download cong-no-ncc*<from>*<to>.csv                                                                                                                                |
| #sdCreateNccBtn                                         | app.js:114                       | clears+opens Create NCC modal, \_populateNccNameDatalist() (Web2SuppliersCache.init→getNames→datalist options), focus code input                                                                                                           |

| 💳 per-row pay button [data-action-pay]                 | SD.openPayModal (actions.js:48)  | opens payment modal, prefills summary (Tổng mua/Đã thanh toán/Còn nợ), sets dataset.txid idempotency key per open                                                                                                                          |
| #sdPayConfirmBtn (Lưu thanh toán) — MONEY OP            | SD.confirmPay (actions.js:76)    | guard btn.disabled, validate amount>0, disable btn+loading, await SD.recordPayment(supplier,amount,date,note,txid) → POST /tx (type=payment, ts from date+T12:00:00+07:00, idempotent txId), apply local + re-render, re-enable in finally |

**Liên kết:** web2/shared/web2-so-order-reader.js (Web2SoOrder) → GET /api/web2-so-order/get (so-order purchases source), web2/shared/web2-suppliers-cache.js (Web2SuppliersCache) → datalist NCC name suggestions for Create modal, web2/shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders, base-URL config), web2/shared/web2-deeplink.js (?supplier= focus + linkBtn to supplier-wallet & so-order pages), web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE), web2/shared/web2-sidebar.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-optimistic.js (loaded but NOT actually used in handlers), Render route /api/web2-supplier-wallet (state/suppliers/tx/import/delete) — web2-supplier-wallet.js, Navigates to: supplier-wallet page (Ví NCC deep-link), so-order page (Sổ Order deep-link)

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:supplier-wallet (server ledger mutations) — debounce 1500ms shared timer → loadAll()+render; SUBSCRIBE web2:wallet:\* (wildcard, SePay deposit/refund) — same debounce; SUBSCRIBE web2:products (so-order data via products pending) — same debounce; SUBSCRIBE web2:fast-sale-orders (PBH refund affecting NCC) — same debounce; PUBLISH: none directly; mutations (POST /tx, /suppliers) trigger server-side \_notify('web2:supplier-wallet') in web2-supplier-wallet.js:32; CLEANUP GAP: \_sseUnsubs collected but never invoked — no beforeunload/visibilitychange handler unsubscribes. On a plain page nav the browser tears down EventSource, so low impact, but the shared \_sseReloadTimer is never cleared on unload and the unsub functions are dead storage. Guard `if(_sseUnsubs.length) return` prevents double-subscribe within one page life.

**console.log:** 5 — supplier-debt-app.js:242 console.log('[SupplierDebt-SSE] reload triggered by:', topic) — leftover debug noise on every SSE refresh (topic name only, no PII); supplier-debt-app.js:234 console.warn SSE-not-loaded (benign); supplier-debt-api.js:66,72,86 console.warn for loader/load failures — error messages only, no tokens/customer data leaked

**Bugs (audit):**

- ⚪ `logic` Dead source-toggle code: app.js references document.getElementById('sdSourceWeb2') and wires a change listener, and filters.js reads its .checked, but no #sdSourceWeb2 element exists in index.html. The listener never attaches and STATE.filters.sourceWeb2 is permanently true (via `?? true`). loadAll( — `supplier-debt-app.js:29-36; supplier-debt-filters.js:20; supplier-debt-api.js:52` → Remove the sdSourceWeb2 listener + filter read, or add the missing checkbox. Hardcode loadAll() to always call loadWeb2().
- 🟡 `race` loadAll() has no in-flight/abort guard. Date-from change + date-to change + Áp dụng + Refresh + an SSE debounced reload can all invoke loadAll() concurrently; each awaits two independent fetches (so-order + /state) and overwrites STATE.soOrderData/walletData/suppliersList. A slow earlier response ca — `supplier-debt-api.js:51-55; supplier-debt-app.js:62-69,23-28,51-55` → Add a monotonically increasing request token (or AbortController): capture seq at call start, and only assign STATE.\*/render if seq === latestSeq when the awaits resolve.
- 🟡 `logic` GMT+7 violation in default period + month range. currentMonthRange() and setDefaultDateRange() use new Date().getFullYear()/getMonth()/getDate() in the BROWSER's local timezone, not Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh (project rule 10). An operator on a non-+7 device (or a browser with a different TZ) gets the wrong d — `supplier-debt-filters.js:24-34,36-45` → Derive y/m/lastDay from an Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-CA',{timeZone:'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'}) of new Date() instead of getFullYear/getMonth, so the default range is computed in GMT+7.
- 🟡 `logic` Order-adjustment (discount/shipping) applied in full for partial_received orders, while the corresponding purchase debit is prorated to qtyReceived. In aggregate Pass 1, partial rows count only Math.min(qtyReceived,qty) into debit, but the per-order orderAdjustments net (-discount+shipping) is appli — `supplier-debt-api.js:262-309` → Either prorate the order adjustment by received fraction, or only book order adjustments when the order is fully received; clarify the intended accounting with the user (Web 2.0 beta).
- ⚪ `logic` resolveCodeForSupplier prefix match is greedy/ambiguous: it matches when supplierKey starts with '<code> '. A supplier whose name legitimately begins with letters equal to another supplier's short code (e.g. code 'A1' vs a name 'A1 PHONE' belonging to a different meta entry) can be assigned the wron — `supplier-debt-api.js:225-239` → Prefer exact-name match first, only fall back to code-prefix match for known legacy 'CODE name' rows, and require the remainder after the prefix to also match a known name.
- ⚪ `logic` buildCongNoEntries moveName comparison dead branch: congnoTableHtml checks e.moveName === 'PAYMENT' || 'RETURN' to add is-credit-move class, but moveName is always built as 'PAY/<year>/<id>' or 'RET/...' or server 'PAY/<year>/<seq>' — never the literal 'PAYMENT'/'RETURN'. The credit-move styling nev — `supplier-debt-render.js:374-375` → Use e.credit>0 (or type) to detect credit entries instead of comparing to literal 'PAYMENT'/'RETURN'.
- ⚪ `logic` Opening/period-boundary asymmetry between purchases and transactions. Purchases bucket via isBefore(sh.date,from) → \_purchasesBefore else isInPeriod else DROPPED (dates strictly after `to` are silently ignored, which is intended for a period report). Transactions bucket via vnDate(ts) with the `else — `supplier-debt-api.js:278-309,313-356,361-362` → Unify the bucketing: compute a single yyyy-mm-dd VN date for both purchases (sh.date) and tx (vnDate(ts)) and route both through the same before/in/after helper to guarantee opening+debit-credit recon
- ⚪ `memory-leak` SSE timer + unsub leak on long-lived page. \_sseReloadTimer is never cleared and \_sseUnsubs is never invoked; there is no beforeunload/pagehide cleanup. For a normal full-page navigation the browser reclaims this, but if the page is kept open and re-init were ever triggered (or embedded), the debounc — `supplier-debt-app.js:230-258` → Add window.addEventListener('pagehide', () => { if(\_sseReloadTimer) clearTimeout(\_sseReloadTimer); \_sseUnsubs.forEach(u=>u&&u()); \_sseUnsubs=[]; }).
- ⚪ `logic` recordPayment local optimistic apply dedupes by tx.id but increments paidAmount only — it never updates the wallet balance/derived fields and the local apply pushes a tx whose ts is server-or-client. On a concurrent SSE web2:supplier-wallet event firing within the 1500ms window, loadAll() will overw — `supplier-debt-api.js:198-217; supplier-debt-app.js:240-245` → Since the page already awaits the server response before applying, drop the manual local push and rely on the immediate applyFilterAndRender after a fresh /state, or reconcile by tx_id on reload.
- ℹ️ `logic` Enter-to-submit handler clicks the first .btn-primary in the open modal. The Create NCC and Payment modals have validation, but Enter also fires while focus is on a plain <input> (number/date/text) — acceptable, but combined with the per-modal txid only being regenerated on openPayModal, a rapid Ent — `supplier-debt-app.js:132-141; supplier-debt-actions.js:79,95-101` → None — double-submit is correctly guarded by btn.disabled + idempotent txId.

**Security (audit):**

- ℹ️ Write mutations (saveSupplier/saveSupplierNote/recordPayment) correctly attach x-web2-token via authHeaders() (Web2Auth.authHeaders) and server route /tx,/suppliers,/import use requireWeb2AuthSoft which 401s under WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1 (confirmed enabled in prod 2026-06-13). No silent-401 lost-mutatio — `supplier-debt-api.js:24-31,101,133,182` → None — gating is correct.
- ⚪ DELETE /api/web2-supplier-wallet/supplier/:name is gated HARD by x-admin-secret=CLEANUP_SECRET (fail-closed) and is not called from this page — good. No destructive endpoint exposed to page flow. — `web2-supplier-wallet.js:448-452` → None.
- ⚪ GET /state and GET /suppliers have NO auth middleware (no requireWeb2AuthSoft). Supplier names, notes, ledger amounts, performed_by are returned to any caller with no token. PII/financial exposure if worker proxy is reachable unauthenticated. — `web2-supplier-wallet.js:100,159` → Add requireWeb2AuthSoft to GET /state and GET /suppliers so reads are gated like writes under WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE.
- ⚪ performedBy is taken from client (window.Web2UserInfo.get().userName) and trusted server-side as the audit actor — spoofable. Not a hard vuln but the ledger 'performed_by' is client-asserted, not derived from req.web2User. — `supplier-debt-api.js:192; web2-supplier-wallet.js (tx insert)` → Prefer req.web2User identity server-side over client-supplied performedBy for audit fields.
- ℹ️ XSS: all user/customer-derived strings rendered into innerHTML go through escapeHtml (supplier names, notes, descriptions, move names). CSS-attr selector uses cssAttrEscape. Deep-link supplier value is set via .value / toast text, not innerHTML. — `supplier-debt-render.js:87,95,111-120,377-383; state.js:56-64` → None — escaping is consistent.
- ℹ️ CSV export guards against formula injection (prefixes leading =,+,-,@,tab,CR with single quote). — `state.js:115-122` → None.

**Ghi chú:** FOCUS RESULT: draft/cancelled order inclusion is NOT a bug — aggregate() Pass 1 explicitly `if (st !== 'received' && st !== 'partial_received') continue;` (api.js:261), and so-order status enum is {draft,partial_received,received,cancelled} with 'ordered' deprecated→normalized to draft. Debit only accrues on receipt. Sum correctness (opening = purchasesBefore - txBefore; ending = opening + debit - credit) is internally consistent; the running-balance ledger in congnoTableHtml recomputes from row.opening and should end at row.ending.; No TPOS coupling and no Web 1.0 pool/table/SSE coupling found — uses web2Db (server route getPool = web2Db||chatDb fallback) and web2: SSE topics only. Compliant.; web2-optimistic.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js are loaded in HTML but not used by handlers (Web2UserInfo.get is read in recordPayment performedBy). Per UI-FIRST rule, money ops intentionally keep await+loading-state rather than Web2Optimistic, which is the documented exception.; Dual-base api() retries the SAME write on the fallback host if the first throws; this is safe only because /tx and /suppliers are idempotent (tx_id UNIQUE, supplier upsert ON CONFLICT). If a future non-idempotent write is added to api(), the blind retry would double-apply.

### page:supplier-wallet

Ví NCC (Supplier Wallet) is a Web 2.0 page that tracks supplier accounts payable. Total purchased is DERIVED client-side from Sổ Order (so-order) data (only rows with status received/partial_received), while payments and returns are an append-only server LEDGER (POST /api/web2-supplier-wallet/tx) backed by web2Db tables web2_supplier_ledger + web2_supplier_meta, idempotent by tx_id. balance = totalPurchased − paidAmount − returnedAmount, recomputed locally. It refactored 2026-06-18 into 5 small modules (state/api/render/actions/app) sharing a window.\_\_SW namespace. The page renders supplier cards, a detail drawer (purchases / 30-day history tabs), and money modals (return, payment, create-NCC). SePay refunds from suppliers are polled and applied as payment transactions. Realtime via SSE topics web2:wallet:\*, web2:products, web2:so-order, web2:supplier-wallet.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** CSS: web2-sidebar.css, web2-components.css, supplier-wallet.css, web2-theme.css; Google Fonts Inter (preconnect+stylesheet); Scripts (head): lucide UMD (defer), shared/js/notification-system.js; Scripts (body, ordered): web2-auth.js (sets window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG + Web2Auth), web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js, web2-products/web2-products-api.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-idb-store.js, web2-products-cache.js, web2-suppliers-cache.js, web2-so-order-reader.js, supplier-wallet-storage.js, web2-deeplink.js, then state/api/render/actions/app modules; Inline: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside', {activeUrl}) at bottom; init() (app.js:92): await SupplierWalletStorage.load() (IDB/localStorage cache) -> cleanupOldTransactions (now no-op) -> wireUi() -> skeleton placeholder -> Web2ProductsCache.init() (fire-and-forget catch) -> await loadAndRender('init') (fetch so-order via Web2SoOrder.load, aggregate, merge, render, pollDeposits) -> deeplink ?supplier= auto-open -> await SupplierWalletStorage.Sync.init() (GET /state server ledger) -> reload from storage + re-merge so-order agg + renderList + pushSync -> lucide.createIcons() -> \_sseConnect(); wireUi() attaches input/change/click/keydown listeners on search, sort, create/return/pay buttons, detail tabs, return-body change/input, select-all, [data-sw-close], and global document keydown (Escape close / Enter submit)

| Control                                                      | Handler                                                      | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| ------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| #swSearch input (search NCC by name)                         | renderList (render.js:17, wired app.js:26)                   | Filters wallets by supplier.toLowerCase().includes(search), re-sorts, re-renders cards + counters. No debounce — re-renders full list on every keystroke (fine for small N).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| #swSort select                                               | renderList (render.js:17, wired app.js:27)                   | Re-sorts by balance-desc/asc, total-desc, or name-asc; re-renders.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| supplier card click (.sw-card[data-supplier])                | openDetail (render.js:82, wired render.js:53-55)             | Sets SW.activeSupplier, detailTab='purchases', fills stat values, injects cross-links (Công nợ / Sổ Order deeplinks), renders purchases tab, shows #swDetailModal.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| #swCreateBtn (Tạo NCC)                                       | openCreateModal (actions.js:164)                             | Clears name input, shows modal, focuses input after 80ms.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| #swCreateConfirmBtn / Enter in name                          | confirmCreate (actions.js:171)                               | Validates non-empty + case-insensitive dup check vs local state. getOrCreateWallet + save (local). await Web2SuppliersCache.ensure(name) -> POST server meta. On failure: toast error and RETURN (local wallet already created -> local/server divergence, see bugs). Closes modal, renderList.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| detail tab buttons (data-detail-tab)                         | inline (app.js:37-42) -> SW.renderDetailTabs (render.js:128) | Sets SW.detailTab, toggles active class + panel visibility, renders purchases or history.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| #swReturnBtn (Trả hàng)                                      | openReturnModal (actions.js:16)                              | Builds return rows from agg.purchases filtered to NOT fully-returned; per row remaining = ordered qty − cumulative returned qty; sets data-qty=remaining, max=remaining. Generates idempotency txid into modal.dataset.txid. Shows modal.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| return-body change/input (.sw-return-check / .sw-return-qty) | recalcReturnTotal (actions.js:58, wired app.js:49-59)        | For each row: qty=min(input, data-qty); line total = checked ? qty\*cost : 0; sums into #swReturnTotal.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| #swReturnSelectAll                                           | inline (app.js:60-65)                                        | Toggles all .sw-return-check then recalcReturnTotal.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| #swReturnConfirmBtn (Xác nhận trả)                           | confirmReturn (actions.js:75)                                | Guards btn.disabled (double-click). Collects checked rows (qty capped to data-qty, amount=qty\*cost, ordered). Best-effort stock adjust (await Web2ProductsApi.adjustStock with delta=-qty, non-blocking). await SupplierWalletStorage.addTransaction type=return with txId + rowReturns{qty,amount,ordered} + performedBy. On addTransaction throw: toast + RETURN inside try (skips success path, finally re-enables btn). On success: toast, hide modal, renderList, openDetail. Server caps over-refund (newQty>ordered -> 400). |
| #swPayBtn (Ghi thanh toán)                                   | openPayModal (actions.js:208)                                | Resets amount=0, note='', generates modal.dataset.txid, shows modal, autofocus+select amount after 30ms.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| #swPayConfirmBtn (Lưu thanh toán)                            | confirmPay (actions.js:224)                                  | Guards btn.disabled. amount=Number(input)\|\|0; reject <=0. await addTransaction type=payment with txId+performedBy. On throw: toast error (catch). finally re-enables btn. On success: toast, hide modal, renderList, openDetail. Server assigns moveName PAY/<year>/<seq>.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| document keydown Escape                                      | inline (app.js:72-77)                                        | Closes all open .sw-modal.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| document keydown Enter                                       | inline (app.js:78-89)                                        | If a pay/return modal is open and not IME/textarea, clicks its .btn-primary (submit).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| [data-sw-close] backdrop/close/Hủy                           | inline (app.js:67-71)                                        | Sets closest .sw-modal hidden.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| endpoint POST /api/web2-supplier-wallet/tx                   | router.post('/tx') web2-supplier-wallet.js:189               | requireWeb2AuthSoft. Validates supplier/type/amount>0. BEGIN; upsert meta + SELECT ... FOR UPDATE; payment without moveName -> nextval sequence PAY/<year>/<seq>; INSERT ledger ON CONFLICT(tx_id) DO NOTHING; if no row -> return alreadyProcessed; if return + rowReturns -> accumulate qty/amount per rowId, reject if cumulative qty>ordered (400), UPDATE meta returned_row_ids; COMMIT; \_notify('tx'). Idempotent.                                                                                                            |
| endpoint GET /api/web2-supplier-wallet/state                 | router.get('/state') :100                                    | ensureTables; reads meta+ledger; reconstructs wallets{} with paidAmount/returnedAmount summed from ledger, returnedRowIds from meta; totalPurchased=0 (client derives).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| endpoint POST /suppliers                                     | router.post('/suppliers') :325                               | requireWeb2AuthSoft. Atomic upsert meta code/note via ON CONFLICT; \_notify('supplier').                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| endpoint POST /import                                        | router.post('/import') :359                                  | requireWeb2AuthSoft. One-time guarded migration (only if ledger+meta empty).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| endpoint DELETE /supplier/:name                              | router.delete :448                                           | Hard admin gate x-admin-secret=CLEANUP_SECRET (fail-closed). Deletes ledger+meta rows; \_notify('supplier-deleted').                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |

**Liên kết:** so-order/index.html (empty-state link + deeplink Sổ Order via Web2Deeplink.url.soOrder), supplier-debt page (Web2Deeplink.url.supplierDebt cross-link), shared: web2-auth.js, web2-sidebar.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-idb-store.js, web2-products-cache.js, web2-suppliers-cache.js (Web2SuppliersCache.ensure), web2-so-order-reader.js (Web2SoOrder.load), web2-optimistic.js, web2-user-info.js, web2-deeplink.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-products/js/web2-products-api.js (adjustStock), render routes: POST/GET /api/web2-supplier-wallet/\* (tx,state,suppliers,import), GET /api/wallet-deposits/load (SePay deposits), worker base: chatomni-proxy.nhijudyshop.workers.dev with fallback web2-api-kv04.onrender.com

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:wallet:\* (app.js:197) — SePay refund; debounce 800ms via SW.\_ssePollTimer -> pollDeposits(); logs phone+amount; SUBSCRIBE web2:products (app.js:225) — debounce 1200ms via SW.\_sseReloadTimer -> loadAndRender; SUBSCRIBE web2:so-order (app.js:232) — SHARES same SW.\_sseReloadTimer (1200ms) as web2:products; SUBSCRIBE web2:supplier-wallet (app.js:238) — ALSO shares SW.\_sseReloadTimer (800ms here) -> Sync.init + load + loadAndRender + re-openDetail. NOTE: this 800ms branch and the 1200ms products/so-order branch clobber the SAME timer var -> see bugs (cross-topic debounce interference).; PUBLISH (server): \_notify('web2:supplier-wallet',{action,supplier,ts},'update') after each tx/supplier/import/delete mutation (web2-supplier-wallet.js:32); Cleanup: subscribe() returns unsubscribe fns stored in SW.\_sseUnsubs, but NO beforeunload/pagehide handler ever calls them (acceptable for full-page nav, but EventSource + timers are never explicitly torn down). \_sseConnect re-entry guarded by SW.\_sseUnsubs.length.

**console.log:** 17 — web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-app.js:203 — console.log logs SePay supplier phone + transaction amount on every wallet SSE event (mild PII/financial data leak to browser console); web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-state.js:49-64 — SW_DEBUG block defaults ON (window.SW_DEBUG !== false); \_dbg dumps wallet names, balances, totals, sort order to console + window.\_\_swDebugLog on every render (leftover debug noise; author TODO at line 46 says 'gỡ block debug này sau khi chẩn xong'); web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-app.js:220,242 — SSE reload trigger console.log (debug noise)

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `race` Shared debounce timer SW.\_sseReloadTimer is reused by THREE different SSE subscriptions with DIFFERENT semantics and delays: web2:products (1200ms -> loadAndRender), web2:so-order (1200ms -> loadAndRender), and web2:supplier-wallet (800ms -> Sync.init + reload + re-openDetail). Because they all clea — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-app.js:216-251 (SW._sseReloadTimer used ` → Use a separate timer per concern (e.g. SW.\_sseAggTimer for products/so-order vs SW.\_sseLedgerTimer for supplier-wallet), or coalesce into one handler that ALWAYS runs Sync.init() then loadAndRender().
- 🟡 `race` applyDeposits builds the processed-id set ONCE via getProcessedSepayIds(state) (a snapshot of current transactions) and dedupes against it inside the loop, but the loop awaits addTransaction per deposit and never adds newly-applied sepayIds back into the `processed` set. If the SAME deposit appears — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-storage.js:343-368 (entry truthy on alre` → In applyDeposits, add sid to `processed` after a successful apply; and only count `added` when the returned entry was NOT alreadyProcessed (addTransaction could return a flag, or check d.alreadyProces
- 🟡 `race` pollDeposits() has no in-flight guard. It is triggered from init (loadAndRender->pollDeposits) AND from the web2:wallet:\* SSE branch (debounced 800ms). Two concurrent pollDeposits runs both read the same SW.walletState.lastDepositSync, fetch overlapping deposits, and both call applyDeposits on the S — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-api.js:99-117; storage.js:343-369,215-23` → Add a module-level \_depositPollInFlight boolean guard in pollDeposits (return early if already running); or serialize via a promise chain. Also re-check processed set against live state inside the loo
- 🟡 `data-loss` confirmCreate creates the wallet LOCALLY and saves (getOrCreateWallet + save) BEFORE awaiting the server ensure(); if Web2SuppliersCache.ensure(rawName) throws, it toasts error and RETURNs WITHOUT removing the local wallet entry. The NCC now exists in local IDB/localStorage + RAM (and renders in the — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-actions.js:191-201` → Await ensure() FIRST; only mutate/save local state after server confirms. On failure, do not leave a local-only wallet (or delete the just-created key).
- 🟡 `logic` confirmReturn: when addTransaction throws, the code does `notify(...); return;` INSIDE the try block (actions.js:150-153). The `return` triggers the finally (re-enables btn) — correct — but the best-effort stock adjust at lines 103-129 already ran and DECREMENTED product stock (Web2ProductsApi.adjus — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-actions.js:100-153` → Do the ledger addTransaction FIRST (money is source of truth), and only adjust stock after the ledger write succeeds; or capture the adjustments and re-add (+qty) on ledger failure.
- ⚪ `race` Optimistic local apply vs concurrent SSE reload: confirmPay/confirmReturn push the new tx into w.transactions and increment paidAmount/returnedAmount locally (storage.addTransaction:215-239), then call renderList+openDetail. Meanwhile the server \_notify fires web2:supplier-wallet which (after 800ms — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-app.js:244; storage.js:215-239` → Treat SW.walletState as immutable-replace only; have mutation handlers re-read SW.walletState after each await rather than capturing it.
- ⚪ `data-loss` save() debounces the IDB/localStorage write by 150ms (WRITE_DEBOUNCE_MS). flush() exists and is exported but is NEVER called on pagehide/beforeunload. A save() immediately followed by tab close loses the local cache write. Impact is low because the server ledger is the source of truth and state is r — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-storage.js:123-151 (flush never wired)` → Add window.addEventListener('pagehide'/'visibilitychange'->hidden, () => SupplierWalletStorage.flush()) in app.js init.
- ⚪ `logic` matchSupplier fuzzy-matches SePay deposit free-text content to a supplier name (word-boundary, length>=4, longest-first). This is heuristic and can mis-assign a refund to the wrong supplier when two suppliers share a >=4-char token, or fail to match (refund silently dropped, content not surfaced any — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-storage.js:327-369` → Require a stronger signal (exact code token, or a configured alias map) before auto-applying a money tx; otherwise queue unmatched/ambiguous deposits for manual confirmation instead of silent best-eff
- ⚪ `logic` History tab header/empty-state say 'Lịch sử (30 ngày)' / 'Chưa có giao dịch trong 30 ngày' but the data is the FULL ledger (server no longer purges — cleanupOldTransactions is a no-op). renderHistory shows ALL w.transactions, not a 30-day window. Misleading label only (no data bug), but a user trust — `index.html:143, render.js:170-176; storage.js:155-157` → Update the label to 'Lịch sử giao dịch' (remove the 30-day claim) or actually filter to 30 days for display.
- ⚪ `logic` recalcReturnTotal/confirmReturn compute return amount as qty\*cost where qty=min(input, data-qty=remaining). But if a user types a qty into .sw-return-qty WITHOUT checking the row, recalc shows 0 (correct), yet the row's max attribute is set to `remaining` while the input value defaults to `remaining — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-actions.js:39-49,60-73` → Default the qty input to 0 (require explicit qty) or require per-row confirmation for money returns.
- ℹ️ `logic` aggregateSuppliers uses tab.currency rate via rateToVnd with FALLBACK_RATES hardcoded (CNY 3500 etc). If a tab has a foreign currency with no per-tab rate, totalPurchased uses a stale hardcoded FX rate -> debt figures can be materially wrong. Acceptable for VND-dominant data but a silent correctness — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-state.js:20-28,125-131; api.js:29,43` → Surface a warning when falling back to FALLBACK_RATES, or require an explicit rate per non-VND tab.

**Security (audit):**

- ⚪ Write auth is SOFT-gated server-side: requireWeb2AuthSoft only returns 401 when env WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE==='1', otherwise warns and proceeds. Client \_api() does attach x-web2-token at the choke point (storage.js:40-50), so this page is compliant, but if WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE is not set in this service's en — `render.com/middleware/web2-auth.js:132-136; web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wal` → Confirm WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1 is set for the web2-api service (MEMORY says enabled 13/06). Keep \_authHeaders on every mutation path (it is).
- ⚪ web2_auth token is read in plaintext from localStorage and sent as x-web2-token; token-at-rest is plaintext (no hashing on client, expected for a bearer header). Not a new issue but worth noting for the money surface. — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-storage.js:43-47` → No client-side fix; ensure server token has short TTL + rotation.
- ℹ️ All customer/supplier-controlled strings rendered into innerHTML are escaped via SW.escapeHtml (supplier names, product names, variants, notes, performedBy). No unescaped untrusted innerHTML found. — `render.js:67-78,157-165,183-189; actions.js:39-46` → None — escaping is consistent. Maintain escapeHtml on any new field.
- ℹ️ Server queries are fully parameterized ($1..$N); no string-built SQL. returned_row_ids merged as JSON.stringify into a parameterized $::jsonb. — `render.com/routes/web2-supplier-wallet.js:211-307` → None.
- ℹ️ Destructive DELETE /supplier/:name is fail-closed behind x-admin-secret=CLEANUP_SECRET; not reachable from page flow. — `render.com/routes/web2-supplier-wallet.js:448-451` → None.
- ⚪ SePay supplier phone + amount logged to console on every wallet SSE event (financial PII in client console). — `web2/supplier-wallet/js/supplier-wallet-app.js:203-207` → Drop the amount/phone from the log or gate behind SW_DEBUG.

**Ghi chú:** Money correctness is mostly solid: server ledger is append-only + idempotent by tx*id (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING), over-refund is capped server-side under SELECT ... FOR UPDATE on meta (newQty>ordered -> 400), and returnedRowIds accumulate deltas. The read-modify-write of returned_row_ids is correctly serialized by the row lock.; Web 2.0 hygiene OK: pool getPool = web2Db || chatDb (web2Db preferred), tables web2*\*, SSE topic web2:supplier-wallet on the web2 hub, no TPOS coupling, no Web 1.0 table writes from this page. (chatDb fallback at getPool:46 is a last-resort and would only hit Web 1.0 pool if web2Db missing — acceptable per existing convention.); No timezone bug in money math (ts stored as epoch ms; PAY move-name year uses new Date(ts).getFullYear() which is server TZ=+7 — fine since it's just a label).; The biggest real-world risks here are the SHARED SSE debounce timer (high) and the stock-adjust-before-ledger ordering in confirmReturn (medium), both of which can produce a visibly wrong balance/inventory state that only self-heals on the next reload.; Leftover SW_DEBUG instrumentation (state.js:44-64) defaults ON in production and should be removed (author TODO acknowledges this).

### page:users-and-perms

Two Web 2.0 admin pages for managing the web2_users account system (separate from Web 1.0 `users`/JWT). web2/users/ is the full CRUD page (create/edit user, change password, deactivate, per-user permission matrix, KPI link) driven by js/users-app.js against /api/web2-users/*. web2/users-permissions/ is a leaner standalone permission-matrix editor (pick user -> tick page/action checkboxes -> Save) with all logic inline in index.html. Backend route render.com/routes/web2-users.js owns the schema (web2_users + web2_user_sessions on web2Db), bcrypt passwords, UUID-style session tokens (sha256-hashed at rest), a server-side permission registry (WEB2_PAGES/ROLE_DEFAULTS), and gates all mutations with requireWeb2Admin while reads use requireWeb2Auth. Role/permission enforcement for OTHER pages is client-only via Web2Auth.can() — the server validates permission *shape\* on write but does not enforce per-action permissions on the protected feature endpoints themselves.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** web2/users/index.html: Google Fonts (Inter) preconnect+stylesheet; lucide UMD (defer); shared CSS web2-sidebar.css, web2-components.css, web2-theme.css, local css/users.css; web2/users/index.html scripts in order: ../../shared/js/notification-system.js, shared/web2-auth.js (runs guardPage() immediately -> redirect to /web2/login if no token), web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js, web2-sse-bridge.js, js/users-app.js; users-app.js init(): wireUi() attaches all button/input listeners, then loadAll() does Promise.all([GET /list?limit=200&includeInactive=0, GET /pages]) -> STATE.users/pages/actionLabels, renderList(), lucide.createIcons(), \_sseConnect() subscribes web2:users; inline script tail: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside', {activeUrl}); web2/users-permissions/index.html: lucide UMD; web2-sidebar.css, web2-theme.css; scripts web2-auth.js (guardPage), web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js then inline IIFE; users-permissions inline DOMContentLoaded: Web2Sidebar.mount(activeRoute:'users-permissions'); loadUsers() GET /list (with x-web2-token); await loadRegistry() GET /pages; renderTable({})

| Control                                                                           | Handler                                                                      | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| users: 'Tạo người dùng' button (#uCreateBtn)                                      | openUserModal(null) (users-app.js:448,198)                                   | opens create modal, password field shown, username enabled; confirmUserSave POST / with x-web2-token -> reload list                                                                                                                           |
| users: row 'Sửa' (data-act=edit)                                                  | handleAction->openUserModal(user) (users-app.js:180,198)                     | edit modal; username field disabled (immutable); PATCH /:id (no password) -> notify + loadAll + renderList                                                                                                                                    |
| users: 'Lưu' in user modal (#uUserSaveBtn)                                        | confirmUserSave (users-app.js:220)                                           | client-validates username+displayName non-empty and password>=8 on create; disables btn (double-submit guard); api POST / or PATCH /:id; closes modal, loadAll, renderList; re-enables btn in finally                                         |
| users: row 'Đổi mật khẩu' (data-act=pwd)                                          | openPasswordModal->confirmPasswordSave (users-app.js:274,283)                | POST /:id/password {password} -> server bcrypts + DELETEs all that user's sessions (force logout). No await/loading skeleton; btn re-enabled in finally                                                                                       |
| users: row 'Phân quyền' (data-act=perms)                                          | openPermsModal->renderPermsGrid->confirmPermsSave (users-app.js:348,359,409) | deep-copies user.permissions into permsDraft, renders checkbox grid grouped by page.group; checkbox change mutates permsDraft[slug]; Save PUT /:id/permissions {permissions} -> loadAll + renderList                                          |
| users: 'Reset về mặc định theo vai trò'                                           | resetPermsToRoleDefaults (users-app.js:427)                                  | GET /role-defaults/:role -> overwrites permsDraft, re-renders grid (not yet persisted until Save)                                                                                                                                             |
| users: 'Tick tất cả'/'Bỏ tất cả'                                                  | bulkCheck(true/false) (users-app.js:439)                                     | sets every checkbox.checked then dispatches synthetic change events to sync permsDraft                                                                                                                                                        |
| users: row 'Vô hiệu' (data-act=delete)                                            | deactivateUser (users-app.js:306)                                            | Popup.danger confirm; Web2Optimistic.run sets user.isActive=false + renderList + flashes success toast IMMEDIATELY, then DELETE /:id in background; rollback restores isActive on failure (e.g. last-admin 400). onSuccess loadAll+renderList |
| users: row 'Phân công KPI' (data-act=kpi)                                         | openKpiAssignments (users-app.js:192)                                        | window.open('../kpi/assignments.html','\_blank') — no user id/context passed in URL                                                                                                                                                           |
| users: search input (#uSearch)                                                    | input listener (users-app.js:454)                                            | sets STATE.filters.search, renderList() client-side filters on username/displayName/email/phone/role substring (no debounce)                                                                                                                  |
| users: 'Hiển thị user đã vô hiệu' checkbox (#uShowInactive)                       | change listener (users-app.js:458)                                           | sets includeInactive, await loadAll() re-fetches /list?includeInactive=1, renderList                                                                                                                                                          |
| users: 'Tải lại' (#uRefreshBtn)                                                   | click listener (users-app.js:449)                                            | await loadAll + renderList + 'Đã tải lại' toast                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| users/users-permissions: [data-u-close]/Escape                                    | close listeners (users-app.js:473,478)                                       | sets [hidden] on .u-modal; Escape hides all open modals                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| users-permissions: userPick select                                                | onchange->loadPerm(uid) (index.html:320,275)                                 | GET /:id (x-web2-token) -> renderTable(user.permissions)                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| users-permissions: rolePick select                                                | onchange->applyRole(role) (index.html:323,300)                               | GET /role-defaults/:role -> renderTable(template perms) (not persisted); resets select                                                                                                                                                        |
| users-permissions: 'Xoá tất cả' (#btnClear)                                       | onclick (index.html:327)                                                     | Popup.confirm -> unchecks all checkboxes (draft only, not saved)                                                                                                                                                                              |
| users-permissions: 'Save' (#btnSave)                                              | onclick (index.html:347)                                                     | collectPerm() builds {slug:[actions]}, double-submit guard (btn.disabled), PUT /:id/permissions {permissions} with x-web2-token -> toast; btn re-enabled in finally                                                                           |
| BACKEND endpoint GET /api/web2-users/pages                                        | web2-users.js:455                                                            | returns WEB2_PAGES registry + roles + ACTION_LABELS (UNAUTHENTICATED — no gate)                                                                                                                                                               |
| BACKEND GET /role-defaults/:role                                                  | web2-users.js:464                                                            | returns ROLE_DEFAULTS[role]() (UNAUTHENTICATED — no gate)                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| BACKEND GET /list, GET /:id                                                       | requireWeb2Auth (web2-users.js:471,496)                                      | any logged-in user (incl viewer/staff) can read ALL usernames/emails/phones/permissions                                                                                                                                                       |
| BACKEND POST /, PATCH /:id, PUT /:id/permissions, POST /:id/password, DELETE /:id | requireWeb2Admin (web2-users.js:513,558,633,677,701)                         | admin-only mutations; PATCH+DELETE have atomic last-admin guard; PUT validates slug+action against registry; password change + deactivate purge sessions                                                                                      |
| BACKEND POST /login                                                               | web2-users.js:737                                                            | IP rate-limited (8 fails/15min), bcrypt.compare, issues random 32-byte token (stored hashed), updates last_login_at, opportunistic expired-session cleanup                                                                                    |
| BACKEND GET /me, POST /logout                                                     | web2-users.js:797,833                                                        | resolve token->user (hash or legacy plaintext); logout deletes session by hash or plaintext                                                                                                                                                   |

**Liên kết:** ../kpi/assignments.html (opened in new tab from KPI action button), /web2/login/index.html (Web2Auth.guardPage redirect target), shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.can/getStored/authHeaders — permission + token source), shared/web2-optimistic.js (Web2Optimistic.run — deactivate flow), shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE.subscribe), shared/web2-sidebar.js (Web2Sidebar.mount, auto-loads notification-system/popup/lottie/command-palette), shared/web2-user-info.js, web2-history-timeline.js, web2-db-badge.js, web2-components.css, web2-theme.css, Render route /api/web2-users/\* (render.com/routes/web2-users.js), Render middleware render.com/middleware/web2-auth.js, render.com/server.js (mounts route + wires initializeNotifiers to web2 SSE hub), Cloudflare worker WEB2_USERS -> handleCustomer360Proxy -> web2-api-kv04.onrender.com

**SSE:** users-app.js subscribes 'web2:users' via Web2SSE.subscribe (users-app.js:504); on event: if targetId == current session user id AND action in {update-permissions,update,change-password,deactivate} -> warn toast + setTimeout(location.reload,3000); else debounce 600ms (\_sseReloadTimer) -> loadAll+renderList; Publisher: web2-users.js \_notify(action,id) broadcasts topic 'web2:users' via web2RealtimeSseRoutes.notifyClients after each mutation (create/update/update-permissions/change-password/deactivate). Correct Web 2.0 hub (realtime-sse-web2), wired in server.js:1139-1142; CLEANUP GAP: \_sseConnect stores \_sseUnsubscribe but it is NEVER called — no page unload/visibilitychange teardown. EventSource persists for page lifetime (acceptable for SPA-less page but no explicit cleanup). users-permissions page does NOT subscribe to SSE at all (stale matrix if another admin edits concurrently); Role-change is emitted as generic action 'update' (not a role-specific action) — the self-permission-change reload heuristic only fires for the demoted user, which is correct, but a permission grant to another user the current user is viewing only triggers the 600ms debounce reload, no targeted invalidation of an open perms modal

**console.log:** 2 — users-app.js:104 console.warn('[web2-users] load fail:', e.message) — error message only, low risk; users-app.js:530 console.log('[users-app-SSE] event:', action, targetId) — logs action + numeric user id only, no PII/token; minor debug noise; NOTE: web2-auth.js:166 console.warn logs `User ${user.username} lacks ${slug}.${action}` (username in client console) but that file is shared, not this unit's own code

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `race` Optimistic deactivate flashes a SUCCESS toast and flips the row to 'Đã vô hiệu' BEFORE the server responds. If DELETE returns 400 (last-admin guard) or any error, rollback restores isActive=true and shows an error toast — but the user already saw 'Đã vô hiệu <user>' success. For a money/auth-adjacen — `web2/users/js/users-app.js:306-345 + web2-optimistic.js:81 (successMsg shown pre` → For deactivate use the await+loading path (like password change): disable button, await api DELETE, only then mark inactive + toast. Do not pass successMsg to Web2Optimistic for this destructive auth
- 🟡 `race` Self-permission/role change reload heuristic is incomplete. \_currentSessionUserId() reads the CACHED user from localStorage 'web2_auth' set at login; permissions in that cache are NOT refreshed except via Web2Auth.verify() (only called on requireAuth, not on this page after load). So if an admin dem — `web2/users/js/users-app.js:508-545; web2-auth.js:212-223 guardPage only checks t` → On the self-affecting SSE event, call Web2Auth.verify() (re-fetch /me) before/after reload so cached permissions update; or have guardPage periodically verify().
- ⚪ `logic` SSE listener is never torn down: \_sseUnsubscribe is captured (users-app.js:499,504) but no code ever calls it (no beforeunload/pagehide). Also \_sseReloadTimer is not cleared on unload. Minor leak; on a long-lived tab the debounced reload could fire after navigation intent. EventSource itself is recl — `web2/users/js/users-app.js:499-536` → Add window.addEventListener('pagehide', () => { \_sseUnsubscribe?.(); clearTimeout(\_sseReloadTimer); }).
- ⚪ `logic` users-permissions/index.html has NO SSE subscription and no auto-refresh. Two admins editing the same user's matrix concurrently: last Save wins silently (PUT replaces the whole permissions object). No version/etag check -> lost-update. users-app.js perms modal has the same full-object-replace lost- — `web2/users-permissions/index.html:347-380; web2-users.js:633-674 (full overwrite` → Subscribe users-permissions to web2:users to reload matrix on remote change; consider optimistic-concurrency (updated_at check) on PUT permissions.
- ⚪ `logic` applyRole() in users-permissions renders the role template into the matrix but does NOT auto-save and gives no indication the change is unsaved; combined with the success toast 'Đã áp role template' a user may believe permissions were applied to the user when they were only loaded into the unsaved g — `web2/users-permissions/index.html:300-314,327-342` → Clarify toast wording ('Đã nạp template — bấm Save để lưu') to avoid an admin thinking a role was applied when it was not persisted.
- ⚪ `logic` Search filter has no debounce (renderList on every keystroke). Cheap here (<=200 rows client-side) but inconsistent with the project's debounce convention; not a correctness bug. — `web2/users/js/users-app.js:454-457` → Optional: wrap in a small debounce for consistency.
- ℹ️ `logic` editingUser is reused as shared mutable state for THREE modals (edit user, password, perms uses permsUser separately). openPasswordModal overwrites STATE.editingUser; if a user opens edit modal, then without closing opens password modal, STATE.editingUser is repointed. Modals are exclusive in practi — `web2/users/js/users-app.js:199,275` → Use a dedicated state field per modal (pwdUser) to avoid cross-modal coupling.
- ℹ️ `tpos-coupling` No live TPOS or Web 1.0 coupling found. ensureTables runs an idempotent migration that strips legacy TPOS slugs/actions (tpos-pancake->live-chat, drop loadTpos/syncTpos) — correct cleanup, guarded by WHERE so re-run is no-op. Pool is web2Db||chatDb fallback (standard Web 2.0 pattern). — `render.com/routes/web2-users.js:377-390,472` → None — noted as clean.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 Per-action permission enforcement is CLIENT-ONLY. Web2Auth.can(slug,action) is the only thing stopping a non-admin from acting; the protected feature endpoints across Web 2.0 are soft-gated (requireWeb2AuthSoft, often only checking 'logged in'), not action-gated. The permission matrix configured her — `web2/shared/web2-auth.js:125-130 (can); render.com/routes/web2-users.js permissi` → Add server-side per-action permission middleware (resolve req.web2User.permissions[slug] includes action) on the feature mutation endpoints; treat client can() purely as UX. Until then the page over-p
- 🟡 GET /list and GET /:id are gated only by requireWeb2Auth (any active user). A 'viewer' or 'staff' account can enumerate ALL users' username/email/phone/role and full effective permissions. The users-permissions page even works for non-admins reading data (only Save is admin-gated). PII (email/phone) — `render.com/routes/web2-users.js:471,496` → Gate /list and /:id with requireWeb2Admin (or a 'users.view' permission check). Page-open is only login-guarded (no requireSlug/requireAction passed to requireAuth), so any logged-in user can open web
- ⚪ GET /pages and GET /role-defaults/:role are completely unauthenticated. Leaks the full page/action registry and role permission templates to anyone who can reach the worker. Low impact (no PII) but unnecessary surface. — `render.com/routes/web2-users.js:455,464` → Apply requireWeb2Auth to both; users-permissions/index.html loadRegistry/applyRole currently call them without a token, so adding auth requires sending authHeaders there.
- ⚪ Token passed in URL query string for /me?token= (Web2Auth.verify) — tokens land in proxy/Render access logs and browser history. Worker forwards full URL. — `web2/shared/web2-auth.js:102; render.com/routes/web2-users.js:802 (accepts ?toke` → Prefer x-web2-token header for /me (middleware already supports it); deprecate ?token= query usage.
- ℹ️ Default admin auto-seeded with hardcoded password 'admin@@' (web2-users.js:396) on first boot of an empty table. Acceptable for bootstrap but must be rotated; this credential also appears in test tooling. — `render.com/routes/web2-users.js:396` → Force password change on first admin login or seed from an env var.
- ℹ️ XSS posture is OK: users-app.js escapeHtml's all user fields before innerHTML; users-permissions esc() uses textContent. SQL is fully parameterized (no string-built queries). PATCH uses dynamic SET list but column names are literals, values parameterized. SSE payload carries only {action,id,ts} (no — `web2/users/js/users-app.js:30-38,141-167; render.com/routes/web2-users.js:480,66` → No change needed; documented as positive findings.

**Ghi chú:** Server-side mutation gating is solid: requireWeb2Admin on create/update/permissions/password/delete; atomic last-admin guard on both PATCH and DELETE (TOCTOU-fixed via single SQL with EXISTS subquery); password change + deactivate purge all sessions for the user.; Token at-rest hardening (C7) is in place: login stores sha256(token) in both PK and token_hash columns; verify matches hash OR legacy plaintext for zero-lockout; 42703 fallback for the boot window before the lazy ALTER runs.; PUT /:id/permissions validates every slug against WEB2_PAGES and every action against that page's allowed action set — prevents injecting arbitrary slugs/actions. permissions==null reverts to role defaults. This is the one place server validates the shape, but it does not enforce those permissions on other routes (see security high).; The real gap for this AUTH-adjacent unit is not in these two pages' own code (which correctly attach x-web2-token and are admin-gated server-side) but that the permission MODEL they configure is enforced client-only across the rest of Web 2.0.; KPI button opens ../kpi/assignments.html with no user context in the URL — assignments page must independently re-pick the user; verify that page is also requireWeb2Auth gated (out of this unit's scope).

### page:variants-cat-card-counter

Four Web 2.0 pages: (1) Kho Biến Thể (web2/variants/) — CRUD table over web2_variants via /api/web2-variants, optimistic create/update/toggle, SSE web2:variants realtime + shared Web2VariantsCache (single source for so-order/products). (2) Nhóm sản phẩm (web2/product-category/) — thin generic page-builder (Web2Page mount, slug 'productcategory'); all data/SSE handled by shared page-builder.js. (3) Tạo card SP (web2/product-card/) — 100% on-device canvas poster generator (Web2ProductCard render engine), pulls products from Web2ProductsCache, exports PNG / copies to clipboard / hands off to FB-posts page via Web2FbShare. (4) Đếm SP (web2/product-counter/) — phone-only thin host that mounts shared Web2ProductCounter camera+MediaPipe object-detection engine; second camera surface via Web2PackCounter. None of these touch TPOS or Web 1.0 pools/tables/SSE; variants backend correctly uses web2Db||chatDb fallback and parameterized SQL.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** variants/index.html: Google Fonts (Inter/Manrope) preconnect+stylesheet; shared CSS web2-sidebar/effects/base/components + css/web2-variants.css; lucide UMD (defer); shared-auth-manager.js, notification-system.js, web2-theme.css in head; variants: body scripts web2-auth.js(guard), web2-user-info, web2-history-timeline, web2-db-badge, web2-optimistic, web2-sidebar(mount #web2Aside on DOMContentLoaded), web2-effects, web2-sse-bridge, web2-product-code, js/web2-variants-api, shared/web2-variants-cache, js/web2-variants-app; variants init(): lucide.createIcons; wires all buttons/filters/modal; calls load() (GET /api/web2-variants/list page=1 limit=2000); Web2VariantsCache.init() (paged list load + SSE setup); Web2SSE.subscribe('web2:variants') debounced 600ms -> load(); product-category/index.html: fonts, web2-sidebar/base/components/page-builder CSS, lucide, shared-auth-manager, notification-system, web2-theme; body: web2-auth, web2-user-info, web2-history-timeline, web2-db-badge, web2-optimistic, web2-sidebar, web2-api, web2-sse-bridge, page-builder.js; then Web2Sidebar.mount + Web2Page.mount({slug:'productcategory'}) which does the data fetch + SSE web2:productcategory inside shared page-builder; product-card/index.html: web2-sidebar.css, web2-theme.css, lucide, product-card.css; body: notification-system, web2-auth, web2-sidebar, web2-products-cache, web2-fb-share, web2-qr, web2-logo-eraser, web2-image-editor, product-card-render, product-card; DOMContentLoaded -> Web2Sidebar.mount + ProductCardPage.init(); product-card init(): renderPickers (sizes/templates/accents from Web2ProductCard constants), bindField inputs, wireProductPicker, Web2ProductsCache.init() (silent), window 'paste' + 'resize' listeners, initial doRender(); product-counter/index.html: lucide, product-counter.css; body: notification-system, web2-auth, web2-product-counter (shared engine, lazy), web2-pack-counter, js/product-counter; DOMContentLoaded -> wires pcBack/pcInfo/pcHint/pcPack, ProductCounterPage.init() which mounts Web2ProductCounter on #pcMount (camera NOT started until user taps; MediaPipe WASM+model lazy-loaded on first start)

| Control                                                               | Handler                                                                          | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| variants: #btnCreateVariant click                                     | openCreate (web2-variants-app.js:145)                                            | resets STATE.editingId=null, clears modal fields, adds .active to #variantModal, focuses #vmValue                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| variants: #btnSaveVariant click / Enter in modal                      | saveModal (web2-variants-app.js:208)                                             | disables Save btn (double-submit guard), validates value+shortCode (/^[A-Z0-9]{1,20}$/); CREATE: Web2Optimistic.run appends tmp-<Date.now()> row, POST /api/web2-variants, onSuccess pushTickle+load(); UPDATE: optimistic merge STATE.variants[i], PATCH /api/web2-variants/:id, rollback on error; both pushTickle to Web2VariantsCache |
| variants: row edit pencil onclick                                     | Web2VariantsApp.openEdit (web2-variants-app.js:160)                              | finds variant by id, fills modal, sets editingId, opens modal                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| variants: row toggle (pause/play) onclick                             | Web2VariantsApp.toggleActive (web2-variants-app.js:345)                          | captures idx ONCE, optimistic STATE.variants[idx].isActive=newState + renderRows, PATCH /api/web2-variants/:id {isActive}, onSuccess replaces row + pushTickle, rollback restores snapshot via stale idx                                                                                                                                  |
| variants: row delete trash onclick                                    | Web2VariantsApp.remove (web2-variants-app.js:389)                                | await Popup.danger confirm; DELETE /api/web2-variants/:id (await, no optimistic), filters STATE.variants, decrements total, renderRows, pushTickle({action:'delete'})                                                                                                                                                                     |
| variants: #vmSuggestShortCode click / #vmValue blur (empty shortcode) | suggestShortCode (web2-variants-app.js:181)                                      | GET /api/web2-variants/suggest-short-code?value&groupName, fills #vmShortCode + hint                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| variants: #filterSearch Enter / #filterActive,#filterGroup change     | applyFilters (web2-variants-app.js:138)                                          | reads filter inputs into STATE, calls load() -> server-filtered list re-fetch + re-render                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| product-category: row/field actions, add/edit/delete                  | shared page-builder.js Web2Page (web2/shared/page-builder.js)                    | generic CRUD against /api/web2/productcategory entity; ref field 'parentCode' resolves to productcategory; SSE web2:productcategory drives realtime — implemented entirely in shared module (out of this unit's files)                                                                                                                    |
| product-card: #pcardProdSearch input                                  | wireProductPicker (product-card.js:103)                                          | debounce 200ms, Web2ProductsCache.findByName(q,8), renders dropdown; row click -> pickProduct                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| product-card: dropdown row click                                      | pickProduct (product-card.js:148)                                                | sets name/price from product, fills inputs, setImage(p.imageUrl) (cross-origin), doRender                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| product-card: text inputs (name/price/badge/note/shop)                | bindField (product-card.js:236)                                                  | updates state.opts[key], scheduleRender (120ms debounce) -> Web2ProductCard.render to canvas                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| product-card: #pcardQr input                                          | inline (product-card.js:319)                                                     | debounce 300ms -> setQr -> Web2QR.toDataUrl -> loadImage -> doRender                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| product-card: #pcardCutout change                                     | inline (product-card.js:314)                                                     | toggles cutout (contain vs cover image draw), doRender                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| product-card: #pcardUpload change / window paste                      | inline (product-card.js:324,332)                                                 | FileReader.readAsDataURL -> setImage(dataURL) same-origin (CORS-safe), doRender                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| product-card: #pcardExport click                                      | exportPng (product-card.js:171)                                                  | canvas.toBlob -> creates <a download>, click, revokeObjectURL after 4s; catches SecurityError (tainted canvas) -> notify                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| product-card: #pcardCopy click                                        | copyPng (product-card.js:194)                                                    | canvas.toBlob -> navigator.clipboard.write ClipboardItem image/png                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| product-card: #pcardShareFb click                                     | shareToFb (product-card.js:209)                                                  | canvas.toDataURL -> Web2FbShare.send (writes payload to sessionStorage one-shot) -> navigates to fb-posts page                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| product-card: #pcardEraseLogo / #pcardEditImg click                   | inline (product-card.js:347,355)                                                 | opens Web2LogoEraser / Web2ImageEditor modal, returns edited dataURL -> setImage                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
