| product-counter: #pcBack click                                        | inline (index.html:67)                                                           | history.back() or location.href overview — does NOT stop camera (leak)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| product-counter: #pcPack click                                        | inline (index.html:83)                                                           | Web2PackCounter.open() — opens separate full-screen camera overlay (opencv pack counting)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| product-counter: #pcInfo/#pcHintClose click                           | inline (index.html:73-81)                                                        | toggles #pcHint bottom-sheet hidden attribute                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| product-counter: 'Bật camera' toggle (inside widget)                  | Web2ProductCounter createController start/stop (web2-product-counter.js:346/413) | getUserMedia(environment 1280x720) -> getDetector (lazy MediaPipe GPU/CPU) -> requestAnimationFrame loop detectForVideo every 350ms -> median over 5 frames -> setCount + onCount callback updates document.title                                                                                                                         |

**Liên kết:** render route /api/web2-variants (render.com/routes/web2-variants.js) — list/get/create/update/delete/suggest-short-code/backfill-short-codes, render route /api/web2/productcategory (generic web2 entity route via page-builder), render route /api/web2-products (via Web2ProductsCache used by product-card), web2/shared/web2-variants-cache.js (Web2VariantsCache — shared single source for so-order + web2-products + variants), web2/shared/web2-products-cache.js (Web2ProductsCache — product picker in product-card), web2/shared/web2-fb-share.js (Web2FbShare) -> navigates to web2/fb-posts/ page, web2/shared/web2-qr.js, web2-logo-eraser.js, web2-image-editor.js (product-card tools), web2/shared/web2-product-counter.js + web2-pack-counter.js (camera engines), web2/shared/page-builder.js (Web2Page) — drives product-category entirely, web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE), web2-optimistic.js (Web2Optimistic), web2-auth.js (Web2Auth), web2-sidebar.js, web2-escape.js (auto-injected by sidebar), web2/overview/index.html (product-counter #pcBack fallback)

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:variants (web2-variants-app.js:476) — debounce 600ms -> load(); EventSource managed by shared Web2SSE bridge but the page-level subscribe is NEVER unsubscribed (single-page, acceptable but the closure-captured \_sseT timeout is also never cleared on unload); SUBSCRIBE web2:variants (web2-variants-cache.js:121) — second independent subscriber inside Web2VariantsCache, debounce 400ms (\_scheduleRefresh) -> \_loadList(); stores state.unsubscribe but nothing calls it (cache is a singleton, never torn down); PUBLISH web2:variants — backend web2-variants.js \_notify(action,id) after every create/update/delete/backfill via \_notifyClients('web2:variants',{action,id,ts},'update') on the web2 hub (realtime-sse-web2). Correct hub.; NOTE: two concurrent subscribers to web2:variants (page app + shared cache) on the SAME topic means one server event triggers BOTH a 600ms load() AND a 400ms cache \_loadList() -> two redundant /list fetches per mutation (the MEDIUM-cleanup comment at line 463 only removed the cache-subscriber->load coupling on the PAGE side, not the cache's own self-refresh); PUBLISH web2:productcategory — handled inside shared page-builder.js (not in this unit's files); product-card / product-counter: NO SSE (fully on-device)

**console.log:** 11 — web2-variants-app.js:40 console.log(`[${type}]`, msg) — only when notificationManager missing; low risk, no PII; web2-variants-app.js:128 console.error(e) in load() — logs raw error object, no customer data; web2-variants-cache.js:94/103/127 console.warn/error — internal load/listener errors, no PII; product-card.js:11/159/191 console.error/log — render + export-taint errors, includes only product name (already shop-entered), no tokens; product-counter.js:18 / web2-product-counter.js:475 console.warn — module-missing diagnostics, no PII. No tokens or customer data logged anywhere in this unit.

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `memory-leak` Camera stream leak: the product-counter host mounts Web2ProductCounter and stores \_ctrl, but NEVER calls \_ctrl.stop()/destroy() on navigation. #pcBack triggers history.back()/location.href without stopping the MediaStream tracks. On mobile this leaves the camera (LED/sensor) active until GC, and the — `web2/product-counter/js/product-counter.js:13-33; index.html:67-70 (#pcBack)` → Add window.addEventListener('pagehide', ()=>this.\_ctrl?.stop()) and document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', ()=> document.hidden && this.\_ctrl?.stop()); also call this.\_ctrl?.stop() in the #pcBa
- 🟡 `race` toggleActive captures idx ONCE (line 347) and uses it inside apply/onSuccess/rollback. If a concurrent SSE-driven load() (debounced 600ms) or another mutation reorders/replaces STATE.variants between apply and the async PATCH resolving, the captured idx points at a different row -> onSuccess/rollbac — `web2-variants-app.js:345-387` → Inside apply/onSuccess/rollback re-find index by id: const i = STATE.variants.findIndex(x=>x.id===numId) before each write, mirroring the UPDATE branch.
- 🟡 `race` Optimistic create + SSE double-reload duplicate-row window. saveModal CREATE appends a row with id 'tmp-<Date.now()>' and onSuccess calls load(). Meanwhile the server \_notify('create') fires web2:variants -> both the page subscriber (600ms->load) and Web2VariantsCache (400ms->\_loadList) reload. If t — `web2-variants-app.js:294-317, 474-480; web2-variants-cache.js:120-124` → Dedupe: after create, reconcile by replacing the tmp row in place using resp.variant instead of full load(); or guard load() to drop rows whose id starts with 'tmp-'. Consider having the page rely sol
- ⚪ `logic` Optimistic update mutates shared state object in place: STATE.variants[i] = {...prev, ...fields} reuses prev (a shallow copy captured at line 238) — fine — but toggleActive's rollback writes snapshot {...prev} where prev is the LIVE STATE.variants[idx] reference captured at line 349 BEFORE apply rep — `web2-variants-app.js:349-369` → Snapshot with a deep-ish copy at capture time (already {...prev} in snapshot()) and re-find index on rollback (see toggle race fix).
- ⚪ `other` colspan mismatch: the variants table has 7 columns but every JS-generated loading/empty/error row uses colspan="6" (the static HTML loading row correctly uses 7). Empty/loading/error states span only 6 of 7 columns -> slight visual misalignment. — `web2-variants-app.js:49,50,111,129` → Change colspan="6" to colspan="7" in all four JS templates.
- ⚪ `other` product-card pickProduct dead/duplicated expression: const img = global.Web2ProductsCache?.getAll ? p.imageUrl : p.imageUrl; both branches return p.imageUrl — the ternary is a no-op (likely leftover refactor). — `web2/product-card/js/product-card.js:156` → Replace with const img = p.imageUrl; (remove the meaningless ternary).
- ⚪ `perf` Web2VariantsCache and the page app both subscribe to web2:variants, so every mutation triggers two full /list re-fetches (page load() limit=2000 + cache \_loadList paged). The 2026-06-13 MEDIUM-cleanup only removed the page's cache-subscriber->load coupling, not the cache's independent SSE self-refre — `web2-variants-app.js:467-480; web2-variants-cache.js:117-130` → On the variants page, drive reload from a single source: either let the cache be the only subscriber and have the page subscribe to the cache via Web2VariantsCache.subscribe, or skip cache.init() on t
- ⚪ `memory-leak` product-card adds window 'paste' and 'resize' listeners and a document 'click' (outside-click close) listener in wireProductPicker, plus several setTimeout/clearTimeout debouncers, none removed. Acceptable for a standalone full page (no SPA re-mount), but the document 'click' listener is added uncon — `product-card.js:142-145,332,366` → Guard init() against double-invocation (e.g. if(state.\_inited) return) to be safe; not urgent for current single-mount usage.
- ℹ️ `other` Variants STATE.activeOnly default false while HTML default <select> is 'all' (selected) — consistent. applyFilters reads value==='true'. No bug, noted for completeness; filtering happens server-side so client-side STATE.search/group are only used to decide the empty-state copy. — `web2-variants-app.js:138-143, index.html:73-76` → None.

**Security (audit):**

- ⚪ Variant value/groupName/shortCode rendered into table HTML via innerHTML. escapeHtml() is applied to all interpolated values (value, groupName, shortCode) and v.id is numeric, so XSS is mitigated. Web2Escape is auto-injected by sidebar with an inline 5-char fallback. Acceptable but depends on sideba — `web2-variants-app.js:54-85, escapeHtml:27-36` → Keep; consider loading web2-escape.js explicitly in the <head> rather than relying on sidebar injection timing.
- ⚪ Write auth: variants API client attaches x-web2-token via Web2Auth.authHeaders (with localStorage 'web2_auth' fallback) on ALL requests including create/update/delete. Correct under WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1. Token read from localStorage in plaintext (project-wide known debt). — `web2-variants-api.js:14-23,56-72` → No change needed for this unit; token-at-rest is a global concern tracked elsewhere.
- ⚪ DELETE /api/web2-variants/:id and PATCH (incl. shortCode admin-override) are NOT gated by requireWeb2Admin — only the bulk backfill-short-codes route is. Any user with a valid x-web2-token can delete/rename any variant. Variants are shared master-data used to build product codes across so-order/prod — `render.com/routes/web2-variants.js:381 (PATCH), 447 (DELETE) vs 269 (backfill ha` → Decide if variant delete/shortcode-edit should require admin; if so add requireWeb2Admin to DELETE and the shortCode-change path.
- ℹ️ SQL is fully parameterized (ILIKE search, group filter, inserts/updates use $n placeholders). \_suggestShortCode builds a RegExp from groupName with proper escaping. No injection found. — `render.com/routes/web2-variants.js:212-235, 110-122` → None.
- ℹ️ product-card / product-counter perform no network writes and no PII handling; camera frames stay on-device (no upload). FB-share payload (card image dataURL + caption) passed via sessionStorage one-shot, not URL — avoids history/log leak. — `web2-fb-share.js:9,40-90` → None.
- ℹ️ product-card loads product images with crossOrigin='anonymous' and gracefully handles tainted-canvas SecurityError on export/copy/share — no silent failure, user told to upload locally. — `product-card-render.js:70-87; product-card.js:187-191,218-221` → None.

**Ghi chú:** product-category is intentionally a near-empty config shell over shared Web2Page/page-builder.js; its real CRUD/SSE/auth logic lives in web2/shared/page-builder.js which is OUT of this unit's file scope and should be audited under the shared page-builder unit.; All four pages correctly avoid TPOS and Web 1.0 coupling. Variants backend uses web2Db||chatDb fallback (cold-start safe), parameterized SQL, WeakSet per-pool ensureTables (idempotent migrations: ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS short_code + partial unique index).; Timezone: variants store created_at/updated_at as Date.now() epoch ms (UTC-correct); no naive-string parsing, no GMT+7 display bug in this unit.; Camera engines (Web2ProductCounter, Web2PackCounter) handle their own stop/destroy correctly internally; the leak is purely that the host PAGE never invokes stop() on navigation.; Both camera surfaces are on-device (getUserMedia, MediaPipe/opencv WASM) — no frames sent to any server, consistent with privacy claims in the UI.

### page:video-maker

web2/video-maker is a 100% in-browser product-video maker: it composes product images into a slideshow (Ken Burns motion + crossfade transitions + on-canvas text via Web2VideoRender), generates Vietnamese narration on-device (MMS-TTS-vie / Piper via transformers.js ONNX/WASM in video-tts.js, or cloned voice via a VieNeu FastAPI server running on a shop machine discovered through an in-memory registry), mixes narration + background music (Web2VideoAudio), and records the canvas to MP4/WebM via captureStream + MediaRecorder. AI script generation calls the Web2-only Gemini route /api/web2/ai-script. It is a pure client tool with no per-page DB writes; its only backend touchpoints are the AI-script route and the VieNeu registry. Role: media/marketing utility in the "Đa dụng Web 2.0" menu.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** CSS: ../shared/web2-sidebar.css?v=20260613z, ../shared/web2-theme.css?v=20260613z, ./video-maker.css?v=20260619e; Script (defer, CDN): https://unpkg.com/lucide@0.294.0/dist/umd/lucide.min.js — third-party, no SRI; Scripts in order: ../../shared/js/notification-system.js, ../shared/web2-auth.js (sets window.API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG + Web2Auth), ../shared/web2-sidebar.js, ../shared/web2-products-cache.js, ../shared/web2-vieneu.js, ../shared/web2-pos-installer.js, then page modules js/video-tts.js, video-anim.js, video-render.js, video-scene-editor.js, video-audio.js, video-ai-script.js, video-vieneu.js, video-maker.js; DOMContentLoaded: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside',{activeRoute:'video-maker'}); VideoMakerPage.init(); lucide.createIcons(); VideoMakerPage.init() (video-maker.js:828): grabs #vmCanvas 2d ctx; renderPickers/renderVoices/renderScenes; wireSceneList; wireAudioUi (fills bulk selects, wires music/split/volume inputs); Web2VideoVieneuUI.init (refreshServers + setInterval 20s + auto-connect if saved URL); applyCanvasSize; binds click/keydown handlers; fires Web2ProductsCache.init() (fire-and-forget); window.resize -> fitPreview; Web2ProductsCache.init(): loads product list from IDB persist then revalidates via web2 HTTP; tries \_setupRealtime() but web2-sse-bridge.js is NOT loaded so logs warning and realtime is disabled; NOT loaded though referenced with fallback: web2-escape.js (Web2Escape), web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE), web2-optimistic.js

Falls back to template on any error.                    |

**Liên kết:** ../shared/web2-sidebar.js (Web2Sidebar.mount, nav shell), ../shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders, API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG base URL), ../shared/web2-products-cache.js (Web2ProductsCache.init/getAll, topic web2:products), ../shared/web2-vieneu.js (Web2Vieneu client -> VieNeu server + registry), ../shared/web2-pos-installer.js (Web2PosInstaller .bat download), ../../shared/js/notification-system.js (notificationManager), Render route /api/web2/ai-script/generate (web2-ai-script.js -> Gemini), Render route /api/web2-vieneu-registry/{list,register,unregister}, External: VieNeu FastAPI server on shop machine (URL from registry/localStorage web2_vieneu_url): /health /voices /synthesize /clone, Worker chatomni-proxy forwards /api/web2/_ and /api/web2-_ to web2-api, CDN: transformers@3.3.3, vits-web@1.0.3 (TTS), lucide@0.294.0, product image hosts (loadImageCors)

**SSE:** Subscribes web2:products INDIRECTLY via Web2ProductsCache.\_setupRealtime, but web2-sse-bridge.js is NOT loaded in index.html -> Web2SSE undefined -> realtime disabled, logs warning '[Web2ProductsCache] Web2SSE bridge not loaded — realtime updates disabled. Manual refresh required.' Product cache is stale (IDB persist + single revalidate fetch) until reload.; This page publishes no SSE topics and performs no debounced reload.; No EventSource opened directly by the page; no SSE cleanup needed.

**console.log:** 8 — video-maker.js:12 console.log('[video]', m) — notify fallback, no PII; video-vieneu.js:16 console.log('[vieneu]', m) — notify fallback, no PII; video-maker.js:226/375/501/603/678 console.error('[video-maker] ...:', e) — error objects only, no customer data; video-ai-script.js:70 console.warn AI fallback — logs e.message only (topic/products not logged), low risk; No tokens/PII leaked; the warnings are benign but the products-cache 'bridge not loaded' warning fires on every load and is avoidable noise (load web2-sse-bridge.js or drop the cache realtime dependency)

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟡 `bug` [hidden] attribute does NOT hide elements styled with display:flex/inline-flex — the documented project regression. Buttons #vmStop, #vmMusicClear, #vmPlayVoice, #vmVnCloneClear use class .vm-btn (display:inline-flex), container #vmVnCloneRow uses .vm-row (display:flex), and #vmSplitActions uses .vm — `web2/video-maker/video-maker.css:296 (.vm-btn), :326 (.vm-row), :510 (.vm-split-` → Add to video-maker.css: .vm-btn[hidden],.vm-row[hidden],.vm-split-actions[hidden]{display:none!important} (or one global [hidden]{display:none!important} in shared web2-theme.css).
- 🟡 `memory-leak` setInterval(refreshServers, 20000) in Web2VideoVieneuUI.init is never cleared and runs a fetch to the registry /list every 20s for the life of the page. Mitigated only because sidebar nav is full-page <a href> reload; but if init() is ever called twice (re-mount) intervals stack, and the page keeps — `web2/video-maker/js/video-vieneu.js:106` → Store the interval id and clear on pagehide/visibilitychange; gate polling on the <details> open state; guard init() against double-invocation.
- 🟡 `race` Concurrent SSE-event + optimistic-update race is N/A here, but a real recorder-lifecycle race exists: exportVideo's rAF loop resolves only on t>=total and there is no abort if the user navigates or the AudioContext stays suspended. More concretely, audio is started (graph.start at video-maker.js:351 — `web2/video-maker/js/video-maker.js:344-351` → Capture start = performance.now() immediately before BOTH rec.start and graph.start (start them back-to-back), or prime a short silent lead-in; consider requestData()/timeslice tuning.
- ⚪ `race` TTS double-trigger: genNarration (#vmGenVoice) and playSample (#vmGenVoice voice sample) can be invoked concurrently. ONNX-corruption is correctly prevented by the global \_serialize lock in video-tts.js, but the UI guards are inconsistent — playSample uses state.\_sampling, genNarration only disables — `web2/video-maker/js/video-maker.js:205,474; video-tts.js:49-57` → Introduce a single 'ttsBusy' flag disabling both #vmGenVoice and voice-sample buttons while any synth is in flight; surface a single status target.
- ⚪ `bug` Unstable scene ordering when two products share the same name. randomGenerate sorts by pick.findIndex(p=>p.name===a.\_name) (and topicGenerate dedupes by name elsewhere) — identical names collapse to the same index, so duplicates can reorder/lose intended order. Wrong dedupe/sort key (name instead of — `web2/video-maker/js/video-maker.js:566-570` → Tag each picked product with a stable index at pick time and sort by that, not by name.
- ⚪ `bug` Music/narration volume slider changes after a graph is already started have no effect on the current preview/record because GainNode.gain.value is read once at buildMixGraph time and not re-applied to a live graph. During an active 'Xem trước' or while a record loop is running, dragging #vmMusicVol/ — `web2/video-maker/js/video-maker.js:756-765; video-audio.js:113-118` → Keep references to the gain nodes and update gain.value on slider input, or document that volumes are locked once playback/record starts.
- ⚪ `perf` Four separate AudioContext instances are created (video-maker \_audioCtx fallback, video-audio \_ac, video-tts \_dctx, web2-vieneu \_ac). Browsers cap concurrent AudioContexts (~6); the TTS decode context (\_dctx) and vieneu decode context are never closed. Wasteful and risks 'Failed to construct AudioCo — `web2/video-maker/js/video-tts.js:116-120; web2/shared/web2-vieneu.js:63-67` → Reuse Web2VideoAudio.ac() for all decode paths (or close decode contexts after use).
- ⚪ `bug` products-cache realtime silently disabled: index.html omits web2-sse-bridge.js, so Web2ProductsCache.\_setupRealtime cannot subscribe to web2:products. 'Tạo ngẫu nhiên' / 'Tạo bằng AI' can build videos from a stale product list if items changed in another tab/machine, and a warning logs on every load — `web2/video-maker/index.html (missing web2-sse-bridge.js); web2/shared/web2-produ` → Either load ../shared/web2-sse-bridge.js before web2-products-cache.js, or call Web2ProductsCache.refresh() when the random/AI buttons are clicked.
- ℹ️ `bug` loadImageCors retries without crossOrigin on error (video-maker.js:686). The fallback (non-CORS) image will TAINT the canvas, so captureStream/MediaRecorder will throw a SecurityError at export time for product images served without proper CORS headers — failure surfaces only at 'Xuất video', not wh — `web2/video-maker/js/video-maker.js:686-699` → Detect tainted scenes early (try ctx.getImageData after draw) and warn the user, or proxy product images through a CORS-enabled worker endpoint.

**Security (audit):**

- 🟠 AI-script endpoint has NO auth gating. /api/web2/ai-script/generate (web2-ai-script.js:61) never applies requireWeb2AuthSoft, unlike sibling web2 routes (e.g. web2-quick-replies.js:124). With WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1 the frontend sends x-web2-token but the server ignores it, so any unauthenticated caller — `render.com/routes/web2-ai-script.js:61` → Add const {requireWeb2AuthSoft}=require('../middleware/web2-auth'); and router.post('/generate', requireWeb2AuthSoft, ...). Also add a per-IP/token rate limit on Gemini calls.
- 🟡 VieNeu registry is an open write endpoint when VIENEU_REGISTRY_SECRET is unset (defaults to '' = no auth, web2-vieneu-registry.js:21). A stranger can POST /register an arbitrary https URL that then appears in the shop's 'máy online' list; the frontend auto-fetches that URL (health/voices) and, if a — `render.com/routes/web2-vieneu-registry.js:21-29; web2/video-maker/js/video-viene` → Require VIENEU_REGISTRY_SECRET in production (reject register/list when unset), and constrain registered URLs to an allowlist domain (e.g. \*.trycloudflare.com) or require the secret on /list too.
- ⚪ Third-party CDN scripts loaded without SRI: lucide (unpkg) and dynamic imports of transformers@3.3.3 / vits-web@1.0.3 (jsdelivr). A CDN compromise could inject code that runs on a page that can access the user's mic and Web2Auth token. — `web2/video-maker/index.html:17; js/video-tts.js:23-24` → Pin with SRI hashes where possible or self-host the lucide UMD; document the supply-chain risk for the dynamic ESM imports.
- ⚪ VieNeu secret stored in localStorage plaintext (web2_vieneu_secret) and sent as x-vieneu-secret header; readable by any XSS on the origin. — `web2/shared/web2-vieneu.js:19,38-49` → Acceptable for a LAN tunnel secret but note at-rest exposure; prefer session-scoped storage.
- ℹ️ No XSS found: scene src/title/subtitle and product name/price are escaped via esc() (local fallback escapes & < > " '), and image src uses crossOrigin without innerHTML attribute breakout. Registry server name is rendered with raw concatenation in renderServers (video-vieneu.js:73) — s.name is serve — `web2/video-maker/js/video-vieneu.js:73` → Escape s.name/s.note before innerHTML insertion (use Web2Escape) to harden against the open-registry vector.

**Ghi chú:** No TPOS coupling and no Web1 pool/table/SSE coupling found — the page is correctly Web2-scoped (web2 routes, web2:products topic, web2Db-backed cache).; No timezone code beyond Date.now() for filenames; GMT+7 concerns are N/A here.; TTS engine correctly serializes ONNX inference via a global promise lock (video-tts.js:49) to avoid 'Gather idx out of bounds' — good defensive design worth preserving.; The VieNeu registry is in-memory single-instance (web2-api); it works only because machines re-register every ~30s. If web2-api scales beyond 1 instance the list becomes per-instance inconsistent.; Export mime fallback is safe: pickMime() '' -> outMime 'video/webm'.; Recommend a quick win bundle: (1) gate ai-script with requireWeb2AuthSoft + rate limit, (2) add [hidden] display override, (3) clear the 20s interval, (4) load web2-sse-bridge.js or refresh cache on demand.

### page:zalo

The Zalo page (web2/zalo/) is the single source-of-truth surface for all Zalo integration in Web 2.0. It is a 4-tab SPA (Tài khoản / Hội thoại / Tra cứu / ZNS) split into small modules under window.WZApp: utils (base/state/a11y/modal), accounts (load/render accounts, QR login, 1-click cookie login via extension, OA connect, set-primary, delete), chat (conversation list + delegates the message thread to the shared WZChat engine), and lookup-zns (Zalo user lookup + ZNS template send + log). All backend access goes through window.ZaloApi (shared web2-zalo-api.js) hitting /api/web2-zalo on web2Db with a CF-worker→Render dual-base fallback. Realtime is via Web2SSE topics web2:zalo:accounts and web2:zalo:messages. Two login paths exist: extension cookie login (primary, expectedUid guard enforced server-side) and QR polling (fallback). is_primary selects the personal account used to message customers 1-1 across all pages.

**Tải khi vào trang / boot:** CSS: Google Fonts Inter (preconnect+stylesheet), ../shared/web2-sidebar.css, web2-components.css, web2-theme.css, css/web2-zalo.css, shared/zalo-chat/{chat-bubbles,chat-composer,chat-lightbox}.css (index.html:11-24); JS head: unpkg lucide@0.294.0 (defer, 3rd-party CDN no SRI, index.html:26), ../../shared/js/notification-system.js (index.html:28); JS body shared: web2-auth.js (sets API_CONFIG/WEB2_CONFIG + x-web2-token source), web2-user-info.js, web2-optimistic.js, web2-sidebar.js?v=20260620a, web2-sse-bridge.js, web2-extension-bridge.js (index.html:376-382); JS page deps: web2-zalo-api.js (ZaloApi), full zalo-chat engine set chat-store/lightbox/emoji-picker/sticker-picker/reactions/bubbles/composer/realtime/chat-actions/chat-view (WZChat.\*) loaded BEFORE app (index.html:385-396); JS page modules in order: web2-zalo-utils → -accounts → -chat → -lookup-zns → -app (index.html:398-402); Inline boot: Web2Sidebar.mount('#web2Aside') + lucide.createIcons() (index.html:404-408); init() (app.js:159): bind() wires all listeners; WZApp.loadAccounts() fetches GET /status immediately; subscribeSse() subscribes web2:zalo:accounts + web2:zalo:messages; reads ?focus=<phone> URL param to deep-link into chat tab; loadAccounts() (accounts.js:30) on enter: ZaloApi.status() → render account cards + status strip + autoRenewZalo() (1-shot silent cookie re-login of stale connected accounts if extension present)

| Control                                                                                    | Handler                                                                 | Sau đó                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Tab buttons (Tài khoản/Hội thoại/Tra cứu/ZNS) click + ArrowLeft/Right/Home/End/Enter/Space | switchTab / focusTab (app.js:19, 44-69)                                 | Roving-tabindex ARIA tablist; arrows only move focus, Enter/Space/click activates. On activate sets state.tab, toggles panel hidden, and lazily loads: accounts→loadAccounts(); chat→loadConversations(); lookup→fillAccountSelect; zns→loadTemplates()+loadZnsLog().                                                                |
| Account card action buttons (data-act delegated)                                           | gridActivate → onAccAction(act,key,btn) (app.js:73-79, accounts.js:158) | qr→startQr; zalologin→loginZaloCookie; reconnect→ZaloApi.reconnect+toast+reload in 1.5s; disconnect→ZaloApi.disconnect+reload; delete→Popup.danger confirm then ZaloApi.deleteAccount+reload; sync→ZaloApi.syncTemplates(OA); primary→ZaloApi.setPrimary+reload; chat→set state.conv.accountKey + switchTab('chat'). Errors toasted. |
| 'Đăng nhập Zalo' 1-click button                                                            | loginZaloCookie(key,silent) (accounts.js:208)                           | Checks Web2Ext.hasExtension; ext.request('GET_ZALO_CREDS',15s); on success POST /accounts/:key/login-cookie {cookie,imei,userAgent}; server enforces expectedUid (WRONG_ACCOUNT→400). Reloads accounts after 1.5s. On no_session/no_imei offers Popup to open chat.zalo.me.                                                          |
| QR button → modal + polling                                                                | startQr(key) / pollQr(key) (accounts.js:259, 275)                       | openQrModal; ZaloApi.loginQr; if alreadyConnected close+reload; else setInterval(1500ms) ZaloApi.qr(key) updating image+status; stops on connected (close+reload), qr_expired, declined, or 4 consecutive network errors. Guarded by state.qr.key!==key.                                                                             |
| Add personal modal Save (#wzAddSave) / Enter in label                                      | saveAddPersonal (accounts.js:332)                                       | ZaloApi.createAccount(label) → hideModal → await loadAccounts → auto startQr(new key). IME-guarded Enter (keyCode 229).                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| OA connect modal Save (#wzOaSave)                                                          | saveOa (accounts.js:355)                                                | Validates appId/secret/code required; ZaloApi.oaConnect(body incl Secret Key) → close + toast + reload. Secret field is type=password but value sent in plaintext POST body.                                                                                                                                                         |
| Chat account select change (#wzChatAccount)                                                | inline change (app.js:108)                                              | state.conv.accountKey=value → loadConversations().                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Conversation list item click / Enter / Space                                               | openConversation(Number(id)) (app.js:112-122, chat.js:155)              | Destroys prior \_view, re-renders list highlight, finds conv by String(id) match, mounts WZChat.mountConversation into #wzChatMain (handles messages/composer/realtime thread subscribe).                                                                                                                                            |
| Conversation search input (#wzConvSearch, rebound each render)                             | bindConvHead input debounce 300ms (chat.js:138-149)                     | sets state.conv.search + loadConversations(). Listener re-added on every renderConvList (see bug: stacking).                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Sync conversations button (#wzConvSync)                                                    | syncConversations(false) (chat.js:65)                                   | ZaloApi.syncConversations(key) → toast synced/users/groups → loadConversations. Also auto-triggered once per key when list empty + connected (maybeAutoSync).                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Lookup button (#wzLookupBtn) / Enter / 'Thông tin của tôi'                                 | doLookup / showSelf (lookup-zns.js:16, 45)                              | ZaloApi.lookup({accountKey,phone}) or ZaloApi.self → render profile card (name/UID/phone/gender/dob). No client-side phone validation.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| ZNS Send (#wzZnsSend)                                                                      | sendZns (lookup-zns.js:88)                                              | Validates phone+templateId present, JSON.parse(template_data); ZaloApi.sendZns({phone,templateId,data,sentBy:Web2UserInfo.userName}) → toast + clear phone + reload log. No phone format validation; LIVE customer notification send.                                                                                                |
| ZNS reload log (#wzZnsReloadLog)                                                           | loadZnsLog (lookup-zns.js:122)                                          | ZaloApi.znsLog({limit:50}) → render table (time GMT+7, phone, template, status).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Modal close/backdrop/Escape                                                                | hideModal/closeQrModal/closeOaModal + global Escape (app.js:88-141)     | Hides modal, removes focus-trap listener, restores \_lastFocus. closeQrModal also clearInterval(qr.timer)+nulls qr.key.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| SSE web2:zalo:accounts                                                                     | subscribeSse callback (app.js:146)                                      | If on accounts tab → loadAccounts() (no debounce).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| SSE web2:zalo:messages                                                                     | subscribeSse callback debounced 600ms (app.js:152)                      | If on chat tab → loadConversations() (list only; open-thread messages handled by WZChat thread topic).                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

**Liên kết:** window.ZaloApi → web2/shared/web2-zalo-api.js → /api/web2-zalo/_ on web2-api (CF worker chatomni-proxy → Render web2-api-kv04 fallback), WZChat._ shared chat engine: web2/shared/zalo-chat/{chat-store,bubbles,composer,realtime,chat-actions,chat-view,lightbox,emoji-picker,sticker-picker,reactions}.js, web2/shared/web2-sse-bridge.js (Web2SSE), web2/shared/web2-extension-bridge.js (Web2Ext) → n2store-extension content script (GET_ZALO_CREDS), web2/shared/web2-auth.js (Web2Auth.authHeaders / x-web2-token), web2-user-info.js (sentBy), web2-optimistic.js (loaded, unused here), web2-sidebar.js, popup.js (Popup.danger/confirm/warning), Backend: render.com/routes/web2-zalo.js + render.com/services/web2-zalo-zca.js (zca-js), Inbound deep-link contract: web2/shared/web2-zalo.js:119 builds ?focus=<phone> to this page; consumed by web2/jt-tracking and web2/shared/web2-customer-chat.js via Web2Zalo.mountChat

**SSE:** SUBSCRIBE web2:zalo:accounts (app.js:146) — callback reloads accounts on accounts tab, NO debounce, NO unsubscribe (lives for page lifetime; never torn down — acceptable for full-page nav, but accumulates if page logic ever re-inits); SUBSCRIBE web2:zalo:messages (app.js:152) — debounce 600ms via module-local \_listT, reloads conversation list only when on chat tab; never unsubscribed; Thread topic web2:zalo:thread:<id> subscribed/cleaned inside shared WZChat.mountConversation (openConversation destroys prior \_view before mounting new — relies on WZChat.destroy() to unsubscribe; not verified in this unit); Backend publishes matching topics: web2:zalo:accounts (create/update/deleted/reset/tracked-changed), web2:zalo:messages (create/update/reset), web2:zalo:thread:<id> (message/reaction/recall/seen/typing) — render.com/routes/web2-zalo.js; Note: SSE accounts callback runs loadAccounts() with no debounce; a burst of account status updates (e.g. multiple connections) can fire rapid GET /status refetches

**console.log:** 0

**Bugs (audit):**

- 🟠 `logic` ?focus=<phone> deep-link does NOT filter the conversation list. In init(), switchTab('chat') is called BEFORE state.conv.search = focus. switchTab('chat') synchronously invokes loadConversations(), which builds the ZaloApi.conversations({search: state.conv.search}) request object while search is sti — `web2/zalo/js/web2-zalo-app.js:164-168` → Set state.conv.search = focus BEFORE switchTab('chat'): `if (focus){ state.conv.search = focus; switchTab('chat'); }`. Optionally also set the #wzConvSearch input value so the user sees the active fil
- 🟡 `memory-leak` Conversation search input listener stacks. bindConvHead() is called on EVERY renderConvList() (which runs on each loadConversations, each SSE messages tick, each openConversation highlight re-render). Each call does $('#wzConvSearch').addEventListener('input', ...) on a freshly innerHTML-recreated i — `web2/zalo/js/web2-zalo-chat.js:90-151` → renderConvList always rewrites box.innerHTML (head included) so the old node is usually discarded — but to be safe, guard bindConvHead with a dataset flag (e.g. if(inp.dataset.bound) return; inp.datas
- 🟡 `race` Dual-base fallback can double-execute non-idempotent POSTs. \_fetch retries DIRECT when BASE returns a connection error OR HTTP >=500. createAccount generates a fresh crypto.randomUUID() key per server request (backend:509), so if the worker commits the INSERT then the response is lost (network blip — `web2/shared/web2-zalo-api.js:36-57; render.com/routes/web2-zalo.js:505-517` → Only fall back to DIRECT for transport errors (the catch branch), NOT for HTTP>=500 on non-idempotent methods; or pass a client idempotency key (e.g. clientReqId) that the server upserts on. At minimu
- ⚪ `race` QR polling vs modal-close / autoRenew overlap. pollQr uses a single shared state.qr.timer + state.qr.key guard. If autoRenewZalo() (background cookie login) or an SSE-driven loadAccounts() flips an account to connected while a QR poll for a DIFFERENT account is running, no conflict (guard handles ke — `web2/zalo/js/web2-zalo-accounts.js:275-325` → At the top of the setInterval callback after await, re-check state.qr.key===key before touching DOM/loadAccounts (the pre-await check exists but state can change during the await).
- ⚪ `logic` setPrimary backend UPDATE has no account_type filter: `UPDATE web2_zalo_accounts SET is_primary=(account_key=$1)` writes is_primary=false to OA rows too on every primary set, and theoretically could set an OA key primary if called directly (the page guards personal-only, and the route also guards, s — `render.com/routes/web2-zalo.js:619-639` → Add `WHERE account_type='personal'` to the UPDATE so OA rows are never touched and is_primary semantics stay personal-scoped.
- ⚪ `race` autoRenewZalo() fires silent cookie re-logins for ALL stale personal accounts sequentially on every loadAccounts() that resolves first time per page load (\_autoRenewTried 1-shot). It awaits each loginZaloCookie which on success schedules setTimeout(loadAccounts,1500); multiple stale accounts → multi — `web2/zalo/js/web2-zalo-accounts.js:39, 242-256, 235` → In the silent (autoRenew) path skip the setTimeout(loadAccounts) reload; let the single web2:zalo:accounts SSE event refresh once, or coalesce reloads with a debounce.
- ⚪ `logic` loadConversations does not pin/validate accountKey for the ?focus path. After the focus fix, a search with empty accountKey returns conversations across accounts; openConversation then mounts a thread whose account_key may differ from any selected primary, so a reply could go from an unintended acco — `web2/zalo/js/web2-zalo-chat.js:36-52` → When deep-linking by phone, resolve and set state.conv.accountKey to the primary connected account before loading, so the mounted thread sends from the expected account.

**Security (audit):**

- ⚪ Zalo OA Secret Key entered in modal (#wzOaSecret, type=password) is sent in plaintext JSON POST body to /api/web2-zalo/oa/connect. It is not logged client-side, but is a long-lived credential transiting the dual-base proxy. Acceptable over HTTPS but the value also lives in the DOM input until modal — `web2/zalo/js/web2-zalo-accounts.js:355-380; index.html:344-351` → Clear OA secret/code/appId inputs after saveOa success and on closeOaModal; confirm the API never echoes the secret back in account payloads.
- ⚪ 1-click cookie login transmits the full chat.zalo.me session (cookie + imei + userAgent) from the extension through the page to /accounts/:key/login-cookie. These are bearer-equivalent Zalo session credentials. They are not console-logged here (good) and the server-side expectedUid guard prevents id — `web2/zalo/js/web2-zalo-accounts.js:217-233; web2/shared/web2-extension-bridge.js` → Extension bridge posts with targetOrigin '\*' — scope postMessage to the page origin and validate event.origin in the content script to reduce session-credential exposure to other frames.
- ℹ️ All ZaloApi writes correctly attach x-web2-token via \_authHeaders() (web2-zalo-api.js:16-26), so WEB2_AUTH_ENFORCE=1 writes (createAccount, setPrimary, delete, login-cookie, sendZns, oaConnect, etc.) are authenticated. No write omits the header. — `web2/shared/web2-zalo-api.js:16-58` → No action — note token is read from localStorage web2_auth (plaintext at-rest, a known Web 2.0 architecture item, not unique to this page).
- ℹ️ XSS surface reviewed: every dynamic value rendered via innerHTML across accounts/chat/lookup/zns goes through esc() (account names, conv names/previews, lookup profile fields, ZNS log phone/template/status/error, QR scanned name, error messages). Avatar onerror handler reads esc()-escaped data-init — `web2/zalo/js/web2-zalo-utils.js:16-42; all *.js innerHTML sites` → No action.
- ℹ️ No client-side phone validation before ZNS send or lookup (no /^0\d{9}$/ check), unlike the project rule for SĐT. Server presumably validates, but malformed phone reaches the live ZNS send endpoint. — `web2/zalo/js/web2-zalo-lookup-zns.js:89-97; :18-21` → Add a /^0\d{9}$/ guard before sendZns/doLookup to fail fast and avoid spending ~200đ on bad ZNS sends.

**Ghi chú:** Page is well-modularized (5 files, all <400 lines) and follows Web 2.0 conventions: web2Db-only via /api/web2-zalo, GMT+7 via Intl timeZone Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh (utils.js:97-110), no TPOS coupling, no Web 1.0 table/pool/SSE access, no bare snake_case SSE topics.; Zero console.\* in page JS (clean). Extension bridge does console.log a ready message (no PII).; Modal a11y is solid: focus trap, roving tabindex tablist, Escape handling, focus restore. IME-safe Enter (keyCode 229) on add-label.; expectedUid cookie-login guard is enforced server-side (web2-zalo.js:592) using stored zalo_uid; the page intentionally does not pass it — correct design, prevents login-nham-danh-tinh.; Realtime is SSE-only (no Firestore listeners, no setInterval polling except the QR-login modal which is a legitimate short-lived login poll, not background data polling) — compliant with the no-poller rule.; All write endpoints attach x-web2-token; no silent-401 write found in this unit.

---

_Sinh tự động từ journal workflow audit (56 unit, 121 lỗi xác nhận khử trùng). Rà soát tĩnh, không gọi mạng, không gửi gì tới FB/Pancake/Zalo. Verify dừng sớm do candidate trùng lặp nhiều — lỗi quan trọng (critical/high) đã phủ đủ._
